                    return
                end
                local targetPlayer = getTargetPlayer(Module.state.selectedPlayer)
                if not targetPlayer or not targetPlayer.Character then
                    showNotify("跟随失败", "目标玩家角色不存在", 3)
                    Module.state.isOrbiting = false
                    return
                end
                stopOrbit()
                startOrbit(targetPlayer)
            else
                stopOrbit()
            end
        end)

        FollowSection:Toggle("镜像跟随", "MirrorFollow", false, function(Value)
            Module.state.isMirroring = Value
            if Value then
                if not Module.state.selectedPlayer then
                    showNotify("选择玩家", "请先从下拉框选择玩家", 3)
                    Module.state.isMirroring = false
                    return
                end
                local targetPlayer = getTargetPlayer(Module.state.selectedPlayer)
                if not targetPlayer or not targetPlayer.Character then
                    showNotify("跟随失败", "目标玩家角色不存在", 3)
                    Module.state.isMirroring = false
                    return
                end
                stopMirror()
                startMirror(targetPlayer)
            else
                stopMirror()
            end
        end)

        FollowSection:Toggle("漂浮跟随", "FloatFollow", false, function(Value)
            Module.state.isFloating = Value
            if Value then
                if not Module.state.selectedPlayer then
                    showNotify("选择玩家", "请先从下拉框选择玩家", 3)
                    Module.state.isFloating = false
                    return
                end
                local targetPlayer = getTargetPlayer(Module.state.selectedPlayer)
                if not targetPlayer or not targetPlayer.Character then
                    showNotify("跟随失败", "目标玩家角色不存在", 3)
                    Module.state.isFloating = false
                    return
                end
                stopFloat()
                startFloat(targetPlayer)
            else
                stopFloat()
            end
        end)

        FollowSection:Toggle("影子跟随", "ShadowFollow", false, function(Value)
            Module.state.isShadowFollowing = Value
            if Value then
                if not Module.state.selectedPlayer then
                    showNotify("选择玩家", "请先从下拉框选择玩家", 3)
                    Module.state.isShadowFollowing = false
                    return
                end
                local targetPlayer = getTargetPlayer(Module.state.selectedPlayer)
                if not targetPlayer or not targetPlayer.Character then
                    showNotify("跟随失败", "目标玩家角色不存在", 3)
                    Module.state.isShadowFollowing = false
                    return
                end
                stopShadow()
                startShadow(targetPlayer)
            else
                stopShadow()
            end
        end)

        FollowSection:Toggle("反向跟随", "AntiFollow", false, function(Value)
            Module.state.isAntiFollowing = Value
            if Value then
                if not Module.state.selectedPlayer then
                    showNotify("选择玩家", "请先从下拉框选择玩家", 3)
                    Module.state.isAntiFollowing = false
                    return
                end
                local targetPlayer = getTargetPlayer(Module.state.selectedPlayer)
                if not targetPlayer or not targetPlayer.Character then
                    showNotify("跟随失败", "目标玩家角色不存在", 3)
                    Module.state.isAntiFollowing = false
                    return
                end
                stopAntiFollow()
                startAntiFollow(targetPlayer)
            else
                stopAntiFollow()
            end
        end)

        FollowSection:Toggle("旋转跟随", "SpinFollow", false, function(Value)
            Module.state.isSpinning = Value
            if Value then
                if not Module.state.selectedPlayer then
                    showNotify("选择玩家", "请先从下拉框选择玩家", 3)
                    Module.state.isSpinning = false
                    return
                end
                local targetPlayer = getTargetPlayer(Module.state.selectedPlayer)
                if not targetPlayer or not targetPlayer.Character then
                    showNotify("跟随失败", "目标玩家角色不存在", 3)
                    Module.state.isSpinning = false
                    return
                end
                stopSpin()
                startSpin(targetPlayer)
            else
                stopSpin()
            end
        end)

        FollowSection:Toggle("抖动跟随", "ShakeFollow", false, function(Value)
            Module.state.isShaking = Value
            if Value then
                if not Module.state.selectedPlayer then
                    showNotify("选择玩家", "请先从下拉框选择玩家", 3)
                    Module.state.isShaking = false
                    return
                end
                local targetPlayer = getTargetPlayer(Module.state.selectedPlayer)
                if not targetPlayer or not targetPlayer.Character then
                    showNotify("跟随失败", "目标玩家角色不存在", 3)
                    Module.state.isShaking = false
                    return
                end
                stopShake()
                startShake(targetPlayer)
            else
                stopShake()
            end
        end)

        FollowSection:Toggle("站在玩家头后", "FaceStand", false, function(Value)
            Module.state.isFaceStanding = Value
            if Value then
                if not Module.state.selectedPlayer then
                    showNotify("选择玩家", "请先从下拉框选择玩家", 3)
                    Module.state.isFaceStanding = false
                    return
                end
                local targetPlayer = getTargetPlayer(Module.state.selectedPlayer)
                if not targetPlayer or not targetPlayer.Character then
                    showNotify("跟随失败", "目标玩家角色不存在", 3)
                    Module.state.isFaceStanding = false
                    return
                end
                stopFaceStand()
                startFaceStand(targetPlayer)
            else
                stopFaceStand()
            end
        end)

        FollowSection:Toggle("坐在玩家前面", "BackSit", false, function(Value)
            Module.state.isBackSitting = Value
            if Value then
                if not Module.state.selectedPlayer then
                    showNotify("选择玩家", "请先从下拉框选择玩家", 3)
                    Module.state.isBackSitting = false
                    return
                end
                local targetPlayer = getTargetPlayer(Module.state.selectedPlayer)
                if not targetPlayer or not targetPlayer.Character then
                    showNotify("跟随失败", "目标玩家角色不存在", 3)
                    Module.state.isBackSitting = false
                    return
                end
                stopBackSit()
                startBackSit(targetPlayer)
            else
                stopBackSit()
            end
        end)

        FollowSection:Toggle("口交", "SuckFollow", false, function(Value)
            Module.state.isSucking = Value
            if Value then
                if not Module.state.selectedPlayer then
                    showNotify("选择玩家", "请先从下拉框选择玩家", 3)
                    Module.state.isSucking = false
                    return
                end
                local targetPlayer = getTargetPlayer(Module.state.selectedPlayer)
                if not targetPlayer or not targetPlayer.Character then
                    showNotify("跟随失败", "目标玩家角色不存在", 3)
                    Module.state.isSucking = false
                    return
                end
                stopSuckFollow()
                startSuckFollow(targetPlayer)
            else
                stopSuckFollow()
            end
        end)

        FollowSection:Toggle("被超", "SusFollow", false, function(Value)
            Module.state.isSusFollowing = Value
            if Value then
                if not Module.state.selectedPlayer then
                    showNotify("选择玩家", "请先从下拉框选择玩家", 3)
                    Module.state.isSusFollowing = false
                    return
                end
                local targetPlayer = getTargetPlayer(Module.state.selectedPlayer)
                if not targetPlayer or not targetPlayer.Character then
                    showNotify("跟随失败", "目标玩家角色不存在", 3)
                    Module.state.isSusFollowing = false
                    return
                end
                stopSusFollow()
                startSusFollow(targetPlayer)
            else
                stopSusFollow()
            end
        end)

        FollowSection:Toggle("超别人", "ModernFollow", false, function(Value)
            Module.state.isModernFollowing = Value
            if Value then
                if not Module.state.selectedPlayer then
                    showNotify("选择玩家", "请先从下拉框选择玩家", 3)
                    Module.state.isModernFollowing = false
                    return
                end
                local targetPlayer = getTargetPlayer(Module.state.selectedPlayer)
                if not targetPlayer or not targetPlayer.Character then
                    showNotify("跟随失败", "目标玩家角色不存在", 3)
                    Module.state.isModernFollowing = false
                    return
                end
                stopModernFollow()
                startModernFollow(targetPlayer)
            else
                stopModernFollow()
            end
        end)

        FollowSection:Toggle("给别人口", "EnhancedSuckFollow", false, function(Value)
            Module.state.isEnhancedSuckFollowing = Value
            if Value then
                if not Module.state.selectedPlayer then
                    showNotify("选择玩家", "请先从下拉框选择玩家", 3)
                    Module.state.isEnhancedSuckFollowing = false
                    return
                end
                local targetPlayer = getTargetPlayer(Module.state.selectedPlayer)
                if not targetPlayer or not targetPlayer.Character then
                    showNotify("跟随失败", "目标玩家角色不存在", 3)
                    Module.state.isEnhancedSuckFollowing = false
                    return
                end
                stopEnhancedSuckFollow()
                startEnhancedSuckFollow(targetPlayer)
            else
                stopEnhancedSuckFollow()
            end
        end)

        FollowSection:Button("停止所有跟随", function()
            stopOrbit()
            stopMirror()
            stopFloat()
            stopShadow()
            stopAntiFollow()
            stopSpin()
            stopShake()
            stopFaceStand()
            stopBackSit()
            stopAutoFollow()
            stopSuckFollow()
            stopSusFollow()
            stopModernFollow()
            stopEnhancedSuckFollow()
            showNotify("跟随停止", "已停止所有恶搞跟随", 3)
        end)

        game.Players.LocalPlayer.CharacterAdded:Connect(function()
            if Module.state.isLoopHeadSit and Module.state.selectedPlayer then
                task.wait(1)
                startHeadSit(Module.state.selectedPlayer)
            end
        end)

        local function onScriptDestroy()
            cleanAllResources()
        end
        if script and script.Parent then
            script.Parent.AncestryChanged:Connect(function(_, newParent)
                if not newParent then
                    onScriptDestroy()
                end
            end)
        end

        return {
            Cleanup = cleanAllResources,
            SelectPlayer = function(playerName)
                Module.state.selectedPlayer = playerName
            end
        }
    end
}

local PlayerTabAPI = PlayerTabModule.LoadPlayerTab(Window, Library)

local NPCHandler = {
    _data = {
        npcs = {},
        selectedNPC = nil,
        npcFollowEnabled = false,
        npcAttackEnabled = false,
        npcProtectEnabled = false,
        batchControl = {
            allNPCsFollow = false,
            allNPCsAttack = false,
            allNPCsProtect = false,
            controlLoops = {}
        }
    },
    _services = {
        Players = game:GetService("Players"),
        RunService = game:GetService("RunService")
    }
}

local _localPlayer = NPCHandler._services.Players.LocalPlayer

local NPCTab = Window:Tab("控制NPC", '80451686744860')
task.wait(0.1)
local SingleControl = NPCTab:section("单个控制", true)

local npcDropdown = SingleControl:Dropdown("选择NPC", "NPCSelect", {"暂无NPC"}, function(Value)
    NPCHandler._data.selectedNPC = Value
end)

function NPCHandler:refreshNPCList()
    local npcList = {"暂无NPC"}
    self._data.npcs = {}
    
    for _, obj in pairs(workspace:GetDescendants()) do
        if obj:IsA("Model") and obj:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid") then
            local isPlayer = self._services.Players:GetPlayerFromCharacter(obj)
            if not isPlayer and obj.Name ~= _localPlayer.Character.Name then
                table.insert(npcList, obj.Name)
                self._data.npcs[obj.Name] = obj
            end
        end
    end
    
    npcDropdown:SetOptions(npcList)
end

function NPCHandler:getAllNPCs()
    local npcs = {}
    for _, obj in pairs(workspace:GetDescendants()) do
        if obj:IsA("Model") and obj:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid") then
            local isPlayer = self._services.Players:GetPlayerFromCharacter(obj)
            if not isPlayer and obj.Name ~= _localPlayer.Character.Name then
                table.insert(npcs, obj)
            end
        end
    end
    return npcs
end

function NPCHandler:stopAllNPCControl()
    self._data.batchControl.allNPCsFollow = false
    self._data.batchControl.allNPCsAttack = false
    self._data.batchControl.allNPCsProtect = false
    
    for npcName, loop in pairs(self._data.batchControl.controlLoops) do
        if loop then
            loop:Disconnect()
        end
    end
    self._data.batchControl.controlLoops = {}
    
    local allNPCs = self:getAllNPCs()
    for _, npc in pairs(allNPCs) do
        if npc and npc.PrimaryPart then
            local bodyVelocity = npc.PrimaryPart:FindFirstChild("BodyVelocity")
            if bodyVelocity then
                bodyVelocity.Velocity = Vector3.new(0, 0, 0)
            end
        end
    end
end

spawn(function()
    while wait(2) do
        NPCHandler:refreshNPCList()
    end
end)

SingleControl:Button("传送到选定NPC", function()
    if NPCHandler._data.selectedNPC and NPCHandler._data.selectedNPC ~= "暂无NPC" and NPCHandler._data.npcs[NPCHandler._data.selectedNPC] then
        local npc = NPCHandler._data.npcs[NPCHandler._data.selectedNPC]
        local player = _localPlayer
        if player.Character and player.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
            player.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = npc.PrimaryPart.CFrame + Vector3.new(3, 0, 0)
        end
    end
end)

SingleControl:Button("传送NPC到玩家", function()
    if NPCHandler._data.selectedNPC and NPCHandler._data.selectedNPC ~= "暂无NPC" and NPCHandler._data.npcs[NPCHandler._data.selectedNPC] then
        local npc = NPCHandler._data.npcs[NPCHandler._data.selectedNPC]
        local playerPos = _localPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position
        npc:SetPrimaryPartCFrame(CFrame.new(playerPos + Vector3.new(3, 0, 0)))
    end
end)

SingleControl:Toggle("NPC跟随玩家", "NPCFollow", false, function(State)
    NPCHandler._data.npcFollowEnabled = State
    
    if State and NPCHandler._data.selectedNPC and NPCHandler._data.selectedNPC ~= "暂无NPC" then
        local npc = NPCHandler._data.npcs[NPCHandler._data.selectedNPC]
        if not npc then return end
        
        spawn(function()
            while NPCHandler._data.npcFollowEnabled and npc and npc.Parent do
                local playerPos = _localPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position
                local npcPos = npc.PrimaryPart.Position
                local distance = (playerPos - npcPos).Magnitude
                
                if distance > 5 then
                    local bodyVelocity = npc.PrimaryPart:FindFirstChild("BodyVelocity") or Instance.new("BodyVelocity")
                    bodyVelocity.Velocity = (playerPos - npcPos).Unit * 10
                    bodyVelocity.MaxForce = Vector3.new(4000, 0, 4000)
                    bodyVelocity.Parent = npc.PrimaryPart
                    
                    local bodyGyro = npc.PrimaryPart:FindFirstChild("BodyGyro") or Instance.new("BodyGyro")
                    bodyGyro.CFrame = CFrame.new(npcPos, playerPos)
                    bodyGyro.MaxTorque = Vector3.new(4000, 4000, 4000)
                    bodyGyro.Parent = npc.PrimaryPart
                else
                    local bodyVelocity = npc.PrimaryPart:FindFirstChild("BodyVelocity")
                    if bodyVelocity then
                        bodyVelocity.Velocity = Vector3.new(0, 0, 0)
                    end
                end
                wait(0.1)
            end
        end)
    end
end)

SingleControl:Toggle("NPC攻击模式", "NPCAttack", false, function(State)
    NPCHandler._data.npcAttackEnabled = State
    
    if State and NPCHandler._data.selectedNPC and NPCHandler._data.selectedNPC ~= "暂无NPC" then
        local npc = NPCHandler._data.npcs[NPCHandler._data.selectedNPC]
        if not npc then return end
        
        spawn(function()
            while NPCHandler._data.npcAttackEnabled and npc and npc.Parent do
                local closestPlayer = nil
                local closestDistance = math.huge
                
                for _, player in pairs(NPCHandler._services.Players:GetPlayers()) do
                    if player ~= _localPlayer and player.Character then
                        local distance = (npc.PrimaryPart.Position - player.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position).Magnitude
                        if distance < closestDistance then
                            closestDistance = distance
                            closestPlayer = player
                        end
                    end
                end
                
                if closestPlayer and closestDistance < 50 then
                    local targetPos = closestPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position
                    local npcPos = npc.PrimaryPart.Position
                    
                    local bodyVelocity = npc.PrimaryPart:FindFirstChild("BodyVelocity") or Instance.new("BodyVelocity")
                    bodyVelocity.Velocity = (targetPos - npcPos).Unit * 15
                    bodyVelocity.MaxForce = Vector3.new(4000, 0, 4000)
                    bodyVelocity.Parent = npc.PrimaryPart
                end
                wait(0.1)
            end
        end)
    end
end)

SingleControl:Toggle("NPC保护模式", "NPCProtect", false, function(State)
    NPCHandler._data.npcProtectEnabled = State
    
    if State and NPCHandler._data.selectedNPC and NPCHandler._data.selectedNPC ~= "暂无NPC" then
        local npc = NPCHandler._data.npcs[NPCHandler._data.selectedNPC]
        if not npc then return end
        
        spawn(function()
            while NPCHandler._data.npcProtectEnabled and npc and npc.Parent do
                local playerPos = _localPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position
                local npcPos = npc.PrimaryPart.Position
                
                local distanceToPlayer = (playerPos - npcPos).Magnitude
                if distanceToPlayer > 8 then
                    local bodyVelocity = npc.PrimaryPart:FindFirstChild("BodyVelocity") or Instance.new("BodyVelocity")
                    bodyVelocity.Velocity = (playerPos - npcPos).Unit * 8
                    bodyVelocity.MaxForce = Vector3.new(4000, 0, 4000)
                    bodyVelocity.Parent = npc.PrimaryPart
                else
                    local bodyVelocity = npc.PrimaryPart:FindFirstChild("BodyVelocity")
                    if bodyVelocity then
                        bodyVelocity.Velocity = Vector3.new(0, 0, 0)
                    end
                end
                wait(0.1)
            end
        end)
    end
end)

SingleControl:Button("让NPC跳舞", function()
    if NPCHandler._data.selectedNPC and NPCHandler._data.selectedNPC ~= "暂无NPC" and NPCHandler._data.npcs[NPCHandler._data.selectedNPC] then
        local npc = NPCHandler._data.npcs[NPCHandler._data.selectedNPC]
        local humanoid = npc:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
        
        if humanoid then
            local danceAnimation = Instance.new("Animation")
            danceAnimation.AnimationId = "rbxassetid://181525546"
            local danceTrack = humanoid:LoadAnimation(danceAnimation)
            danceTrack:Play()
        end
    end
end)

SingleControl:Button("让NPC跳跃", function()
    if NPCHandler._data.selectedNPC and NPCHandler._data.selectedNPC ~= "暂无NPC" and NPCHandler._data.npcs[NPCHandler._data.selectedNPC] then
        local npc = NPCHandler._data.npcs[NPCHandler._data.selectedNPC]
        local humanoid = npc:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
        if humanoid then
            humanoid.Jump = true
        end
    end
end)

SingleControl:Button("随机颜色", function()
    if NPCHandler._data.selectedNPC and NPCHandler._data.selectedNPC ~= "暂无NPC" and NPCHandler._data.npcs[NPCHandler._data.selectedNPC] then
        local npc = NPCHandler._data.npcs[NPCHandler._data.selectedNPC]
        for _, part in pairs(npc:GetChildren()) do
            if part:IsA("BasePart") then
                part.BrickColor = BrickColor.random()
            end
        end
    end
end)

SingleControl:Button("发光效果", function()
    if NPCHandler._data.selectedNPC and NPCHandler._data.selectedNPC ~= "暂无NPC" and NPCHandler._data.npcs[NPCHandler._data.selectedNPC] then
        local npc = NPCHandler._data.npcs[NPCHandler._data.selectedNPC]
        for _, part in pairs(npc:GetChildren()) do
            if part:IsA("BasePart") then
                local pointLight = Instance.new("PointLight")
                pointLight.Brightness = 1
                pointLight.Range = 10
                pointLight.Color = Color3.new(1, 1, 1)
                pointLight.Parent = part
            end
        end
    end
end)

SingleControl:Button("火焰效果", function()
    if NPCHandler._data.selectedNPC and NPCHandler._data.selectedNPC ~= "暂无NPC" and NPCHandler._data.npcs[NPCHandler._data.selectedNPC] then
        local npc = NPCHandler._data.npcs[NPCHandler._data.selectedNPC]
        local rootPart = npc.PrimaryPart
        if rootPart then
            local fire = Instance.new("Fire")
            fire.Size = 5
            fire.Heat = 10
            fire.Parent = rootPart
        end
    end
end)

SingleControl:Button("烟雾效果", function()
    if NPCHandler._data.selectedNPC and NPCHandler._data.selectedNPC ~= "暂无NPC" and NPCHandler._data.npcs[NPCHandler._data.selectedNPC] then
        local npc = NPCHandler._data.npcs[NPCHandler._data.selectedNPC]
        local rootPart = npc.PrimaryPart
        if rootPart then
            local smoke = Instance.new("Smoke")
            smoke.Size = 5
            smoke.Opacity = 0.3
            smoke.RiseVelocity = 5
            smoke.Parent = rootPart
        end
    end
end)

SingleControl:Button("删除选定NPC", function()
    if NPCHandler._data.selectedNPC and NPCHandler._data.selectedNPC ~= "暂无NPC" and NPCHandler._data.npcs[NPCHandler._data.selectedNPC] then
        local npc = NPCHandler._data.npcs[NPCHandler._data.selectedNPC]
        if npc and npc.Parent then
            npc:Destroy()
        end
        NPCHandler._data.npcs[NPCHandler._data.selectedNPC] = nil
        NPCHandler:refreshNPCList()
    end
end)

local AllControl = NPCTab:section("控制所有", true)

AllControl:Toggle("所有NPC跟随玩家", "AllNPCsFollow", false, function(State)
    NPCHandler:stopAllNPCControl()
    NPCHandler._data.batchControl.allNPCsFollow = State
    
    if State then
        local allNPCs = NPCHandler:getAllNPCs()
        
        for _, npc in pairs(allNPCs) do
            if npc and npc.PrimaryPart then
                local npcName = npc.Name
                
                local followLoop = NPCHandler._services.RunService.Heartbeat:Connect(function()
                    if not NPCHandler._data.batchControl.allNPCsFollow then return end
                    if not npc or not npc.Parent then 
                        if NPCHandler._data.batchControl.controlLoops[npcName] then
                            NPCHandler._data.batchControl.controlLoops[npcName]:Disconnect()
                        end
                        return 
                    end
                    
                    local playerPos = _localPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position
                    local npcPos = npc.PrimaryPart.Position
                    local distance = (playerPos - npcPos).Magnitude
                    
                    if distance > 8 then
                        local bodyVelocity = npc.PrimaryPart:FindFirstChild("BodyVelocity") or Instance.new("BodyVelocity")
                        bodyVelocity.Velocity = (playerPos - npcPos).Unit * 12
                        bodyVelocity.MaxForce = Vector3.new(4000, 0, 4000)
                        bodyVelocity.Parent = npc.PrimaryPart
                    else
                        local bodyVelocity = npc.PrimaryPart:FindFirstChild("BodyVelocity")
                        if bodyVelocity then
                            bodyVelocity.Velocity = Vector3.new(0, 0, 0)
                        end
                    end
                end)
                
                NPCHandler._data.batchControl.controlLoops[npcName] = followLoop
            end
        end
    end
end)

AllControl:Toggle("所有NPC攻击模式", "AllNPCsAttack", false, function(State)
    NPCHandler:stopAllNPCControl()
    NPCHandler._data.batchControl.allNPCsAttack = State
    
    if State then
        local allNPCs = NPCHandler:getAllNPCs()
        
        for _, npc in pairs(allNPCs) do
            if npc and npc.PrimaryPart then
                local npcName = npc.Name
                
                local attackLoop = NPCHandler._services.RunService.Heartbeat:Connect(function()
                    if not NPCHandler._data.batchControl.allNPCsAttack then return end
                    if not npc or not npc.Parent then 
                        if NPCHandler._data.batchControl.controlLoops[npcName] then
                            NPCHandler._data.batchControl.controlLoops[npcName]:Disconnect()
                        end
                        return 
                    end
                    
                    local closestPlayer = nil
                    local closestDistance = math.huge
                    
                    for _, player in pairs(NPCHandler._services.Players:GetPlayers()) do
                        if player ~= _localPlayer and player.Character then
                            local distance = (npc.PrimaryPart.Position - player.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position).Magnitude
                            if distance < closestDistance then
                                closestDistance = distance
                                closestPlayer = player
                            end
                        end
                    end
                    
                    if closestPlayer and closestDistance < 50 then
                        local targetPos = closestPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position
                        local npcPos = npc.PrimaryPart.Position
                        
                        local bodyVelocity = npc.PrimaryPart:FindFirstChild("BodyVelocity") or Instance.new("BodyVelocity")
                        bodyVelocity.Velocity = (targetPos - npcPos).Unit * 18
                        bodyVelocity.MaxForce = Vector3.new(4000, 0, 4000)
                        bodyVelocity.Parent = npc.PrimaryPart
                    end
                end)
                
                NPCHandler._data.batchControl.controlLoops[npcName] = attackLoop
            end
        end
    end
end)

AllControl:Toggle("所有NPC保护模式", "AllNPCsProtect", false, function(State)
    NPCHandler:stopAllNPCControl()
    NPCHandler._data.batchControl.allNPCsProtect = State
    
    if State then
        local allNPCs = NPCHandler:getAllNPCs()
        
        for _, npc in pairs(allNPCs) do
            if npc and npc.PrimaryPart then
                local npcName = npc.Name
                
                local protectLoop = NPCHandler._services.RunService.Heartbeat:Connect(function()
                    if not NPCHandler._data.batchControl.allNPCsProtect then return end
                    if not npc or not npc.Parent then 
                        if NPCHandler._data.batchControl.controlLoops[npcName] then
                            NPCHandler._data.batchControl.controlLoops[npcName]:Disconnect()
                        end
                        return 
                    end
                    
                    local playerPos = _localPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position
                    local npcPos = npc.PrimaryPart.Position
                    
                    local distanceToPlayer = (playerPos - npcPos).Magnitude
                    local idealDistance = 6
                    
                    if distanceToPlayer > idealDistance + 3 then
                        local bodyVelocity = npc.PrimaryPart:FindFirstChild("BodyVelocity") or Instance.new("BodyVelocity")
                        bodyVelocity.Velocity = (playerPos - npcPos).Unit * 10
                        bodyVelocity.MaxForce = Vector3.new(4000, 0, 4000)
                        bodyVelocity.Parent = npc.PrimaryPart
                    elseif distanceToPlayer < idealDistance - 3 then
                        local bodyVelocity = npc.PrimaryPart:FindFirstChild("BodyVelocity") or Instance.new("BodyVelocity")
                        bodyVelocity.Velocity = (npcPos - playerPos).Unit * 8
                        bodyVelocity.MaxForce = Vector3.new(4000, 0, 4000)
                        bodyVelocity.Parent = npc.PrimaryPart
                    else
                        local bodyVelocity = npc.PrimaryPart:FindFirstChild("BodyVelocity")
                        if bodyVelocity then
                            bodyVelocity.Velocity = Vector3.new(0, 0, 0)
                        end
                    end
                end)
                
                NPCHandler._data.batchControl.controlLoops[npcName] = protectLoop
            end
        end
    end
end)

AllControl:Button("所有NPC传送到玩家", function()
    local allNPCs = NPCHandler:getAllNPCs()
    local playerPos = _localPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position
    
    for i, npc in pairs(allNPCs) do
        if npc and npc.PrimaryPart then
            local angle = (i / #allNPCs) * math.pi * 2
            local radius = 8
            local offset = Vector3.new(
                math.cos(angle) * radius,
                0,
                math.sin(angle) * radius
            )
            npc:SetPrimaryPartCFrame(CFrame.new(playerPos + offset))
        end
    end
end)

AllControl:Button("所有NPC停止移动", function()
    NPCHandler:stopAllNPCControl()
end)

AllControl:Button("所有NPC开始跳舞", function()
    local allNPCs = NPCHandler:getAllNPCs()
    
    for _, npc in pairs(allNPCs) do
        local humanoid = npc:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
        if humanoid then
            local danceAnimation = Instance.new("Animation")
            danceAnimation.AnimationId = "rbxassetid://136720812089001"
            local danceTrack = humanoid:LoadAnimation(danceAnimation)
            danceTrack:Play()
        end
    end
end)

AllControl:Button("所有NPC随机颜色", function()
    local allNPCs = NPCHandler:getAllNPCs()
    
    for _, npc in pairs(allNPCs) do
        for _, part in pairs(npc:GetChildren()) do
            if part:IsA("BasePart") then
                part.BrickColor = BrickColor.random()
            end
        end
    end
end)

AllControl:Button("所有NPC添加发光", function()
    local allNPCs = NPCHandler:getAllNPCs()
    
    for _, npc in pairs(allNPCs) do
        for _, part in pairs(npc:GetChildren()) do
            if part:IsA("BasePart") then
                local pointLight = part:FindFirstChildOfClass("PointLight") or Instance.new("PointLight")
                pointLight.Brightness = 1
                pointLight.Range = 8
                pointLight.Color = Color3.new(math.random(), math.random(), math.random())
                pointLight.Parent = part
            end
        end
    end
end)

AllControl:Button("所有NPC清除效果", function()
    local allNPCs = NPCHandler:getAllNPCs()
    
    for _, npc in pairs(allNPCs) do
        for _, part in pairs(npc:GetChildren()) do
            if part:IsA("BasePart") then
                local light = part:FindFirstChildOfClass("PointLight")
                if light then light:Destroy() end
                
                local fire = part:FindFirstChildOfClass("Fire")
                if fire then fire:Destroy() end
                
                local smoke = part:FindFirstChildOfClass("Smoke")
                if smoke then smoke:Destroy() end
            end
        end
    end
end)

AllControl:Button("删除所有NPC", function()
    local allNPCs = NPCHandler:getAllNPCs()
    for _, npc in pairs(allNPCs) do
        if npc and npc.Parent then
            npc:Destroy()
        end
    end
    NPCHandler._data.npcs = {}
    NPCHandler:refreshNPCList()
end)

NPCHandler:refreshNPCList()

local NPCTab2 = Window:Tab("控制NPC V2", '80451686744860')
task.wait(0.1)
local SingleControlV2 = NPCTab2:section("功能", true)
do
    local clickNPC = false
    local currentNPC = nil
    local lockSelection = false
    local highlightNPC = Instance.new("Highlight")
    highlightNPC.Name = "NPCControlHighlight_" .. tostring(tick())
    highlightNPC.FillTransparency = 1
    highlightNPC.OutlineColor = Color3.fromRGB(0, 255, 0)
    highlightNPC.Parent = game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer.PlayerGui
    local clickNPCConnection

    local _localPlayer = game.Players.LocalPlayer
    local NPCHandler = {
        _services = {
            Players = game:GetService("Players")
        },
        _data = {
            selectedNPC = nil,
            npcs = {}
        }
    }

    local controlConnection = nil
    local followConnection = nil
    local killAuraConnection = nil
    local freezeAuraConnection = nil
    local punishAuraEnabled = false
    local punishAuraConnection = nil
    local punishAuraPositions = {}
    local networkVis = false
    local simRadius = 150

    if SingleControlV2 then
        SingleControlV2:Toggle("点击选择NPC", "ClickSelectNPC", false, function(Value)
            clickNPC = Value
            if Value then
                if clickNPCConnection then
                    clickNPCConnection:Disconnect()
                end
                
                clickNPCConnection = game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer:GetMouse().Button1Down:Connect(function()
                    if lockSelection then return end 
                    
                    local mouse = game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer:GetMouse()
                    local target = mouse.Target
                    
                    if target then
                        local model = target:FindFirstAncestorOfClass("Model")
                        if model and model:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid") then
                            local isPlayer = NPCHandler._services.Players:GetPlayerFromCharacter(model)
                            if not isPlayer and model.Name ~= _localPlayer.Character.Name then
                                currentNPC = model
                                highlightNPC.Adornee = currentNPC
                                
                                NPCHandler._data.selectedNPC = currentNPC.Name
                                NPCHandler._data.npcs[currentNPC.Name] = currentNPC
                            end
                        end
                    end
                end)
            else
                if clickNPCConnection then
                    clickNPCConnection:Disconnect()
                    clickNPCConnection = nil
                end
            end
        end)

        SingleControlV2:Toggle("锁定选择", "LockNPCSelection", false, function(Value)
            lockSelection = Value
        end)

        SingleControlV2:Button("杀死NPC", function()
            if currentNPC then
                local humanoid = currentNPC:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
                if humanoid then
                    humanoid.Health = 0
                end
            end
        end)

        SingleControlV2:Button("传送到NPC", function()
            if currentNPC and currentNPC.PrimaryPart then
                local player = _localPlayer
                if player.Character and player.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                    player.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = currentNPC.PrimaryPart.CFrame + Vector3.new(3, 0, 0)
                end
            end
        end)

        SingleControlV2:Button("传送NPC到玩家", function()
            if currentNPC then
                local playerPos = _localPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position
                if currentNPC.PrimaryPart then
                    currentNPC:SetPrimaryPartCFrame(CFrame.new(playerPos + Vector3.new(3, 0, 0)))
                else
                    currentNPC:PivotTo(CFrame.now(playerPos + Vector3.new(3, 0, 0)))
                end
            end
        end)

        SingleControlV2:Toggle("控制NPC", "ControlNPC", false, function(State)
            if State then
                if currentNPC and currentNPC.PrimaryPart then
                    local originalCharacter = _localPlayer.Character
                    
                    _localPlayer.Character = currentNPC
                    workspace.CurrentCamera.CameraSubject = currentNPC:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
                    
                    local move = 0.01
                    controlConnection = game:GetService("RunService").PreSimulation:Connect(function()
                        local humanoid = _localPlayer.Character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
                        if _localPlayer.Character and humanoid then
                            humanoid.RootPart.CFrame = humanoid.RootPart.CFrame + Vector3.new(0, move, 0)
                            move = -move
                        else
                            if controlConnection then
                                controlConnection:Disconnect()
                                controlConnection = nil
                            end
                        end
                    end)
                    
                    highlightNPC.OutlineColor = Color3.fromRGB(0, 255, 0)
                end
            else
                if originalCharacter then
                    _localPlayer.Character = originalCharacter
                    workspace.CurrentCamera.CameraSubject = originalCharacter:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
                    if controlConnection then
                        controlConnection:Disconnect()
                        controlConnection = nil
                    end
                end
            end
        end)

        SingleControlV2:Button("切换坐下状态", function()
            if currentNPC then
                local humanoid = currentNPC:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
                if humanoid then
                    humanoid.Sit = not humanoid.Sit
                end
            end
        end)

        SingleControlV2:Toggle("NPC跟随玩家", "NPCFollowPlayer", false, function(Value)
            if Value then
                if currentNPC and currentNPC.PrimaryPart then
                    followConnection = game:GetService("RunService").RenderStepped:Connect(function()
                        if currentNPC and currentNPC.PrimaryPart then
                            local humanoid = currentNPC:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
                            if humanoid then
                                local hrp = _localPlayer.Character and _localPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
                                if hrp then
                                    humanoid:MoveTo(hrp.Position + Vector3.new(-4, 0, 0))
                                end
                            end
                        else
                            if followConnection then
                                followConnection:Disconnect()
                                followConnection = nil
                            end
                        end
                    end)
                    
                    highlightNPC.OutlineColor = Color3.fromRGB(0, 255, 0)
                end
            else
                if followConnection then
                    followConnection:Disconnect()
                    followConnection = nil
                end
            end
        end)

        SingleControlV2:Toggle("查看NPC视角", "ViewNPCPerspective", false, function(Value)
            if Value then
                if currentNPC  then
                    workspace.CurrentCamera.CameraSubject = currentNPC
                    highlightNPC.OutlineColor = Color3.fromRGB(0, 255, 255)
                end
            else
                if _localPlayer.Character and _localPlayer.Character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid") then
                    workspace.CurrentCamera.CameraSubject = _localPlayer.Character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
                end
            end
        end)

        SingleControlV2:Toggle("冻结NPC", "FreezeNPC", false, function(Value)
            if currentNPC and currentNPC.PrimaryPart then
                currentNPC.PrimaryPart.Anchored = Value
                highlightNPC.OutlineColor = Value and Color3.fromRGB(135, 206, 235) or Color3.fromRGB(0, 255, 0)
            end
        end)

        SingleControlV2:Toggle("自动杀死NPC", "AutoKillNPC", false, function(Value)
            if Value then
                killAuraConnection = game:GetService("RunService").Stepped:Connect(function()
                    local hrp1 = _localPlayer.Character and _localPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
                    if not hrp1 then return end

                    local nearbyParts = workspace:GetPartBoundsInRadius(hrp1.Position, 13)
                    for _, part in pairs(nearbyParts) do
                        local model = part:FindFirstAncestorOfClass("Model")
                        if model and model:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid") then
                            local npc = model
                            local hrp = npc:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
                            if hrp and not hrp.Anchored and npc ~= _localPlayer.Character then
                                local humanoid = npc:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
                                if humanoid then
                                    humanoid.Health = 0
                                end
                            end
                        end
                    end
                end)
            else
                if killAuraConnection then
                    killAuraConnection:Disconnect()
                    killAuraConnection = nil
                end
            end
        end)

        SingleControlV2:Button("NPC跳跃", function()
            local hrp1 = _localPlayer.Character and _localPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
            if not hrp1 then return end

            local nearbyParts = workspace:GetPartBoundsInRadius(hrp1.Position, 13)
            for _, part in pairs(nearbyParts) do
                local model = part:FindFirstAncestorOfClass("Model")
                if model and model:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid") then
                    local npc = model
                    local hrp = npc:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
                    if hrp and not hrp.Anchored and npc ~= _localPlayer.Character then
                        local humanoid = npc:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
                        if humanoid then
                            humanoid:ChangeState(Enum.HumanoidStateType.Jumping)
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
        end)

        SingleControlV2:Toggle("NPC冻结", "FreezeAuraNPC", false, function(Value)
            if Value then
                freezeAuraConnection = game:GetService("RunService").Stepped:Connect(function()
                    local hrp1 = _localPlayer.Character and _localPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
                    if not hrp1 then return end

                    local nearbyParts = workspace:GetPartBoundsInRadius(hrp1.Position, 13)
                    for _, part in pairs(nearbyParts) do
                        local model = part:FindFirstAncestorOfClass("Model")
                        if model and model:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid") then
                            local npc = model
                            local hrp = npc:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
                            if hrp and npc ~= _localPlayer.Character then
                                hrp.Anchored = true
                            end
                        end
                    end
                end)
            else
                if freezeAuraConnection then
                    freezeAuraConnection:Disconnect()
                    freezeAuraConnection = nil
                    local hrp1 = _localPlayer.Character and _localPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
                    if hrp1 then
                        local nearbyParts = workspace:GetPartBoundsInRadius(hrp1.Position, 13)
                        for _, part in pairs(nearbyParts) do
                            local model = part:FindFirstAncestorOfClass("Model")
                            if model and model:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid") then
                                local npc = model
                                local hrp = npc:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
                                if hrp and npc ~= _localPlayer.Character then
                                    hrp.Anchored = false
                                end
                            end
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
        end)

        SingleControlV2:Toggle("NPC传送到太空", "PunishAuraNPC", false, function(Value)
            if Value then
                punishAuraEnabled = true
                punishAuraConnection = game:GetService("RunService").Stepped:Connect(function()
                    local hrp1 = _localPlayer.Character and _localPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
                    if not hrp1 then return end

                    local nearbyParts = workspace:GetPartBoundsInRadius(hrp1.Position, 13)
                    for _, part in pairs(nearbyParts) do
                        local model = part:FindFirstAncestorOfClass("Model")
                        if model and model:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid") then
                            local npc = model
                            local hrp = npc:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
                            if hrp and npc ~= _localPlayer.Character then
                                if not punishAuraPositions[npc] then
                                    punishAuraPositions[npc] = npc:GetPivot()
                                end
                                npc:PivotTo(CFrame.new(0, 1000, 0))
                            end
                        end
                    end
                end)
            else
                punishAuraEnabled = false
                if punishAuraConnection then
                    punishAuraConnection:Disconnect()
                    punishAuraConnection = nil
                    for npc, originalPosition in pairs(punishAuraPositions) do
                        if npc and npc.Parent then
                            npc:PivotTo(originalPosition)
                        end
                    end
                    punishAuraPositions = {}
                end
            end
        end)

        SingleControlV2:Toggle("显示网络安全效果", "ShowNetworkOwners", false, function(Value)
            networkVis = Value
            settings().Physics.AreOwnersShown = networkVis
        end)

        SingleControlV2:Slider("模拟半径", "SimulationRadius", 10, 500, 150, function(Value)
            simRadius = Value
            sethiddenproperty(_localPlayer, "SimulationRadius", Value)
            sethiddenproperty(_localPlayer, "MaxSimulationRadius", Value)
        end)
    else
        warn("SingleControlV2 未找到，NPC控制功能无法初始化")
    end

    game.Players.LocalPlayer.CharacterAdded:Connect(function(character)
        if highlightNPC then
            highlightNPC.Adornee = nil
        end
    end)

    game:GetService("Players").PlayerRemoving:Connect(function(player)
        if player == game.Players.LocalPlayer and highlightNPC then
            highlightNPC:Destroy()
        end
    end)
end

do
    local controlledObjects = {}
    local objectControlEnabled = false
    local flightEnabled = false
    local flightSpeed = 20
    local selectedObject = nil
    local objectList = {}
    local objectDropdown = nil
    local clickObject = false
    local lockSelection = false 
    local objectNameInput = "" 

    local function findObjectsByNameFunction(objectName)
        objectList = {}
        local function searchInInstance(instance)
            if string.lower(instance.Name) == string.lower(objectName) then
                table.insert(objectList, instance)
            end
            for _, child in ipairs(instance:GetChildren()) do
                searchInInstance(child)
            end
        end
        
        searchInInstance(workspace)
        return objectList
    end

    local flightConnection
    local function startFlightFunction()
        if flightConnection then
            flightConnection:Disconnect()
        end
        
        flightConnection = _G.CreateHeartbeatConnection(function()
            if flightEnabled and selectedObject then
                local rootPart = selectedObject:IsA("BasePart") and selectedObject or selectedObject:FindFirstChildWhichIsA("BasePart")
                if rootPart then
                    local mouse = game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer:GetMouse()
                    local mousePos = mouse.Hit.Position
                    local direction = (mousePos - rootPart.Position).Unit
                    rootPart.Velocity = direction * flightSpeed
                end
            end
        end)
    end

    local highlight = Instance.new("Highlight")
    highlight.Name = "ObjectControlHighlight_" .. tostring(tick())
    highlight.FillTransparency = 1
    highlight.OutlineColor = Color3.fromRGB(0, 255, 0)
    highlight.Parent = game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer.PlayerGui
    local clickConnection

    if Window then
        local object = Window:Tab("控制物体", '101768155599700')
task.wait(0.1)
        local object1 = object:section("基础功能", true)

        object1:Toggle("点击选择物体", "ClickSelectObject", false, function(Value)
            clickObject = Value
            if Value then
                if clickConnection then
                    clickConnection:Disconnect()
                end
                
                clickConnection = game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer:GetMouse().Button1Down:Connect(function()
                    if lockSelection then return end 
                    
                    local mouse = game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer:GetMouse()
                    local target = mouse.Target
                    
                    if target then
                        local model = target:FindFirstAncestorOfClass("Model")
                        selectedObject = model or target
                        
                        highlight.Adornee = selectedObject
                        
                        if objectDropdown then
                            local options = {selectedObject.Name}
                            objectDropdown:SetOptions(options)
                        end
                    end
                end)
            else
                if clickConnection then
                    clickConnection:Disconnect()
                    clickConnection = nil
                end
            end
        end)

        object1:Toggle("锁定选择", "LockSelection", false, function(Value)
            lockSelection = Value
        end)

        objectDropdown = object1:Dropdown("选择物体", "ObjectSelect", {"未选择物体"}, function(Value)
            if Value ~= "未选择物体" then
                local function findObjectByName(name)
                    local function search(instance)
                        if instance.Name == name then
                            return instance
                        end
                        for _, child in ipairs(instance:GetChildren()) do
                            local result = search(child)
                            if result then
                                return result
                            end
                        end
                        return nil
                    end
                    return search(workspace)
                end
                
                local obj = findObjectByName(Value)
                if obj then
                    selectedObject = obj
                    highlight.Adornee = obj
                end
            end
        end)

        object1:Toggle("启用物体控制", "EnableObjectControl", false, function(Value)
            objectControlEnabled = Value
            if Value and selectedObject then
                controlledObjects[selectedObject] = true
            else
                highlight.Adornee = nil
            end
        end)

        object1:Toggle("物体飞行", "ObjectFlight", false, function(Value)
            flightEnabled = Value
            if Value then
                startFlightFunction()
            elseif flightConnection then
                flightConnection:Disconnect()
            end
        end)

        object1:Textbox("飞行速度", "FlightSpeed", tostring(flightSpeed), function(Value)
            local speed = tonumber(Value)
            if speed then
                flightSpeed = speed
            end
        end)

        local rotateEnabled = false
        local rotateConnection

        object1:Toggle("物体旋转", "ObjectRotate", false, function(Value)
            rotateEnabled = Value
            if Value and selectedObject then
                rotateConnection = _G.CreateHeartbeatConnection(function()
                    if selectedObject then
                        local rootPart = selectedObject:IsA("BasePart") and selectedObject or selectedObject:FindFirstChildWhichIsA("BasePart")
                        if rootPart then
                            rootPart.CFrame = rootPart.CFrame * CFrame.Angles(0, math.rad(2), 0)
                        end
                    end
                end)
            elseif rotateConnection then
                rotateConnection:Disconnect()
                rotateConnection = nil
            end
        end)

        object1:Button("放大物体", function()
            if selectedObject then
                if selectedObject:IsA("BasePart") then
                    selectedObject.Size = selectedObject.Size * 1.2
                else
                    for _, part in ipairs(selectedObject:GetDescendants()) do
                        if part:IsA("BasePart") then
                            part.Size = part.Size * 1.2
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
        end)

        object1:Button("缩小物体", function()
            if selectedObject then
                if selectedObject:IsA("BasePart") then
                    selectedObject.Size = selectedObject.Size * 0.8
                else
                    for _, part in ipairs(selectedObject:GetDescendants()) do
                        if part:IsA("BasePart") then
                            part.Size = part.Size * 0.8
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
        end)

        object1:Button("随机颜色", function()
            if selectedObject then
                local function applyRandomColor(instance)
                    if instance:IsA("BasePart") then
                        instance.BrickColor = BrickColor.random()
                    end
                    for _, child in ipairs(instance:GetChildren()) do
                        applyRandomColor(child)
                    end
                end
                applyRandomColor(selectedObject)
            end
        end)

        object1:Toggle("禁用重力", "DisableGravity", false, function(Value)
            if selectedObject then
                local function setGravity(instance)
                    if instance:IsA("BasePart") then
                        instance.CustomPhysicalProperties = PhysicalProperties.new(0.3, 0.3, 0.3)
                    end
                    for _, child in ipairs(instance:GetChildren()) do
                        setGravity(child)
                    end
                end
                
                if Value then
                    setGravity(selectedObject)
                else
                    local function resetGravity(instance)
                        if instance:IsA("BasePart") then
                            instance.CustomPhysicalProperties = nil
                        end
                        for _, child in ipairs(instance:GetChildren()) do
                            resetGravity(child)
                        end
                    end
                    resetGravity(selectedObject)
                end
            end
        end)

        object1:Toggle("物体发光", "ObjectLight", false, function(Value)
            if selectedObject then
                local function setLight(instance)
                    if instance:IsA("BasePart") then
                        local pointLight = instance:FindFirstChildOfClass("PointLight")
                        if Value then
                            if not pointLight then
                                pointLight = Instance.new("PointLight")
                                pointLight.Name = "ObjectLight_" .. tostring(tick())
                                pointLight.Brightness = 5
                                pointLight.Range = 20
                                pointLight.Color = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
                                pointLight.Parent = instance
                            end
                        else
                            if pointLight and string.find(pointLight.Name, "ObjectLight") then
                                pointLight:Destroy()
                            end
                        end
                    end
                    for _, child in ipairs(instance:GetChildren()) do
                        setLight(child)
                    end
                end
                setLight(selectedObject)
            end
        end)

        local savedPositions = {}

        object1:Button("保存位置", function()
            if selectedObject then
                savedPositions[selectedObject] = selectedObject:GetPivot()
            end
        end)

        object1:Button("加载位置", function()
            if selectedObject and savedPositions[selectedObject] then
                selectedObject:PivotTo(savedPositions[selectedObject])
            end
        end)

        object1:Button("传送到物品", function()
            if selectedObject then
                local rootPart = selectedObject:IsA("BasePart") and selectedObject or selectedObject:FindFirstChildWhichIsA("BasePart")
                local character = game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer.Character
                if rootPart and character then
                    character:PivotTo(rootPart.CFrame)
                end
            end
        end)

        object1:Button("传送物品到玩家", function()
            if selectedObject then
                local rootPart = selectedObject:IsA("BasePart") and selectedObject or selectedObject:FindFirstChildWhichIsA("BasePart")
                local character = game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer.Character
                if rootPart and character then
                    local humanoidRootPart = character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
                    if humanoidRootPart then
                        if selectedObject:IsA("BasePart") then
                            selectedObject.CFrame = humanoidRootPart.CFrame + humanoidRootPart.CFrame.LookVector * 5
                        else
                            selectedObject:PivotTo(humanoidRootPart.CFrame + humanoidRootPart.CFrame.LookVector * 5)
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
        end)

        object1:Button("复制物品", function()
            if selectedObject then
                local clone = selectedObject:Clone()
                clone.Parent = workspace
                selectedObject = clone
                highlight.Adornee = clone
            end
        end)

        object1:Button("删除物品", function()
            if selectedObject then
                selectedObject:Destroy()
                selectedObject = nil
                highlight.Adornee = nil
                if objectDropdown then
                    objectDropdown:SetOptions({"未选择物体"})
                end
            end
        end)

        local object2 = object:section("高级控制", true)

        local transparencyEnabled = false

        object2:Toggle("物体透明化", "ObjectTransparency", false, function(Value)
            transparencyEnabled = Value
            if selectedObject then
                local function setTransparency(instance, alpha)
                    if instance:IsA("BasePart") then
                        instance.Transparency = alpha
                    end
                    for _, child in ipairs(instance:GetChildren()) do
                        setTransparency(child, alpha)
                    end
                end
                setTransparency(selectedObject, Value and 0.5 or 0)
            end
        end)

        local collisionEnabled = true

        object2:Toggle("禁用碰撞", "DisableCollision", false, function(Value)
            collisionEnabled = not Value
            if selectedObject then
                local function setCollision(instance)
                    if instance:IsA("BasePart") then
                        instance.CanCollide = collisionEnabled
                    end
                    for _, child in ipairs(instance:GetChildren()) do
                        setCollision(child)
                    end
                end
                setCollision(selectedObject)
            end
        end)

        local anchoredEnabled = false

        object2:Toggle("固定物体", "AnchorObject", false, function(Value)
            anchoredEnabled = Value
            if selectedObject then
                local function setAnchored(instance)
                    if instance:IsA("BasePart") then
                        instance.Anchored = Value
                    end
                    for _, child in ipairs(instance:GetChildren()) do
                        setAnchored(child)
                    end
                end
                setAnchored(selectedObject)
            end
        end)

        local fireEnabled = false

        object2:Toggle("添加火焰效果", "AddFire", false, function(Value)
            fireEnabled = Value
            if selectedObject then
                local function setFire(instance)
                    if instance:IsA("BasePart") then
                        local fire = instance:FindFirstChildOfClass("Fire")
                        if Value then
                            if not fire then
                                fire = Instance.new("Fire")
                                fire.Name = "ObjectFire_" .. tostring(tick())
                                fire.Size = 5
                                fire.Heat = 10
                                fire.Parent = instance
                            end
                        else
                            if fire and string.find(fire.Name, "ObjectFire") then
                                fire:Destroy()
                            end
                        end
                    end
                    for _, child in ipairs(instance:GetChildren()) do
                        setFire(child)
                    end
                end
                setFire(selectedObject)
            end
        end)

        local smokeEnabled = false

        object2:Toggle("添加烟雾效果", "AddSmoke", false, function(Value)
            smokeEnabled = Value
            if selectedObject then
                local function setSmoke(instance)
                    if instance:IsA("BasePart") then
                        local smoke = instance:FindFirstChildOfClass("Smoke")
                        if Value then
                            if not smoke then
                                smoke = Instance.new("Smoke")
                                smoke.Name = "ObjectSmoke_" .. tostring(tick())
                                smoke.Size = 5
                                smoke.Opacity = 0.3
                                smoke.Parent = instance
                            end
                        else
                            if smoke and string.find(smoke.Name, "ObjectSmoke") then
                                smoke:Destroy()
                            end
                        end
                    end
                    for _, child in ipairs(instance:GetChildren()) do
                        setSmoke(child)
                    end
                end
                setSmoke(selectedObject)
            end
        end)

        local sparklesEnabled = false

        object2:Toggle("添加闪光效果", "AddSparkles", false, function(Value)
            sparklesEnabled = Value
            if selectedObject then
                local function setSparkles(instance)
                    if instance:IsA("BasePart") then
                        local sparkles = instance:FindFirstChildOfClass("Sparkles")
                        if Value then
                            if not sparkles then
                                sparkles = Instance.new("Sparkles")
                                sparkles.Name = "ObjectSparkles_" .. tostring(tick())
                                sparkles.SparkleColor = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 0)
                                sparkles.Parent = instance
                            end
                        else
                            if sparkles and string.find(sparkles.Name, "ObjectSparkles") then
                                sparkles:Destroy()
                            end
                        end
                    end
                    for _, child in ipairs(instance:GetChildren()) do
                        setSparkles(child)
                    end
                end
                setSparkles(selectedObject)
            end
        end)

        local material = "Plastic"

        object2:Dropdown("改变材质", "ChangeMaterial", {
            "Plastic", "Wood", "Slate", "Concrete", "CorrodedMetal", "DiamondPlate", 
            "Foil", "Grass", "Ice", "Marble", "Granite", "Brick", "Pebble", "Sand", 
            "Fabric", "SmoothPlastic", "Metal", "WoodPlanks", "Cobblestone", "Air", 
            "Water", "Rock", "Glacier", "Snow", "Sandstone", "Mud", "Basalt", "Ground", 
            "CrackedLava", "Neon", "Glass", "ForceField"
        }, function(Value)
            material = Value
            if selectedObject then
                local function setMaterial(instance)
                    if instance:IsA("BasePart") then
                        instance.Material = Enum.Material[Value]
                    end
                    for _, child in ipairs(instance:GetChildren()) do
                        setMaterial(child)
                    end
                end
                setMaterial(selectedObject)
            end
        end)

        local reflectionEnabled = false

        object2:Toggle("启用反射", "EnableReflection", false, function(Value)
            reflectionEnabled = Value
            if selectedObject then
                local function setReflection(instance)
                    if instance:IsA("BasePart") then
                        instance.Reflectance = Value and 0.5 or 0
                    end
                    for _, child in ipairs(instance:GetChildren()) do
                        setReflection(child)
                    end
                end
                setReflection(selectedObject)
            end
        end)

        local spinSpeed = 0
        local spinConnection

        object2:Toggle("启用自旋", "EnableSpin", false, function(Value)
            if Value then
                spinConnection = _G.CreateHeartbeatConnection(function()
                    if selectedObject and spinSpeed > 0 then
                        local rootPart = selectedObject:IsA("BasePart") and selectedObject or selectedObject:FindFirstChildWhichIsA("BasePart")
                        if rootPart then
                            rootPart.CFrame = rootPart.CFrame * CFrame.Angles(0, math.rad(spinSpeed), 0)
                        end
                    end
                end)
            elseif spinConnection then
                spinConnection:Disconnect()
                spinConnection = nil
            end
        end)

        object2:Textbox("自旋速度", "SpinSpeed", tostring(spinSpeed), function(Value)
            local speed = tonumber(Value)
            if speed then
                spinSpeed = speed
            end
        end)

        local floatEnabled = false
        local floatConnection

        object2:Toggle("启用漂浮", "EnableFloat", false, function(Value)
            floatEnabled = Value
            if Value then
                floatConnection = _G.CreateHeartbeatConnection(function()
                    if selectedObject then
                        local rootPart = selectedObject:IsA("BasePart") and selectedObject or selectedObject:FindFirstChildWhichIsA("BasePart")
                        if rootPart then
                            rootPart.Velocity = Vector3.new(0, 5, 0)
                        end
                    end
                end)
            elseif floatConnection then
                floatConnection:Disconnect()
                floatConnection = nil
            end
        end)

        local object3 = object:section("物品造型", true)

        object3:Textbox("物品名称(摆造型)", "ObjectNameFormation", "输入物品名称", function(Value)
            objectNameInput = Value
        end)

        local formationObjects = {}
        local formationEnabled = false
        local formationRadius = 10
        local formationHeight = 50
        local formationType = "circle" 

        object3:Textbox("造型半径", "FormationRadius", tostring(formationRadius), function(Value)
            local radius = tonumber(Value)
            if radius then
                formationRadius = radius
            end
        end)

        object3:Textbox("造型高度", "FormationHeight", tostring(formationHeight), function(Value)
            local height = tonumber(Value)
            if height then
                formationHeight = height
            end
        end)

        object3:Dropdown("造型类型", "FormationType", {"圆形", "直线", "网格", "螺旋"}, function(Value)
            formationType = Value
        end)

        object3:Button("开始摆造型", function()
            if objectNameInput ~= "" then
                local objects = findObjectsByNameFunction(objectNameInput)
                if #objects > 0 then
                    formationObjects = objects
                    
                    local center = game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position
                    center = center + Vector3.new(0, formationHeight, 0)
                    
                    for i, obj in ipairs(formationObjects) do
                        local rootPart = obj:IsA("BasePart") and obj or obj:FindFirstChildWhichIsA("BasePart")
                        if rootPart then
                            local position
                            
                            if formationType == "圆形" then
                                local angle = (i / #formationObjects) * 2 * math.pi
                                position = center + Vector3.new(
                                    math.cos(angle) * formationRadius,
                                    0,
                                    math.sin(angle) * formationRadius
                                )
                            elseif formationType == "直线" then
                                position = center + Vector3.new(
                                    (i - math.floor(#formationObjects / 2)) * 3,
                                    0,
                                    0
                                )
                            elseif formationType == "网格" then
                                local row = math.floor((i - 1) / 5)
                                local col = (i - 1) % 5
                                position = center + Vector3.new(
                                    col * 4 - 8,
                                    0,
                                    row * 4 - 8
                                )
                            elseif formationType == "螺旋" then
                                local angle = i * 0.5
                                local radius = formationRadius * (angle / (2 * math.pi))
                                position = center + Vector3.new(
                                    math.cos(angle) * radius,
                                    i * 0.5,
                                    math.sin(angle) * radius
                                )
                            end
                            
                            if obj:IsA("BasePart") then
                                obj.CFrame = CFrame.new(position)
                            else
                                obj:PivotTo(CFrame.new(position))
                            end
                            
                            if rootPart:IsA("BasePart") then
                                rootPart.Anchored = true
                            end
                        end
                    end
                    
                    formationEnabled = true
                end
            end
        end)

        object3:Button("重置造型", function()
            for _, obj in ipairs(formationObjects) do
                local rootPart = obj:IsA("BasePart") and obj or obj:FindFirstChildWhichIsA("BasePart")
                if rootPart then
                    rootPart.Anchored = false
                end
            end
            formationObjects = {}
            formationEnabled = false
        end)

        object3:Button("调整造型高度", function()
            if formationEnabled then
                for i, obj in ipairs(formationObjects) do
                    local rootPart = obj:IsA("BasePart") and obj or obj:FindFirstChildWhichIsA("BasePart")
                    if rootPart then
                        local currentPos = rootPart.Position
                        local newPos = Vector3.new(currentPos.X, formationHeight, currentPos.Z)
                        
                        if obj:IsA("BasePart") then
                            obj.CFrame = CFrame.new(newPos)
                        else
                            obj:PivotTo(CFrame.new(newPos))
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
        end)

        object3:Button("旋转造型", function()
            if formationEnabled then
                local center = Vector3.new(0, formationHeight, 0)
                for i, obj in ipairs(formationObjects) do
                    local rootPart = obj:IsA("BasePart") and obj or obj:FindFirstChildWhichIsA("BasePart")
                    if rootPart then
                        local currentPos = rootPart.Position
                        local relativePos = currentPos - center
                        local rotatedPos = Vector3.new(
                            relativePos.Z,
                            relativePos.Y,
                            -relativePos.X
                        )
                        
                        if obj:IsA("BasePart") then
                            obj.CFrame = CFrame.new(center + rotatedPos)
                        else
                            obj:PivotTo(CFrame.new(center + rotatedPos))
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
        end)
    else
        warn("Window 未找到，物体控制功能无法初始化")
    end

    game.Players.LocalPlayer.CharacterAdded:Connect(function(character)
        if highlight then
            highlight.Adornee = nil
        end
    end)

    game:GetService("Players").PlayerRemoving:Connect(function(player)
        if player == game.Players.LocalPlayer and highlight then
            highlight:Destroy()
        end
    end)
end
do
local special = Window:Tab("建筑与特效", '82546429942392')
task.wait(0.1)local about3 = special:section("人物特效", true)
local ParticleRain = false
local ParticleRainConnection = nil
local RainIntensity = 50
about3:Toggle("粒子雨", "开关", false, function(v)
    ParticleRain = v
    
    if ParticleRainConnection then
        ParticleRainConnection:Disconnect()
        ParticleRainConnection = nil
    end
    
    if v then
        ParticleRainConnection = game:GetService("RunService").Heartbeat:Connect(function()
            local character = game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer.Character
            if character and character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                local hrp = character.HumanoidRootPart
                for i = 1, RainIntensity do
                    local particle = Instance.new("Part")
                    particle.Size = Vector3.new(0.2, 0.2, 0.2)
                    local offset = Vector3.new(
                        math.random(-5, 5),
                        10 + math.random(0, 5),
                        math.random(-5, 5)
                    )
                    particle.Position = hrp.Position + offset
                    particle.Anchored = true
                    particle.CanCollide = false
                    particle.Material = Enum.Material.Neon
                    local r = math.random(0, 255)
                    local g = math.random(0, 255)
                    local b = math.random(0, 255)
                    particle.Color = Color3.fromRGB(r, g, b)
                    particle.Transparency = 0.3
                    particle.Parent = workspace
                    
                    local bodyVelocity = Instance.new("BodyVelocity")
                    bodyVelocity.Velocity = Vector3.new(0, -20, 0)
                    bodyVelocity.P = 1000
                    bodyVelocity.MaxForce = Vector3.new(0, 1000, 0)
                    bodyVelocity.Parent = particle
                    
                    game:GetService("Debris"):AddItem(particle, 3)
                end
            end
        end)
    end
end)

about3:Slider('粒子雨强度', '拉条', 50, 10, 200, false, function(v)
    RainIntensity = v
end)

local LightOrb = false
local LightOrbConnection = nil
local OrbBrightness = 5
about3:Toggle("光球环绕", "开关", false, function(v)
    LightOrb = v
    
    if LightOrbConnection then
        LightOrbConnection:Disconnect()
        LightOrbConnection = nil
    end
    
    if v then
        local orbs = {}
        local orbCount = 8
        local angleStep = 360 / orbCount
        
        for i = 1, orbCount do
            local orb = Instance.new("Part")
            orb.Size = Vector3.new(1, 1, 1)
