            orb.Shape = Enum.PartType.Ball
            orb.Material = Enum.Material.Neon
            orb.Color = Color3.fromHSV(i/orbCount, 1, 1)
            orb.Anchored = true
            orb.CanCollide = false
            orb.Parent = workspace
            
            local pointLight = Instance.new("PointLight")
            pointLight.Brightness = OrbBrightness
            pointLight.Color = orb.Color
            pointLight.Range = 10
            pointLight.Parent = orb
            
            table.insert(orbs, orb)
        end
        
        LightOrbConnection = game:GetService("RunService").Heartbeat:Connect(function()
            local character = game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer.Character
            if character and character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                local hrp = character.HumanoidRootPart
                local time = tick()
                local radius = 5
                local height = 2
                
                for i, orb in ipairs(orbs) do
                    local angle = math.rad(i * angleStep + time * 100)
                    local x = math.cos(angle) * radius
                    local z = math.sin(angle) * radius
                    local y = math.sin(time * 2 + i) * height
                    
                    orb.Position = hrp.Position + Vector3.new(x, y + 2, z)
                    orb.Color = Color3.fromHSV((time + i/10) % 1, 1, 1)
                    orb.PointLight.Color = orb.Color
                end
            end
        end)
    else
        for _, orb in ipairs(orbs or {}) do
            if orb then
                orb:Destroy()
            end
        end
        orbs = {}
    end
end)

about3:Slider('光球亮度', '拉条', 5, 1, 20, false, function(v)
    OrbBrightness = v
    if orbs then
        for _, orb in ipairs(orbs) do
            if orb and orb:FindFirstChild("PointLight") then
                orb.PointLight.Brightness = v
            end
        end
    end
end)

local CrystalAura = false
local CrystalAuraConnection = nil
local CrystalCount = 12
about3:Toggle("水晶光环", "开关", false, function(v)
    CrystalAura = v
    
    if CrystalAuraConnection then
        CrystalAuraConnection:Disconnect()
        CrystalAuraConnection = nil
    end
    
    if v then
        local crystals = {}
        local baseRadius = 3
        local waveHeight = 2
        
        for i = 1, CrystalCount do
            local crystal = Instance.new("Part")
            crystal.Size = Vector3.new(1, math.random(2, 4), 1)
            crystal.Material = Enum.Material.Glass
            crystal.Transparency = 0.2
            crystal.Reflectance = 0.5
            crystal.Color = Color3.fromHSV(i/CrystalCount, 0.8, 1)
            crystal.Anchored = true
            crystal.CanCollide = false
            crystal.Parent = workspace
            
            local pointLight = Instance.new("PointLight")
            pointLight.Brightness = 3
            pointLight.Color = crystal.Color
            pointLight.Range = 8
            pointLight.Parent = crystal
            
            table.insert(crystals, crystal)
        end
        
        CrystalAuraConnection = game:GetService("RunService").Heartbeat:Connect(function()
            local character = game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer.Character
            if character and character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                local hrp = character.HumanoidRootPart
                local time = tick()
                local radius = baseRadius + math.sin(time) * 0.5
                
                for i, crystal in ipairs(crystals) do
                    local angle = math.rad(i * (360 / CrystalCount) + time * 30)
                    local x = math.cos(angle) * radius
                    local z = math.sin(angle) * radius
                    local waveOffset = math.sin(time * 2 + i) * waveHeight
                    
                    crystal.CFrame = CFrame.new(hrp.Position + Vector3.new(x, waveOffset + 1, z))
                    crystal.CFrame = crystal.CFrame * CFrame.Angles(0, time + i, 0)
                    
                    local hue = ((time * 0.2) + i/CrystalCount) % 1
                    crystal.Color = Color3.fromHSV(hue, 0.8, 1)
                    crystal.PointLight.Color = crystal.Color
                end
            end
        end)
    else
        for _, crystal in ipairs(crystals or {}) do
            if crystal then
                crystal:Destroy()
            end
        end
        crystals = {}
    end
end)

about3:Slider('水晶数量', '拉条', 12, 4, 30, false, function(v)
    CrystalCount = math.floor(v)
    if crystals and CrystalAura then
        for _, crystal in ipairs(crystals) do
            if crystal then
                crystal:Destroy()
            end
        end
        crystals = {}
        
        local character = game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer.Character
        if character and character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
            local hrp = character.HumanoidRootPart
            local baseRadius = 3
            local waveHeight = 2
            local time = tick()
            
            for i = 1, CrystalCount do
                local crystal = Instance.new("Part")
                crystal.Size = Vector3.new(1, math.random(2, 4), 1)
                crystal.Material = Enum.Material.Glass
                crystal.Transparency = 0.2
                crystal.Reflectance = 0.5
                crystal.Color = Color3.fromHSV(i/CrystalCount, 0.8, 1)
                crystal.Anchored = true
                crystal.CanCollide = false
                crystal.Parent = workspace
                
                local pointLight = Instance.new("PointLight")
                pointLight.Brightness = 3
                pointLight.Color = crystal.Color
                pointLight.Range = 8
                pointLight.Parent = crystal
                
                table.insert(crystals, crystal)
            end
        end
    end
end)

    buildingRainbow = State

        buildingRainbowConnection:Disconnect()
        buildingRainbowConnection = nil

    if buildingRainbow then
        buildingRainbowConnection = game:GetService("RunService").Heartbeat:Connect(function()

            for _, part in pairs(workspace:GetDescendants()) do
                if part:IsA("BasePart") and part.Name ~= "HumanoidRootPart" then
                    local hue = (time + part.Position.Magnitude * 0.001) % 1
                    part.Color = Color3.fromHSV(hue, rainbowSaturation, rainbowValue)
                end
            end
        end)
    end

local buildingSize = false
local buildingSizeConnection = nil
local sizeMultiplier = 2
local sizeOscillationSpeed = 1
local sizeOscillationStrength = 0.1

Universal:Toggle("建筑呼吸", "开关", false, function(State)
    buildingSize = State
    
    if buildingSizeConnection then
        buildingSizeConnection:Disconnect()
        buildingSizeConnection = nil
    end
    
    if buildingSize then
        buildingSizeConnection = game:GetService("RunService").Heartbeat:Connect(function()
            local time = tick() * sizeOscillationSpeed
            local oscillation = math.sin(time) * sizeOscillationStrength
            
            for _, part in pairs(workspace:GetDescendants()) do
                if part:IsA("BasePart") and part.Name ~= "HumanoidRootPart" and not part:IsDescendantOf(game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character) then
                    part.Size = part.Size * (sizeMultiplier + oscillation)
                end
            end
        end)
    else
        for _, part in pairs(workspace:GetDescendants()) do
            if part:IsA("BasePart") and part.Name ~= "HumanoidRootPart" and not part:IsDescendantOf(game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character) then
                part.Size = part.Size / sizeMultiplier
            end
        end
    end
end)

Universal:Slider('大小倍数', '拉条', 2, 1, 5, false, function(v)
    sizeMultiplier = v
end)

Universal:Slider('呼吸速度', '拉条', 1, 0.1, 5, false, function(v)
    sizeOscillationSpeed = v
end)

Universal:Slider('呼吸强度', '拉条', 0.1, 0, 0.5, false, function(v)
    sizeOscillationStrength = v
end)

local buildingGravity = false
local buildingGravityConnection = nil
local gravityStrength = 0.5
local gravitySpeed = 1

Universal:Toggle("建筑漂浮", "开关", false, function(State)
    buildingGravity = State
    
    if buildingGravityConnection then
        buildingGravityConnection:Disconnect()
        buildingGravityConnection = nil
    end
    
    if buildingGravity then
        local originalPositions = {}
        buildingGravityConnection = game:GetService("RunService").Heartbeat:Connect(function()
            local time = tick() * gravitySpeed
            
            for _, part in pairs(workspace:GetDescendants()) do
                if part:IsA("BasePart") and part.Name ~= "HumanoidRootPart" and not part:IsDescendantOf(game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character) then
                    if not originalPositions[part] then
                        originalPositions[part] = part.Position
                    end
                    
                    local floatOffset = math.sin(time + part.Position.Magnitude * 0.01) * gravityStrength
                    part.Position = originalPositions[part] + Vector3.new(0, floatOffset, 0)
                end
            end
        end)
    else
        buildingGravityConnection = nil
    end
end)

Universal:Slider('漂浮强度', '拉条', 0.5, 0.1, 2, false, function(v)
    gravityStrength = v
end)

Universal:Slider('漂浮速度', '拉条', 1, 0.1, 5, false, function(v)
    gravitySpeed = v
end)

local buildingTransparency = false
local buildingTransparencyConnection = nil
local transparencyValue = 0.5
local transparencyPulseSpeed = 1

Universal:Toggle("建筑透明", "开关", false, function(State)
    buildingTransparency = State
    
    if buildingTransparencyConnection then
        buildingTransparencyConnection:Disconnect()
        buildingTransparencyConnection = nil
    end
    
    if buildingTransparency then
        buildingTransparencyConnection = game:GetService("RunService").Heartbeat:Connect(function()
            local time = tick() * transparencyPulseSpeed
            
            for _, part in pairs(workspace:GetDescendants()) do
                if part:IsA("BasePart") and part.Name ~= "HumanoidRootPart" and not part:IsDescendantOf(game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character) then
                    local pulseValue = (math.sin(time) + 1) / 2
                    part.Transparency = transparencyValue + (pulseValue * 0.5)
                end
            end
        end)
    else
        for _, part in pairs(workspace:GetDescendants()) do
            if part:IsA("BasePart") and part.Name ~= "HumanoidRootPart" and not part:IsDescendantOf(game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character) then
                part.Transparency = 0
            end
        end
    end
end)

Universal:Slider('透明度', '拉条', 0.5, 0, 1, false, function(v)
    transparencyValue = v
end)

Universal:Slider('脉动速度', '拉条', 1, 0.1, 5, false, function(v)
    transparencyPulseSpeed = v
end)

local reverseGravityConnection = nil
local gravityMultiplier = 2

Universal:Toggle("反重力", "开关", false, function(State)
    reverseGravity = State
    
    if reverseGravityConnection then
        reverseGravityConnection:Disconnect()
        reverseGravityConnection = nil
    end
    
    if reverseGravity then
        reverseGravityConnection = game:GetService("RunService").Heartbeat:Connect(function()
            workspace.Gravity = -196.2 * gravityMultiplier

        workspace.Gravity = 196.2
    end

Universal:Slider('重力倍数', '拉条', 2, 0.5, 5, false, function(v)
    gravityMultiplier = v
    if reverseGravity then
        workspace.Gravity = -196.2 * gravityMultiplier
    end

local timeVortex = false
local timeVortexConnection = nil
local vortexSpeed = 1
local vortexRadius = 50
local vortexStrength = 10

Universal:Toggle("时空漩涡", "开关", false, function(State)
    timeVortex = State
    
    if timeVortexConnection then
        timeVortexConnection:Disconnect()
        timeVortexConnection = nil
    end
    
    if timeVortex then
        timeVortexConnection = game:GetService("RunService").Heartbeat:Connect(function()
            local time = tick() * vortexSpeed
            local center = game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character and 
                          game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
            
            if center then
                for _, part in pairs(workspace:GetDescendants()) do
                    if part:IsA("BasePart") and part.Name ~= "HumanoidRootPart" then
                        local distance = (part.Position - center.Position).Magnitude
                        if distance < vortexRadius then
                            local angle = math.atan2(part.Position.Z - center.Position.Z, 
                                                    part.Position.X - center.Position.X)
                            local newAngle = angle + vortexStrength * (vortexRadius - distance) / vortexRadius
                            local newX = center.Position.X + distance * math.cos(newAngle)
                            local newZ = center.Position.Z + distance * math.sin(newAngle)
                            part.Position = Vector3.new(newX, part.Position.Y, newZ)
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
        end)
    end
end)

Universal:Slider('漩涡速度', '拉条', 1, 0.1, 5, false, function(v)
    vortexSpeed = v
end)

Universal:Slider('漩涡半径', '拉条', 50, 10, 200, false, function(v)
    vortexRadius = v
end)

Universal:Slider('漩涡强度', '拉条', 10, 1, 50, false, function(v)
    vortexStrength = v
end)

local gravityWell = false
local gravityWellConnection = nil
local wellStrength = 100
local wellRadius = 30
local wellSpeed = 1

Universal:Toggle("引力井", "开关", false, function(State)
    gravityWell = State
    
    if gravityWellConnection then
        gravityWellConnection:Disconnect()
        gravityWellConnection = nil
    end
    
    if gravityWell then
        gravityWellConnection = game:GetService("RunService").Heartbeat:Connect(function()
            local time = tick() * wellSpeed
            local center = game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character and 
                          game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
            
            if center then
                for _, part in pairs(workspace:GetDescendants()) do
                    if part:IsA("BasePart") and part.Name ~= "HumanoidRootPart" and not part.Anchored then
                        local distance = (part.Position - center.Position).Magnitude
                        if distance < wellRadius then
                            local direction = (center.Position - part.Position).Unit
                            local attraction = direction * wellStrength * ((wellRadius - distance) / wellRadius)
                            part.Velocity = part.Velocity + attraction
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
        end)
    end
end)

Universal:Slider('引力强度', '拉条', 100, 10, 500, false, function(v)
    wellStrength = v
end)

Universal:Slider('引力半径', '拉条', 30, 5, 100, false, function(v)
    wellRadius = v
end)

Universal:Slider('引力速度', '拉条', 1, 0.1, 5, false, function(v)
    wellSpeed = v
end)

local mirrorWorld = false
local mirrorWorldConnection = nil
local mirrorType = "X"

Universal:Toggle("镜像世界", "开关", false, function(State)
    mirrorWorld = State
    
    if mirrorWorldConnection then
        mirrorWorldConnection:Disconnect()
        mirrorWorldConnection = nil
    end
    
    if mirrorWorld then
        mirrorWorldConnection = game:GetService("RunService").Heartbeat:Connect(function()
            local time = tick()
            for _, part in pairs(workspace:GetDescendants()) do
                if part:IsA("BasePart") and part.Name ~= "HumanoidRootPart" then
                    local originalPosition = part.Position
                    local mirroredPosition
                    
                    if mirrorType == "X" then
                        mirroredPosition = Vector3.new(-originalPosition.X, originalPosition.Y, originalPosition.Z)
                    elseif mirrorType == "Y" then
                        mirroredPosition = Vector3.new(originalPosition.X, -originalPosition.Y, originalPosition.Z)
                    elseif mirrorType == "Z" then
                        mirroredPosition = Vector3.new(originalPosition.X, originalPosition.Y, -originalPosition.Z)
                    end
                    
                    local mirrorPart = Instance.new("Part")
                    mirrorPart.Size = part.Size
                    mirrorPart.Position = mirroredPosition
                    mirrorPart.Transparency = 0.5
                    mirrorPart.Color = Color3.fromRGB(255, 100, 100)
                    mirrorPart.Material = Enum.Material.Glass
                    mirrorPart.Anchored = true
                    mirrorPart.CanCollide = false
                    mirrorPart.Parent = workspace
                    game:GetService("Debris"):AddItem(mirrorPart, 0.1)
                end
            end
        end)
    end
end)

local timeFreeze = false
local timeFreezeConnection = nil
local freezeRadius = 30
local freezeDuration = 3
local freezeCooldown = 5

Universal:Toggle("时间冻结", "开关", false, function(State)
    timeFreeze = State
    
    if timeFreezeConnection then
        timeFreezeConnection:Disconnect()
        timeFreezeConnection = nil
    end
    
    if timeFreeze then
        local lastFreezeTime = 0
        timeFreezeConnection = game:GetService("RunService").Heartbeat:Connect(function()
            local currentTime = tick()
            if currentTime - lastFreezeTime >= freezeCooldown then
                lastFreezeTime = currentTime
                
                local center = game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character and 
                              game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
                
                if center then
                    for _, part in pairs(workspace:GetDescendants()) do
                        if part:IsA("BasePart") and part.Name ~= "HumanoidRootPart" then
                            local distance = (part.Position - center.Position).Magnitude
                            if distance < freezeRadius then
                                local originalColor = part.Color
                                local originalTransparency = part.Transparency
                                part.Color = Color3.fromRGB(100, 100, 255)
                                part.Transparency = 0.3
                                part.Anchored = true
                                
                                task.wait(freezeDuration)
                                
                                part.Color = originalColor
                                part.Transparency = originalTransparency
                                part.Anchored = false
                            end
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
        end)
    end
end)

Universal:Slider('冻结半径', '拉条', 30, 5, 100, false, function(v)
    freezeRadius = v
end)

Universal:Slider('冻结时间', '拉条', 3, 1, 10, false, function(v)
    freezeDuration = v
end)

Universal:Slider('冷却时间', '拉条', 5, 1, 20, false, function(v)
    freezeCooldown = v
end)

local buildingDance = false
local buildingDanceConnection = nil
local danceSpeed = 1
local danceAmplitude = 5
local danceStyle = "Swing"

Universal:Toggle("建筑舞蹈", "开关", false, function(State)
    buildingDance = State
    
    if buildingDanceConnection then
        buildingDanceConnection:Disconnect()
        buildingDanceConnection = nil
    end
    
    if buildingDance then
        local originalCFrames = {}
        buildingDanceConnection = game:GetService("RunService").Heartbeat:Connect(function()
            local time = tick() * danceSpeed
            
            for _, part in pairs(workspace:GetDescendants()) do
                if part:IsA("BasePart") and part.Name ~= "HumanoidRootPart" and not part:IsDescendantOf(game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character) then
                    if not originalCFrames[part] then
                        originalCFrames[part] = part.CFrame
                    end
                    
                    local originalCFrame = originalCFrames[part]
                    local offset
                    
                    if danceStyle == "Swing" then
                        offset = Vector3.new(
                            math.sin(time + part.Position.X * 0.01) * danceAmplitude,
                            math.sin(time + part.Position.Y * 0.01) * danceAmplitude * 0.5,
                            math.cos(time + part.Position.Z * 0.01) * danceAmplitude
                        )
                    elseif danceStyle == "Spin" then
                        local angle = time + part.Position.Magnitude * 0.001
                        offset = Vector3.new(0, 0, 0)
                        part.CFrame = originalCFrame * CFrame.Angles(0, angle, 0)
                    elseif danceStyle == "Bob" then
                        offset = Vector3.new(
                            0,
                            math.sin(time + part.Position.Magnitude * 0.001) * danceAmplitude,
                            0
                        )
                    end
                    
                    if danceStyle ~= "Spin" then
                        part.Position = originalCFrame.Position + offset
                    end
                end
            end
        end)
    else
        buildingDanceConnection = nil
    end
end)

Universal:Slider('舞蹈速度', '拉条', 1, 0.1, 5, false, function(v)
    danceSpeed = v
end)

Universal:Slider('舞蹈幅度', '拉条', 5, 1, 20, false, function(v)
    danceAmplitude = v
end)
local gravityPulse = false
local gravityPulseConnection = nil
local pulseStrength = 200
local pulseRadius = 50
local pulseInterval = 2

Universal:Toggle("重力脉冲", "开关", false, function(State)
    gravityPulse = State
    
    if gravityPulseConnection then
        gravityPulseConnection:Disconnect()
        gravityPulseConnection = nil
    end
    
    if gravityPulse then
        local lastPulseTime = tick()
        gravityPulseConnection = game:GetService("RunService").Heartbeat:Connect(function()
            local currentTime = tick()
            if currentTime - lastPulseTime >= pulseInterval then
                lastPulseTime = currentTime
                
                local center = game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character and 
                              game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
                
                if center then
                    for _, part in pairs(workspace:GetDescendants()) do
                        if part:IsA("BasePart") and part.Name ~= "HumanoidRootPart" and not part.Anchored then
                            local distance = (part.Position - center.Position).Magnitude
                            if distance < pulseRadius then
                                local direction = (part.Position - center.Position).Unit
                                part.Velocity = part.Velocity + direction * pulseStrength
                                
                                local pulseEffect = Instance.new("Part")
                                pulseEffect.Size = Vector3.new(1, 1, 1)
                                pulseEffect.Position = part.Position
                                pulseEffect.Shape = Enum.PartType.Ball
                                pulseEffect.Material = Enum.Material.Neon
                                pulseEffect.Color = Color3.fromRGB(255, 100, 100)
                                pulseEffect.Transparency = 0.5
                                pulseEffect.Anchored = true
                                pulseEffect.CanCollide = false
                                pulseEffect.Parent = workspace
                                game:GetService("Debris"):AddItem(pulseEffect, 0.5)
                            end
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
        end)
    end
end)

Universal:Slider('脉冲强度', '拉条', 200, 50, 1000, false, function(v)
    pulseStrength = v
end)

Universal:Slider('脉冲半径', '拉条', 50, 10, 200, false, function(v)
    pulseRadius = v
end)

Universal:Slider('脉冲间隔', '拉条', 2, 0.5, 10, false, function(v)
    pulseInterval = v
end)
end

task.wait(0.1)

        game.Lighting.Ambient = Color3.new(1, 1, 1)
    else
        game.Lighting.Ambient = Color3.new(0, 0, 0)
    end

Section5:Toggle("秒杀有血条生物", "NightVision", false, function(Value)
    if Value then
getgenv().G = true
getgenv().Creator = 'BS'
while getgenv().G and getgenv().Creator == 'BS' do
wait(1)
sethiddenproperty(game.Players.LocalPlayer, "SimulationRadius", 100)
sethiddenproperty(game.Players.LocalPlayer, "MaxSimulationRadius", 100)
for i,d in pairs(game:GetService("Workspace"):GetDescendants()) do
    if d.ClassName == 'Humanoid' and d.Parent.Name ~= game.Players.LocalPlayer.Name then
        d.Health = -1
    end
end
end
wait(1)
getgenv().G = true
getgenv().Creator = 'BS'
while getgenv().G and getgenv().Creator == 'BS' do
wait(1)
sethiddenproperty(game.Players.LocalPlayer, "SimulationRadius", 100)
sethiddenproperty(game.Players.LocalPlayer, "MaxSimulationRadius", 100)
for i,d in pairs(game:GetService("Workspace"):GetDescendants()) do
    if d.ClassName == 'Humanoid' and d.Parent.Name ~= game.Players.LocalPlayer.Name then
        d.Health = 9999999999
    end
end
end
    else
getgenv().G = false
  end
end)

Section5:Toggle("穿墙", "Noclip", false, function(Value)
    if Value then
        if not _G.NoclipActive then
            _G.NoclipActive = true
            
            if _G.NoclipConnection then
                _G.NoclipConnection:Disconnect()
                _G.NoclipConnection = nil
            end
            
            _G.DescendantAddedConnections = {}
            _G.OriginalCollisionStates = {}
            
            local function setupNoclipForCharacter(character)
                if not character then return end
                
                for _, part in pairs(character:GetDescendants()) do
                    if part:IsA("BasePart") then
                        if not _G.OriginalCollisionStates[part] then
                            _G.OriginalCollisionStates[part] = part.CanCollide
                        end
                        part.CanCollide = false
                    end
                end
                
                local descendantConnection = character.DescendantAdded:Connect(function(descendant)
                    if descendant:IsA("BasePart") then
                        if not _G.OriginalCollisionStates[descendant] then
                            _G.OriginalCollisionStates[descendant] = descendant.CanCollide
                        end
                        descendant.CanCollide = false
                    end
                end)
                
                _G.DescendantAddedConnections[character] = descendantConnection
            end
            
            _G.CurrentCharacter = game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character
            if _G.CurrentCharacter then
                setupNoclipForCharacter(_G.CurrentCharacter)
            end
            
            _G.NoclipConnection = game:GetService("RunService").Stepped:Connect(function()
                if not _G.NoclipActive then return end
                
                local currentChar = game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character
                if not currentChar then return end
                
                if currentChar ~= _G.CurrentCharacter then
                    if _G.DescendantAddedConnections[_G.CurrentCharacter] then
                        _G.DescendantAddedConnections[_G.CurrentCharacter]:Disconnect()
                        _G.DescendantAddedConnections[_G.CurrentCharacter] = nil
                    end
                    
                    _G.CurrentCharacter = currentChar
                    setupNoclipForCharacter(currentChar)
                end
                
                for _, part in pairs(currentChar:GetDescendants()) do
                    if part:IsA("BasePart") then
                        part.CanCollide = false
                    end
                end
            end)
            
            if _G.CharacterAddedConnection then
                _G.CharacterAddedConnection:Disconnect()
            end
            _G.CharacterAddedConnection = game.Players.LocalPlayer.CharacterAdded:Connect(function(newCharacter)
                if _G.NoclipActive then
                    wait()
                    _G.CurrentCharacter = newCharacter
                    setupNoclipForCharacter(newCharacter)
                end
            end)
        end
    else
        if _G.NoclipActive then
            _G.NoclipActive = false
            
            if _G.NoclipConnection then
                _G.NoclipConnection:Disconnect()
                _G.NoclipConnection = nil
            end
            
            if _G.CharacterAddedConnection then
                _G.CharacterAddedConnection:Disconnect()
                _G.CharacterAddedConnection = nil
            end
            
            for part, originalState in pairs(_G.OriginalCollisionStates or {}) do
                if part and part.Parent then
                    part.CanCollide = originalState
                end
            end
            
            for character, connection in pairs(_G.DescendantAddedConnections or {}) do
                if connection then
                    connection:Disconnect()
                end
            end
            
            _G.DescendantAddedConnections = {}
            _G.OriginalCollisionStates = {}
            _G.CurrentCharacter = nil
        end
    end
end)

Section5:Button("子弹追踪(视角会变得奇怪)", function()
    local Camera = game:GetService("Workspace").CurrentCamera
    local Players = game:GetService("Players")
    local LocalPlayer = game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer
    local function GetClosestPlayer()
        local ClosestPlayer = nil
        local FarthestDistance = math.huge
        for i, v in pairs(Players.GetPlayers(Players)) do
            if v ~= LocalPlayer and v.Character and v.Character.FindFirstChild(v.Character, "HumanoidRootPart") then
                local DistanceFromPlayer = (LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position - v.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position).Magnitude
                if DistanceFromPlayer < FarthestDistance then
                    FarthestDistance = DistanceFromPlayer
                    ClosestPlayer = v
                end
            end
        end
        if ClosestPlayer then return ClosestPlayer end
    end
    local GameMetaTable = getrawmetatable(game)
    local OldGameMetaTableNamecall = GameMetaTable.__namecall
    setreadonly(GameMetaTable, false)
    GameMetaTable.__namecall = newcclosure(function(object, ...)
        local NamecallMethod = getnamecallmethod()
        local Arguments = {...}
        if tostring(NamecallMethod) == "FindPartOnRayWithIgnoreList" then
            local ClosestPlayer = GetClosestPlayer()
            if ClosestPlayer and ClosestPlayer.Character then
                Arguments[1] = Ray.new(Camera.CFrame.Position, (ClosestPlayer.Character.Head.Position - Camera.CFrame.Position).Unit * (Camera.CFrame.Position - ClosestPlayer.Character.Head.Position).Magnitude)
            end
        end
        return OldGameMetaTableNamecall(object, unpack(Arguments))
    end)
    setreadonly(GameMetaTable, true)
end)

Section5:Button("飞行(第二种)", function()
local UIS = game:GetService("UserInputService")
local RS = game:GetService("RunService")
local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local CoreGui = game:GetService("CoreGui")
local LocalPlayer = Players.LocalPlayer

if CoreGui:FindFirstChild("HYPOLX_FLY_UI") then
    CoreGui.HYPOLX_FLY_UI:Destroy()
end

local gui = Instance.new("ScreenGui")
gui.Name = "HYPOLX_FLY_UI"
gui.Parent = CoreGui
gui.ResetOnSpawn = false

local main = Instance.new("Frame")
main.Size = UDim2.new(0,300,0,200)
main.Position = UDim2.new(0.5,-150,0.5,-100)
main.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(15,15,15)
main.BackgroundTransparency = 0.05
main.BorderSizePixel = 0
main.Active = true
main.Draggable = true
Instance.new("UICorner",main).CornerRadius = UDim.new(0,10)
main.Parent = gui

local title = Instance.new("TextLabel")
title.Size = UDim2.new(1,0,0,35)
title.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(30,60,255)
title.BackgroundTransparency = 0.1
title.Text = "tubers93飞行"
title.Font = Enum.Font.GothamBold
title.TextSize = 18
title.TextColor3 = Color3.new(1,1,1)
Instance.new("UICorner",title).CornerRadius = UDim.new(0,10)
title.Parent = main

local toggle = Instance.new("TextButton")
toggle.Size = UDim2.new(0.8,0,0,45)
toggle.Position = UDim2.new(0.1,0,0.28,0)
toggle.Text = "启动飞行"
toggle.Font = Enum.Font.GothamBold
toggle.TextSize = 16
toggle.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255,50,50)
toggle.TextColor3 = Color3.new(1,1,1)
Instance.new("UICorner",toggle).CornerRadius = UDim.new(0,8)
toggle.Parent = main

local status = Instance.new("TextLabel")
status.Size = UDim2.new(0.8,0,0,20)
status.Position = UDim2.new(0.1,0,0.75,0)
status.Text = "状态: 未激活"
status.Font = Enum.Font.Gotham
status.TextSize = 14
status.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255,150,150)
status.BackgroundTransparency = 1
status.Parent = main

local speedBox = Instance.new("TextBox")
speedBox.Size = UDim2.new(0.55,0,0,30)
speedBox.Position = UDim2.new(0.05,0,0.53,0)
speedBox.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(30,30,50)
speedBox.BackgroundTransparency = 0.2
speedBox.TextColor3 = Color3.new(1,1,1)
speedBox.PlaceholderText = "输入飞行速度"
speedBox.Text = "60"
speedBox.Font = Enum.Font.Gotham
speedBox.TextSize = 14
Instance.new("UICorner",speedBox).CornerRadius = UDim.new(0,6)
speedBox.Parent = main

local speedLabel = Instance.new("TextLabel")
speedLabel.Size = UDim2.new(0.4,0,0,30)
speedLabel.Position = UDim2.new(0.6,0,0.53,0)
speedLabel.BackgroundTransparency = 1
speedLabel.Text = "设置速度"
speedLabel.Font = Enum.Font.GothamBold
speedLabel.TextSize = 14
speedLabel.TextColor3 = Color3.new(0.8,0.8,0.8)
speedLabel.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left
speedLabel.Parent = main

local flying = false
local BV, BG, conn, currentSpeed = nil, nil, nil, 60

local function stopFly()
    if conn then conn:Disconnect(); conn = nil end
    if BV then BV:Destroy(); BV = nil end
    if BG then BG:Destroy(); BG = nil end
    local character = LocalPlayer.Character
    if character then
        local hrp = character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
        local hum = character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
        if hrp and hum then hum.PlatformStand = false end
    end
    flying = false
    toggle.Text = "启动飞行"
    toggle.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255,50,50)
    status.Text = "状态: 未激活"
    status.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255,150,150)
end

local function startFly(speed)
    currentSpeed = tonumber(speed) or 60
    if currentSpeed <= 0 then currentSpeed = 60 end
    local character = LocalPlayer.Character
    if not character then return end
    local hrp = character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
    local hum = character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
    if not hrp or not hum then return end
    stopFly()
    hum.PlatformStand = true
    BV = Instance.new("BodyVelocity")
    BV.MaxForce = Vector3.new(1e9,1e9,1e9)
    BV.Velocity = Vector3.zero
    BV.Parent = hrp
    BG = Instance.new("BodyGyro")
    BG.MaxTorque = Vector3.new(1e9,1e9,1e9)
    BG.P = 3000
    BG.D = 700
    BG.Parent = hrp
    flying = true
    toggle.Text = "关闭飞行"
    toggle.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(50,255,50)
    status.Text = "状态: 飞行中"
    status.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(150,255,150)
    conn = RS.RenderStepped:Connect(function()
        if not (flying and BV and BG and hrp.Parent) then
            stopFly()
            return
        end
        local cam = workspace.CurrentCamera
        local move = Vector3.zero
        local ctrl = require(LocalPlayer.PlayerScripts:WaitForChild("PlayerModule"):WaitForChild("ControlModule")):GetMoveVector()
        if ctrl.Magnitude > 0 then
            move = move + cam.CFrame:VectorToWorldSpace(Vector3.new(ctrl.X,0,ctrl.Z)).Unit
        end
        if UIS:IsKeyDown(Enum.KeyCode.Space) then move = move + Vector3.yAxis end
        if UIS:IsKeyDown(Enum.KeyCode.LeftShift) then move = move - Vector3.yAxis end
        BV.Velocity = move * currentSpeed
        BG.CFrame = cam.CFrame
    end)
end

toggle.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
    if flying then stopFly() else startFly(speedBox.Text) end
end)

speedBox.FocusLost:Connect(function(enter)
    if enter then
        local v = tonumber(speedBox.Text)
        if v and v > 0 then
            if flying then startFly(v) end
        else
            speedBox.Text = tostring(currentSpeed)
        end
    end
end)

LocalPlayer.Chatted:Connect(function(msg)
    local split = msg:lower():split(" ")
    local cmd = split[1]
    if cmd == ";fly" then
        startFly(split[2])
    elseif cmd == ";unfly" then
        stopFly()
    end
end)
end)

end)

Section5:Button("在聊天框中进行图画(Pro版)", function()

Section5:Button("锁定视角", function()
local ShiftlockStarterGui = Instance.new("ScreenGui")
local ImageButton = Instance.new("ImageButton")
ShiftlockStarterGui.Name = "Shiftlock (StarterGui)"
ShiftlockStarterGui.Parent = game.CoreGui
ShiftlockStarterGui.ZIndexBehavior =  Enum.ZIndexBehavior.Sibling
ShiftlockStarterGui.ResetOnSpawn = false

ImageButton.Parent = ShiftlockStarterGui
ImageButton.Active = true
ImageButton.Draggable = true
ImageButton.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
ImageButton.BackgroundTransparency = 1.000
ImageButton.Position = UDim2.new(0.921914339, 0, 0.552375436, 0)
ImageButton.Size = UDim2.new(0.0636147112, 0, 0.0661305636, 0)
ImageButton.SizeConstraint = Enum.SizeConstraint.RelativeXX
ImageButton.Image = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=182223762"
local function TLQOYN_fake_script()
    local script = Instance.new("LocalScript", ImageButton)

    local MobileCameraFramework = {}
    local players = game:GetService("Players")
    local runservice = game:GetService("RunService")
    local CAS = game:GetService("ContextActionService")
    local player = players.LocalPlayer
    local character = player.Character or player.CharacterAdded:Wait()
    local root = character:WaitForChild("HumanoidRootPart")
    local humanoid = character.Humanoid
    local camera = workspace.CurrentCamera
    local button = script.Parent
    uis = game:GetService("UserInputService")
    ismobile = uis.TouchEnabled
    button.Visible = ismobile
    
    local states = {
        OFF = "rbxasset://textures/ui/mouseLock_off@2x.png",
        ON = "rbxasset://textures/ui/mouseLock_on@2x.png"
    }
    local MAX_LENGTH = 900000
    local active = false
    local ENABLED_OFFSET = CFrame.new(1.7, 0, 0)
    local DISABLED_OFFSET = CFrame.new(-1.7, 0, 0)
local rootPos = Vector3.new(0,0,0)
local function UpdatePos()
if player.Character and player.Character:FindFirstChildOfClass"Humanoid" and player.Character:FindFirstChildOfClass"Humanoid".RootPart then
rootPos = player.Character:FindFirstChildOfClass"Humanoid".RootPart.Position
end
end
    local function UpdateImage(STATE)
        button.Image = states[STATE]
    end
    local function UpdateAutoRotate(BOOL)
if player.Character and player.Character:FindFirstChildOfClass"Humanoid" then
player.Character:FindFirstChildOfClass"Humanoid".AutoRotate = BOOL
end
end
    local function GetUpdatedCameraCFrame()
if game:GetService"Workspace".CurrentCamera then
return CFrame.new(rootPos, Vector3.new(game:GetService"Workspace".CurrentCamera.CFrame.LookVector.X * MAX_LENGTH, rootPos.Y, game:GetService"Workspace".CurrentCamera.CFrame.LookVector.Z * MAX_LENGTH))
end
end
    local function EnableShiftlock()
UpdatePos()
        UpdateAutoRotate(false)
        UpdateImage("ON")
if player.Character and player.Character:FindFirstChildOfClass"Humanoid" and player.Character:FindFirstChildOfClass"Humanoid".RootPart then
player.Character:FindFirstChildOfClass"Humanoid".RootPart.CFrame = GetUpdatedCameraCFrame()
end
if game:GetService"Workspace".CurrentCamera then
game:GetService"Workspace".CurrentCamera.CFrame = camera.CFrame * ENABLED_OFFSET
end
    end
    local function DisableShiftlock()
UpdatePos()
        UpdateAutoRotate(true)
        UpdateImage("OFF")
        if game:GetService"Workspace".CurrentCamera then
game:GetService"Workspace".CurrentCamera.CFrame = camera.CFrame * DISABLED_OFFSET
end
        pcall(function()
            active:Disconnect()
            active = nil
        end)
    end
    UpdateImage("OFF")
    active = false
    function ShiftLock()
        if not active then
            active = runservice.RenderStepped:Connect(function()
                EnableShiftlock()
            end)
        else
            DisableShiftlock()
        end
    end
    local ShiftLockButton = CAS:BindAction("ShiftLOCK", ShiftLock, false, "On")
    CAS:SetPosition("ShiftLOCK", UDim2.new(0.8, 0, 0.8, 0))
    button.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
        if not active then
            active = runservice.RenderStepped:Connect(function()
                EnableShiftlock()
            end)
        else
            DisableShiftlock()
        end
    end)
    return MobileCameraFramework
    
end
coroutine.wrap(TLQOYN_fake_script)()
local function OMQRQRC_fake_script()
    local script = Instance.new("LocalScript", ShiftlockStarterGui)

    local Players = game:GetService("Players")
    local UserInputService = game:GetService("UserInputService")
    local Settings = UserSettings()
    local GameSettings = Settings.GameSettings
    local ShiftLockController = {}
    while not Players.LocalPlayer do
        wait()
    end
    local LocalPlayer = Players.LocalPlayer
    local Mouse = LocalPlayer:GetMouse()
    local PlayerGui = LocalPlayer:WaitForChild("PlayerGui")
    local ScreenGui, ShiftLockIcon, InputCn
    local IsShiftLockMode = true
    local IsShiftLocked = true
    local IsActionBound = false
    local IsInFirstPerson = false
    ShiftLockController.OnShiftLockToggled = Instance.new("BindableEvent")
    local function isShiftLockMode()
        return LocalPlayer.DevEnableMouseLock and GameSettings.ControlMode == Enum.ControlMode.MouseLockSwitch and LocalPlayer.DevComputerMovementMode ~= Enum.DevComputerMovementMode.ClickToMove and GameSettings.ComputerMovementMode ~= Enum.ComputerMovementMode.ClickToMove and LocalPlayer.DevComputerMovementMode ~= Enum.DevComputerMovementMode.Scriptable
    end
    if not UserInputService.TouchEnabled then
        IsShiftLockMode = isShiftLockMode()
    end
    local function onShiftLockToggled()
        IsShiftLocked = not IsShiftLocked
        ShiftLockController.OnShiftLockToggled:Fire()
    end
    local initialize = function()
        print("enabled")
    end
    function ShiftLockController:IsShiftLocked()
        return IsShiftLockMode and IsShiftLocked
    end
    function ShiftLockController:SetIsInFirstPerson(isInFirstPerson)
        IsInFirstPerson = isInFirstPerson
    end
    local function mouseLockSwitchFunc(actionName, inputState, inputObject)
        if IsShiftLockMode then
            onShiftLockToggled()
        end
    end
    local function disableShiftLock()
        if ScreenGui then
            ScreenGui.Parent = nil
        end
        IsShiftLockMode = false
        Mouse.Icon = ""
        if InputCn then
            InputCn:disconnect()
            InputCn = nil
        end
        IsActionBound = false
        ShiftLockController.OnShiftLockToggled:Fire()
    end
    local onShiftInputBegan = function(inputObject, isProcessed)
        if isProcessed then
            return
        end
        if inputObject.UserInputType ~= Enum.UserInputType.Keyboard or inputObject.KeyCode == Enum.KeyCode.LeftShift or inputObject.KeyCode == Enum.KeyCode.RightShift then
        end
    end
    local function enableShiftLock()
        IsShiftLockMode = isShiftLockMode()
        if IsShiftLockMode then
            if ScreenGui then
                ScreenGui.Parent = PlayerGui
            end
            if IsShiftLocked then
                ShiftLockController.OnShiftLockToggled:Fire()
            end
            if not IsActionBound then
                InputCn = UserInputService.InputBegan:connect(onShiftInputBegan)
                IsActionBound = true
            end
        end
    end
    GameSettings.Changed:connect(function(property)
        if property == "ControlMode" then
            if GameSettings.ControlMode == Enum.ControlMode.MouseLockSwitch then
                enableShiftLock()
            else
                disableShiftLock()
            end
        elseif property == "ComputerMovementMode" then
            if GameSettings.ComputerMovementMode == Enum.ComputerMovementMode.ClickToMove then
                disableShiftLock()
            else
                enableShiftLock()
            end
        end
    end)
    LocalPlayer.Changed:connect(function(property)
        if property == "DevEnableMouseLock" then
            if LocalPlayer.DevEnableMouseLock then
                enableShiftLock()
            else
                disableShiftLock()
            end
        elseif property == "DevComputerMovementMode" then
            if LocalPlayer.DevComputerMovementMode == Enum.DevComputerMovementMode.ClickToMove or LocalPlayer.DevComputerMovementMode == Enum.DevComputerMovementMode.Scriptable then
                disableShiftLock()
            else
                enableShiftLock()
            end
        end
    end)
    LocalPlayer.CharacterAdded:connect(function(character)
        if not UserInputService.TouchEnabled then
            initialize()
        end
    end)
    if not UserInputService.TouchEnabled then
        initialize()
        if isShiftLockMode() then
            InputCn = UserInputService.InputBegan:connect(onShiftInputBegan)
            IsActionBound = true
        end
    end
    enableShiftLock()
    return ShiftLockController
    
end
coroutine.wrap(OMQRQRC_fake_script)()
end)

Enable if you want the feature
]]

will not appear above your character, but you will have your character immortal in the Fencing arena.
]]

will not appear above your character, but you will have your character immortal in the Fencing arena.
]]

local Section6 = Tab3:section("通用脚本2", false)
Section6:Button("点击传送", function()
    mouse = game.Players.LocalPlayer:GetMouse()
    tool = Instance.new("Tool")
    tool.RequiresHandle = false
    tool.Name = "[BS]传送工具"
    tool.Activated:connect(function()
        local pos = mouse.Hit+Vector3.new(0,2.5,0)
        pos = CFrame.new(pos.X,pos.Y,pos.Z)
        game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = pos
    end)
    tool.Parent = game.Players.LocalPlayer.Backpack
end)
Section6:Button("吸人脚本(全局吸不可关闭)", function()
    --[[
Subscribe to Zaptosis
--]]

local L_1_ = true;
local L_2_ = game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart;
local L_3_ = L_2_.Position - Vector3.new(5, 0, 0)

game.Players.LocalPlayer:GetMouse().KeyDown:Connect(function(L_4_arg1)
	if L_4_arg1 == 'f' then
		L_1_ = not L_1_
	end;
	if L_4_arg1 == 'r' then
		L_2_ = game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart;
		L_3_ = L_2_.Position - Vector3.new(5, 0, 0)
	end
end)

for L_5_forvar1, L_6_forvar2 in pairs(game.Players:GetPlayers()) do
	if L_6_forvar2 == game.Players.LocalPlayer then
	else
		local L_7_ = coroutine.create(function()
			game:GetService('RunService').RenderStepped:Connect(function()
				local L_8_, L_9_ = pcall(function()
					local L_10_ = L_6_forvar2.Character;
					if L_10_ then
						if L_10_:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
							if L_1_ then
								L_6_forvar2.Backpack:ClearAllChildren()
								for L_11_forvar1, L_12_forvar2 in pairs(L_10_:GetChildren()) do
									if L_12_forvar2:IsA("Tool") then
										L_12_forvar2:Destroy()
									end
								end;
								L_10_.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(L_3_)
							end
						end
					end
				end)
				if L_8_ then
				else
					warn("Unnormal error: "..L_9_)
				end
			end)
		end)
		coroutine.resume(L_7_)
	end
end;

game.Players.PlayerAdded:Connect(function(L_13_arg1)   
	if L_13_arg1 == game.Players.LocalPlayer then
	else
		local L_14_ = coroutine.create(function()
			game:GetService('RunService').RenderStepped:Connect(function()
				local L_15_, L_16_ = pcall(function()
					local L_17_ = L_13_arg1.Character;
					if L_17_ then
						if L_17_:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
							if L_1_ then
								L_13_arg1.Backpack:ClearAllChildren()
								for L_18_forvar1, L_19_forvar2 in pairs(L_17_:GetChildren()) do
									if L_19_forvar2:IsA("Tool") then
										L_19_forvar2:Destroy()
									end
								end;
								L_17_.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(L_3_)
							end
						end
					end
				end)
				if L_15_ then
				else
					warn("Unnormal error: "..L_16_)
				end
			end)
		end)
		coroutine.resume(L_14_)
	end           
end)
end)

Section6:Toggle("定住自己", "NightVision", false, function(Value)
          if Value then 
                       for i,v in pairs(game.Players:GetChildren()) do
local Target = v.Name
local R_C = Instance.new("BallSocketConstraint")
R_C.Parent = game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart
local hah = Instance.new("Attachment")
hah.Parent = game.Players[Target].Character.HumanoidRootPart
local hah2 = Instance.new("Attachment")
hah2.Parent = game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart
R_C.Attachment0 = hah
R_C.Attachment1 = hah2
R_C.Visible = false
wait(0.1)
end
    else
        -- 解除所有玩家约束的脚本
local function RemoveAllConstraints()
    -- 遍历所有玩家
    for _, player in ipairs(game:GetService("Players"):GetPlayers()) do
        if player.Character then
            local humanoidRootPart = player.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
            if humanoidRootPart then
                -- 删除所有约束
                for _, child in ipairs(humanoidRootPart:GetChildren()) do
                    if child:IsA("Constraint") then
                        child:Destroy()
                    end
                end
                
                -- 删除所有Attachment（可选）
                for _, child in ipairs(humanoidRootPart:GetChildren()) do
                    if child:IsA("Attachment") then
                        child:Destroy()
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    end
    print("已移除所有玩家的物理约束")
end

-- 自动执行（可选）
RemoveAllConstraints()

-- 也可以绑定到按键（例如按F8解除）
game:GetService("UserInputService").InputBegan:Connect(function(input, processed)
    if not processed and input.KeyCode == Enum.KeyCode.F8 then
        RemoveAllConstraints()
    end
end)

print("按F8键可以解除所有玩家的移动限制")
    end
end)

Section7:Button("0范围", function()
    _G.HeadSize = 0
    _G.Disabled = true
    game:GetService('RunService').RenderStepped:connect(function()
        if _G.Disabled then
            for i,v in next, game:GetService('Players'):GetPlayers() do
                if v.Name ~= game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.Name then
                    pcall(function()
                        v.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Size = Vector3.new(_G.HeadSize,_G.HeadSize,_G.HeadSize)
                        v.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Transparency = 0.7
                        v.Character.HumanoidRootPart.BrickColor = BrickColor.new("Really red")
                        v.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Material = "Neon"
                        v.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CanCollide = false
                    end)
                end
            end
        end
    end)
end)

Section7:Button("位置", function()
local ScreenGui = Instance.new("ScreenGui")
local Frame = Instance.new("Frame")
local title = Instance.new("TextLabel")
local copy = Instance.new("TextButton")
local pos = Instance.new("TextBox")
local find = Instance.new("TextButton")



ScreenGui.Parent = game.CoreGui
ScreenGui.ZIndexBehavior = Enum.ZIndexBehavior.Sibling

Frame.Parent = ScreenGui
Frame.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(43, 43, 43)

local function UMTQ_fake_script() 
  local script = Instance.new('LocalScript', copy)

  script.Parent.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
    setclipboard(script.Parent.Parent.pos.Text)
  end)
end
coroutine.wrap(UMTQ_fake_script)()
local function KJAYG_fake_script() 
  local script = Instance.new('LocalScript', Frame)

  local UIS = game:GetService("UserInputService")
  function dragify(Frame)
    dragToggle = nil
    local dragSpeed = 0
    dragInput = nil
    dragStart = nil
    local dragPos = nil
    function updateInput(input)
      local Delta = input.Position - dragStart
      local Position = UDim2.new(startPos.X.Scale, startPos.X.Offset + Delta.X, startPos.Y.Scale, startPos.Y.Offset + Delta.Y)
      game:GetService("TweenService"):Create(Frame, TweenInfo.new(0.25), {Position = Position}):Play()
    end
    Frame.InputBegan:Connect(function(input)
      if (input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1 or input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Touch) and UIS:GetFocusedTextBox() == nil then
        dragToggle = true
        dragStart = input.Position
        startPos = Frame.Position
        input.Changed:Connect(function()
          if input.UserInputState == Enum.UserInputState.End then
            dragToggle = false
          end
        end)
      end
    end)
    Frame.InputChanged:Connect(function(input)
      if input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseMovement or input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Touch then
        dragInput = input
      end
    end)
    game:GetService("UserInputService").InputChanged:Connect(function(input)
      if input == dragInput and dragToggle then
        updateInput(input)
      end
    end)
  end

  dragify(script.Parent)
end
coroutine.wrap(KJAYG_fake_script)()
local function EKBNYI_fake_script() 
  local script = Instance.new('LocalScript', find)

  script.Parent.MouseButton1Down:Connect(function()
    script.Parent.Parent.pos.Text = tostring(game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position)
  end)
end
coroutine.wrap(EKBNYI_fake_script)()
end)

-- 全局变量
local currentSeat = nil
local currentModel = nil
local flying = false
local moving = {
    forward = false,
    backward = false,
    up = false,
    down = false
}
local cameraController = nil
local physicsController = nil
local lastValidCameraCFrame = nil
local cameraOffset = CFrame.new(0, 5, -15)
local smoothFactor = 0.2
local collisionCheckRay = Ray.new(Vector3.new(), Vector3.new())
local controlPart = nil
local BV = nil
local BG = nil
local wasSitting = false -- 记录开启飞行前是否坐着
local isVirtualSeat = false -- 标记是否为虚拟座位
local virtualVehicleModel = nil -- 虚拟载具模型

-- 辅助函数：线性插值
local function lerp(a, b, t)
    return a + (b - a) * math.min(t, 1)
end

-- 通用座位检测函数
local function findSeat(character)
    if not character then return nil end
    
    -- 1. 检查当前是否已坐在座位上
    local humanoid = character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
    if humanoid and humanoid.SeatPart then
        return humanoid.SeatPart
    end
    
    -- 2. 检查角色附近是否有座位
    local rootPart = character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") or character:FindFirstChild("Torso")
    if not rootPart then return nil end
    
    local nearbySeats = {}
    local radius = 15
    
    -- 检查附近的座位
    for _, part in ipairs(workspace:GetPartsInPart(rootPart, radius)) do
        if part:IsA("Seat") or part:IsA("VehicleSeat") then
            table.insert(nearbySeats, part)
        end
    end
    
    -- 如果有多个座位，选择最近的一个
    if #nearbySeats > 0 then
        table.sort(nearbySeats, function(a, b)
            return (a.Position - rootPart.Position).Magnitude < (b.Position - rootPart.Position).Magnitude
        end)
        return nearbySeats[1]
    end
    
    -- 3. 检查角色是否在载具中
    if character.Parent and character.Parent:IsA("Model") then
        for _, part in ipairs(character.Parent:GetDescendants()) do
            if part:IsA("VehicleSeat") and part.Occupant == humanoid then
                return part
            end
        end
    end
    
    return nil
end

-- 创建虚拟座位
local function createVirtualSeat()
    -- 创建虚拟载具模型
    virtualVehicleModel = Instance.new("Model")
    virtualVehicleModel.Name = "FlymVirtualVehicle"
    
    -- 创建控制部件
    controlPart = Instance.new("Part")
    controlPart.Name = "ControlPart"
    controlPart.Anchored = false
    controlPart.CanCollide = false
    controlPart.Transparency = 1
    controlPart.Size = Vector3.new(2, 2, 2)
    controlPart.Position = localPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position
    controlPart.Parent = virtualVehicleModel
    
    virtualVehicleModel.PrimaryPart = controlPart
    
    -- 创建虚拟座位
    local virtualSeat = Instance.new("Seat")
    virtualSeat.Name = "VirtualSeat"
    virtualSeat.Transparency = 1
    virtualSeat.CanCollide = false
    virtualSeat.Size = Vector3.new(2, 2, 2)
    virtualSeat.CFrame = controlPart.CFrame
    virtualSeat.Parent = virtualVehicleModel
    
    virtualVehicleModel.Parent = workspace
    
    return virtualSeat
end

-- 让玩家坐下到指定座位
local function sitPlayerInSeat(seat)
    local char = localPlayer.Character
    if not char then return false end
    
    local humanoid = char:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
    if not humanoid then return false end
    
    -- 如果玩家已经在座位上，不需要操作
    if humanoid.SeatPart == seat then
        return true
    end
    
    -- 尝试传送玩家到座位附近
    local rootPart = char:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") or char:FindFirstChild("Torso")
    if rootPart then
        rootPart.CFrame = seat.CFrame + Vector3.new(0, 3, 0)
        task.wait(0.1)
    end
    
    -- 尝试坐下
    humanoid.Sit = true
    task.wait(0.1)
    
    -- 检查是否坐下成功
    if humanoid.SeatPart == seat then
        return true
    end
    
    -- 如果失败，再次尝试
    if rootPart then
        rootPart.CFrame = seat.CFrame + Vector3.new(0, 3, 0)
        task.wait(0.1)
        humanoid.Sit = true
        task.wait(0.2)
    end
    
    return humanoid.SeatPart == seat
end

-- 飞行控制功能
Fly.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
    local char = localPlayer.Character
    if not char then
        Stat2.Text = "角色未加载!"
        Stat2.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 0)
        task.wait(1.5)
        Stat2.Text = "关闭"
        Stat2.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 0, 0)
        return
    end
    
    -- 尝试查找座位
    local seat = findSeat(char)
    
    -- 如果没有找到座位，创建虚拟座位
    if not seat then
        seat = createVirtualSeat()
        isVirtualSeat = true
        Stat2.Text = "使用虚拟座位"
        Stat2.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 0)
        task.wait(0.5)
    else
        isVirtualSeat = false
    end
    
    -- 记录玩家是否原本坐在座位上
    local humanoid = char:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
    wasSitting = humanoid and humanoid.Sit
    
    -- 确保玩家坐在座位上
    local sitSuccess = sitPlayerInSeat(seat)
    
    if not sitSuccess then
        Stat2.Text = "坐下失败!"
        Stat2.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 0)
        task.wait(1.5)
        Stat2.Text = "关闭"
        Stat2.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 0, 0)
        return
    end

    -- 获取控制部件
    if isVirtualSeat then
        controlPart = virtualVehicleModel.PrimaryPart
        currentModel = virtualVehicleModel
    else
        -- 对于普通座位，直接使用座位本身作为控制部件
        controlPart = seat
        currentModel = seat:FindFirstAncestorOfClass("Model") or seat
    end
    
    Fly.Visible = false
    Stat2.Text = "控制中"
    Stat2.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 255, 0)
    Unfly.Visible = true
    Flyon.Visible = true
    flying = true
    currentSeat = seat
    
    -- 移除现有控件
    if controlPart:FindFirstChild("FlyingBodyVelocity") then
        controlPart.FlyingBodyVelocity:Destroy()
    end
    if controlPart:FindFirstChild("FlyingBodyGyro") then
        controlPart.FlyingBodyGyro:Destroy()
    end
    
    -- 创建控制器
    BV = Instance.new("BodyVelocity")
    BV.Name = "FlyingBodyVelocity"
    BV.Parent = controlPart
    BV.MaxForce = Vector3.new(math.huge, math.huge, math.huge)
    BV.Velocity = Vector3.new(0, 0, 0)
    
    BG = Instance.new("BodyGyro")
    BG.Name = "FlyingBodyGyro"
    BG.Parent = controlPart
    BG.MaxTorque = Vector3.new(20000, 20000, 20000)
    BG.D = 1500
    BG.P = 12000
    
    -- 改进的视角控制系统
    local function updateCamera()
        if not flying or not controlPart or not controlPart.Parent then
            -- 如果控制部件不存在，恢复默认摄像机
            if localPlayer.Character then
                local humanoid = localPlayer.Character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
                if humanoid then
                    workspace.CurrentCamera.CameraType = Enum.CameraType.Custom
                    workspace.CurrentCamera.CameraSubject = humanoid
                end
            end
            return
        end
        
        local cam = workspace.CurrentCamera
        local vehiclePos = controlPart.Position
        local vehicleLook = controlPart.CFrame.LookVector
        
        -- 计算理想摄像机位置
        local idealOffset = cameraOffset
        local targetPos = controlPart.CFrame * idealOffset
        local targetLook = vehiclePos + vehicleLook * 10
        
        -- 碰撞检测
        collisionCheckRay.Origin = vehiclePos
        collisionCheckRay.Direction = (targetPos.p - vehiclePos).Unit
        local hit = workspace:FindPartOnRay(collisionCheckRay, currentModel or controlPart)
        
        if hit then
            targetPos = CFrame.new(hit.Position + collisionCheckRay.Direction * 2)
        end
        
        -- 平滑过渡
        if lastValidCameraCFrame then
            cam.CFrame = lastValidCameraCFrame:Lerp(
                CFrame.new(targetPos.p, targetLook),
                smoothFactor
            )
        else
            cam.CFrame = CFrame.new(targetPos.p, targetLook)
        end
        
        lastValidCameraCFrame = cam.CFrame
    end
    
    -- 启动视角控制器
    if cameraController then
        cameraController:Disconnect()
    end
    cameraController = game:GetService("RunService").RenderStepped:Connect(updateCamera)
    
    -- 运动控制循环
    physicsController = _G.CreateHeartbeatConnection(function()
        if not flying then
            if physicsController then
                physicsController:Disconnect()
            end
            return
        end
        
        -- 检查控制部件是否存在
        if not controlPart or not controlPart.Parent then
            Stat2.Text = "丢失连接!"
            Stat2.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 0)
            Unfly:Click()
            return
        end
        
        -- 确保控制部件存在
        if not BV or not BV.Parent then
            -- 尝试查找现有部件
            BV = controlPart:FindFirstChild("FlyingBodyVelocity")
            
            -- 如果不存在，创建新的
            if not BV then
                BV = Instance.new("BodyVelocity")
                BV.Name = "FlyingBodyVelocity"
                BV.Parent = controlPart
                BV.MaxForce = Vector3.new(math.huge, math.huge, math.huge)
                BV.Velocity = Vector3.new(0, 0, 0)
            end
        end
        
        if not BG or not BG.Parent then
            BG = controlPart:FindFirstChild("FlyingBodyGyro")
            if not BG then
                BG = Instance.new("BodyGyro")
                BG.Name = "FlyingBodyGyro"
                BG.Parent = controlPart
                BG.MaxTorque = Vector3.new(20000, 20000, 20000)
                BG.D = 1500
                BG.P = 12000
            end
        end
        
        local speedValue = tonumber(Speed.Text) or 50
        local moveDirection = Vector3.new(0, 0, 0)
        
        -- 运动控制
        if moving.forward then
            moveDirection = moveDirection + workspace.CurrentCamera.CFrame.LookVector
        end
        if moving.backward then
            moveDirection = moveDirection - workspace.CurrentCamera.CFrame.LookVector
        end
        if moving.up then
            moveDirection = moveDirection + Vector3.new(0, 1, 0)
        end
        if moving.down then
            moveDirection = moveDirection + Vector3.new(0, -1, 0)
        end
        
        -- 应用速度
        if moveDirection.Magnitude > 0 then
            BV.Velocity = moveDirection.Unit * speedValue
        else
            BV.Velocity = Vector3.new(0, 0, 0)
        end
        
        -- 方向控制
        if BG and BG.Parent then
            BG.CFrame = CFrame.new(controlPart.Position, controlPart.Position + workspace.CurrentCamera.CFrame.LookVector)
        end
    end)
end)

-- 运动控制按钮事件
W.MouseButton1Down:Connect(function() moving.forward = true end)
W.MouseButton1Up:Connect(function() moving.forward = false end)
S.MouseButton1Down:Connect(function() moving.backward = true end)
S.MouseButton1Up:Connect(function() moving.backward = false end)
Up.MouseButton1Down:Connect(function() moving.up = true end)
Up.MouseButton1Up:Connect(function() moving.up = false end)
Down.MouseButton1Down:Connect(function() moving.down = true end)
Down.MouseButton1Up:Connect(function() moving.down = false end)

-- 关闭控制功能
Unfly.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
    flying = false
    for k in pairs(moving) do moving[k] = false end
    
    -- 安全移除控制部件
    pcall(function()
        if controlPart and controlPart.Parent then
            if controlPart:FindFirstChild("FlyingBodyVelocity") then
                controlPart.FlyingBodyVelocity:Destroy()
            end
            if controlPart:FindFirstChild("FlyingBodyGyro") then
                controlPart.FlyingBodyGyro:Destroy()
            end
        end
        
        -- 销毁虚拟座位
        if isVirtualSeat and virtualVehicleModel then
            virtualVehicleModel:Destroy()
            virtualVehicleModel = nil
            isVirtualSeat = false
        end
    end)
    
    if cameraController then
        cameraController:Disconnect()
        cameraController = nil
    end
    
    if physicsController then
        physicsController:Disconnect()
        physicsController = nil
    end
    
    Fly.Visible = true
    Stat2.Text = "关闭"
    Stat2.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 0, 0)
    Unfly.Visible = false
    Flyon.Visible = false
    
    -- 恢复摄像机
    if localPlayer.Character then
        local humanoid = localPlayer.Character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
        if humanoid then
            workspace.CurrentCamera.CameraType = Enum.CameraType.Custom
            workspace.CurrentCamera.CameraSubject = humanoid
            
            -- 如果原本是坐着的状态，尝试重新坐下
            if wasSitting then
                task.wait(0.5)
                humanoid.Sit = true
            end
        end
    end
end)

-- 关闭按钮功能
Close.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
    -- 安全清理所有资源
    if flying then
        Unfly:Click()
    end
    Flymguiv2:Destroy()
end)

-- 最小化按钮功能
local function Mini()
    if Minimize.Text == "-" then
        Minimize.Text = "+"
        FlyFrame.Visible = false
    else
        Minimize.Text = "-"
        FlyFrame.Visible = true
    end
end
Minimize.MouseButton1Click:Connect(Mini)

-- 初始状态检查
task.spawn(function()
    while wait(1) do
        if flying then
            -- 定期检查控制状态
            if not controlPart or not controlPart.Parent then
                Stat2.Text = "丢失连接!"
                Stat2.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 0)
                Unfly:Click()
            elseif not BV or not BV.Parent or not BG or not BG.Parent then
                Stat2.Text = "恢复控制中..."
                Stat2.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 0)
                
                -- 尝试重新获取控制
                BV = controlPart:FindFirstChild("FlyingBodyVelocity")
                BG = controlPart:FindFirstChild("FlyingBodyGyro")
                
                if BV and BG then
                    Stat2.Text = "控制中"
                    Stat2.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 255, 0)
                end
            end
            
            -- 检查玩家是否还在座位上
            local char = localPlayer.Character
            if char then
                local humanoid = char:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
                if humanoid and humanoid.SeatPart ~= currentSeat then
                    Stat2.Text = "玩家离开座位!"
                    Stat2.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 0)
                    Unfly:Click()
                end
            end
        end
    end
end)
end)

Section7:Button("让头定在原地", function()
    local lp = game:GetService "Players".LocalPlayer
    if lp.Character:FindFirstChild "Head" then
        local char = lp.Character
        char.Archivable = true
        local new = char:Clone()
        new.Parent = workspace
        lp.Character = new
        wait(0.1)
        local oldhum = char:FindFirstChildWhichIsA "Humanoid"
        local newhum = oldhum:Clone()
        newhum.Parent = char
        newhum.RequiresNeck = false
        oldhum.Parent = nil
        wait(0.1)
        lp.Character = char
        new:Destroy()
        wait(0.1)
        newhum:GetPropertyChangedSignal("Health"):Connect(function()
            if newhum.Health <= 0 then
                oldhum.Parent = lp.Character
                wait(0.1)
                oldhum:Destroy()
            end
        end)
        workspace.CurrentCamera.CameraSubject = char
        if char:FindFirstChild "Animate" then
            char.Animate.Disabled = true
            wait(0.1)
            char.Animate.Disabled = false
        end
        lp.Character:FindFirstChild "Head":Destroy()
    end
end)

local Section8 = Tab3:section("通用脚本4", false)
Section8:Button("让走路和跳跃变卡(对别人没影响)", function()
    loadstring(game:HttpGet(" https://rawscripts.net/raw/Universal-Script-Fake-lag-41217"))()
end)
Section8:Button("蜘蛛侠", function()
loadstring([[
-- 服务
local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local TweenService = game:GetService("TweenService")
local UserInputService = game:GetService("UserInputService")
local RunService = game:GetService("RunService")
local Debris = game:GetService("Debris")

local player = Players.LocalPlayer
local camera = workspace.CurrentCamera

-- 状态变量
local autoPull, noclip, webPhysics, spiderMode = false, false, false, false
local targetPos, currentWeb = nil, nil

-- 图形界面
local guiMain, panelFrame, btnAuto, btnNoclip, btnSpider, subButtons = nil

local function buildGui()
    if guiMain then guiMain:Destroy() end
    guiMain = Instance.new("ScreenGui", player:WaitForChild("PlayerGui"))
    guiMain.ResetOnSpawn = false

    panelFrame = Instance.new("Frame")
    panelFrame.Size = UDim2.new(0, 210, 0, 260)
    panelFrame.Position = UDim2.new(0.1, 0, 0.4, 0)
    panelFrame.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(30, 30, 30)
    panelFrame.BackgroundTransparency = 0.2
    panelFrame.Active = true
    panelFrame.Parent = guiMain

    -- 使面板可拖动（支持移动端+桌面端）
    local dragging = false
    local dragStartPos = nil
    local startPos = nil

    panelFrame.InputBegan:Connect(function(input)
        if input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Touch or input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1 then
            dragging = true
            dragStartPos = input.Position
            startPos = panelFrame.Position
            input.Changed:Connect(function()
                if input.UserInputState == Enum.UserInputState.End then
                    dragging = false
                end
            end)
        end
    end)

    panelFrame.InputChanged:Connect(function(input)
        if dragging and (input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Touch or input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseMovement) then
            local delta = input.Position - dragStartPos
            panelFrame.Position = UDim2.new(startPos.X.Scale, startPos.X.Offset + delta.X,
                                            startPos.Y.Scale, startPos.Y.Offset + delta.Y)
        end
    end)

    -- 按钮创建函数
    local function mk(text, y)
        local btn = Instance.new("TextButton", panelFrame)
        btn.Size = UDim2.new(1, -10, 0, 40)
        btn.Position = UDim2.new(0, 5, 0, y)
        btn.Text = text
        btn.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(70, 70, 70)
        btn.TextColor3 = Color3.new(1, 1, 1)
        btn.Font = Enum.Font.SourceSansBold
        btn.TextSize = 18
        return btn
    end

    btnAuto = mk("自动行走: 关闭", 10)
    btnNoclip = mk("穿墙模式: 关闭", 60)
    btnSpider = mk("🕷 蜘蛛侠模式", 110)
    local btnWebPull = mk("蛛网牵引: 关闭", 160)
    local btnWebPhys = mk("蛛网物理: 关闭", 210)

    subButtons = {btnWebPull, btnWebPhys}
    for _, b in ipairs(subButtons) do
        b.Visible = false
    end

    btnSpider.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
        spiderMode = not spiderMode
        for _, b in ipairs(subButtons) do
            b.Visible = spiderMode
        end
    end)

    btnAuto.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
        autoPull = not autoPull
        btnAuto.Text = "自动行走: " .. (autoPull and "开启" or "关闭")
        btnAuto.BackgroundColor3 = autoPull and Color3.fromRGB(0, 120, 255) or Color3.fromRGB(70, 70, 70)
    end)

    btnNoclip.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
        noclip = not noclip
        btnNoclip.Text = "穿墙模式: " .. (noclip and "开启" or "关闭")
    end)

    btnWebPull.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
        webPhysics = false
        autoPull = true
        btnWebPull.Text = "蛛网牵引: 开启"
        btnWebPhys.Text = "蛛网物理: 关闭"
    end)

    btnWebPhys.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
        webPhysics = true
        autoPull = false
        btnWebPhys.Text = "蛛网物理: 开启"
        btnWebPull.Text = "蛛网牵引: 关闭"
    end)
end

local function createWeb(startPos, endPos)
    if currentWeb then currentWeb:Destroy() end
    local p1 = Instance.new("Part", workspace)
    p1.Anchored = true
    p1.CanCollide = false
    p1.Transparency = 1
    p1.CFrame = CFrame.new(startPos)
    local p2 = Instance.new("Part", workspace)
    p2.Anchored = true
    p2.CanCollide = false
    p2.Transparency = 1
    p2.CFrame = CFrame.new(endPos)
    local a1 = Instance.new("Attachment", p1)
    local a2 = Instance.new("Attachment", p2)
    local beam = Instance.new("Beam", p1)
    beam.Attachment0 = a1
    beam.Attachment1 = a2
    beam.Width0 = 2
    beam.Width1 = 2
    beam.LightEmission = 1
    beam.Texture = "rbxassetid://446111271"  -- 蛛网材质ID
    beam.TextureMode = Enum.TextureMode.Stretch
    beam.TextureLength = 1
    beam.TextureSpeed = 2
    beam.Color = ColorSequence.new(Color3.new(1, 1, 1))
    beam.Transparency = NumberSequence.new(0.05)
    currentWeb = Instance.new("Folder", workspace)
    p1.Parent = currentWeb
    p2.Parent = currentWeb
end

local function useWeb()
    if not targetPos then
        return
    end
    local char = player.Character or player.CharacterAdded:Wait()
    local root = char:WaitForChild("HumanoidRootPart")
    createWeb(root.Position, targetPos)
    if webPhysics then  -- 物理模式
        local bv = Instance.new("BodyVelocity", root)
        bv.MaxForce = Vector3.new(1e6, 1e6, 1e6)
        bv.Velocity = (targetPos - root.Position).Unit * 100
        Debris:AddItem(bv, 0.5)
    elseif autoPull then  -- 自动牵引模式
        local tw = TweenService:Create(root, TweenInfo.new(0.6, Enum.EasingStyle.Quad), {
            CFrame = CFrame.new(targetPos + Vector3.new(0, 3, 0))  -- 目标点上移3单位
        })
        tw:Play()
    end
end

UserInputService.InputBegan:Connect(function(input, processed)
    if processed then
        return
    end
    if
        input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Touch
        or input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1
    then
        local ray = camera:ScreenPointToRay(input.Position.X, input.Position.Y)
        local rp = RaycastParams.new()
        rp.FilterDescendantsInstances = {player.Character}
        rp.FilterType = Enum.RaycastFilterType.Blacklist  -- 排除玩家角色
        local hit = workspace:Raycast(ray.Origin, ray.Direction * 500, rp)
        if hit then
            targetPos = hit.Position
            useWeb()
        end
    end
end)

RunService.RenderStepped:Connect(function()
    local char = player.Character
    if char and noclip then
        for _, p in pairs(char:GetDescendants()) do
            if p:IsA("BasePart") then
                p.CanCollide = false  -- 禁用所有部件碰撞
            end
        end
    end
end)

player.CharacterAdded:Connect(function()
    wait(1)
    buildGui()
    if targetPos then
        wait(0.5)
        useWeb()  -- 角色重生后重新使用蛛网
    end
end)

buildGui()  -- 初始创建界面
]])()
end)
Section8:Button("变成Boss", function()
--// Fe sonic.exe 由 Jinxx cuh 制作 | 汉化版

local player = game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer
local char = player.Character or player.CharacterAdded:Wait()
local hum = char:WaitForChild("Humanoid")
local hrp = char:WaitForChild("HumanoidRootPart")
local cam = workspace.CurrentCamera

hum.WalkSpeed = 30  -- 初始移动速度

-- 恐怖笑声音效
local sfx = Instance.new("Sound", char:FindFirstChild("Head") or char)
sfx.SoundId = "rbxassetid://2496367477"
sfx.Volume = 4
sfx:Play()
task.delay(3, function()
    sfx:Stop()
end)

-- 头顶文字效果
local startText = Instance.new("BillboardGui", char)
