Rose:Button("奇葩飞行", function()
local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local UserInputService = game:GetService("UserInputService")
local RunService = game:GetService("RunService")
local TweenService = game:GetService("TweenService")
local Workspace = game:GetService("Workspace")

-- 确保使用正确的玩家对象
local player = Players.LocalPlayer

-- 初始化角色变量
local character = player.Character or player.CharacterAdded:Wait()
local humanoid = character:WaitForChild("Humanoid")
local rootPart = character:WaitForChild("HumanoidRootPart")

-- 飞行状态
local isFlying = false
local flightSpeed = 50
local maxSpeed = 150
local boostMultiplier = 2.5
local isBoosting = false
local flightHeight = 5
local isMobile = UserInputService.TouchEnabled

-- 更真实的超人飞行动画
local flightAnimation = Instance.new("Animation")
flightAnimation.AnimationId = "rbxassetid://188647419" -- 更标准的超人飞行动画

-- 存储原始关节角度（用于恢复）
local originalJoints = {}

-- 粒子效果
local function createFlightEffects()
    local effects = {}
    
    -- 脚部粒子
    local leftFoot = character:FindFirstChild("LeftFoot") or character:FindFirstChild("LeftLeg") or rootPart
    local rightFoot = character:FindFirstChild("RightFoot") or character:FindFirstChild("RightLeg") or rootPart
    
    if leftFoot then
        local leftParticle = Instance.new("ParticleEmitter")
        leftParticle.Color = ColorSequence.new(Color3.new(0, 0.8, 1))
        leftParticle.LightEmission = 0.8
        leftParticle.Size = NumberSequence.new(0.5)
        leftParticle.Texture = "rbxassetid://242019837"
        leftParticle.Transparency = NumberSequence.new(0.5)
        leftParticle.Lifetime = NumberRange.new(0.5)
        leftParticle.Rate = 50
        leftParticle.Speed = NumberRange.new(5)
        leftParticle.VelocitySpread = 30
        leftParticle.Parent = leftFoot
        table.insert(effects, leftParticle)
    end
    
    if rightFoot then
        local rightParticle = Instance.new("ParticleEmitter")
        rightParticle.Color = ColorSequence.new(Color3.new(0, 0.8, 1))
        rightParticle.LightEmission = 0.8
        rightParticle.Size = NumberSequence.new(0.5)
        rightParticle.Texture = "rbxassetid://242019837"
        rightParticle.Transparency = NumberSequence.new(0.5)
        rightParticle.Lifetime = NumberRange.new(0.5)
        rightParticle.Rate = 50
        rightParticle.Speed = NumberRange.new(5)
        rightParticle.VelocitySpread = 30
        rightParticle.Parent = rightFoot
        table.insert(effects, rightParticle)
    end
    
    -- 音效
    local flightSound = Instance.new("Sound")
    flightSound.SoundId = "rbxassetid://130977847"
    flightSound.Volume = 0.7
    flightSound.Looped = true
    flightSound.Parent = rootPart
    flightSound:Play()
    table.insert(effects, flightSound)
    
    return effects
end

-- 保存原始关节配置
local function saveOriginalJoints()
    originalJoints = {}
    
    local function saveJoint(jointName)
        local joint = character:FindFirstChild(jointName, true)
        if joint and joint:IsA("Motor6D") then
            originalJoints[jointName] = {
                C0 = joint.C0,
                C1 = joint.C1
            }
        end
    end
    
    saveJoint("Root")
    saveJoint("Neck")
    saveJoint("Waist")
    saveJoint("Left Shoulder")
    saveJoint("Right Shoulder")
    saveJoint("Left Hip")
    saveJoint("Right Hip")
end

-- 姿势修复核心函数（完全重构）
local function forceSupermanPose()
    if not character or not humanoid then return end
    
    -- 完全禁用物理模拟和干扰状态
    humanoid.PlatformStand = true
    humanoid.AutoRotate = false
    
    -- 禁用所有可能影响姿势的状态
    for _, state in ipairs(Enum.HumanoidStateType:GetEnumItems()) do
        if state ~= Enum.HumanoidStateType.Flying then
            humanoid:SetStateEnabled(state, false)
        end
    end
    
    -- 强制设置姿势状态
    humanoid:ChangeState(Enum.HumanoidStateType.Flying)
    
    -- 应用自定义姿势
    local torso = character:FindFirstChild("UpperTorso") or character:FindFirstChild("Torso")
    if not torso then return end
    
    -- 身体水平飞行姿势 (90度前倾)
    local rootJoint = torso:FindFirstChild("Root") or torso:FindFirstChild("Waist")
    if rootJoint and rootJoint:IsA("Motor6D") then
        rootJoint.C0 = CFrame.new(0, 0, 0) * CFrame.Angles(math.rad(-90), 0, 0)
    end
    
    -- 手臂向前伸直
    local leftShoulder = torso:FindFirstChild("Left Shoulder") or torso:FindFirstChild("LeftShoulder")
    if leftShoulder and leftShoulder:IsA("Motor6D") then
        leftShoulder.C0 = CFrame.new(-1, 0.5, 0) * CFrame.Angles(math.rad(-20), math.rad(-90), math.rad(-10))
    end
    
    local rightShoulder = torso:FindFirstChild("Right Shoulder") or torso:FindFirstChild("RightShoulder")
    if rightShoulder and rightShoulder:IsA("Motor6D") then
        rightShoulder.C0 = CFrame.new(1, 0.5, 0) * CFrame.Angles(math.rad(-20), math.rad(90), math.rad(10))
    end
    
    -- 腿部并拢向后伸直
    local leftHip = torso:FindFirstChild("Left Hip") or torso:FindFirstChild("LeftHip")
    if leftHip and leftHip:IsA("Motor6D") then
        leftHip.C0 = CFrame.new(-1, -1, 0) * CFrame.Angles(0, math.rad(-90), 0)
    end
    
    local rightHip = torso:FindFirstChild("Right Hip") or torso:FindFirstChild("RightHip")
    if rightHip and rightHip:IsA("Motor6D") then
        rightHip.C0 = CFrame.new(1, -1, 0) * CFrame.Angles(0, math.rad(90), 0)
    end
    
    -- 头部向前看
    local neck = torso:FindFirstChild("Neck") or character:FindFirstChild("Neck")
    if neck and neck:IsA("Motor6D") then
        neck.C0 = CFrame.new(0, 1, 0) * CFrame.Angles(math.rad(-20), 0, 0)
    end
end

-- 恢复原始姿势
local function restoreOriginalPose()
    for jointName, data in pairs(originalJoints) do
        local joint = character:FindFirstChild(jointName, true)
        if joint and joint:IsA("Motor6D") then
            joint.C0 = data.C0
            joint.C1 = data.C1
        end
    end
end

-- 飞行姿势控制
local flightTrack
local function setFlightPose(enable)
    if not character or not humanoid then return end
    
    if enable then
        -- 保存原始关节配置
        saveOriginalJoints()
        
        -- 加载飞行动画
        local animator = humanoid:FindFirstChildOfClass("Animator")
        if animator then
            flightTrack = animator:LoadAnimation(flightAnimation)
            flightTrack.Looped = true
            flightTrack.Priority = Enum.AnimationPriority.Action
            flightTrack:Play()
        end
        
        -- 强制应用超人姿势
        forceSupermanPose()
    else
        -- 停止动画
        if flightTrack then
            flightTrack:Stop()
            flightTrack:Destroy()
            flightTrack = nil
        end
        
        -- 恢复原始姿势
        restoreOriginalPose()
        
        -- 恢复状态
        humanoid.PlatformStand = false
        humanoid.AutoRotate = true
        
        -- 重新启用状态
        for _, state in ipairs(Enum.HumanoidStateType:GetEnumItems()) do
            humanoid:SetStateEnabled(state, true)
        end
    end
end

-- 创建移动设备控制UI - 优化版
local mobileControls
local function createMobileControls()
    local screenGui = Instance.new("ScreenGui")
    screenGui.Name = "FlightMobileControls"
    screenGui.ResetOnSpawn = false
    screenGui.Parent = player:WaitForChild("PlayerGui")
    
    -- 控制容器（用于整体缩放）
    local controlsContainer = Instance.new("Frame")
    controlsContainer.Name = "ControlsContainer"
    controlsContainer.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 1, 0)
    controlsContainer.BackgroundTransparency = 1
    controlsContainer.Parent = screenGui
    
    -- 虚拟摇杆 (左下角)
    local joystickOuter = Instance.new("Frame")
    joystickOuter.Name = "JoystickOuter"
    joystickOuter.Size = UDim2.new(0.2, 0, 0.2, 0)
    joystickOuter.Position = UDim2.new(0.05, 0, 0.75, 0)
    joystickOuter.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(0.2, 0.2, 0.2)
    joystickOuter.BackgroundTransparency = 0.5
    joystickOuter.BorderSizePixel = 0
    joystickOuter.Parent = controlsContainer
    
    local corner = Instance.new("UICorner")
    corner.CornerRadius = UDim.new(1, 0)
    corner.Parent = joystickOuter
    
    local joystickInner = Instance.new("Frame")
    joystickInner.Name = "JoystickInner"
    joystickInner.Size = UDim2.new(0.4, 0, 0.4, 0)
    joystickInner.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0.5, 0.5)
    joystickInner.Position = UDim2.new(0.5, 0, 0.5, 0)
    joystickInner.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(1, 1, 1)
    joystickInner.BackgroundTransparency = 0.7
    joystickInner.BorderSizePixel = 0
    joystickInner.Parent = joystickOuter
    
    local cornerInner = Instance.new("UICorner")
    cornerInner.CornerRadius = UDim.new(1, 0)
    cornerInner.Parent = joystickInner
    
    -- 摇杆标签
    local joystickLabel = Instance.new("TextLabel")
    joystickLabel.Name = "JoystickLabel"
    joystickLabel.Text = "移动"
    joystickLabel.TextColor3 = Color3.new(1, 1, 1)
    joystickLabel.TextSize = 16
    joystickLabel.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0.2, 0)
    joystickLabel.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, -0.2, 0)
    joystickLabel.BackgroundTransparency = 1
    joystickLabel.Parent = joystickOuter
    
    -- 垂直控制摇杆 (右下角)
    local verticalJoystickOuter = Instance.new("Frame")
    verticalJoystickOuter.Name = "VerticalJoystickOuter"
    verticalJoystickOuter.Size = UDim2.new(0.15, 0, 0.2, 0)
    verticalJoystickOuter.Position = UDim2.new(0.85, 0, 0.75, 0)
    verticalJoystickOuter.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(0.2, 0.2, 0.2)
    verticalJoystickOuter.BackgroundTransparency = 0.5
    verticalJoystickOuter.BorderSizePixel = 0
    verticalJoystickOuter.Parent = controlsContainer
    
    local vCorner = Instance.new("UICorner")
    vCorner.CornerRadius = UDim.new(1, 0)
    vCorner.Parent = verticalJoystickOuter
    
    local verticalJoystickInner = Instance.new("Frame")
    verticalJoystickInner.Name = "VerticalJoystickInner"
    verticalJoystickInner.Size = UDim2.new(0.4, 0, 0.4, 0)
    verticalJoystickInner.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0.5, 0.5)
    verticalJoystickInner.Position = UDim2.new(0.5, 0, 0.5, 0)
    verticalJoystickInner.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(1, 1, 1)
    verticalJoystickInner.BackgroundTransparency = 0.7
    verticalJoystickInner.BorderSizePixel = 0
    verticalJoystickInner.Parent = verticalJoystickOuter
    
    local vCornerInner = Instance.new("UICorner")
    vCornerInner.CornerRadius = UDim.new(1, 0)
    vCornerInner.Parent = verticalJoystickInner
    
    -- 垂直摇杆标签
    local verticalLabel = Instance.new("TextLabel")
    verticalLabel.Name = "VerticalLabel"
    verticalLabel.Text = "高度"
    verticalLabel.TextColor3 = Color3.new(1, 1, 1)
    verticalLabel.TextSize = 16
    verticalLabel.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0.2, 0)
    verticalLabel.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, -0.2, 0)
    verticalLabel.BackgroundTransparency = 1
    verticalLabel.Parent = verticalJoystickOuter
    
    -- 加速按钮 (右下角)
    local boostButton = Instance.new("TextButton")
    boostButton.Name = "BoostButton"
    boostButton.Size = UDim2.new(0.2, 0, 0.1, 0)
    boostButton.Position = UDim2.new(0.75, 0, 0.85, 0)
    boostButton.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(1, 0.5, 0)
    boostButton.BackgroundTransparency = 0.5
    boostButton.Text = "加速"
    boostButton.TextSize = 18
    boostButton.TextColor3 = Color3.new(1, 1, 1)
    boostButton.Parent = controlsContainer
    
    -- 加速按钮圆角
    local boostCorner = Instance.new("UICorner")
    boostCorner.CornerRadius = UDim.new(0.3, 0)
    boostCorner.Parent = boostButton
    
    -- 飞行开关按钮 (顶部中央)
    local flightToggleButton = Instance.new("TextButton")
    flightToggleButton.Name = "FlightToggleButton"
    flightToggleButton.Size = UDim2.new(0.3, 0, 0.08, 0)
    flightToggleButton.Position = UDim2.new(0.35, 0, 0.05, 0)
    flightToggleButton.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(0, 0.6, 1)
    flightToggleButton.BackgroundTransparency = 0.5
    flightToggleButton.Text = "开始飞行"
    flightToggleButton.TextSize = 20
    flightToggleButton.TextColor3 = Color3.new(1, 1, 1)
    flightToggleButton.Parent = controlsContainer
    
    -- 飞行按钮圆角
    local flightCorner = Instance.new("UICorner")
    flightCorner.CornerRadius = UDim.new(0.2, 0)
    flightCorner.Parent = flightToggleButton
    
    -- 摇杆数据结构
    local virtualJoystick = {
        Outer = joystickOuter,
        Inner = joystickInner,
        Active = false,
        Position = Vector2.new(0,0),
        StartPos = nil
    }
    
    local verticalJoystick = {
        Outer = verticalJoystickOuter,
        Inner = verticalJoystickInner,
        Active = false,
        Position = Vector2.new(0,0),
        StartPos = nil
    }
    
    -- 摇杆事件
    joystickOuter.InputBegan:Connect(function(input)
        if input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Touch then
            virtualJoystick.Active = true
            virtualJoystick.StartPos = Vector2.new(input.Position.X, input.Position.Y)
        end
    end)
    
    joystickOuter.InputChanged:Connect(function(input)
        if virtualJoystick.Active and input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Touch then
            local currentPos = Vector2.new(input.Position.X, input.Position.Y)
            local delta = currentPos - virtualJoystick.StartPos
            local maxRadius = joystickOuter.AbsoluteSize.X / 2
            local magnitude = math.min(delta.Magnitude, maxRadius)
            local direction = delta.Unit
            
            virtualJoystick.Position = direction * magnitude / maxRadius
            joystickInner.Position = UDim2.new(0.5, direction.X * magnitude, 0.5, direction.Y * magnitude)
        end
    end)
    
    joystickOuter.InputEnded:Connect(function(input)
        if input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Touch then
            virtualJoystick.Active = false
            virtualJoystick.Position = Vector2.new(0,0)
            joystickInner.Position = UDim2.new(0.5,0,0.5,0)
        end
    end)
    
    -- 垂直摇杆事件
    verticalJoystickOuter.InputBegan:Connect(function(input)
        if input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Touch then
            verticalJoystick.Active = true
            verticalJoystick.StartPos = Vector2.new(input.Position.X, input.Position.Y)
        end
    end)
    
    verticalJoystickOuter.InputChanged:Connect(function(input)
        if verticalJoystick.Active and input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Touch then
            local currentPos = Vector2.new(input.Position.X, input.Position.Y)
            local delta = currentPos - verticalJoystick.StartPos
            local maxRadius = verticalJoystickOuter.AbsoluteSize.Y / 2
            local magnitude = math.min(delta.Magnitude, maxRadius)
            local direction = delta.Unit
            
            -- 只取Y轴移动
            verticalJoystick.Position = Vector2.new(0, direction.Y * magnitude / maxRadius)
            verticalJoystickInner.Position = UDim2.new(0.5, 0, 0.5, direction.Y * magnitude)
        end
    end)
    
    verticalJoystickOuter.InputEnded:Connect(function(input)
        if input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Touch then
            verticalJoystick.Active = false
            verticalJoystick.Position = Vector2.new(0,0)
            verticalJoystickInner.Position = UDim2.new(0.5,0,0.5,0)
        end
    end)
    
    -- 按钮事件
    local boostActive = false
    
    boostButton.MouseButton1Down:Connect(function()
        boostActive = true
        boostButton.BackgroundTransparency = 0.2
    end)
    
    boostButton.MouseButton1Up:Connect(function()
        boostActive = false
        boostButton.BackgroundTransparency = 0.5
    end)
    
    -- 返回控制对象
    return {
        joystick = virtualJoystick,
        verticalJoystick = verticalJoystick,
        boostActive = function() return boostActive end,
        toggleButton = flightToggleButton
    }
end

-- 如果设备是移动设备，创建移动控制
if isMobile then
    mobileControls = createMobileControls()
end

-- 飞行控制核心
local flightConnection
local flightEffects = {}
local function startFlying()
    if isFlying then return end
    isFlying = true
    
    -- 获取当前角色
    character = player.Character
    humanoid = character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
    rootPart = character:WaitForChild("HumanoidRootPart")
    
    if not character or not humanoid or not rootPart then
        warn("无法启动飞行：角色部件缺失")
        isFlying = false
        return
    end
    
    -- 设置超人姿势（立即应用）
    setFlightPose(true)
    
    -- 创建粒子效果
    flightEffects = createFlightEffects()
    
    -- 飞行循环
    flightConnection = RunService.Heartbeat:Connect(function(delta)
        if not character or not rootPart or not humanoid or not isFlying then
            if flightConnection then
                flightConnection:Disconnect()
            end
            return
        end
        
        -- 姿势保护：防止其他动作干扰
        forceSupermanPose()
        
        -- 获取相机方向
        local camera = Workspace.CurrentCamera
        if not camera then return end
        
        local cameraCFrame = camera.CFrame
        local lookVector = cameraCFrame.LookVector
        local rightVector = cameraCFrame.RightVector
        local upVector = Vector3.new(0, 1, 0)
        
        -- 计算移动方向
        local direction = Vector3.new()
        
        if isMobile and mobileControls then
            -- 移动设备控制 - 新版
            local joyPos = mobileControls.joystick.Position
            direction = direction + lookVector * joyPos.Y
            direction = direction + rightVector * joyPos.X
            
            -- 垂直控制
            local verticalPos = mobileControls.verticalJoystick.Position.Y
            direction = direction + upVector * verticalPos
            
            -- 加速控制
            isBoosting = mobileControls.boostActive()
        else
            -- 电脑控制
            if UserInputService:IsKeyDown(Enum.KeyCode.W) then
                direction = direction + lookVector
            end
            
            if UserInputService:IsKeyDown(Enum.KeyCode.S) then
                direction = direction - lookVector
            end
            
            if UserInputService:IsKeyDown(Enum.KeyCode.D) then
                direction = direction + rightVector
            end
            
            if UserInputService:IsKeyDown(Enum.KeyCode.A) then
                direction = direction - rightVector
            end
            
            if UserInputService:IsKeyDown(Enum.KeyCode.Space) then
                direction = direction + upVector
            end
            
            if UserInputService:IsKeyDown(Enum.KeyCode.LeftControl) then
                direction = direction - upVector
            end
            
            isBoosting = UserInputService:IsKeyDown(Enum.KeyCode.LeftShift)
        end
        
        -- 加速控制
        local currentSpeed = isBoosting and flightSpeed * boostMultiplier or flightSpeed
        currentSpeed = math.min(currentSpeed, maxSpeed)
        
        -- 应用移动
        if direction.Magnitude > 0 then
            direction = direction.Unit * currentSpeed
            
            -- 关键修复：正确应用速度
            rootPart.Velocity = Vector3.new(direction.X, direction.Y, direction.Z)
            
            -- 保持超人姿势方向
            local targetCFrame = CFrame.new(rootPart.Position, rootPart.Position + lookVector)
            rootPart.CFrame = targetCFrame
        else
            -- 悬停时保持位置
            rootPart.Velocity = Vector3.new(0, 0, 0)
        end
    end)
end

-- 停止飞行
local function stopFlying()
    if not isFlying then return end
    isFlying = false
    
    -- 恢复姿势
    setFlightPose(false)
    
    -- 移除效果
    for _, effect in ipairs(flightEffects) do
        effect:Destroy()
    end
    flightEffects = {}
    
    -- 停止循环
    if flightConnection then
        flightConnection:Disconnect()
    end
    
    -- 重置速度
    if rootPart then
        rootPart.Velocity = Vector3.new(0, 0, 0)
    end
    
    -- 恢复重力
    if humanoid then
        humanoid.PlatformStand = false
    end
end

-- 飞行开关函数
local function toggleFlight()
    if isFlying then
        stopFlying()
        if isMobile and mobileControls and mobileControls.toggleButton then
            mobileControls.toggleButton.Text = "开始飞行"
            mobileControls.toggleButton.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(0, 0.6, 1)
        end
    else
        startFlying()
        if isMobile and mobileControls and mobileControls.toggleButton then
            mobileControls.toggleButton.Text = "停止飞行"
            mobileControls.toggleButton.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(1, 0.2, 0.2)
        end
    end
end

-- 移动设备按钮绑定
if isMobile and mobileControls and mobileControls.toggleButton then
    mobileControls.toggleButton.Activated:Connect(function()
        toggleFlight()
    end)
end

-- 电脑设备按键绑定
if not isMobile then
    UserInputService.InputBegan:Connect(function(input, gameProcessed)
        if gameProcessed then return end
        
        -- 切换飞行状态 (F键)
        if input.KeyCode == Enum.KeyCode.F then
            toggleFlight()
        end
    end)
end

-- 角色重生时重置
player.CharacterAdded:Connect(function(newChar)
    character = newChar
    humanoid = newChar:WaitForChild("Humanoid")
    rootPart = newChar:WaitForChild("HumanoidRootPart")
    
    -- 停止当前飞行
    stopFlying()
    
    -- 重新创建移动设备控制UI
    if isMobile then
        if mobileControls then
            -- 清理旧UI
            local controlsContainer = player.PlayerGui:FindFirstChild("FlightMobileControls")
            if controlsContainer then
                controlsContainer:Destroy()
            end
        end
        mobileControls = createMobileControls()
        if mobileControls and mobileControls.toggleButton then
            mobileControls.toggleButton.Activated:Connect(toggleFlight)
        end
    end
end)

-- 飞行UI指示器
local flightUI = Instance.new("ScreenGui")
flightUI.Name = "FlightUI"
flightUI.Parent = player:WaitForChild("PlayerGui")

local flightIndicator = Instance.new("Frame")
flightIndicator.Name = "FlightIndicator"
flightIndicator.Size = UDim2.new(0, 200, 0, 40)
flightIndicator.Position = UDim2.new(0.5, -100, 0.05, 0)
flightIndicator.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(40, 40, 40)
flightIndicator.BackgroundTransparency = 0.5
flightIndicator.BorderSizePixel = 0
flightIndicator.Visible = false
flightIndicator.Parent = flightUI

local corner = Instance.new("UICorner")
corner.CornerRadius = UDim.new(0.3, 0)
corner.Parent = flightIndicator

local statusText = Instance.new("TextLabel")
statusText.Name = "StatusText"
statusText.Text = "飞行模式: 关闭"
statusText.TextColor3 = Color3.new(1, 1, 1)
statusText.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 1, 0)
statusText.BackgroundTransparency = 1
statusText.Font = Enum.Font.GothamBold
statusText.TextSize = 18
statusText.Parent = flightIndicator

-- 速度指示器
local speedBar = Instance.new("Frame")
speedBar.Name = "SpeedBar"
speedBar.Size = UDim2.new(0.9, 0, 0, 5)
speedBar.Position = UDim2.new(0.05, 0, 0.9, 0)
speedBar.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(0.3, 0.3, 0.3)
speedBar.BorderSizePixel = 0
speedBar.Parent = flightIndicator

local speedFill = Instance.new("Frame")
speedFill.Name = "SpeedFill"
speedFill.Size = UDim2.new(0, 0, 1, 0)
speedFill.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(0.2, 0.8, 1)
speedFill.BorderSizePixel = 0
speedFill.Parent = speedBar

-- 更新UI
RunService.Heartbeat:Connect(function()
    if isFlying and rootPart then
        flightIndicator.Visible = true
        statusText.Text = isBoosting and "飞行模式: 加速中!" or "飞行模式: 开启"
        statusText.TextColor3 = isBoosting and Color3.new(1, 0.5, 0) or Color3.new(0.5, 1, 1)
        
        -- 更新速度指示器
        local currentSpeed = math.min(rootPart.Velocity.Magnitude, maxSpeed)
        local fillPercent = currentSpeed / maxSpeed
        speedFill.Size = UDim2.new(fillPercent, 0, 1, 0)
        speedFill.BackgroundColor3 = isBoosting and Color3.new(1, 0.7, 0.2) or Color3.new(0.2, 0.8, 1)
    else
        flightIndicator.Visible = false
    end
end)

-- 初始状态
flightIndicator.Visible = false

-- 添加一个启动消息
print("超人飞行脚本已加载完成！按F键（电脑）或点击开始飞行按钮（手机）启动。")
end)
Rose:Button("半无敌(无法关闭)", function()
local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local RunService = game:GetService("RunService")

-- 获取本地玩家
local player = Players.LocalPlayer
local character = player.Character or player.CharacterAdded:Wait()
local humanoid = character:WaitForChild("Humanoid")
local rootPart = character:WaitForChild("HumanoidRootPart")

-- 核心无敌功能
local function applyUltimateImmunity()
    -- 1. 完全移除伤害碰撞箱
    for _, part in ipairs(character:GetDescendants()) do
        if part:IsA("BasePart") then
            -- 禁用所有物理碰撞
            part.CanCollide = false
            part.CanTouch = false
            part.CanQuery = false
            part.Massless = true
        end
    end

    -- 2. 免疫掉落伤害
    if humanoid:GetState() ~= Enum.HumanoidStateType.Ragdoll then
        humanoid:SetStateEnabled(Enum.HumanoidStateType.Ragdoll, false)
    end
    
    -- 3. 核心免疫函数
    local function healthLock()
        -- 防止角色死亡
        if humanoid.Health <= 0 then
            humanoid:ChangeState(Enum.HumanoidStateType.Running)
        end
        
        -- 锁定生命值
        humanoid.Health = humanoid.MaxHealth
        
        -- 移除所有负面效果
        for _, effect in ipairs(humanoid:GetChildren()) do
            if effect:IsA("StringValue") and effect.Name:match("KO") then
                effect:Destroy()
            end
        end
        
        -- 重置下落伤害缓冲
        if rootPart then
            rootPart.Velocity = Vector3.new(rootPart.Velocity.X, math.min(rootPart.Velocity.Y, 0), rootPart.Velocity.Z)
        end
    end
    
    -- 4. 物理接触防护
    local touchIgnored = {}
    for _, part in ipairs(character:GetDescendants()) do
        if part:IsA("BasePart") then
            -- 拦截所有触碰事件
            part.Touched:Connect(function(otherPart)
                if not touchIgnored[otherPart] then
                    touchIgnored[otherPart] = true
                    otherPart.CanCollide = false
                    otherPart.CanTouch = false
                end
            end)
        end
    end
    
    -- 5. 创建防护连接
    local heartbeatConnection = RunService.Heartbeat:Connect(healthLock)
    
    return heartbeatConnection
end

-- 主功能应用
local immunityConnection = applyUltimateImmunity()

-- 角色重生时重新应用
player.CharacterAdded:Connect(function(newCharacter)
    character = newCharacter
    humanoid = newCharacter:WaitForChild("Humanoid")
    rootPart = newCharacter:WaitForChild("HumanoidRootPart")
    
    -- 移除旧防护
    if immunityConnection then
        immunityConnection:Disconnect()
    end
    
    -- 等待物理加载
    task.wait(0.5)
    
    -- 应用新防护
    immunityConnection = applyUltimateImmunity()
    
    print("无敌系统已更新: 角色重生保护生效")
end)

-- 自我修复机制
RunService.Heartbeat:Connect(function()
    -- 确保连接有效
    if immunityConnection and immunityConnection.Connected ~= true then
        immunityConnection = applyUltimateImmunity()
    end
    
    -- 强制免疫所有接触
    if character then
        for _, item in ipairs(workspace:GetDescendants()) do
            if item:IsA("BasePart") and not item:IsDescendantOf(character) then
                item.CanCollide = false
                item.CanTouch = false
            end
        end
    end
end)

print("终极无敌系统激活成功！")
print("状态: 无敌模式 | 免疫接触 | 无掉落伤害 | 无视秒杀")

local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local RunService = game:GetService("RunService")
local UserInputService = game:GetService("UserInputService")
local Workspace = game:GetService("Workspace")

-- 确保使用正确的玩家对象
local player = Players.LocalPlayer

-- 初始化角色变量
local character = player.Character or player.CharacterAdded:Wait()
local humanoid = character:WaitForChild("Humanoid")
local rootPart = character:WaitForChild("HumanoidRootPart")

-- 增强伤害免疫系统
local function setupAbsoluteDamageImmunity()
    -- 1. 完全禁用死亡状态
    humanoid:SetStateEnabled(Enum.HumanoidStateType.Dead, false)
    
    -- 2. 拦截所有伤害事件
    local function interceptDamage()
        -- 移除所有伤害接收器
        for _, connection in ipairs(getconnections(humanoid.Changed)) do
            if connection.Function and debug.info(connection.Function, "n") == "takeDamage" then
                connection:Disable()
            end
        end
        
        -- 替换TakeDamage方法
        if humanoid:FindFirstChild("TakeDamage") then
            humanoid.TakeDamage:Connect(function(damage)
                return 0  -- 抵消所有伤害
            end)
        else
            -- 创建自定义TakeDamage事件
            local takeDamage = Instance.new("BindableEvent")
            takeDamage.Name = "TakeDamage"
            takeDamage.Parent = humanoid
            
            humanoid.TakeDamage = takeDamage.Event
            
            takeDamage.Event:Connect(function(damage)
                return 0
            end)
        end
    end
    
    -- 3. 生命值锁定系统
    local healthLock
    healthLock = RunService.Heartbeat:Connect(function()
        -- 强制锁定生命值为最大值
        humanoid.Health = humanoid.MaxHealth
        
        -- 防止死亡状态
        if humanoid:GetState() == Enum.HumanoidStateType.Dead then
            humanoid:ChangeState(Enum.HumanoidStateType.Running)
        end
    end)
    
    -- 4. 身体部件无敌化
    local function makePartsInvincible()
        for _, part in ipairs(character:GetDescendants()) do
            if part:IsA("BasePart") then
                -- 设置无敌属性
                part:SetAttribute("Invincible", true)
                
                -- 防止物理交互
                part.CanCollide = false
                part.CanTouch = false
                part.CanQuery = false
                part.Massless = true
                
                -- 防止爆炸伤害
                if part:FindFirstChild("Explosive") then
                    part.Explosive:Destroy()
                end
                
                -- 移除所有伤害相关脚本
                for _, script in ipairs(part:GetChildren()) do
                    if script:IsA("Script") and script.Name:find("Damage") then
                        script:Destroy()
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    end
    
    -- 5. 特殊状态防护
    if character:FindFirstChild("BodyEffects") then
        local bodyEffects = character.BodyEffects
        if bodyEffects:FindFirstChild("K.O") then
            bodyEffects["K.O"]:Destroy()
        end
        if bodyEffects:FindFirstChild("Dead") then
            bodyEffects.Dead:Destroy()
        end
    end
    
    -- 应用所有保护
    interceptDamage()
    makePartsInvincible()
    
    return healthLock
end

-- 智能移动系统
local function setupSmartMovement()
    -- 1. 状态管理连接
    local stateConnection
    stateConnection = humanoid.StateChanged:Connect(function(_, newState)
        -- 当角色开始跳跃时
        if newState == Enum.HumanoidStateType.Jumping then
            -- 启用PlatformStand防止摔伤
            humanoid.PlatformStand = true
        end
        
        -- 当角色落地时
        if newState == Enum.HumanoidStateType.Landed then
            -- 立即禁用PlatformStand
            humanoid.PlatformStand = false
            
            -- 强制角色站立
            humanoid:ChangeState(Enum.HumanoidStateType.Running)
        end
    end)
    
    -- 2. 每帧移动恢复系统
    local moveRecoveryConnection
    moveRecoveryConnection = RunService.Heartbeat:Connect(function()
        -- 确保角色能站起来
        if humanoid.FloorMaterial ~= Enum.Material.Air then
            -- 强制禁用PlatformStand
            humanoid.PlatformStand = false
            
            -- 确保角色处于站立状态
            if humanoid:GetState() ~= Enum.HumanoidStateType.Running then
                humanoid:ChangeState(Enum.HumanoidStateType.Running)
            end
            
            -- 重置物理状态
            if rootPart then
                rootPart.AssemblyLinearVelocity = Vector3.new()
                rootPart.AssemblyAngularVelocity = Vector3.new()
            end
        end
    end)
    
    -- 3. 防摔落机制
    local fallProtectionConnection
    fallProtectionConnection = RunService.Heartbeat:Connect(function()
        if rootPart and rootPart.Velocity.Y < -50 then
            -- 限制最大下落速度
            rootPart.Velocity = Vector3.new(rootPart.Velocity.X, math.max(rootPart.Velocity.Y, -20), rootPart.Velocity.Z)
        end
    end)
    
    -- 返回断开函数
    return function()
        if stateConnection then stateConnection:Disconnect() end
        if moveRecoveryConnection then moveRecoveryConnection:Disconnect() end
        if fallProtectionConnection then fallProtectionConnection:Disconnect() end
    end
end

-- 主应用函数
local function applyImmortality()
    if not character or not humanoid or not rootPart then return end
    
    -- 应用伤害免疫
    local healthLock = setupAbsoluteDamageImmunity()
    
    -- 应用智能移动系统
    local disconnectMovement = setupSmartMovement()
    
    -- 返回断开函数
    return function()
        if healthLock then healthLock:Disconnect() end
        if disconnectMovement then disconnectMovement() end
    end
end

-- 应用不死系统
local disconnectImmortality = applyImmortality()

-- 角色重生时重新应用
player.CharacterAdded:Connect(function(newChar)
    character = newChar
    humanoid = newChar:WaitForChild("Humanoid")
    rootPart = newChar:WaitForChild("HumanoidRootPart")
    
    -- 等待角色完全加载
    wait(1)  -- 确保所有组件加载完成
    
    -- 重新应用系统
    if disconnectImmortality then
        disconnectImmortality()
    end
    disconnectImmortality = applyImmortality()
    
    -- 额外延迟确保保护生效
    wait(0.5)
    setupAbsoluteDamageImmunity()
end)

-- 初始消息
print("终极不死系统已激活！角色现在：")
print("- 完全免疫所有伤害（包括秒杀）")
print("- 高处掉落不会死亡")
print("- 可以正常移动和跳跃")
print("- 落地后立即恢复移动")

-- 持续监控系统
RunService.Heartbeat:Connect(function()
    -- 确保角色始终存在
    if not character or not character.Parent then
        character = player.Character
    end
    
    -- 确保人形始终存在
    if character and not humanoid then
        humanoid = character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
    end
    
    -- 确保根部件始终存在
    if character and not rootPart then
        rootPart = character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
    end
    
    -- 如果保护断开，重新应用
    if not disconnectImmortality or not pcall(disconnectImmortality) then
        disconnectImmortality = applyImmortality()
    end
end)
end)

Rose:Button("快影(F键启动)", function()
 loadstring(game:HttpGet("https://pastebin.com/raw/idbiRMZG"))()
end)
local superuniversal9 = Tab3:section("通用脚本8", false)

local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local player = Players.LocalPlayer

local isRagdolled = false
local motorBackup = {}

local function getCharacter()
    return player.Character or player.CharacterAdded:Wait()
end

local function toggleRagdoll()
    local character = getCharacter()
    local humanoid = character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
    if not humanoid or humanoid.Health <= 0 then return end

    local root = character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
    if not root then return end

    if not isRagdolled then
        -- Disable humanoid states to allow physics to take over
        humanoid:ChangeState(Enum.HumanoidStateType.Physics)
        humanoid.AutoRotate = false

        -- Store original joints
        motorBackup = {}

        for _, joint in ipairs(character:GetDescendants()) do
            if joint:IsA("Motor6D") then
                local socket = Instance.new("BallSocketConstraint")
                local a1 = Instance.new("Attachment")
                local a2 = Instance.new("Attachment")

                a1.CFrame = joint.C0
                a2.CFrame = joint.C1
                a1.Parent = joint.Part0
                a2.Parent = joint.Part1

                socket.Attachment0 = a1
                socket.Attachment1 = a2
                socket.Parent = joint.Parent
                socket.LimitsEnabled = true
                socket.TwistLimitsEnabled = true

                motorBackup[joint.Name .. "_" .. joint:GetFullName()] = {
                    Part0 = joint.Part0,
                    Part1 = joint.Part1,
                    C0 = joint.C0,
                    C1 = joint.C1,
                    Parent = joint.Parent,
                }

                joint:Destroy()
            end
        end

        -- Make them fall by applying a slight upward velocity first
        root.Velocity = Vector3.new(0, 15, 0)

        isRagdolled = true

    else
        -- Restore motors
        for _, data in pairs(motorBackup) do
            local motor = Instance.new("Motor6D")
            motor.Name = "RestoredMotor"
            motor.Part0 = data.Part0
            motor.Part1 = data.Part1
            motor.C0 = data.C0
            motor.C1 = data.C1
            motor.Parent = data.Parent
        end
        motorBackup = {}

        humanoid:ChangeState(Enum.HumanoidStateType.GettingUp)
        humanoid.AutoRotate = true

        -- Remove leftover attachments/sockets
        for _, item in ipairs(character:GetDescendants()) do
            if item:IsA("BallSocketConstraint") or item:IsA("Attachment") then
                item:Destroy()
            end
        end

        isRagdolled = false
    end
end

player.CharacterAdded:Connect(function(char)
    isRagdolled = false
    motorBackup = {}
end)

local gamepassEnabled = false
local originalUserId = game.Players.LocalPlayer.UserId
local originalPlayerHasPass = nil
local hookedRemotes = {}

local function enableGamepassHacks()
    if game.CreatorType == Enum.CreatorType.User then
        game.Players.LocalPlayer.UserId = game.CreatorId
    elseif game.CreatorType == Enum.CreatorType.Group then
        game.Players.LocalPlayer.UserId = game:GetService("GroupService"):GetGroupInfoAsync(game.CreatorId).Owner.Id
    end
    
    local gamepassService = game:GetService("GamePassService")
    if not originalPlayerHasPass then
        originalPlayerHasPass = gamepassService.PlayerHasPass
    end
    
    gamepassService.PlayerHasPass = function(_, gamepassId)
        return true
    end
    
    local remotesToHook = {
        "GamePassEvent", "GamepassEvent", "GamePass", "PurchaseGamePass", 
        "BuyGamepass", "GamePassManager", "PassEvent", "GamepassPurchase"
    }
    
    for _, name in ipairs(remotesToHook) do
        local remote = game.ReplicatedStorage:FindFirstChild(name)
        if remote and not hookedRemotes[name] then
            if remote:IsA("RemoteEvent") then
                local oldFire = remote.FireServer
                remote.FireServer = function(_, ...)
                    local args = {...}
                    if args[1] == "Purchase" or args[1] == "Buy" then
                        return true
                    end
                    return oldFire(remote, ...)
                end
                hookedRemotes[name] = true
            elseif remote:IsA("RemoteFunction") then
                local oldInvoke = remote.InvokeServer
                remote.InvokeServer = function(_, ...)
                    local args = {...}
                    if args[1] == "Purchase" or args[1] == "Buy" then
                        return true
                    end
                    return oldInvoke(remote, ...)
                end
                hookedRemotes[name] = true
            end
        end
    end
    
    Library:Notify("通行证系统", "已启用全局通行证权限")
end

local function disableGamepassHacks()
    game.Players.LocalPlayer.UserId = originalUserId
    
    local gamepassService = game:GetService("GamePassService")
    if originalPlayerHasPass then
        gamepassService.PlayerHasPass = originalPlayerHasPass
        originalPlayerHasPass = nil
    end
    
    for name, _ in pairs(hookedRemotes) do
        local remote = game.ReplicatedStorage:FindFirstChild(name)
        if remote then
            if remote:IsA("RemoteEvent") then
                remote.FireServer = nil
            elseif remote:IsA("RemoteFunction") then
                remote.InvokeServer = nil
            end
        end
    end
    hookedRemotes = {}
    
    Library:Notify("通行证系统", "已禁用所有通行证修改")
end

superuniversal9:Toggle("伪管理员权限破解通行证", "GlobalGamepass", false, function(state)
    gamepassEnabled = state
    if state then
        enableGamepassHacks()
        
        game.Players.LocalPlayer.CharacterAdded:Connect(function()
            if gamepassEnabled then
                enableGamepassHacks()
            end
        end)
    else
        disableGamepassHacks()
    end
end)

game.Players.LocalPlayer.CharacterAdded:Connect(function()
    if gamepassEnabled then
        enableGamepassHacks()
    end
end)

game:GetService("UserInputService").JumpRequest:connect(function()
    if infiniteJumpEnabled then
        game:GetService"Players".LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChildOfClass'Humanoid':ChangeState("Jumping")
    end
end)

local emotesWalkEnabled = false
local currentEmoteTrack = nil
local currentCharacter = nil

local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local player = Players.LocalPlayer

local function stopCurrentEmote()
    if currentEmoteTrack then
        currentEmoteTrack:Stop()
        currentEmoteTrack = nil
    end
end

local function playEmote(humanoid, emoteId)
    stopCurrentEmote()
    
    local animation = Instance.new("Animation")
    animation.AnimationId = "rbxassetid://" .. emoteId

    local success, animTrack = pcall(function()
        return humanoid.Animator:LoadAnimation(animation)
    end)

    if success and animTrack then
        currentEmoteTrack = animTrack
        currentEmoteTrack.Priority = Enum.AnimationPriority.Action
        currentEmoteTrack.Looped = true
        currentEmoteTrack:Play()
    end
end

local function isDancing(character, animationTrack)
    if not character:FindFirstChild("Animate") then return false end
    
    local animationId = animationTrack.Animation.AnimationId
    
    if string.find(animationId, "emoji") or string.find(animationId, "emote") or string.find(animationId, "dance") then
        return true
    end
    
    for _, animationHolder in pairs(character.Animate:GetChildren()) do
        if animationHolder:IsA("StringValue") then
            for _, animation in pairs(animationHolder:GetChildren()) do
                if animation:IsA("Animation") and animation.AnimationId == animationId then
                    return false
                end
            end
        end
    end
    
    return true
end

-- 角色添加时设置事件监听
local function onCharacterAdded(character)
    currentCharacter = character
    stopCurrentEmote()

    local humanoid = character:WaitForChild("Humanoid")
    local animator = humanoid:WaitForChild("Animator")

    animator.AnimationPlayed:Connect(function(animationTrack)
        if isDancing(character, animationTrack) then
            local playedEmoteId = string.match(animationTrack.Animation.AnimationId, "%d+") -- 提取动画ID数字部分
            
            if playedEmoteId and emotesWalkEnabled then
                if currentEmoteTrack then
                    local currentEmoteId = string.match(currentEmoteTrack.Animation.AnimationId, "%d+")
                    if currentEmoteId == playedEmoteId then return end
                    stopCurrentEmote()
                end
                playEmote(humanoid, playedEmoteId)
            end
        end
    end)

    humanoid.Died:Connect(stopCurrentEmote)
end

-- 初始化角色监听
if player.Character then
    onCharacterAdded(player.Character)
end
player.CharacterAdded:Connect(onCharacterAdded)

-- 移动时处理表情
local RunService = game:GetService("RunService")
RunService.Stepped:Connect(function()
    if player.Character and player.Character:FindFirstChild("Humanoid") then
        local humanoid = player.Character.Humanoid
        if humanoid and currentEmoteTrack and currentEmoteTrack.IsPlaying then
            if humanoid.MoveDirection.Magnitude > 0 and not emotesWalkEnabled then
                stopCurrentEmote()
            end
        end
    end
end)

if superuniversal9 then
    superuniversal9:Toggle("行走播放动作(就是所有动画无法取消)", "EmoteWalk", false, function(state)
        emotesWalkEnabled = state
        Library:Notify("行走播放动作", state and "已启用" or "已禁用")
    end)
end

-- 修复版自动近战攻击脚本（最终可用版）
local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local RunService = game:GetService("RunService")
local player = Players.LocalPlayer
local character = player.Character or player.CharacterAdded:Wait()
local humanoid = character:WaitForChild("Humanoid")
local autoAttackEnabled = false
local attacking = false
local lastAttackTime = 0
local attackCooldown = 0.1 -- 攻击间隔（可调整）
local attackConnection -- 攻击循环连接，全局定义方便管理

-- 【修复1：优化武器识别】支持更多近战武器类型，兼容自定义命名武器
local function isMeleeWeapon(tool)
    if not tool:FindFirstChild("Handle") then return false end -- 必须包含攻击核心部件
    if tool:GetAttribute("IsMeleeWeapon") then return true end -- 支持自定义属性标记
    local toolName = tool.Name:lower()
    local meleeKeywords = {"sword", "knife", "axe", "bat", "hammer", "blade", "dagger", "mace", "club", "katana"}
    for _, keyword in ipairs(meleeKeywords) do
        if toolName:find(keyword) then return true end
    end
    return false
end

-- 【修复2：优化敌人检测】兼容NPC和玩家，避免空引用报错
local function getEnemiesInRange(range)
    local enemies = {}
    local rootPart = character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
    if not rootPart then return enemies end -- 角色部件缺失时避免崩溃
    
    -- 检测所有可攻击目标（排除自身）
    for _, obj in ipairs(workspace:GetChildren()) do
        if obj ~= character then
            local objHumanoid = obj:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
            local objRoot = obj:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
            if objHumanoid and objRoot and objHumanoid.Health > 0 then
                local distance = (rootPart.Position - objRoot.Position).Magnitude
                if distance <= range then
                    table.insert(enemies, {
                        humanoid = objHumanoid,
                        rootPart = objRoot,
                        distance = distance
                    })
                end
            end
        end
    end
    return enemies
end

-- 【修复3：多方式攻击调用】兼容不同游戏的攻击触发逻辑
local function performAttack(tool)
    if attacking or tick() - lastAttackTime < attackCooldown then return end
    attacking = true
    lastAttackTime = tick()

    -- 方式1：触发工具自带攻击函数（优先）
    if tool:FindFirstChild("Attack") then
        local attackFunc = tool.Attack
        if attackFunc:IsA("Script") or attackFunc:IsA("LocalScript") then
            pcall(function() require(attackFunc)() end)
        elseif attackFunc:IsA("BindableEvent") then
            attackFunc:Fire()
        end
    -- 方式2：触发远程事件（联网游戏常用）
    elseif tool:FindFirstChildOfClass("RemoteEvent") then
        pcall(function() tool.RemoteEvent:FireServer("Attack") end)
    -- 方式3：模拟鼠标点击（基础工具通用）
    else
        local clickDetector = tool:FindFirstChildOfClass("ClickDetector")
        if clickDetector then
            local oldMaxDist = clickDetector.MaxActivationDistance
            clickDetector.MaxActivationDistance = 50 -- 临时扩大触发范围
            pcall(function() clickDetector:FireClick(player) end)
            clickDetector.MaxActivationDistance = oldMaxDist
        end
    end

    -- 防止攻击状态卡死
    task.delay(attackCooldown, function() attacking = false end)
end

-- 【修复4：角色重生自动重连】避免角色加载后功能失效
local function resetCharacterRefs(newChar)
    character = newChar
    humanoid = newChar:WaitForChild("Humanoid")
    -- 重生后自动恢复自动攻击（若之前开启）
    if autoAttackEnabled then
        startAutoAttack()
    end
end
player.CharacterAdded:Connect(resetCharacterRefs)

-- 自动攻击主循环
local function startAutoAttack()
    if attackConnection then attackConnection:Disconnect() end -- 断开旧循环避免重复

    attackConnection = RunService.Heartbeat:Connect(function()
        if not autoAttackEnabled then return end

        -- 实时获取当前装备的工具
        local equippedTool = character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Tool")
        if not equippedTool or not isMeleeWeapon(equippedTool) then
            return -- 未装备有效近战武器时跳过
        end

        -- 检测范围内敌人并攻击最近目标
        local enemies = getEnemiesInRange(15) -- 攻击范围（可调整）
        if #enemies > 0 then
            table.sort(enemies, function(a, b) return a.distance < b.distance end)
            performAttack(equippedTool)
            -- 面向敌人优化命中率
            local rootPart = character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
            if rootPart then
                rootPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(rootPart.Position, enemies[1].rootPart.Position)
            end
        end
    end)
end

-- 【关键修复：绑定UI开关】删除冗余逻辑，确保开关与功能联动
superuniversal9:Toggle("自动近战攻击", "AutoMeleeAttack", false, function(Value)
    autoAttackEnabled = Value
    if Value then
        startAutoAttack()
        -- 通知+打印双重提示
        _G.Notify("自动攻击", "已启用（需装备近战武器）", 3)
        print("自动近战攻击已启用")
    else
        -- 禁用时断开循环
        if attackConnection then
            attackConnection:Disconnect()
            attackConnection = nil
        end
        _G.Notify("自动攻击", "已禁用", 3)
        print("自动近战攻击已禁用")
    end
end)

local xrayEnabled = false

local function xray()
    for _, v in pairs(workspace:GetDescendants()) do
        if v:IsA("BasePart") and not v.Parent:FindFirstChildWhichIsA("Humanoid") and
            not v.Parent.Parent:FindFirstChildWhichIsA("Humanoid") then
            v.LocalTransparencyModifier = xrayEnabled and 0.5 or 0
        end
    end
end

end)

BFD1:Button("超人飞行R6(其实就是游泳的动作)", function()
local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local RunService = game:GetService("RunService")
local LocalPlayer = Players.LocalPlayer
local Camera = workspace.CurrentCamera

local PlayerGui = LocalPlayer:WaitForChild("PlayerGui")
local screenGui = Instance.new("ScreenGui")
screenGui.Name = "DeltaControlGui"
screenGui.ResetOnSpawn = false
screenGui.IgnoreGuiInset = true
screenGui.Parent = PlayerGui

local toggleButton = Instance.new("ImageButton")
toggleButton.Name = "FlyToggle"
toggleButton.Size = UDim2.new(0, 100, 0, 100)
toggleButton.Position = UDim2.new(0.5, -50, 0.5, -50)
toggleButton.Image = "rbxassetid://76316158972959"
toggleButton.BackgroundTransparency = 1
toggleButton.Draggable = true
toggleButton.Active = true
toggleButton.Parent = screenGui

local brakeButton = Instance.new("ImageButton")
brakeButton.Name = "BrakeButton"
brakeButton.Size = UDim2.new(0, 80, 0, 80)
brakeButton.Position = UDim2.new(0.5, -40, 0.5, 60)
brakeButton.Image = "rbxassetid://132411019634629"
brakeButton.BackgroundTransparency = 1
brakeButton.Visible = false
brakeButton.Active = true
brakeButton.Parent = screenGui

local active = false
local braking = false
local rotConn, flyConn, animTrack
local bodyVelocity

local function getCharacter()
    return LocalPlayer.Character or LocalPlayer.CharacterAdded:Wait()
end

local function getRoot()
    return getCharacter():WaitForChild("HumanoidRootPart")
end

local function getHumanoid()
    return getCharacter():FindFirstChildWhichIsA("Humanoid")
end

local function setTPWalk(state)
    if syn or getgenv then
        pcall(function()
            setfflag("tpwalk", state and "1" or "0")
        end)
    end
end

local function playFlyAnimation()
    local hum = getHumanoid()
    if hum then
        local anim = Instance.new("Animation")
        anim.AnimationId = "rbxassetid://282574440"
        animTrack = hum:LoadAnimation(anim)
        animTrack.Looped = true
        animTrack:Play()
    end
end

local function playBrakeAnimation()
    local hum = getHumanoid()
    if hum then
        local anim = Instance.new("Animation")
        anim.AnimationId = "rbxassetid://69427277"
        animTrack = hum:LoadAnimation(anim)
        animTrack.Looped = true
        animTrack:Play()
    end
end

local function stopAnimation()
    if animTrack then
        animTrack:Stop()
        animTrack = nil
    end
end

local function startFlying()
    local root = getRoot()
    bodyVelocity = Instance.new("BodyVelocity")
    bodyVelocity.Velocity = Vector3.zero
    bodyVelocity.MaxForce = Vector3.new(1e9, 1e9, 1e9)
    bodyVelocity.P = 1250
    bodyVelocity.Parent = root

    flyConn = RunService.RenderStepped:Connect(function()
        if not braking then
            local camLook = Camera.CFrame.LookVector
            bodyVelocity.Velocity = camLook * 50
        else
            bodyVelocity.Velocity = Vector3.zero
        end
    end)
end

local function stopFlying()
    if flyConn then
        flyConn:Disconnect()
        flyConn = nil
    end
    if bodyVelocity then
        bodyVelocity:Destroy()
        bodyVelocity = nil
    end
end

local function startRotation()
    rotConn = RunService.RenderStepped:Connect(function()
        local root = getRoot()
        if root then
            root.CFrame = CFrame.new(root.Position, root.Position + Camera.CFrame.LookVector)
        end
    end)
end

local function stopRotation()
    if rotConn then
        rotConn:Disconnect()
        rotConn = nil
    end
end

local function activate()
    active = true
    braking = false
    setTPWalk(true)
    playFlyAnimation()
    startFlying()
    startRotation()
    brakeButton.Visible = true
end

local function deactivate()
    active = false
    stopAnimation()
    stopFlying()
    stopRotation()
    setTPWalk(false)
    brakeButton.Visible = false
end

local function toggleBrake()
    braking = not braking
    stopAnimation()
    if braking then
        playBrakeAnimation()
    else
        playFlyAnimation()
    end
end

toggleButton.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
    if active then
        deactivate()
    else
        activate()
    end
end)

brakeButton.MouseButton1Click:Connect(toggleBrake)

LocalPlayer.CharacterAdded:Connect(function()
    if active then
        task.wait(1)
        activate()
        if braking then
            toggleBrake()
        end
    end
end)
end)

--Physics gun
function sandbox(var,func)
	local env = getfenv(func)
	local newenv = setmetatable({},{
		__index = function(self,k)
			if k=="script" then
				return var
			else
				return env[k]
			end
		end,
	})
	setfenv(func,newenv)
	return func
end

LocalScript4.Parent = Tool0
table.insert(cors,sandbox(LocalScript4,function()
-- Variables for services
local render = game:GetService("RunService").RenderStepped
local contextActionService = game:GetService("ContextActionService")
local userInputService = game:GetService("UserInputService")

local player = game.Players.LocalPlayer
local mouse = player:GetMouse()
local Tool = script.Parent

-- Variables for Module Scripts
local screenSpace = require(Tool:WaitForChild("ScreenSpace"))

local connection
-- Variables for character joints

local neck, shoulder, oldNeckC0, oldShoulderC0 

local mobileShouldTrack = true

-- Thourough check to see if a character is sitting
local function amISitting(character)
	local t = character.Torso
	for _, part in pairs(t:GetConnectedParts(true)) do
		if part:IsA("Seat") or part:IsA("VehicleSeat") then
			return true
		end
	end
end

-- Function to call on renderstepped. Orients the character so it is facing towards
-- the player mouse's position in world space. If character is sitting then the torso
-- should not track
local function frame(mousePosition)
	-- Special mobile consideration. We don't want to track if the user was touching a ui
	-- element such as the movement controls. Just return out of function if so to make sure
	-- character doesn't track
	if not mobileShouldTrack then return end
	
	-- Make sure character isn't swiming. If the character is swimming the following code will
	-- not work well; the character will not swim correctly. Besides, who shoots underwater?
	if player.Character.Humanoid:GetState() ~= Enum.HumanoidStateType.Swimming then
		local torso = player.Character.Torso
		local head = player.Character.Head
		
		local toMouse = (mousePosition - head.Position).unit
		local angle = math.acos(toMouse:Dot(Vector3.new(0,1,0)))
		
		local neckAngle = angle
	
		-- Limit how much the head can tilt down. Too far and the head looks unnatural
		if math.deg(neckAngle) > 110 then
			neckAngle = math.rad(110)
		end
		neck.C0 = CFrame.new(0,1,0) * CFrame.Angles(math.pi - neckAngle,math.pi,0)
		
		-- Calculate horizontal rotation
		local arm = player.Character:FindFirstChild("Right Arm")
		local fromArmPos = torso.Position + torso.CFrame:vectorToWorldSpace(Vector3.new(
			torso.Size.X/2 + arm.Size.X/2, torso.Size.Y/2 - arm.Size.Z/2, 0))
		local toMouseArm = ((mousePosition - fromArmPos) * Vector3.new(1,0,1)).unit
		local look = (torso.CFrame.lookVector * Vector3.new(1,0,1)).unit
		local lateralAngle = math.acos(toMouseArm:Dot(look))		
		
		-- Check for rogue math
		if tostring(lateralAngle) == "-1.#IND" then
			lateralAngle = 0
		end		
		
		-- Handle case where character is sitting down
		if player.Character.Humanoid:GetState() == Enum.HumanoidStateType.Seated then			
			
			local cross = torso.CFrame.lookVector:Cross(toMouseArm)
			if lateralAngle > math.pi/2 then
				lateralAngle = math.pi/2
			end
			if cross.Y < 0 then
				lateralAngle = -lateralAngle
			end
		end	
		
		-- Turn shoulder to point to mouse
		shoulder.C0 = CFrame.new(1,0.5,0) * CFrame.Angles(math.pi/2 - angle,math.pi/2 + lateralAngle,0)	
		
		-- If not sitting then aim torso laterally towards mouse
		if not amISitting(player.Character) then
			torso.CFrame = CFrame.new(torso.Position, torso.Position + (Vector3.new(
				mousePosition.X, torso.Position.Y, mousePosition.Z)-torso.Position).unit)
		else
			--print("sitting")		
		end	
	end
end

-- Function to bind to render stepped if player is on PC
local function pcFrame()
	frame(mouse.Hit.p)
end

-- Function to bind to touch moved if player is on mobile
local function mobileFrame(touch, processed)
	-- Check to see if the touch was on a UI element. If so, we don't want to update anything
	if not processed then
		-- Calculate touch position in world space. Uses Stravant's ScreenSpace Module script
		-- to create a ray from the camera.
		local test = screenSpace.ScreenToWorld(touch.Position.X, touch.Position.Y, 1)
		local nearPos = game.Workspace.CurrentCamera.CoordinateFrame:vectorToWorldSpace(screenSpace.ScreenToWorld(touch.Position.X, touch.Position.Y, 1))
		nearPos = game.Workspace.CurrentCamera.CoordinateFrame.p - nearPos
		local farPos = screenSpace.ScreenToWorld(touch.Position.X, touch.Position.Y,50) 
		farPos = game.Workspace.CurrentCamera.CoordinateFrame:vectorToWorldSpace(farPos) * -1
		if farPos.magnitude > 900 then
			farPos = farPos.unit * 900
		end
		local ray = Ray.new(nearPos, farPos)
		local part, pos = game.Workspace:FindPartOnRay(ray, player.Character)
		
		-- if a position was found on the ray then update the character's rotation
		if pos then
			frame(pos)
		end
	end
end

local oldIcon = nil
-- Function to bind to equip event
local function equip()
	local torso = player.Character.Torso
	
	-- Setup joint variables
	neck = torso.Neck	
	oldNeckC0 = neck.C0
	shoulder = torso:FindFirstChild("Right Shoulder")
	oldShoulderC0 = shoulder.C0
	
	-- Remember old mouse icon and update current
	oldIcon = mouse.Icon
	mouse.Icon = "rbxassetid:// 509381906"
	
	-- Bind TouchMoved event if on mobile. Otherwise connect to renderstepped
	if userInputService.TouchEnabled then
		connection = userInputService.TouchMoved:connect(mobileFrame)
	else
		connection = render:connect(pcFrame)
	end
	
	-- Bind TouchStarted and TouchEnded. Used to determine if character should rotate
	-- during touch input
	userInputService.TouchStarted:connect(function(touch, processed)
		mobileShouldTrack = not processed
	end)	
	userInputService.TouchEnded:connect(function(touch, processed)
		mobileShouldTrack = false
	end)
	
	-- Fire server's equip event
	game.ReplicatedStorage.ROBLOX_PistolEquipEvent:FireServer()
	
	-- Bind event for when mouse is clicked to fire server's fire event
	mouse.Button1Down:connect(function()
		game.ReplicatedStorage.ROBLOX_PistolFireEvent:FireServer(mouse.Hit.p)
	end)
	
	-- Bind reload event to mobile button and r key
	contextActionService:BindActionToInputTypes("Reload", function() 
		game.ReplicatedStorage.ROBLOX_PistolReloadEvent:FireServer()		
	end, true, "")
	
	-- If game uses filtering enabled then need to update server while tool is
	-- held by character.
	if workspace.FilteringEnabled then
		while connection do
			wait()
			game.ReplicatedStorage.ROBLOX_PistolUpdateEvent:FireServer(neck.C0, shoulder.C0)
		end
	end
end

-- Function to bind to Unequip event
local function unequip()
	if connection then connection:disconnect() end
	contextActionService:UnbindAction("Reload")
	game.ReplicatedStorage.ROBLOX_PistolUnequipEvent:FireServer()
	mouse.Icon = oldIcon
	neck.C0 = oldNeckC0
	shoulder.C0 = oldShoulderC0
end

-- Bind tool events
Tool.Equipped:connect(equip)
Tool.Unequipped:connect(unequip)
end))
Script5.Name = "qPerfectionWeld"
Script5.Parent = Tool0
table.insert(cors,sandbox(Script5,function()
-- Created by Quenty (@Quenty, follow me on twitter).
-- Should work with only ONE copy, seamlessly with weapons, trains, et cetera.
-- Parts should be ANCHORED before use. It will, however, store relatives values and so when tools are reparented, it'll fix them.

--[[ INSTRUCTIONS
- Place in the model
- Make sure model is anchored
- That's it. It will weld the model and all children. 

THIS SCRIPT SHOULD BE USED ONLY BY ITSELF. THE MODEL SHOULD BE ANCHORED. 
THIS SCRIPT SHOULD BE USED ONLY BY ITSELF. THE MODEL SHOULD BE ANCHORED. 
THIS SCRIPT SHOULD BE USED ONLY BY ITSELF. THE MODEL SHOULD BE ANCHORED. 
THIS SCRIPT SHOULD BE USED ONLY BY ITSELF. THE MODEL SHOULD BE ANCHORED. 
THIS SCRIPT SHOULD BE USED ONLY BY ITSELF. THE MODEL SHOULD BE ANCHORED. 
THIS SCRIPT SHOULD BE USED ONLY BY ITSELF. THE MODEL SHOULD BE ANCHORED. 
THIS SCRIPT SHOULD BE USED ONLY BY ITSELF. THE MODEL SHOULD BE ANCHORED. 
THIS SCRIPT SHOULD BE USED ONLY BY ITSELF. THE MODEL SHOULD BE ANCHORED. 

This script is designed to be used is a regular script. In a local script it will weld, but it will not attempt to handle ancestory changes. 
]]

--[[ DOCUMENTATION
- Will work in tools. If ran more than once it will not create more than one weld.  This is especially useful for tools that are dropped and then picked up again.
- Will work in PBS servers
- Will work as long as it starts out with the part anchored
- Stores the relative CFrame as a CFrame value
- Takes careful measure to reduce lag by not having a joint set off or affected by the parts offset from origin
- Utilizes a recursive algorith to find all parts in the model
- Will reweld on script reparent if the script is initially parented to a tool.
- Welds as fast as possible
]]

-- qPerfectionWeld.lua
-- Created 10/6/2014
-- Author: Quenty
-- Version 1.0.3

-- Updated 10/14/2014 - Updated to 1.0.1
--- Bug fix with existing ROBLOX welds ? Repro by asimo3089

-- Updated 10/14/2014 - Updated to 1.0.2
--- Fixed bug fix. 

-- Updated 10/14/2014 - Updated to 1.0.3
--- Now handles joints semi-acceptably. May be rather hacky with some joints. :/

local NEVER_BREAK_JOINTS = false -- If you set this to true it will never break joints (this can create some welding issues, but can save stuff like hinges).


local function CallOnChildren(Instance, FunctionToCall)
	-- Calls a function on each of the children of a certain object, using recursion.  

	FunctionToCall(Instance)

	for _, Child in next, Instance:GetChildren() do
		CallOnChildren(Child, FunctionToCall)
	end
end

local function GetNearestParent(Instance, ClassName)
	-- Returns the nearest parent of a certain class, or returns nil

	local Ancestor = Instance
	repeat
		Ancestor = Ancestor.Parent
		if Ancestor == nil then
			return nil
		end
	until Ancestor:IsA(ClassName)

	return Ancestor
end

local function GetBricks(StartInstance)
	local List = {}

	-- if StartInstance:IsA("BasePart") then
	-- 	List[#List+1] = StartInstance
	-- end

	CallOnChildren(StartInstance, function(Item)
		if Item:IsA("BasePart") then
			List[#List+1] = Item;
		end
	end)

	return List
end

local function Modify(Instance, Values)
	-- Modifies an Instance by using a table.  

	assert(type(Values) == "table", "Values is not a table");

	for Index, Value in next, Values do
		if type(Index) == "number" then
			Value.Parent = Instance
		else
			Instance[Index] = Value
		end
	end
	return Instance
end

local function Make(ClassType, Properties)
	-- Using a syntax hack to create a nice way to Make new items.  

	return Modify(Instance.new(ClassType), Properties)
end

local Surfaces = {"TopSurface", "BottomSurface", "LeftSurface", "RightSurface", "FrontSurface", "BackSurface"}
local HingSurfaces = {"Hinge", "Motor", "SteppingMotor"}

local function HasWheelJoint(Part)
	for _, SurfaceName in pairs(Surfaces) do
		for _, HingSurfaceName in pairs(HingSurfaces) do
			if Part[SurfaceName].Name == HingSurfaceName then
				return true
			end
		end
	end
	
	return false
end

local function ShouldBreakJoints(Part)
	--- We do not want to break joints of wheels/hinges. This takes the utmost care to not do this. There are
	--  definitely some edge cases. 

	if NEVER_BREAK_JOINTS then
		return false
	end
	
	if HasWheelJoint(Part) then
		return false
	end
	
	local Connected = Part:GetConnectedParts()
	
	if #Connected == 1 then
		return false
	end
	
	for _, Item in pairs(Connected) do
		if HasWheelJoint(Item) then
			return false
		elseif not Item:IsDescendantOf(script.Parent) then
			return false
		end
	end
	
	return true
end

local function WeldTogether(Part0, Part1, JointType, WeldParent)
	--- Weld's 2 parts together
	-- @param Part0 The first part
	-- @param Part1 The second part (Dependent part most of the time).
	-- @param [JointType] The type of joint. Defaults to weld.
	-- @param [WeldParent] Parent of the weld, Defaults to Part0 (so GC is better).
	-- @return The weld created.

	JointType = JointType or "Weld"
	local RelativeValue = Part1:FindFirstChild("qRelativeCFrameWeldValue")
	
	local NewWeld = Part1:FindFirstChild("qCFrameWeldThingy") or Instance.new(JointType)
	Modify(NewWeld, {
		Name = "qCFrameWeldThingy";
		Part0  = Part0;
		Part1  = Part1;
		C0     = CFrame.new();--Part0.CFrame:inverse();
		C1     = RelativeValue and RelativeValue.Value or Part1.CFrame:toObjectSpace(Part0.CFrame); --Part1.CFrame:inverse() * Part0.CFrame;-- Part1.CFrame:inverse();
		Parent = Part1;
	})

	if not RelativeValue then
		RelativeValue = Make("CFrameValue", {
			Parent     = Part1;
			Name       = "qRelativeCFrameWeldValue";
			Archivable = true;
			Value      = NewWeld.C1;
		})
	end

	return NewWeld
end

local function WeldParts(Parts, MainPart, JointType, DoNotUnanchor)
	-- @param Parts The Parts to weld. Should be anchored to prevent really horrible results.
	-- @param MainPart The part to weld the model to (can be in the model).
	-- @param [JointType] The type of joint. Defaults to weld. 
	-- @parm DoNotUnanchor Boolean, if true, will not unachor the model after cmopletion.
	
	for _, Part in pairs(Parts) do
		if ShouldBreakJoints(Part) then
			Part:BreakJoints()
		end
	end
	
	for _, Part in pairs(Parts) do
		if Part ~= MainPart then
			WeldTogether(MainPart, Part, JointType, MainPart)
		end
	end

	if not DoNotUnanchor then
		for _, Part in pairs(Parts) do
			Part.Anchored = false
		end
		MainPart.Anchored = false
	end
end

local function PerfectionWeld()	
	local Tool = GetNearestParent(script, "Tool")

	local Parts = GetBricks(script.Parent)
	local PrimaryPart = Tool and Tool:FindFirstChild("Handle") and Tool.Handle:IsA("BasePart") and Tool.Handle or script.Parent:IsA("Model") and script.Parent.PrimaryPart or Parts[1]

	if PrimaryPart then
		WeldParts(Parts, PrimaryPart, "Weld", false)
	else
		warn("qWeld - Unable to weld part")
	end
	
	return Tool
end

local Tool = PerfectionWeld()


if Tool and script.ClassName == "Script" then
	--- Don't bother with local scripts

	script.Parent.AncestryChanged:connect(function()
		PerfectionWeld()
	end)
end

-- Created by Quenty (@Quenty, follow me on twitter).

end))
LocalScript6.Name = "Animate"
LocalScript6.Parent = Tool0
table.insert(cors,sandbox(LocalScript6,function()
local arms = nil
local torso = nil
local welds = {}
local Tool = script.Parent
local neck = nil
local orginalC0 = CFrame.new(0, 1, 0, -1, -0, -0, 0, 0, 1, 0, 1, 0)

function Equip(mouse)
wait(0.01)
arms = {Tool.Parent:FindFirstChild("Left Arm"), Tool.Parent:FindFirstChild("Right Arm")}
head = Tool.Parent:FindFirstChild("Head") 
torso = Tool.Parent:FindFirstChild("Torso")
if neck == nil then 
neck = Tool.Parent:FindFirstChild("Torso").Neck
end 
if arms ~= nil and torso ~= nil then
local sh = {torso:FindFirstChild("Left Shoulder"), torso:FindFirstChild("Right Shoulder")}
if sh ~= nil then
local yes = true
if yes then
yes = false
sh[1].Part1 = nil
sh[2].Part1 = nil
local weld1 = Instance.new("Weld")
weld1.Part0 = head
weld1.Parent = head
weld1.Part1 = arms[1]
welds[1] = weld1
local weld2 = Instance.new("Weld")
weld2.Part0 = head
weld2.Parent = head
weld2.Part1 = arms[2]
welds[2] = weld2
-------------------------here
weld1.C1 = CFrame.new(-0.5+1.5, 0.8, .9)* CFrame.fromEulerAnglesXYZ(math.rad(290), 0, math.rad(-90))
weld2.C1 = CFrame.new(-1, 0.8, 0.5-1.5) * CFrame.fromEulerAnglesXYZ(math.rad(-90), math.rad(-15), 0)
	mouse.Move:connect(function ()
		--local Direction = Tool.Direction.Value 
		local Direction = mouse.Hit.p
		local b = head.Position.Y-Direction.Y
		local dist = (head.Position-Direction).magnitude
		local answer = math.asin(b/dist)
		neck.C0=orginalC0*CFrame.fromEulerAnglesXYZ(answer,0,0)
		wait(0.1)
	end)end
else
print("sh")
end
else
print("arms")
end
end

function Unequip(mouse)
if arms ~= nil and torso ~= nil then
local sh = {torso:FindFirstChild("Left Shoulder"), torso:FindFirstChild("Right Shoulder")}
if sh ~= nil then
local yes = true
if yes then
yes = false
	neck.C0 = orginalC0

sh[1].Part1 = arms[1]
sh[2].Part1 = arms[2]
welds[1].Parent = nil
welds[2].Parent = nil
end
else
print("sh")
end
else
print("arms")
end
end
Tool.Equipped:connect(Equip)
Tool.Unequipped:connect(Unequip)

function Animate()

	if Tool.AnimateValue.Value == "Shoot" then

		wait(0.00001)
		weld1.C1 = CFrame.new(-0.5+1.5, 0.8, .9)* CFrame.fromEulerAnglesXYZ(math.rad(290), 0.1, math.rad(-90))
		weld2.C1 = CFrame.new(-1, 0.8, 0.5-1.5) * CFrame.fromEulerAnglesXYZ(math.rad(-95), math.rad(-15), 0)
		wait(0.00001)
		weld1.C1 = CFrame.new(-0.5+1.5, 0.8, .9)* CFrame.fromEulerAnglesXYZ(math.rad(290), 0.3, math.rad(-90))
		weld2.C1 = CFrame.new(-1, 0.8, 0.5-1.5) * CFrame.fromEulerAnglesXYZ(math.rad(-110), math.rad(-15), 0)
		wait(0.00001)
		weld1.C1 = CFrame.new(-0.5+1.5, 0.8, .9)* CFrame.fromEulerAnglesXYZ(math.rad(290), 0.35, math.rad(-90))
		weld2.C1 = CFrame.new(-1, 0.8, 0.5-1.5) * CFrame.fromEulerAnglesXYZ(math.rad(-115), math.rad(-15), 0)
		wait(0.00001)
		weld1.C1 = CFrame.new(-0.5+1.5, 0.8, .9)* CFrame.fromEulerAnglesXYZ(math.rad(290), 0.4, math.rad(-90))
		weld2.C1 = CFrame.new(-1, 0.8, 0.5-1.5) * CFrame.fromEulerAnglesXYZ(math.rad(-120), math.rad(-15), 0)
		wait(0.00001)
		weld1.C1 = CFrame.new(-0.5+1.5, 0.8, .9)* CFrame.fromEulerAnglesXYZ(math.rad(290), 0, math.rad(-90))
		weld2.C1 = CFrame.new(-1, 0.8, 0.5-1.5) * CFrame.fromEulerAnglesXYZ(math.rad(-90), math.rad(-15), 0)

	end 
	if Tool.AnimateValue.Value == "Reload" then

		wait(0.0001)
		weld1.C1 = CFrame.new(-0.5+1.5, 0.8, .9)* CFrame.fromEulerAnglesXYZ(math.rad(290), 0.4, math.rad(-90))
		weld2.C1 = CFrame.new(-1, 0.8, 0.5-1.5) * CFrame.fromEulerAnglesXYZ(math.rad(-95), math.rad(-15), 0)
		wait(0.0001)
		weld1.C1 = CFrame.new(-0.5+1.5, 0.8, .9)* CFrame.fromEulerAnglesXYZ(math.rad(290), 0.4, math.rad(-90))
		weld2.C1 = CFrame.new(-1, 0.8, 0.5-1.5) * CFrame.fromEulerAnglesXYZ(math.rad(-100), math.rad(-15), 0)
		wait(0.0001)
		weld1.C1 = CFrame.new(-0.5+1.5, 0.8, .9)* CFrame.fromEulerAnglesXYZ(math.rad(290), 0.4, math.rad(-90))
		weld2.C1 = CFrame.new(-1, 0.8, 0.5-1.5) * CFrame.fromEulerAnglesXYZ(math.rad(-105), math.rad(-15), 0)
		wait(0.0001)

		weld2.C1 = CFrame.new(-1, 0.8, 0.5-1.5) * CFrame.fromEulerAnglesXYZ(math.rad(-115), math.rad(-15), 0)
		wait(0.0001)

		weld2.C1 = CFrame.new(-1, 0.8, 0.5-1.5) * CFrame.fromEulerAnglesXYZ(math.rad(-120), math.rad(-15), 0)

		weld2.C1 = CFrame.new(-1, 0.8, 0.5-1.5) * CFrame.fromEulerAnglesXYZ(math.rad(-120), math.rad(-15), 0)
		wait(0.0001)
		weld1.C1 = CFrame.new(-0.5+1.5, 1.2, .9)* CFrame.fromEulerAnglesXYZ(math.rad(290), 0.6, math.rad(-90))
		weld2.C1 = CFrame.new(-1, 0.8, 0.5-1.5) * CFrame.fromEulerAnglesXYZ(math.rad(-120), math.rad(-15), 0)
		wait(0.0001)
		weld1.C1 = CFrame.new(-0.5+1.5, 1.3, .9)* CFrame.fromEulerAnglesXYZ(math.rad(290), 0.6, math.rad(-90))
		weld2.C1 = CFrame.new(-1, 0.8, 0.5-1.5) * CFrame.fromEulerAnglesXYZ(math.rad(-120), math.rad(-15), 0)
		wait(0.0001)
		weld1.C1 = CFrame.new(-0.5+1.5, 0.8, .9)* CFrame.fromEulerAnglesXYZ(math.rad(290), 0, math.rad(-90))
		weld2.C1 = CFrame.new(-1, 0.8, 0.5-1.5) * CFrame.fromEulerAnglesXYZ(math.rad(-90), math.rad(-15), 0)	
		Tool.AnimateValue.Value = "None"
	end 
end 

Tool.AnimateValue.Changed:connect(Animate)

end))
Script7.Name = "LineConnect"
Script7.Parent = Tool0
Script7.Disabled = true
table.insert(cors,sandbox(Script7,function()
wait()
local check = script.Part2
local part1 = script.Part1.Value
local part2 = script.Part2.Value
local parent = script.Par.Value
local color = script.Color
local line = Instance.new("Part")
line.TopSurface = 0
line.BottomSurface = 0
line.Reflectance = .5
line.Name = "Laser"
line.Transparency = 0.6
line.Locked = true
line.CanCollide = false
line.Anchored = true
line.formFactor = 0
line.Size = Vector3.new(0.4,0.4,1)
local mesh = Instance.new("BlockMesh")
mesh.Parent = line
while true do
	if (check.Value==nil) then break end
	if (part1==nil or part2==nil or parent==nil) then break end
	if (part1.Parent==nil or part2.Parent==nil) then break end
	if (parent.Parent==nil) then break end
	local lv = CFrame.new(part1.Position,part2.Position)
	local dist = (part1.Position-part2.Position).magnitude
	line.Parent = parent
	line.Material = "Neon"
	line.BrickColor = color.Value.BrickColor
	line.Reflectance = color.Value.Reflectance
	line.Transparency = "0.2"
	line.CFrame = CFrame.new(part1.Position+lv.lookVector*dist/2)
	line.CFrame = CFrame.new(line.Position,part2.Position)
	mesh.Scale = Vector3.new(.25,.25,dist)
	wait()
end
line:remove()
script:remove() 
end))
LocalScript8.Name = "MainScript"
LocalScript8.Parent = Tool0
table.insert(cors,sandbox(LocalScript8,function()
--Physics gun created by Killersoldier45
wait() 
tool = script.Parent
lineconnect = tool.LineConnect
object = nil
mousedown = false
found = false
BP = Instance.new("BodyPosition")
BP.maxForce = Vector3.new(math.huge*math.huge,math.huge*math.huge,math.huge*math.huge) --pwns everyone elses bodyposition
BP.P = BP.P*10 --faster movement. less bounceback.
dist = nil
point = Instance.new("Part")
point.Locked = true
point.Anchored = true
point.formFactor = 0
point.Shape = 0
point.Material = 'Neon'
point.BrickColor = BrickColor.new("Toothpaste")
point.Size = Vector3.new(1,1,1)
point.CanCollide = false
local mesh = Instance.new("SpecialMesh")
mesh.MeshType = "Sphere"
mesh.Scale = Vector3.new(.2,.2,.2)
mesh.Parent = point
handle = tool.Shoot
front = tool.Shoot
color = tool.Shoot
objval = nil
local hooked = false 
local hookBP = BP:clone() 
hookBP.maxForce = Vector3.new(30000,30000,30000) 

function LineConnect(part1,part2,parent)
	local p1 = Instance.new("ObjectValue")
	p1.Value = part1
	p1.Name = "Part1"
	local p2 = Instance.new("ObjectValue")
	p2.Value = part2
	p2.Name = "Part2"
	local par = Instance.new("ObjectValue")
	par.Value = parent
	par.Name = "Par"
	local col = Instance.new("ObjectValue")
	col.Value = color
	col.Name = "Color"
	local s = lineconnect:clone()
	s.Disabled = false
	p1.Parent = s
	p2.Parent = s
	par.Parent = s
	col.Parent = s
	s.Parent = workspace
	if (part2==object) then
		objval = p2
	end
end

function onButton1Down(mouse)
	if (mousedown==true) then return end
	mousedown = true
	coroutine.resume(coroutine.create(function()
		local p = point:clone()
		p.Parent = tool
		LineConnect(front,p,workspace)
		while (mousedown==true) do
			p.Parent = tool
			if (object==nil) then
				if (mouse.Target==nil) then
					local lv = CFrame.new(front.Position,mouse.Hit.p)
					p.CFrame = CFrame.new(front.Position+(lv.lookVector*1000))
				else
					p.CFrame = CFrame.new(mouse.Hit.p)
				end
			else
				LineConnect(front,object,workspace)
				break
			end
			wait()
		end
		p:remove()
	end))
	while (mousedown==true) do
		if (mouse.Target~=nil) then
			local t = mouse.Target
			if (t.Anchored==false) then
				object = t
				dist = (object.Position-front.Position).magnitude
				break
			end
		end
		wait()
	end
	while (mousedown==true) do
		if (object.Parent==nil) then break end
		local lv = CFrame.new(front.Position,mouse.Hit.p)
		BP.Parent = object
		BP.position = front.Position+lv.lookVector*dist
		wait()
	end
	BP:remove()
	object = nil
	objval.Value = nil
end

function onKeyDown(key,mouse) 
	local key = key:lower() 
	local yesh = false 
	if (key=="q") then 
		if (dist>=5) then 
			dist = dist-5 
		end 
	end 
	if key == "" then 
	if (object==nil) then return end 
	for _,v in pairs(object:children()) do 
	if v.className == "BodyGyro" then 
	return nil 
	end 
	end 
	BG = Instance.new("BodyGyro") 
	BG.maxTorque = Vector3.new(math.huge,math.huge,math.huge) 
	BG.cframe = CFrame.new(object.CFrame.p) 
	BG.Parent = object 
	repeat wait() until(object.CFrame == CFrame.new(object.CFrame.p)) 
	BG.Parent = nil 
	if (object==nil) then return end 
	for _,v in pairs(object:children()) do 
	if v.className == "BodyGyro" then 
	v.Parent = nil 
	end 
	end 
	object.Velocity = Vector3.new(0,0,0) 
	object.RotVelocity = Vector3.new(0,0,0) 
	end 
	if (key=="e") then
		dist = dist+5
	end
	if (string.byte(key)==27) then 
		if (object==nil) then return end
		local e = Instance.new("Explosion")
		e.Parent = workspace
		e.Position = object.Position
		color.BrickColor = BrickColor.Black()
		point.BrickColor = BrickColor.White() 
		wait(.48)
		color.BrickColor = BrickColor.White() 
		point.BrickColor = BrickColor.Black() 
	end
	if (key=="") then 
		if not hooked then 
		if (object==nil) then return end 
		hooked = true 
		hookBP.position = object.Position 
		if tool.Parent:findFirstChild("Torso") then 
		hookBP.Parent = tool.Parent.Torso 
		if dist ~= (object.Size.x+object.Size.y+object.Size.z)+5 then 
		dist = (object.Size.x+object.Size.y+object.Size.z)+5 
		end 
		end 
		else 
		hooked = false 
		hookBP.Parent = nil 
		end 
	end 
	if (key=="r") then 
		if (object==nil) then return end 
		color.BrickColor = BrickColor.new("Toothpaste") 
		point.BrickColor = BrickColor.new("Toothpaste") 
		object.Parent = nil 
		wait(.48) 
		color.BrickColor = BrickColor.new("Toothpaste")
		point.BrickColor = BrickColor.new("Toothpaste")
	end 
	if (key=="") then 
	if (object==nil) then return end 
	local New = object:clone() 
	New.Parent = object.Parent 
	for _,v in pairs(New:children()) do 
	if v.className == "BodyPosition" or v.className == "BodyGyro" then 
	v.Parent = nil 
	end 
	end 
	object = New 
	mousedown = false 
	mousedown = true 
	LineConnect(front,object,workspace) 
		while (mousedown==true) do
		if (object.Parent==nil) then break end
		local lv = CFrame.new(front.Position,mouse.Hit.p)
		BP.Parent = object
		BP.position = front.Position+lv.lookVector*dist
		wait()
	end
	BP:remove()
	object = nil
	objval.Value = nil
	end 
	if (key=="") then 
		local Cube = Instance.new("Part") 
		Cube.Locked = true 
		Cube.Size = Vector3.new(4,4,4) 
		Cube.formFactor = 0 
		Cube.TopSurface = 0 
		Cube.BottomSurface = 0 
		Cube.Name = "WeightedStorageCube" 
		Cube.Parent = workspace 
		Cube.CFrame = CFrame.new(mouse.Hit.p) + Vector3.new(0,2,0) 
		for i = 0,5 do 
			local Decal = Instance.new("Decal") 
			Decal.Texture = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=2662260" 
			Decal.Face = i 
			Decal.Name = "WeightedStorageCubeDecal" 
			Decal.Parent = Cube 
		end 
	end 
	if (key=="") then 
		if dist ~= 15 then 
			dist = 15 
		end 
	end 
end

function onEquipped(mouse)
	keymouse = mouse
	local char = tool.Parent
	human = char.Humanoid
	human.Changed:connect(function() if (human.Health==0) then mousedown = false BP:remove() point:remove() tool:remove() end end)
	mouse.Button1Down:connect(function() onButton1Down(mouse) end)
	mouse.Button1Up:connect(function() mousedown = false end)
	mouse.KeyDown:connect(function(key) onKeyDown(key,mouse) end)
	mouse.Icon = "rbxassetid:// 509381906"
end

tool.Equipped:connect(onEquipped)
end))

BFD1:Button("搞鸡系列", function()
local player = game.Players.LocalPlayer
