generalV2:Button("五日式", function()
-- Soru
local UserInputService = game:GetService("UserInputService")
local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local Workspace = game:GetService("Workspace")
local RunService = game:GetService("RunService")
local player = Players.LocalPlayer
local debounce = false

local soruduration = 0.3
local dashSpeed = 60
local zigzagAmplitude = 10 
local zigzagSteps = 10 

local soru = "rbxassetid://5066021887" 

local function createParticle(parent, props)
	local emitter = Instance.new("ParticleEmitter")
	for prop, val in pairs(props) do
		emitter[prop] = val
	end
	emitter.VelocityInheritance = 1
	emitter.LockedToPart = true
	emitter.Parent = parent
	return emitter
end

local function activateInvis(character)
	if not character then return end

	local hrp = character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
	if not hrp then return end

	local savedCFrame = hrp.CFrame  

	character:MoveTo(Vector3.new(-25.95, 84, 3537.55))
	wait(0.15)

	local seat = Instance.new("Seat")
	seat.Anchored = false
	seat.CanCollide = false
	seat.Name = "invischair"
	seat.Transparency = 1
	seat.CFrame = savedCFrame  
	seat.Parent = Workspace

	local weld = Instance.new("Weld")
	weld.Part0 = seat
	weld.Part1 = character:FindFirstChild("Torso") or character:FindFirstChild("UpperTorso")
	weld.C0 = CFrame.new(0, 0, 0)
	weld.Parent = seat

	return seat
end


local RunService = game:GetService("RunService")

local function sorudash(character, duration, speed, amplitude, steps)
	local root = character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
	if not root then return end

	local direction = root.CFrame.LookVector.Unit
	local rightVector = root.CFrame.RightVector.Unit
	local stepTime = duration / steps
	local startPos = root.Position
	local yLevel = startPos.Y 

	local dashSound = Instance.new("Sound")
	dashSound.SoundId = soru
	dashSound.Volume = 1
	dashSound.Parent = root

	local soundPlays = 3
	local soundSteps = {}
	for i = 1, soundPlays do
		table.insert(soundSteps, math.floor(i * steps / (soundPlays + 1)))
	end

	for i = 1, steps do
		local progress = i / steps
		local offset = math.sin(progress * math.pi * 2 * 3) * amplitude 
		local distanceMultiplier = 1.3 
		local stepDistance = speed * stepTime * i * distanceMultiplier
		local targetPos = startPos + direction * stepDistance + rightVector * offset
		targetPos = Vector3.new(targetPos.X, yLevel, targetPos.Z)

		local startCFrame = root.CFrame
		local targetCFrame = CFrame.new(targetPos, targetPos + direction)

		local elapsed = 0
		while elapsed < stepTime do
			local dt = RunService.RenderStepped:Wait()
			elapsed = elapsed + dt
			local alpha = math.clamp(elapsed / stepTime, 0, 1)
			root.CFrame = startCFrame:Lerp(targetCFrame, alpha)
		end

		if table.find(soundSteps, i) then
			dashSound:Play()
		end
	end
end





UserInputService.InputBegan:Connect(function(input, chat)
	if chat then return end
	if input.KeyCode == Enum.KeyCode.Q and not debounce then
		debounce = true

		local character = player.Character
		if not character or not character:FindFirstChild("Humanoid") then
			debounce = false
			return
		end

		local humanoid = character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
		local root = character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
		local torso = character:FindFirstChild("Torso") or character:FindFirstChild("UpperTorso")

		local startSound = Instance.new("Sound")
		startSound.SoundId = soru
		startSound.Volume = 1
		startSound.Parent = root
		startSound:Play()

		local invisSeat = activateInvis(character)
		for _, part in ipairs(character:GetDescendants()) do
			if part:IsA("BasePart") or part:IsA("Decal") then
				part.Transparency = 1
			elseif part:IsA("ParticleEmitter") then
				part.Enabled = false
			end
		end

		local vfxAttachment
		local emitter1, emitter2
		if torso then
			vfxAttachment = Instance.new("Attachment")
			vfxAttachment.Name = "VFXAttachment"
			vfxAttachment.Parent = torso

			emitter1 = createParticle(vfxAttachment, {
				Texture = "rbxassetid://13801691431",
				Color = ColorSequence.new(Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0)),
				Lifetime = NumberRange.new(0.05, 0.4),
				Rate = 0,
				Rotation = NumberRange.new(-90),
				Speed = NumberRange.new(0.6, 13),
				Size = NumberSequence.new({
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0, 0),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.101, 1.94),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.187, 0.0625),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.303, 2.81),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.433, 0.188),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.551, 2.81),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.683, 0),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.799, 2.87),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.905, 0.125),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(1, 3.25)
				}),
				Squash = NumberSequence.new({
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0, 0.112),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.0636, -0.338),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.102, 1.88),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.151, -0.188),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.217, 2.21),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.31, -0.188),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.398, 2.32),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.507, -0.188),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.575, 2.29),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.695, 0.225),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.768, 2.21),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.887, 1.09),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(1, 1.95)
				}),
				LightEmission = 0,
				LightInfluence = 1,
				Orientation = Enum.ParticleOrientation.FacingCamera,
				SpreadAngle = Vector2.new(360, -360),
				Shape = Enum.ParticleEmitterShape.Box,
				ShapeInOut = Enum.ParticleEmitterShapeInOut.Outward,
				Brightness = 15,
				ZOffset = 2,
				RotSpeed = NumberRange.new(-10, 10),
				TimeScale = 0.4
			})
			emitter1:Emit(12)


			emitter2 = createParticle(vfxAttachment, {
				Texture = "rbxassetid://13801691431",
				Color = ColorSequence.new(Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)),
				Lifetime = NumberRange.new(0.05, 0.4),
				Rate = 0, 
				Rotation = NumberRange.new(-90),
				Speed = NumberRange.new(0.6, 13),
				Size = NumberSequence.new({
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0, 0),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.101, 1.94),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.187, 0.0625),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.303, 2.81),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.433, 0.188),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.551, 2.81),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.683, 0),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.799, 2.87),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.905, 0.125),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(1, 3.25)
				}),
				Squash = NumberSequence.new({
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0, 0.112),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.0636, -0.338),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.102, 1.88),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.151, -0.188),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.217, 2.21),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.31, -0.188),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.398, 2.32),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.507, -0.188),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.575, 2.29),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.695, 0.225),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.768, 2.21),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.887, 1.09),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(1, 1.95)
				}),
				LightEmission = 0,
				LightInfluence = 1,
				Orientation = Enum.ParticleOrientation.FacingCamera,
				SpreadAngle = Vector2.new(360, -360),
				Shape = Enum.ParticleEmitterShape.Box,
				ShapeInOut = Enum.ParticleEmitterShapeInOut.Outward,
				Brightness = 15,
				ZOffset = 1.5,
				RotSpeed = NumberRange.new(-10, 10),
				TimeScale = 0.4
			})
			emitter2:Emit(18)
		end

		sorudash(character, soruduration, dashSpeed, zigzagAmplitude, zigzagSteps)

		for _, part in ipairs(character:GetDescendants()) do
			if (part:IsA("BasePart") or part:IsA("Decal")) and part.Name ~= "HumanoidRootPart" then
				part.Transparency = 0
			end
		end
		if invisSeat then invisSeat:Destroy() end



		if vfxAttachment then
			vfxAttachment:Destroy()
		end

		debounce = false
	end
end)











-- SoruDash
local UserInputService = game:GetService("UserInputService")
local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local Workspace = game:GetService("Workspace")
local player = game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer
local character = player.Character or player.CharacterAdded:Wait()

player.CharacterAdded:Connect(function(char)
	character = char
end)

local debounce = false

local soruduration = 1
local soruspeed = 80
local sorujump = 100

local sorustart = "rbxassetid://5066021887" 
local soruend = "rbxassetid://5066021887"   

local function makeparticle(parent, props)
	local emitter = Instance.new("ParticleEmitter")
	for prop, val in pairs(props) do
		emitter[prop] = val
	end
	emitter.VelocityInheritance = 1
	emitter.LockedToPart = true
	emitter.Parent = parent
	return emitter
end

local function activateinvis(character)
	if not character then return end

	local hrp = character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
	if not hrp then return end

	local savedCFrame = hrp.CFrame  

	character:MoveTo(Vector3.new(-25.95, 84, 3537.55))
	wait(0.15)

	local seat = Instance.new("Seat")
	seat.Anchored = false
	seat.CanCollide = false
	seat.Name = "invischair"
	seat.Transparency = 1
	seat.CFrame = savedCFrame  
	seat.Parent = Workspace

	local weld = Instance.new("Weld")
	weld.Part0 = seat
	weld.Part1 = character:FindFirstChild("Torso") or character:FindFirstChild("UpperTorso")
	weld.C0 = CFrame.new(0, 0, 0)
	weld.Parent = seat

	return seat
end

UserInputService.InputBegan:Connect(function(input, chat)
	if chat then return end
	if input.KeyCode == Enum.KeyCode.F and not debounce then
		debounce = true

		local character = player.Character
		if not character or not character:FindFirstChild("Humanoid") then
			debounce = false
			return
		end


		local humanoid = character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
		local root = character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
		local torso = character:FindFirstChild("Torso") or character:FindFirstChild("UpperTorso")

		local startSound = Instance.new("Sound")
		startSound.SoundId = sorustart
		startSound.Volume = 1
		startSound.Parent = root
		startSound:Play()

		local invisSeat = activateInvis(character)

		for _, part in ipairs(character:GetDescendants()) do
			if part:IsA("BasePart") or part:IsA("Decal") then
				part.Transparency = 1
			elseif part:IsA("ParticleEmitter") then
				part.Enabled = false
			end
		end

		local oldSpeed = humanoid.WalkSpeed
		local oldJump = humanoid.JumpPower

		humanoid.WalkSpeed = soruspeed
		humanoid.UseJumpPower = true
		humanoid.JumpPower = sorujump

		local vfxAttachment
		local emitter1, emitter2
		if torso then
			vfxAttachment = Instance.new("Attachment")
			vfxAttachment.Name = "VFXAttachment"
			vfxAttachment.Parent = torso

			emitter1 = createParticle(vfxAttachment, {
				Texture = "rbxassetid://13801691431",
				Color = ColorSequence.new(Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0)),
				Lifetime = NumberRange.new(0.05, 0.4),
				Rate = 0, 
				Rotation = NumberRange.new(-90),
				Speed = NumberRange.new(0.6, 13),
				Size = NumberSequence.new({
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0, 0),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.101, 1.94),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.187, 0.0625),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.303, 2.81),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.433, 0.188),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.551, 2.81),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.683, 0),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.799, 2.87),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.905, 0.125),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(1, 3.25)
				}),
				Squash = NumberSequence.new({
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0, 0.112),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.0636, -0.338),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.102, 1.88),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.151, -0.188),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.217, 2.21),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.31, -0.188),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.398, 2.32),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.507, -0.188),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.575, 2.29),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.695, 0.225),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.768, 2.21),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.887, 1.09),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(1, 1.95)
				}),
				LightEmission = 0,
				LightInfluence = 1,
				Orientation = Enum.ParticleOrientation.FacingCamera,
				SpreadAngle = Vector2.new(360, -360),
				Shape = Enum.ParticleEmitterShape.Box,
				ShapeInOut = Enum.ParticleEmitterShapeInOut.Outward,
				Brightness = 15,
				ZOffset = 2,
				RotSpeed = NumberRange.new(-10, 10),
				TimeScale = 0.3
			})
			emitter1:Emit(12)


			emitter2 = createParticle(vfxAttachment, {
				Texture = "rbxassetid://13801691431",
				Color = ColorSequence.new(Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)),
				Lifetime = NumberRange.new(0.05, 0.4),
				Rate = 0, 
				Rotation = NumberRange.new(-90),
				Speed = NumberRange.new(0.6, 13),
				Size = NumberSequence.new({
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0, 0),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.101, 1.94),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.187, 0.0625),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.303, 2.81),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.433, 0.188),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.551, 2.81),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.683, 0),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.799, 2.87),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.905, 0.125),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(1, 3.25)
				}),
				Squash = NumberSequence.new({
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0, 0.112),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.0636, -0.338),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.102, 1.88),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.151, -0.188),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.217, 2.21),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.31, -0.188),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.398, 2.32),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.507, -0.188),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.575, 2.29),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.695, 0.225),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.768, 2.21),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.887, 1.09),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(1, 1.95)
				}),
				LightEmission = 0,
				LightInfluence = 1,
				Orientation = Enum.ParticleOrientation.FacingCamera,
				SpreadAngle = Vector2.new(360, -360),
				Shape = Enum.ParticleEmitterShape.Box,
				ShapeInOut = Enum.ParticleEmitterShapeInOut.Outward,
				Brightness = 15,
				ZOffset = 1.5,
				RotSpeed = NumberRange.new(-10, 10),
				TimeScale = 0.3
			})
			emitter2:Emit(18)
		end

		task.wait(soruduration)

		local function isOnGround(hum)
			return hum and hum.FloorMaterial ~= Enum.Material.Air
		end

		while humanoid and not isOnGround(humanoid) do
			task.wait(0.1)
		end

		humanoid.WalkSpeed = oldSpeed
		humanoid.JumpPower = oldJump

		for _, part in ipairs(character:GetDescendants()) do
			if (part:IsA("BasePart") or part:IsA("Decal")) and part.Name ~= "HumanoidRootPart" then
				part.Transparency = 0
			end
		end


		if invisSeat then
			invisSeat:Destroy()
		end

		local endSound = Instance.new("Sound")
		endSound.SoundId = soruend
		endSound.Volume = 1
		endSound.Parent = root
		endSound:Play()

		if vfxAttachment then
			vfxAttachment:Destroy()
		end

		debounce = false
	end
end)


--Geppo
local player = game.Players.LocalPlayer
local uis = game:GetService("UserInputService")

local maxJumps = 1000
local geppoboost = 30

local function setupCharacter(character)
	local humanoid = character:WaitForChild("Humanoid")
	local rootPart = character:WaitForChild("HumanoidRootPart")

	local jumpCount = 0
	local baseJumpPower = humanoid.JumpPower

	local gepposound = Instance.new("Sound")
	gepposound.SoundId = "rbxassetid://72044091579953"
	gepposound.Volume = 1
	gepposound.Parent = rootPart

	local vfxAttachment = Instance.new("Attachment")
	vfxAttachment.Name = "VFXAttachment"
	vfxAttachment.Position = Vector3.new(0, -2, 0)
	vfxAttachment.Parent = rootPart

	local function createParticle(parent, props)
		local emitter = Instance.new("ParticleEmitter")
		for prop, val in pairs(props) do
			emitter[prop] = val
		end
		emitter.VelocityInheritance = 0
		emitter.LockedToPart = false
		emitter.Drag = 9
		emitter.Parent = parent
		return emitter
	end

	local emitter1 = createParticle(vfxAttachment, {
		Texture = "rbxassetid://13980317982",
		Color = ColorSequence.new(Color3.fromRGB(98, 98, 98)),
		Lifetime = NumberRange.new(0.2, 1.2),
		Rate = 0, 
		Rotation = NumberRange.new(-360, 360),
		Speed = NumberRange.new(100),
		Size = NumberSequence.new(10),
		Transparency = NumberSequence.new(0.4),
		Squash = NumberSequence.new(0),
		LightEmission = 1,
		LightInfluence = 0,
		Orientation = Enum.ParticleOrientation.FacingCamera,
		SpreadAngle = Vector2.new(0, 180),
		Shape = Enum.ParticleEmitterShape.Disc,
		ShapeInOut = Enum.ParticleEmitterShapeInOut.Outward,
		Brightness = 1,
		ZOffset = -1,
		RotSpeed = NumberRange.new(-50, 50),
		TimeScale = 1,
		EmissionDirection = Enum.NormalId.Left,
		FlipbookLayout = Enum.ParticleFlipbookLayout.Grid8x8,
		FlipbookMode = Enum.ParticleFlipbookMode.OneShot
	})

	local emitter2 = createParticle(vfxAttachment, {
		Texture = "rbxassetid://15021706755", 
		Color = ColorSequence.new(Color3.fromRGB(91, 91, 91)), 
		Lifetime = NumberRange.new(0.4, 0.9),
		Rate = 0, 
		Rotation = NumberRange.new(180),
		Speed = NumberRange.new(0.121, 2.422),
		Size = NumberSequence.new({
			NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0, 0),
			NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.1, 7.78),
			NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.2, 10),
			NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.3, 10),
			NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.4, 10),
			NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.5, 10),
			NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.6, 10),
			NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.6, 10),
			NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.8, 10),
			NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.9, 10),
			NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(1, 10)
		}),
		Transparency = NumberSequence.new({
			NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0, 1),
			NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.0962, 0.749),
			NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(1, 1)
		}),
		Squash = NumberSequence.new(0),
		LightEmission = 0.7,
		LightInfluence = 0.6,
		Orientation = Enum.ParticleOrientation.VelocityPerpendicular,
		SpreadAngle = Vector2.new(5, 5),
		Shape = Enum.ParticleEmitterShape.Box,
		ShapeInOut = Enum.ParticleEmitterShapeInOut.Outward,
		Brightness = 1,
		ZOffset = 0,
		RotSpeed = NumberRange.new(-40, 40),
		TimeScale = 1,
		EmissionDirection = Enum.NormalId.Top,
	})

	humanoid.StateChanged:Connect(function(_, newState)
		if newState == Enum.HumanoidStateType.Landed then
			jumpCount = 0
			humanoid.JumpPower = baseJumpPower
		end
	end)

	uis.InputBegan:Connect(function(input, gameProcessed)
		if gameProcessed then return end
		if input.KeyCode == Enum.KeyCode.Space then
			if jumpCount < maxJumps then
				if jumpCount > 0 then
					humanoid.JumpPower = baseJumpPower + geppoboost
					gepposound:Play()
					emitter1:Emit(25)
					emitter2:Emit(6)
				end
				humanoid:ChangeState(Enum.HumanoidStateType.Jumping)
				jumpCount += 1
			end
		end
	end)
end

if player.Character then
	setupCharacter(player.Character)
end
player.CharacterAdded:Connect(setupCharacter)


--Shigan Ouren
local UserInputService = game:GetService("UserInputService")
local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local ContentProvider = game:GetService("ContentProvider")

local player = Players.LocalPlayer
local character = player.Character or player.CharacterAdded:Wait()
local humanoid = character:WaitForChild("Humanoid")
local head = character:FindFirstChild("Head") or character

local shiganouren = Instance.new("Animation")
shiganouren.AnimationId = "rbxassetid://93642075"

local shiganourensound = "rbxassetid://121514852904179"
local shiganourensound2 = Instance.new("Sound")
shiganourensound2.SoundId = shiganourensound
shiganourensound2.Volume = 1
shiganourensound2.PlaybackSpeed = 1

ContentProvider:PreloadAsync({ shiganourensound2 })

local animTrack = humanoid:LoadAnimation(shiganouren)
animTrack.Looped = true
animTrack.Priority = Enum.AnimationPriority.Action

local holding = false
local holdStartTime = 0
local holdDuration = 4 

local originalWalkSpeed = humanoid.WalkSpeed
local slowSpeed = 3 

local function createHitbox()
	local hb = Instance.new("Part")
	hb.Size = Vector3.new(4, 4, 4)
	hb.Transparency = 1
	hb.Anchored = true
	hb.CanCollide = false
	hb.Parent = workspace
	return hb
end

local function setupchar(char)
	local humanoid = char:WaitForChild("Humanoid")
	local head = char:FindFirstChild("Head") or char
	local animTrack = humanoid:LoadAnimation(shiganouren)
	animTrack.Looped = true
	animTrack.Priority = Enum.AnimationPriority.Action
	return humanoid, head, animTrack
end

local function onCharacterAdded(char)
	character = char
	humanoid, head, animTrack = setupchar(char)
	hitbox = createHitbox() 
	originalWalkSpeed = humanoid.WalkSpeed
	holding = false
end

player.CharacterAdded:Connect(onCharacterAdded)

if player.Character then
	onCharacterAdded(player.Character)
end


local function updateHitbox()
	if not character or not character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then return end
	local root = character.HumanoidRootPart
	hitbox.CFrame = root.CFrame * CFrame.new(0, 0, -5)
end


local function createshiganparticle(parent, props)
	local emitter = Instance.new("ParticleEmitter")
	for prop, val in pairs(props) do
		emitter[prop] = val
	end
	emitter.VelocityInheritance = 1
	emitter.LockedToPart = true
	emitter.Parent = parent
	return emitter
end




local function startshigan()
	if holding then return end
	holding = true
	humanoid.WalkSpeed = slowSpeed
	holdStartTime = tick()

	animTrack:Play()
	animTrack:AdjustSpeed(7)

	local s = shiganourensound2:Clone()
	s.Parent = head
	s:Play()
	game.Debris:AddItem(s, s.TimeLength + 0.5)



	local rightArm = character:FindFirstChild("RightHand") or character:FindFirstChild("Right Arm")
	local vfxAttachment
	local emitter1, emitter2

	if rightArm then
		local vfxAttachment = Instance.new("Attachment")
		vfxAttachment.Name = "VFXAttachment"
		vfxAttachment.Parent = rightArm
		vfxAttachment.Orientation = Vector3.new(90, 0, 0)

		emitter1 = createParticle(vfxAttachment, {
			Texture = "rbxassetid://13801691431",
			Color = ColorSequence.new(Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0)),
			Lifetime = NumberRange.new(0.05, 0.4),
			Rate = 0,
			Rotation = NumberRange.new(-90),
			Speed = NumberRange.new(0.6, 1),
			Size = NumberSequence.new({
				NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0, 0),
				NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.101, 1.94),
				NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.187, 0.0625),
				NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.303, 2.81),
				NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.433, 0.188),
				NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.551, 2.81),
				NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.683, 0),
				NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.799, 2.87),
				NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.905, 0.125),
				NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(1, 3.25)
			}),
			Squash = NumberSequence.new({
				NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0, 0.112),
				NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.0636, -0.338),
				NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.102, 1.88),
				NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.151, -0.188),
				NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.217, 2.21),
				NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.31, -0.188),
				NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.398, 2.32),
				NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.507, -0.188),
				NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.575, 2.29),
				NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.695, 0.225),
				NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.768, 2.21),
				NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.887, 1.09),
				NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(1, 1.95)
			}),
			LightEmission = 0,
			LightInfluence = 1,
			Orientation = Enum.ParticleOrientation.VelocityPerpendicular,
			SpreadAngle = Vector2.new(0, 0),
			Shape = Enum.ParticleEmitterShape.Box,
			ShapeInOut = Enum.ParticleEmitterShapeInOut.Outward,
			Brightness = 15,
			ZOffset = 2,
			RotSpeed = NumberRange.new(-10, 10),
			TimeScale = 1
		})

		emitter2 = createParticle(vfxAttachment, {
			Texture = "rbxassetid://13801691431",
			Color = ColorSequence.new(Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)),
			Lifetime = NumberRange.new(0.05, 0.4),
			Rate = 0,
			Rotation = NumberRange.new(-90),
			Speed = NumberRange.new(0.6, 1),
			Size = NumberSequence.new({
				NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0, 0),
				NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.101, 1.94),
				NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.187, 0.0625),
				NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.303, 2.81),
				NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.433, 0.188),
				NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.551, 2.81),
				NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.683, 0),
				NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.799, 2.87),
				NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.905, 0.125),
				NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(1, 3.25)
			}),
			Squash = NumberSequence.new({
				NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0, 0.112),
				NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.0636, -0.338),
				NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.102, 1.88),
				NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.151, -0.188),
				NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.217, 2.21),
				NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.31, -0.188),
				NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.398, 2.32),
				NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.507, -0.188),
				NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.575, 2.29),
				NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.695, 0.225),
				NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.768, 2.21),
				NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.887, 1.09),
				NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(1, 1.95)
			}),
			LightEmission = 0,
			LightInfluence = 1,
			Orientation = Enum.ParticleOrientation.VelocityPerpendicular,
			SpreadAngle = Vector2.new(0, 0),
			Shape = Enum.ParticleEmitterShape.Box,
			ShapeInOut = Enum.ParticleEmitterShapeInOut.Outward,
			Brightness = 15,
			ZOffset = 2,
			RotSpeed = NumberRange.new(-10, 10),
			TimeScale = 1,
			Transparency = NumberSequence.new(0.7)
		})
		task.wait(0.1)
		emitter1:Emit(1)
		emitter2:Emit(1)
	end

	task.spawn(function()
		local damaged = {}
		while holding and tick() - holdStartTime < holdDuration do
			local s = shiganourensound2:Clone()
			s.Parent = head
			s:Play()
			game.Debris:AddItem(s, s.TimeLength + 0.5)

			if emitter1 then
				emitter1:Emit(1)
				emitter2:Emit(1)
			end

			updateHitbox()

			for _, npc in ipairs(workspace:GetChildren()) do
				if npc:IsA("Model") and npc ~= character and npc:FindFirstChild("Humanoid") and npc:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
					local npcHum = npc.Humanoid
					local npcRoot = npc.HumanoidRootPart
					if (npcRoot.Position - hitbox.Position).Magnitude <= (hitbox.Size.Magnitude / 2) then
						npcHum:TakeDamage(2)
					end
				end
			end

			task.wait(0.06)
		end

		if holding then
			holding = false
		end
		animTrack:Stop()
		if emitter1 then
			emitter1.Enabled = false
			emitter1:Destroy()
		end
		if emitter2 then
			emitter2.Enabled = false
			emitter2:Destroy()
		end
		hitbox:Destroy()
	end)
end

local TweenService = game:GetService("TweenService")

local function stopshigan()
	if not holding then return end
	holding = false
	humanoid.WalkSpeed = originalWalkSpeed
	animTrack:Stop()

	for _, sound in ipairs(head:GetChildren()) do
		if sound:IsA("Sound") and sound.SoundId == shiganourensound2.SoundId then
			local tween = TweenService:Create(sound, TweenInfo.new(0.3, Enum.EasingStyle.Quad, Enum.EasingDirection.Out), {Volume = 0})
			tween:Play()
			tween.Completed:Connect(function()
				sound:Stop()
				sound:Destroy()
			end)
		end
	end
end


UserInputService.InputBegan:Connect(function(input, processed)
	if processed then return end
	if input.KeyCode == Enum.KeyCode.E then
		startshigan()
	end
end)

UserInputService.InputEnded:Connect(function(input)
	if input.KeyCode == Enum.KeyCode.E then
		stopshigan()
	end
end)

--Tekkai
local TweenService = game:GetService("TweenService")
local UserInputService = game:GetService("UserInputService")
local player = game.Players.LocalPlayer
local character = player.Character or player.CharacterAdded:Wait()
local humanoid = character:WaitForChild("Humanoid")
local holding = false

local ironbody = Instance.new("Sound")
ironbody.SoundId = "rbxassetid://82176913611683"
ironbody.Volume = 1
ironbody.Parent = character:WaitForChild("HumanoidRootPart")

local normalbody = Instance.new("Sound")
normalbody.SoundId = "rbxassetid://987654321"
normalbody.Volume = 1
normalbody.Parent = character.HumanoidRootPart

local function setAnchored(state)
	for _, part in pairs(character:GetDescendants()) do
		if part:IsA("BasePart") then
			part.Anchored = state
		end
	end
end

local function blockInput(input, gameProcessed)
	if not holding then return end
	if input.KeyCode ~= Enum.KeyCode.R then
		return Enum.ContextActionResult.Sink
	end
end

UserInputService.InputBegan:Connect(function(input, gameProcessed)
	if gameProcessed then return end
	if input.KeyCode == Enum.KeyCode.R and not holding then
		if humanoid.FloorMaterial == Enum.Material.Air then
			return
		end

		holding = true
		ironbody.Volume = 1
		ironbody:Play()

		local tween = TweenService:Create(ironbody, TweenInfo.new(0.7, Enum.EasingStyle.Linear), {Volume = 0})
		tween:Play()

		setAnchored(true)
		game.ContextActionService:BindAction("BlockAllInput", blockInput, false, unpack(Enum.KeyCode:GetEnumItems()))
	end
end)

UserInputService.InputEnded:Connect(function(input)
	if input.KeyCode == Enum.KeyCode.R and holding then
		holding = false
		normalbody:Play()
		setAnchored(false)
		game.ContextActionService:UnbindAction("BlockAllInput")
	end
end)

player.CharacterAdded:Connect(function(newChar)
	character = newChar
	humanoid = newChar:WaitForChild("Humanoid")
	ironbody.Parent = newChar:WaitForChild("HumanoidRootPart")
	normalbody.Parent = newChar.HumanoidRootPart
end)
end)
generalV2:Button("橡胶果实第二形态", function()
local Animations = {
	Idle1 = "rbxassetid://134878791451155",
	Walk  = "rbxassetid://73485678861586",
	Run   = "rbxassetid://73485678861586",
	Jump  = "rbxassetid://656117878",
	Fall  = "rbxassetid://656115606",
	Intro = "rbxassetid://121760229357537"
}

local gear2startsound = "rbxassetid://106654269561138"
local gear2start = 2
local gear2speed = 60
local gear2jumppower = 70

local player = game.Players.LocalPlayer
local canUseSoru = false

local function applyAnimations(char)
	local animate = char:WaitForChild("Animate")
	animate.idle.Animation1.AnimationId = Animations.Idle1
	animate.walk.WalkAnim.AnimationId = Animations.Walk
	if animate:FindFirstChild("run") then
		animate.run.RunAnim.AnimationId = Animations.Run
	end
	animate.jump.JumpAnim.AnimationId = Animations.Jump
	if animate:FindFirstChild("fall") then
		animate.fall.FallAnim.AnimationId = Animations.Fall
	end
end

local function addSmoke(char)
	for _, part in ipairs(char:GetChildren()) do
		if part:IsA("BasePart") then
			local smoke = Instance.new("ParticleEmitter")
			smoke.Texture = "rbxassetid://258128463"
			smoke.Rate = 10
			smoke.Lifetime = NumberRange.new(0.5, 1)
			smoke.Speed = NumberRange.new(0.5, 1)
			smoke.Size = NumberSequence.new({NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0, 0.5), NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(1, 1)})
			smoke.Transparency = NumberSequence.new({NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0, 0.5), NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(1, 1)})
			smoke.Rotation = NumberRange.new(0, 360)
			smoke.RotSpeed = NumberRange.new(-10, 10)
			smoke.LightEmission = 0.5
			smoke.Parent = part
		end
	end
end

local function playIntro(char)
	local humanoid = char:WaitForChild("Humanoid")
	local animate = char:WaitForChild("Animate")
	animate.Disabled = true

	local originalWalk = humanoid.WalkSpeed
	local originalJump = humanoid.JumpPower
	humanoid.WalkSpeed = 0
	humanoid.JumpPower = 0

	local anim = Instance.new("Animation")
	anim.AnimationId = Animations.Intro
	local track = humanoid:LoadAnimation(anim)
	track.Priority = Enum.AnimationPriority.Action
	track:Play(0)
	track:AdjustWeight(0)

	for i = 1, 20 do
		track:AdjustWeight(i / 20)
		task.wait(1 / 20)
	end

	local sound = Instance.new("Sound")
	sound.SoundId = gear2startsound
	sound.Volume = 3
	sound.Parent = char:FindFirstChild("Head") or char:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
	sound:Play()

	local targetColor = Color3.fromRGB(250, 161, 161)
	local parts = {}
	for _, part in ipairs(char:GetChildren()) do
		if part:IsA("BasePart") and part.Name ~= "HumanoidRootPart" then
			table.insert(parts, part)
		end
	end
	local originalColors = {}
	for i, part in ipairs(parts) do
		originalColors[i] = part.Color
	end
	for step = 1, 30 do
		local alpha = step / 30
		for i, part in ipairs(parts) do
			part.Color = originalColors[i]:Lerp(targetColor, alpha)
		end
		task.wait(gear2start / 30)
	end

	humanoid.WalkSpeed = gear2speed
	humanoid.JumpPower = gear2jumppower

	track:Stop()
	track:Destroy()
	sound:Destroy()

	applyAnimations(char)
	addSmoke(char)
	animate.Disabled = false
	canUseSoru = true
end

local function setupCharacter(char)
	canUseSoru = false
	playIntro(char)
end

player.CharacterAdded:Connect(setupCharacter)

if player.Character then
	setupCharacter(player.Character)
end

--Pose
local UserInputService = game:GetService("UserInputService")
local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local player = Players.LocalPlayer

local animationId = "rbxassetid://121760229357537"
local animation
local animationTrack
local humanoid

local animationPlaying = false
local inputLocked = false
local canUseAnimation = false

local prevWalkSpeed
local prevJumpPower
local prevAutoRotate

local function pose()
	prevWalkSpeed = humanoid.WalkSpeed
	prevJumpPower = humanoid.JumpPower
	prevAutoRotate = humanoid.AutoRotate

	humanoid.WalkSpeed = 0
	humanoid.JumpPower = 0
	humanoid.AutoRotate = false
end

local function unpose()
	humanoid.WalkSpeed = prevWalkSpeed
	humanoid.JumpPower = prevJumpPower
	humanoid.AutoRotate = prevAutoRotate
end

local function stopAnimation()
	if animationTrack then
		animationTrack:Stop(0.2)
	end
	animationPlaying = false
	inputLocked = false
	unpose()
end

local function playAnimation()
	if not humanoid or not animationTrack then return end
	inputLocked = true
	pose()
	animationTrack:Play(0.2, 1, 1)
	animationPlaying = true

	animationTrack.Stopped:Connect(function()
		stopAnimation()
	end)
end

local function setcharacterup(char)
	humanoid = char:WaitForChild("Humanoid")
	animation = Instance.new("Animation")
	animation.AnimationId = animationId
	animationTrack = humanoid:LoadAnimation(animation)
end

player.CharacterAdded:Connect(function(char)
	setcharacterup(char)
end)

if player.Character then
	setcharacterup(player.Character)
end

delay(3, function()
	canUseAnimation = true
end)

UserInputService.InputBegan:Connect(function(input, gameProcessed)
	if gameProcessed then return end

	if input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Keyboard and input.KeyCode == Enum.KeyCode.Q then
		if not canUseAnimation then return end

		if not animationPlaying then
			playAnimation()
		else
			stopAnimation()
		end
	elseif inputLocked then
		return Enum.ContextActionResult.Sink
	end
end)


--Soru
local UserInputService = game:GetService("UserInputService")
local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local Workspace = game:GetService("Workspace")
local player = game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer
local character = player.Character or player.CharacterAdded:Wait()

player.CharacterAdded:Connect(function(char)
	character = char
end)

local debounce = false

local soruduration = 1
local soruspeed = 200 
local sorujump = 100

local sorustart = "rbxassetid://132566914518085" 
local soruend = "rbxassetid://132566914518085"   

local function makeparticle(parent, props)
	local emitter = Instance.new("ParticleEmitter")
	for prop, val in pairs(props) do
		emitter[prop] = val
	end
	emitter.VelocityInheritance = 1
	emitter.LockedToPart = true
	emitter.Parent = parent
	return emitter
end

local function activateinvis(character)
	if not character then return end

	local hrp = character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
	if not hrp then return end

	local savedCFrame = hrp.CFrame  

	character:MoveTo(Vector3.new(-25.95, 84, 3537.55))
	wait(0.15)

	local seat = Instance.new("Seat")
	seat.Anchored = false
	seat.CanCollide = false
	seat.Name = "invischair"
	seat.Transparency = 1
	seat.CFrame = savedCFrame  
	seat.Parent = Workspace

	local weld = Instance.new("Weld")
	weld.Part0 = seat
	weld.Part1 = character:FindFirstChild("Torso") or character:FindFirstChild("UpperTorso")
	weld.C0 = CFrame.new(0, 0, 0)
	weld.Parent = seat

	return seat
end

UserInputService.InputBegan:Connect(function(input, chat)
	if chat then return end
	if input.KeyCode == Enum.KeyCode.F and not debounce and canUseSoru then
		debounce = true

		local character = player.Character
		if not character or not character:FindFirstChild("Humanoid") then
			debounce = false
			return
		end


		local humanoid = character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
		local root = character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
		local torso = character:FindFirstChild("Torso") or character:FindFirstChild("UpperTorso")

		local startSound = Instance.new("Sound")
		startSound.SoundId = sorustart
		startSound.Volume = 1
		startSound.Parent = root
		startSound:Play()

		local invisSeat = activateinvis(character)

		for _, part in ipairs(character:GetDescendants()) do
			if part:IsA("BasePart") or part:IsA("Decal") then
				part.Transparency = 1
			elseif part:IsA("ParticleEmitter") then
				part.Enabled = false
			end
		end

		local oldSpeed = humanoid.WalkSpeed
		local oldJump = humanoid.JumpPower

		humanoid.WalkSpeed = soruspeed
		humanoid.UseJumpPower = true
		humanoid.JumpPower = sorujump

		local vfxAttachment
		local emitter1, emitter2
		if torso then
			vfxAttachment = Instance.new("Attachment")
			vfxAttachment.Name = "VFXAttachment"
			vfxAttachment.Parent = torso

			emitter1 = makeparticle(vfxAttachment, {
				Texture = "rbxassetid://13801691431",
				Color = ColorSequence.new(Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0)),
				Lifetime = NumberRange.new(0.05, 0.4),
				Rate = 0, 
				Rotation = NumberRange.new(-90),
				Speed = NumberRange.new(0.6, 13),
				Size = NumberSequence.new({
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0, 0),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.101, 1.94),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.187, 0.0625),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.303, 2.81),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.433, 0.188),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.551, 2.81),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.683, 0),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.799, 2.87),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.905, 0.125),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(1, 3.25)
				}),
				Squash = NumberSequence.new({
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0, 0.112),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.0636, -0.338),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.102, 1.88),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.151, -0.188),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.217, 2.21),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.31, -0.188),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.398, 2.32),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.507, -0.188),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.575, 2.29),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.695, 0.225),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.768, 2.21),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.887, 1.09),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(1, 1.95)
				}),
				LightEmission = 0,
				LightInfluence = 1,
				Orientation = Enum.ParticleOrientation.FacingCamera,
				SpreadAngle = Vector2.new(360, -360),
				Shape = Enum.ParticleEmitterShape.Box,
				ShapeInOut = Enum.ParticleEmitterShapeInOut.Outward,
				Brightness = 15,
				ZOffset = 2,
				RotSpeed = NumberRange.new(-10, 10),
				TimeScale = 0.3
			})
			emitter1:Emit(12)


			emitter2 = makeparticle(vfxAttachment, {
				Texture = "rbxassetid://13801691431",
				Color = ColorSequence.new(Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)),
				Lifetime = NumberRange.new(0.05, 0.4),
				Rate = 0, 
				Rotation = NumberRange.new(-90),
				Speed = NumberRange.new(0.6, 13),
				Size = NumberSequence.new({
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0, 0),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.101, 1.94),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.187, 0.0625),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.303, 2.81),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.433, 0.188),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.551, 2.81),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.683, 0),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.799, 2.87),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.905, 0.125),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(1, 3.25)
				}),
				Squash = NumberSequence.new({
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0, 0.112),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.0636, -0.338),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.102, 1.88),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.151, -0.188),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.217, 2.21),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.31, -0.188),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.398, 2.32),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.507, -0.188),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.575, 2.29),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.695, 0.225),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.768, 2.21),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.887, 1.09),
					NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(1, 1.95)
				}),
				LightEmission = 0,
				LightInfluence = 1,
				Orientation = Enum.ParticleOrientation.FacingCamera,
				SpreadAngle = Vector2.new(360, -360),
				Shape = Enum.ParticleEmitterShape.Box,
				ShapeInOut = Enum.ParticleEmitterShapeInOut.Outward,
				Brightness = 15,
				ZOffset = 1.5,
				RotSpeed = NumberRange.new(-10, 10),
				TimeScale = 0.3
			})
			emitter2:Emit(18)
		end

		task.wait(soruduration)

		local function isOnGround(hum)
			return hum and hum.FloorMaterial ~= Enum.Material.Air
		end

		while humanoid and not isOnGround(humanoid) do
			task.wait(0.1)
		end

		humanoid.WalkSpeed = oldSpeed
		humanoid.JumpPower = oldJump

		for _, part in ipairs(character:GetDescendants()) do
			if (part:IsA("BasePart") or part:IsA("Decal")) and part.Name ~= "HumanoidRootPart" then
				part.Transparency = 0
			end
		end
		
		for _, part in ipairs(character:GetDescendants()) do
			if part:IsA("ParticleEmitter") and part.Name ~= "VFXEmitter" then
				part.Enabled = true
			end
		end


		if invisSeat then
			invisSeat:Destroy()
		end

		local endSound = Instance.new("Sound")
		endSound.SoundId = soruend
		endSound.Volume = 1
		endSound.Parent = root
		endSound:Play()

		if vfxAttachment then
			vfxAttachment:Destroy()
		end

		debounce = false
	end
end)
end)
generalV2:Button("快速弗雷德熊 V2", function()
local neededFiles = {}
for i = 1, 20 do
    local n = string.format("%03d", i)
    table.insert(neededFiles, "Fredscare/ezgif-frame-"..n..".png")
end
table.insert(neededFiles, "Fredbear.rbxmx")

local HasFiles = true
for _, file in ipairs(neededFiles) do
    if not isfile(file) then
        HasFiles = false
        break
    end
end

if HasFiles then
    loadstring(game:HttpGet("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ian49972/SCRIPTS/refs/heads/main/Fredbear"))()
    return
end

local PlayerGui = game.Players.LocalPlayer:WaitForChild("PlayerGui")

local ScreenGui = Instance.new("ScreenGui")
ScreenGui.IgnoreGuiInset = true
ScreenGui.ResetOnSpawn = false
ScreenGui.Parent = PlayerGui

local Frame = Instance.new("Frame")
Frame.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 1, 0)
Frame.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0)
Frame.Parent = ScreenGui

local LoadingText = Instance.new("TextLabel")
LoadingText.Size = UDim2.new(1,0,0,50)
LoadingText.Position = UDim2.new(0,0,0.3,0)
LoadingText.BackgroundTransparency = 1
LoadingText.Text = "Loading..."
LoadingText.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255,255,255)
LoadingText.TextScaled = true
LoadingText.Parent = Frame

local InfoText = Instance.new("TextLabel")
InfoText.Size = UDim2.new(1,0,0,30)
InfoText.Position = UDim2.new(0,0,0.48,0)
InfoText.BackgroundTransparency = 1
InfoText.Text = "This screen will not appear if you use the script again"
InfoText.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(200,200,200)
InfoText.TextScaled = true
InfoText.Parent = Frame

local BarBG = Instance.new("Frame")
BarBG.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0.5,0.5)
BarBG.Position = UDim2.new(0.5,0,0.8,0)
BarBG.Size = UDim2.new(0.6,0,0.05,0)
BarBG.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(50,50,50)
BarBG.Parent = Frame

local bgCorner = Instance.new("UICorner")
bgCorner.CornerRadius = UDim.new(0,12)
bgCorner.Parent = BarBG

local Bar = Instance.new("Frame")
Bar.Size = UDim2.new(0,0,1,0)
Bar.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255,230,0)
Bar.Parent = BarBG

local barCorner = Instance.new("UICorner")
barCorner.CornerRadius = UDim.new(0,12)
barCorner.Parent = Bar

local function UpdateBar(p)
    Bar.Size = UDim2.new(p, 0, 1, 0)
end

if not isfolder("Fredscare") then
    makefolder("Fredscare")
end

local total = 21
local count = 0

for i = 1, 20 do
    local n = string.format("%03d", i)
    if not isfile("Fredscare/ezgif-frame-"..n..".png") then
        writefile("Fredscare/ezgif-frame-"..n..".png",
            game:HttpGet("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ian49972/IMAGES/refs/heads/main/ezgif-frame-"..n..".png")
        )
    end
    count += 1
    UpdateBar(count / total)
end

if not isfile("Fredbear.rbxmx") then
    writefile("Fredbear.rbxmx",
        game:HttpGet("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ian49972/RBXMS/refs/heads/main/Fredbear.rbxmx")
    )
end

count += 1
UpdateBar(count / total)

ScreenGui:Destroy()

loadstring(game:HttpGet("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ian49972/SCRIPTS/refs/heads/main/Fredbear"))()
end)

print("Anti Afk On")

generalV2:Button("防踢(防服务器踢出)", function()
local function startAntiKick()
    local mt = getrawmetatable(game)
    setreadonly(mt, false)
    local old = mt.__namecall
    mt.__namecall = newcclosure(function(Self, ...)
        local method = getnamecallmethod()
        if method == "Kick" and Self == game.Players.LocalPlayer then
            return
        end
        return old(Self, ...)
    end)
    setreadonly(mt, true)

    game.Players.LocalPlayer.CharacterRemoving:Connect(function()
        task.wait(0.1)
        game.Players.LocalPlayer:LoadCharacter()
    end)

    local connection
    connection = game:GetService("RunService").Stepped:Connect(function()
        local char = game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character
        if char and char:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
            local root = char.HumanoidRootPart
            root.CFrame = root.CFrame + Vector3.new(math.random(-5,5)/100, 0, math.random(-5,5)/100)
        end
    end)

    game.Players.LocalPlayer.OnTeleport:Connect(function(State)
        if State == Enum.TeleportState.Started then
            task.wait(0.1)
            local teleporthandler = game:GetService("TeleportService"):Teleport(game.PlaceId, game.Players.LocalPlayer)
        end
    end)
end

task.wait(1)
startAntiKick()
end)
end
do
local generalV3 = Tab3:section("通用脚本14", false)
generalV3:Toggle("无限体力(第一种)", "Instant_Interaction", false, function(state)
    if state then
            getgenv().BS_StaminaHackedTables = {}
            getgenv().BS_StaminaHookedFunctions = {}
            getgenv().BS_OriginalStaminaValues = {}
            
            for _,v in pairs(getgc(true)) do
                if type(v) == "table" and rawget(v, "Stamina") then
                    table.insert(getgenv().BS_OriginalStaminaValues, {
                        table = v,
                        value = rawget(v, "Stamina")
                    })
                    
                    v.Stamina = 100
                    local mt = getrawmetatable(v)
                    if mt then
                        local originalMeta = {
                            __newindex = mt.__newindex,
                            __index = mt.__index
                        }
                        table.insert(getgenv().BS_StaminaHackedTables, {
                            table = v,
                            metatable = mt,
                            original = originalMeta
                        })
                        
                        setreadonly(mt, false)
                        mt.__newindex = newcclosure(function(t, k, val)
                            if k ~= "Stamina" then rawset(t, k, val) end
                        end)
                        mt.__index = newcclosure(function(t, k)
                            return k == "Stamina" and 100 or rawget(t, k)
                        end)
                        setreadonly(mt, true)
                    end
                end
            end
            
            for _,f in pairs(getgc(true)) do
                if type(f) == "function" then
                    local info = debug.getinfo(f)
                    if info and info.name and info.name:find("[Ss]tamina") then
                        table.insert(getgenv().BS_StaminaHookedFunctions, f)
                        local original = hookfunction(f, function() return 100 end)
                        if original then
                            getgenv().BS_StaminaOriginals = getgenv().BS_StaminaOriginals or {}
                            getgenv().BS_StaminaOriginals[f] = original
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
        else
            if getgenv().BS_StaminaHackedTables then
                for _, data in ipairs(getgenv().BS_StaminaHackedTables) do
                    if data.metatable then
                        setreadonly(data.metatable, false)
                        data.metatable.__newindex = data.original.__newindex
                        data.metatable.__index = data.original.__index
                        setreadonly(data.metatable, true)
                    end
                end
            end
            
            if getgenv().BS_OriginalStaminaValues then
                for _, data in ipairs(getgenv().BS_OriginalStaminaValues) do
                    if data.table then
                        rawset(data.table, "Stamina", data.value)
                    end
                end
            end
            
            if getgenv().BS_StaminaHookedFunctions and getgenv().BS_StaminaOriginals then
                for _, func in ipairs(getgenv().BS_StaminaHookedFunctions) do
                    local original = getgenv().BS_StaminaOriginals[func]
                    if original and hookfunction then
                        hookfunction(func, original)
                    end
                end
            end
            
            getgenv().BS_StaminaHackedTables = nil
            getgenv().BS_StaminaHookedFunctions = nil
            getgenv().BS_OriginalStaminaValues = nil
            getgenv().BS_StaminaOriginals = nil
        end
end)
generalV3:Button("无限体力(第二种)", function()
getgenv().BS_UltimateStamina = true
if getgenv().BS_StaminaEngine then getgenv().BS_StaminaEngine:Disconnect() end
getgenv().BS_StaminaActive = true; getgenv().BS_StaminaRegistry = {t = {}, f = {}, i = {}, mt = {}}
local function matchKey(k) local s = tostring(k):lower(); return s:find("stam") or s:find("stamia") or s:find("energy") or s:find("endur") or s:find("fatigue") or s:find("stamn") end
local function hijackValue(obj, key, val) local mt = getrawmetatable(obj); if mt then setreadonly(mt, false); mt.__index = newcclosure(function(t,k) return k==key and (typeof(val)=="number" and 100 or val) or rawget(t,k) end); mt.__newindex = newcclosure(function(t,k,v) if k~=key then rawset(t,k,v) end end); setreadonly(mt, true); table.insert(getgenv().BS_StaminaRegistry.mt, mt) end end
local function scanTables() pcall(function() for _,v in pairs(getgc(true)) do if type(v)=="table" then for k,val in pairs(v) do if matchKey(k) and (type(val)=="number" or typeof(val)=="EnumItem") then table.insert(getgenv().BS_StaminaRegistry.t, {tbl=v, key=k, val=val}); v[k]=100; hijackValue(v,k,val) end end end end end) end
local function scanInstances() pcall(function() for _,v in pairs(game:GetDescendants()) do if v:IsA("NumberValue") or v:IsA("IntValue") then if matchKey(v.Name) then table.insert(getgenv().BS_StaminaRegistry.i, v); v.Changed:Connect(function() if v.Parent then v.Value = 100 end end) end end end end) end
local function hookFunctions() pcall(function() for _,f in pairs(getgc(true)) do if type(f)=="function" then local i = debug.getinfo(f); if i and i.name and matchKey(i.name) then getgenv().BS_StaminaRegistry.f[f] = hookfunction(f, function(...) return 100 end) end end end end) end
scanTables(); scanInstances(); hookFunctions()
getgenv().BS_StaminaEngine = game:GetService("RunService").RenderStepped:Connect(function()
    pcall(function() for _,d in ipairs(getgenv().BS_StaminaRegistry.t) do if d.tbl and d.key and d.tbl[d.key]~=100 then d.tbl[d.key]=100 end end end)
    pcall(function() for _,v in ipairs(getgenv().BS_StaminaRegistry.i) do if v.Parent and v.Value~=100 then v.Value=100 end end end)
end)
end)
generalV3:Button("无限血量", function()
getgenv().BS_UltimateHealth = true
if getgenv().BS_HealthEngine then getgenv().BS_HealthEngine:Disconnect() end
getgenv().BS_HealthActive = true; getgenv().BS_HealthRegistry = {t = {}, f = {}, i = {}, mt = {}, cu = {}}
local function matchKey(k) local s = tostring(k):lower(); return s:find("health") or s:find("hp") or s:find("hitpoint") or s:find("life") or s:find("alive") or s:find("maxhealth") end
local function isBadKey(k) local s = tostring(k):lower(); return s:find("speed") or s:find("walkspeed") or s:find("jumppower") or s:find("gravity") or s:find("sensitivity") or s:find("mousespeed") or s:find("camerarot") or s:find("fieldofview") or s:find("fov") or s:find("velocity") or s:find("acceleration") or s:find("rotate") or s:find("turn") or s:find("yaw") or s:find("pitch") or s:find("roll") end
local function hijackValue(obj, key, val) local mt = getrawmetatable(obj); if mt then setreadonly(mt, false); local oldIndex = mt.__index; mt.__index = newcclosure(function(t,k) if k==key and not isBadKey(k) then return (typeof(val)=="number" and (val>0 and math.huge or val) or val) end return oldIndex and oldIndex(t,k) or rawget(t,k) end); local oldNewIndex = mt.__newindex; mt.__newindex = newcclosure(function(t,k,v) if k==key and not isBadKey(k) and type(v)=="number" and v<math.huge then return end return oldNewIndex and oldNewIndex(t,k,v) or rawset(t,k,v) end); setreadonly(mt, true); table.insert(getgenv().BS_HealthRegistry.mt, {mt=mt, oi=oldIndex, oni=oldNewIndex}) end end
local function scanTables() pcall(function() for _,v in pairs(getgc(true)) do if type(v)=="table" then for k,val in pairs(v) do if matchKey(k) and not isBadKey(k) and type(val)=="number" then table.insert(getgenv().BS_HealthRegistry.t, {tbl=v, key=k, val=val}); if val>0 then v[k]=math.huge; hijackValue(v,k,val) end end end end end end) end
local function scanInstances() pcall(function() for _,v in pairs(game:GetDescendants()) do if v:IsA("NumberValue") or v:IsA("IntValue") or v:IsA("Humanoid") then if (matchKey(v.Name) or v:IsA("Humanoid")) and not isBadKey(v.Name) then table.insert(getgenv().BS_HealthRegistry.i, v); if v:IsA("Humanoid") then local hum = v; pcall(function() hum.Health = math.huge; hum.MaxHealth = math.huge; hum:SetStateEnabled(Enum.HumanoidStateType.Dead, false); hum.BreakJointsOnDeath = false; end); table.insert(getgenv().BS_HealthRegistry.cu, hum:GetPropertyChangedSignal("Health"):Connect(function() if hum.Health < math.huge then hum.Health = math.huge end end)) else v.Value = 999999; table.insert(getgenv().BS_HealthRegistry.cu, v.Changed:Connect(function() if v.Parent and v.Value < 999999 then v.Value = 999999 end end)) end end end end end) end
local function hookFunctions() pcall(function() for _,f in pairs(getgc(true)) do if type(f)=="function" then local i = debug.getinfo(f); if i and i.name and matchKey(i.name) and not isBadKey(i.name) then getgenv().BS_HealthRegistry.f[f] = hookfunction(f, function(...) return math.huge end) end end end end) end
scanTables(); scanInstances(); hookFunctions()
getgenv().BS_HealthEngine = game:GetService("RunService").RenderStepped:Connect(function()
    pcall(function() for _,d in ipairs(getgenv().BS_HealthRegistry.t) do if d.tbl and d.key and type(d.tbl[d.key])=="number" and d.tbl[d.key]<math.huge then d.tbl[d.key]=math.huge end end end)
    pcall(function() for _,v in ipairs(getgenv().BS_HealthRegistry.i) do if v.Parent then if v:IsA("Humanoid") then v.Health = math.huge; v.MaxHealth = math.huge; pcall(function() v:SetStateEnabled(Enum.HumanoidStateType.Dead, false) end) elseif v.Value < 999999 then v.Value = 999999 end end end end)
end)
end)

generalV3:Button("修改伤害为999999", function()
getgenv().BS_UltimateDamage = true
if getgenv().BS_DamageEngine then getgenv().BS_DamageEngine:Disconnect() end
getgenv().BS_DamageActive = true; getgenv().BS_DamageRegistry = {t = {}, f = {}, mt = {}}
local function matchKey(k) local s = tostring(k):lower(); return s:find("damage") or s:find("dmg") or s:find("power") or s:find("attack") or s:find("hitdmg") or s:find("bulletdmg") or s:find("weapondmg") end
local function hijackValue(obj, key, val) local mt = getrawmetatable(obj); if mt then setreadonly(mt, false); local origIndex = mt.__index; mt.__index = newcclosure(function(t,k) if k==key then return (typeof(val)=="number" and 999999 or val) end return origIndex and origIndex(t,k) or rawget(t,k) end); local origNewIndex = mt.__newindex; mt.__newindex = newcclosure(function(t,k,v) if k==key then v = (typeof(val)=="number" and 999999 or val) end return origNewIndex and origNewIndex(t,k,v) or rawset(t,k,v) end); setreadonly(mt, true); table.insert(getgenv().BS_DamageRegistry.mt, {mt=mt, oi=origIndex, oni=origNewIndex}) end end

local function hookFunctions() pcall(function() for _,f in pairs(getgc(true)) do if type(f)=="function" then local i = debug.getinfo(f); if i and i.name and matchKey(i.name) then local old = f; getgenv().BS_DamageRegistry.f[f] = hookfunction(f, function(...) local r = old(...); return (typeof(r)=="number" and 999999 or r) end) end end end end) end
