generalV3:Button("修改所有间隔为0", function()
getgenv().BS_ZeroCooldown = true
if getgenv().BS_CooldownEngine then getgenv().BS_CooldownEngine:Disconnect() end
getgenv().BS_CooldownActive = true; getgenv().BS_CooldownRegistry = {t = {}, f = {}, mt = {}}
local cdKeys = {cooldown=true,cd=true,interval=true,delay=true,waittime=true,casttime=true,recharge=true,reloadtime=true,firerate=true,attackspeed=true,usedelay=true,nextuse=true,lastused=true,cooldowntime=true}
local badKeys = {speed=true,walkspeed=true,jumppower=true,gravity=true,sensitivity=true,mousespeed=true,camera=true,fieldofview=true,fov=true,velocity=true,acceleration=true,gui=true,button=true,click=true,input=true}
local function matchKey(k) local s = tostring(k):lower(); for key,_ in pairs(cdKeys) do if s:find(key) then return true end end return false end
local function isBadKey(k) local s = tostring(k):lower(); for key,_ in pairs(badKeys) do if s:find(key) then return true end end return false end
local function hijackValue(obj, key, val) local mt = getrawmetatable(obj); if mt then setreadonly(mt, false); local oldNewIndex = mt.__newindex; mt.__newindex = newcclosure(function(t,k,v) if k==key and type(v)=="number" and v>0 then return end return oldNewIndex and oldNewIndex(t,k,v) or rawset(t,k,v) end); setreadonly(mt, true); table.insert(getgenv().BS_CooldownRegistry.mt, {mt=mt, oni=oldNewIndex}) end end
local function scanTables() pcall(function() for _,v in pairs(getgc(true)) do if type(v)=="table" then for k,val in pairs(v) do if matchKey(k) and not isBadKey(k) and type(val)=="number" and val>0 then table.insert(getgenv().BS_CooldownRegistry.t, {tbl=v, key=k}); v[k]=0; hijackValue(v,k,val) end end end end end) end
local function hookFunctions() pcall(function() for _,f in pairs(getgc(true)) do if type(f)=="function" then local i = debug.getinfo(f); if i and i.name and matchKey(i.name) and not isBadKey(i.name) then getgenv().BS_CooldownRegistry.f[f] = hookfunction(f, function(...) return 0 end) end end end end) end
scanTables(); hookFunctions()
task.spawn(function() while getgenv().BS_CooldownActive do task.wait(0.5); pcall(function() for _,d in ipairs(getgenv().BS_CooldownRegistry.t) do if d.tbl and d.key and d.tbl[d.key] ~= 0 then d.tbl[d.key] = 0 end end end) end end)
end)
generalV3:Button("绕过反作弊", function()
do
local getInfo = getinfo or debug.getinfo
local debugMode = false
local hookedFunctions = {}
local detectedFunc, killFunc

setthreadidentity(2)

for _, value in ipairs(getgc(true)) do
    if typeof(value) == "table" then
        local detected = rawget(value, "Detected")
        local kill = rawget(value, "Kill")

        if typeof(detected) == "function" and not detectedFunc then
            detectedFunc = detected
            local originalHook
            originalHook = hookfunction(detectedFunc, function(method, info, ...)
                if method ~= "_" then
                    if debugMode then
                        warn(string.format(
                            "Adonis AntiCheat flagged\nMethod: %s\nInfo: %s",
                            tostring(method),
                            tostring(info)
                        ))
                    end
                end
                return true
            end)
            table.insert(hookedFunctions, detectedFunc)
        end

        if rawget(value, "Variables") and rawget(value, "Process") and typeof(kill) == "function" and not killFunc then
            killFunc = kill
            local originalHook
            originalHook = hookfunction(killFunc, function(info)
                if debugMode then
                    warn(string.format("Adonis AntiCheat tried to kill (fallback): %s", tostring(info)))
                end
            end)
            table.insert(hookedFunctions, killFunc)
        end
    end
end

local originalDebugInfo
originalDebugInfo = hookfunction(getrenv().debug.info, newcclosure(function(...)
    local firstArg, _ = ...
    if detectedFunc and firstArg == detectedFunc then
        if debugMode then
            warn("Adonis bypassed")
        end
        return coroutine.yield(coroutine.running())
    end
    return originalDebugInfo(...)
end))

setthreadidentity(7)
end
do
local function LoadScript()
    _G.ESP_BIND = nil
    _G.FREE_FOR_ALL = nil
    _G.CHANGE_AIM = nil
    _G.AIM_AT = nil
    _G.Size = nil

    local function HookCrashFunctions()
        local badFunctions = {"Crash", "HardCrash", "GPUCrash", "RAMCrash", "KillClient", "SetFPS"}
        
        for i,v in pairs(getgc()) do 
            if type(v) == "function" then
                local info = debug.getinfo(v)
                local functionName = info.name
                
                if info.source and info.source:find('=.Core.Functions') and table.find(badFunctions, functionName) then
                    pcall(function()
                        hookfunction(v, function()
                            return nil
                        end)
                    end)
                end
            end
        end
    end

    local function FindAndPatchTables()
        local v_u_1485_table = nil
        local v_u_129_config = nil
        
        pcall(function()
            local gc = getgc(true)
            for _, obj in ipairs(gc) do
                if type(obj) == "table" then
                    pcall(function()
                        if obj.DTXC1 and obj.GP2 and obj.AX1 and obj.EN then
                            v_u_1485_table = obj
                        end
                    end)
                    pcall(function()
                        if obj.MaxDT and obj.IntSalt and obj.CZs and obj.RequestRate then
                            v_u_129_config = obj
                        end
                    end)
                end
            end
        end)
        
        if v_u_1485_table then
            pcall(function()
                v_u_1485_table.DTXC1 = function() return nil end
                v_u_1485_table.Detected = function() return nil end
                v_u_1485_table.GP2 = function() return nil end
                v_u_1485_table.AX1 = function() return true end
                v_u_1485_table.CX1 = function() return nil end
            end)
        end
        
        if v_u_129_config then
            pcall(function()
                v_u_129_config.MaxDT = 999999999
                v_u_129_config.RequestRate = 999999
            end)
        end
    end

    local function HookTamperingFunctions()
        pcall(function()
            for _, obj in ipairs(getgc(true)) do
                if type(obj) == "function" then
                    pcall(function()
                        local consts = debug.getconstants(obj)
                        for _, c in ipairs(consts) do
                            if c == "Z_Z" or c == "Tampering WalkSpeed" or c == "Tampering JumpPower" or c == "Tampering HipHeight" or c == "DTXC1" then
                                pcall(function()
                                    hookfunction(obj, function(...) 
                                        return nil 
                                    end)
                                end)
                                break
                            end
                        end
                    end)
                end
            end
        end)
        
        pcall(function()
            for _, obj in ipairs(getgc(true)) do
                if type(obj) == "function" then
                    pcall(function()
                        local ups = debug.getupvalues(obj)
                        for i, v in pairs(ups) do
                            if v == true then
                                local consts = debug.getconstants(obj)
                                for _, c in ipairs(consts) do
                                    if c == "DTXC1" or c == "v_u_27" or c == "GP2" then
                                        debug.setupvalue(obj, i, false)
                                        break
                                    end
                                end
                            end
                        end
                    end)
                end
            end
        end)
    end

    local function SetupWalkSpeedHook()
        local expectedWS, expectedJP, expectedHH = nil, nil, nil
        
        pcall(function()
            for _, obj in ipairs(getgc(true)) do
                if typeof(obj) == "Instance" and obj:IsA("NumberValue") and obj.Parent == nil then
                    local val = obj.Value
                    if not expectedWS and val >= 5 and val <= 50 then
                        expectedWS = obj
                    elseif not expectedJP and val >= 30 and val <= 60 then
                        expectedJP = obj
                    elseif not expectedHH and val >= -5 and val <= 5 then
                        expectedHH = obj
                    end
                end
            end
        end)
        
        if expectedWS or expectedJP or expectedHH then
            pcall(function()
                local oldNewindex
                oldNewindex = hookmetamethod(game, "__newindex", newcclosure(function(self, key, value)
                    if typeof(self) == "Instance" and self:IsA("Humanoid") then
                        if key == "WalkSpeed" and expectedWS then
                            expectedWS.Value = value
                        elseif key == "JumpPower" and expectedJP then
                            expectedJP.Value = value
                        elseif key == "HipHeight" and expectedHH then
                            expectedHH.Value = value
                        end
                    end
                    return oldNewindex(self, key, value)
                end))
            end)
        end
    end

    local function DisableHumanoidConnections(humanoid)
        if not humanoid then return end
        pcall(function()
            for _, conn in ipairs(getconnections(humanoid.Changed)) do
                pcall(function() 
                    if conn.Disable then
                        conn:Disable() 
                    end
                end)
            end
        end)
        pcall(function()
            for _, conn in ipairs(getconnections(humanoid.StateChanged)) do
                pcall(function() 
                    if conn.Disable then
                        conn:Disable() 
                    end
                end)
            end
        end)
        pcall(function()
            for _, conn in ipairs(getconnections(humanoid.Died)) do
                pcall(function()
                    local func = conn.Function
                    if func then
                        local consts = debug.getconstants(func)
                        for _, c in ipairs(consts) do
                            if c == "DTXC1" then
                                if conn.Disable then
                                    conn:Disable()
                                end
                                break
                            end
                        end
                    end
                end)
            end
        end)
    end

    local function DisableCharacterConnections(char)
        if not char then return end
        pcall(function()
            for _, conn in ipairs(getconnections(char.AncestryChanged)) do
                pcall(function()
                    local func = conn.Function
                    if func then
                        local consts = debug.getconstants(func)
                        for _, c in ipairs(consts) do
                            if c == "DTXC1" then
                                if conn.Disable then
                                    conn:Disable()
                                end
                                break
                            end
                        end
                    end
                end)
            end
        end)
        pcall(function()
            for _, part in ipairs(char:GetDescendants()) do
                if part:IsA("BasePart") then
                    for _, conn in ipairs(getconnections(part.DescendantAdded)) do
                        pcall(function()
                            local func = conn.Function
                            if func then
                                local consts = debug.getconstants(func)
                                for _, c in ipairs(consts) do
                                    if c == "BodyGyro" or c == "BodyForce" or c == "BM" or c == "DTXC1" then
                                        if conn.Disable then
                                            conn:Disable()
                                        end
                                        break
                                    end
                                end
                            end
                        end)
                    end
                end
            end
        end)
    end

    local function TagBodyMovers(char)
        if not char then return end
        pcall(function()
            for _, inst in ipairs(char:GetDescendants()) do
                if inst:IsA("BodyMover") or inst:IsA("BodyGyro") or inst:IsA("BodyForce") or inst:IsA("BodyPosition") or inst:IsA("BodyVelocity") or inst:IsA("BodyAngularVelocity") or inst:IsA("BodyThrust") or inst:IsA("LinearVelocity") or inst:IsA("AlignPosition") or inst:IsA("AlignOrientation") then
                    pcall(function() 
                        if game:GetService("CollectionService").AddTag then
                            game:GetService("CollectionService"):AddTag(inst, "BM") 
                        end
                    end)
                end
            end
        end)
    end

    local function SafeInstanceNewHook()
        pcall(function()
            local originalInstanceNew = Instance.new
            local BodyMovers = {
                BodyGyro = true, 
                BodyForce = true, 
                BodyPosition = true, 
                BodyVelocity = true, 
                BodyAngularVelocity = true, 
                BodyThrust = true, 
                LinearVelocity = true, 
                AlignPosition = true, 
                AlignOrientation = true
            }
            
            local function SafeNew(className, parent)
                local instance = originalInstanceNew(className)
                if BodyMovers[className] then
                    pcall(function() 
                        local cs = game:GetService("CollectionService")
                        if cs and cs.AddTag then
                            cs:AddTag(instance, "BM")
                        end
                    end)
                end
                if parent then 
                    instance.Parent = parent 
                end
                return instance
            end
            
            if hookfunction then
                pcall(function()
                    hookfunction(Instance, "new", SafeNew)
                end)
            end
        end)
    end

    local function HookNamecall()
        pcall(function()
            local oldNamecall
            oldNamecall = hookmetamethod(game, "__namecall", newcclosure(function(self, ...)
                local method = getnamecallmethod()
                if method == "Kick" then
                    return nil
                end
                if method == "BreakJoints" then
                    return nil
                end
                if method == "FireServer" or method == "InvokeServer" then
                    local args = {...}
                    if args[1] == "Z_Z" then
                        return nil
                    end
                end
                return oldNamecall(self, ...)
            end))
        end)
    end

    local function DisableRemote0924()
        local Players = game:GetService("Players")
        local LocalPlayer = Players.LocalPlayer
        pcall(function()
            local Remote0924 = LocalPlayer.PlayerScripts:FindFirstChild("RemoteEvent", true) or 
                               game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage"):FindFirstChild("0924023902330", true)
            if Remote0924 then
                for _, conn in ipairs(getconnections(Remote0924.OnClientEvent)) do
                    pcall(function() 
                        if conn and conn.Disable then
                            conn:Disable() 
                        end
                    end)
                end
            end
        end)
    end

    local function SetupCharacterAdded()
        local Players = game:GetService("Players")
        local LocalPlayer = Players.LocalPlayer
        
        pcall(function()
            LocalPlayer.CharacterAdded:Connect(function(char)
                task.wait(0.5)
                local hum = char:WaitForChild("Humanoid", 10)
                if hum then
                    task.wait(0.5)
                    DisableHumanoidConnections(hum)
                    DisableCharacterConnections(char)
                    TagBodyMovers(char)
                end
            end)
            
            if LocalPlayer.Character then
                DisableHumanoidConnections(LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid"))
                DisableCharacterConnections(LocalPlayer.Character)
                TagBodyMovers(LocalPlayer.Character)
            end
        end)
    end

    task.wait(2.5)
    
    HookCrashFunctions()
    FindAndPatchTables()
    HookTamperingFunctions()
    SetupWalkSpeedHook()
    SafeInstanceNewHook()
    HookNamecall()
    DisableRemote0924()
    SetupCharacterAdded()
end

coroutine.wrap(LoadScript)()
end
end)
generalV3:Button("防服务器封禁", function()
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")

for _, v in pairs(getgc(true)) do
    if type(v) == "table" and rawget(v, "exploitDetected") then
        if typeof(rawget(v, "exploitDetected")) == "Instance" then
            targetRemote = v["exploitDetected"]
            break
        end
    end
end

local oldNamecall
oldNamecall = hookmetamethod(game, "__namecall", function(self, ...)
    local method = getnamecallmethod()
    if self == targetRemote and method == "FireServer" then
        return nil
    end
    return oldNamecall(self, ...)
end)

local oldFireServer
oldFireServer = hookfunction(Instance.new("RemoteEvent").FireServer, function(self, ...)
    if self == targetRemote then
        return nil
    end
    return oldFireServer(self, ...)
end)
end)
generalV3:Button("绕过移动检测", function()
local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local LocalPlayer = Players.LocalPlayer
local Character = LocalPlayer.Character or LocalPlayer.CharacterAdded:Wait()
local HumanoidRootPart = Character:WaitForChild("HumanoidRootPart")
local Humanoid = Character:WaitForChild("Humanoid")
local intendedPosition = HumanoidRootPart.Position
local lastServerPosition = HumanoidRootPart.Position
local lastUpdateTime = tick()
local debounceTime = 0.3
local isTeleporting = false

for k, v in pairs(getgc(true)) do
    if pcall(function() return rawget(v, "indexInstance") end) and type(rawget(v, "indexInstance")) == "table" then
        local index = rawget(v, "indexInstance")[1]
        if index == "restrictTeleport" or index == "checkCFrame" or index == "validateMove" or index == "restrictMove" then
            setreadonly(v, false)
            v.tvk = {index, function(player, targetCFrame, ...)
                if player == LocalPlayer and isTeleporting then
                    intendedPosition = targetCFrame.Position
                    lastServerPosition = intendedPosition
                    lastUpdateTime = tick()
                    return true
                end
                return CFrame.new(intendedPosition)
            end}
        end
    end
end

while true do
    wait(0.1)
    if HumanoidRootPart and tick() - lastUpdateTime > debounceTime then
        local currentPos = HumanoidRootPart.Position
        local distanceFromLastServer = (currentPos - lastServerPosition).Magnitude
        if distanceFromLastServer > 10 and not isTeleporting then
            pcall(function()
                HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(intendedPosition)
                lastUpdateTime = tick()
            end)
        end
        lastServerPosition = currentPos
    end
end

local function onTouch(part)
    local targetPos = part:GetAttribute("TargetPosition") or part.Position + Vector3.new(0, 5, 0)
    if targetPos then
        isTeleporting = true
        intendedPosition = targetPos
        lastServerPosition = targetPos
        lastUpdateTime = tick()
        pcall(function()
            HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(targetPos)
        end)
        isTeleporting = false
    end
end

for _, part in pairs(game.Workspace:GetDescendants()) do
    if part:IsA("BasePart") and (part:GetAttribute("TargetPosition") or part.Name:lower():find("teleport")) then
        part.Touched:Connect(onTouch)
    end
end

game.Workspace.DescendantAdded:Connect(function(descendant)
    if descendant:IsA("BasePart") and (descendant:GetAttribute("TargetPosition") or part.Name:lower():find("teleport")) then
        descendant.Touched:Connect(onTouch)
    end
end)

if Humanoid.WalkSpeed < 16 then
    pcall(function()
        Humanoid.WalkSpeed = 16
    end)
end

print("AT Bypass enablee")
game:FindService("LogService").MessageOut:Connect(function(message, messageType)
    if messageType == Enum.MessageType.MessageOutput then
        print(message)
    end
end)
end)
generalV3:Toggle("相位穿墙", "PhaseNoclip", false, function(State)
    if State then
        local character = game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character
        if character then
            if not getfenv().originalCollisionStates then
                getfenv().originalCollisionStates = {}
            end
            
            for _, part in ipairs(character:GetDescendants()) do
                if part:IsA("BasePart") then
                    getfenv().originalCollisionStates[part] = part.CanCollide
                    part.CanCollide = false
                    part.Material = Enum.Material.ForceField
                end
            end
            
            if not getfenv().characterChildAddedConnection then
                getfenv().characterChildAddedConnection = character.DescendantAdded:Connect(function(descendant)
                    if descendant:IsA("BasePart") and getfenv().originalCollisionStates then
                        getfenv().originalCollisionStates[descendant] = descendant.CanCollide
                        descendant.CanCollide = false
                        descendant.Material = Enum.Material.ForceField
                    end
                end)
            end
        end
    else
        local character = game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character
        if character and getfenv().originalCollisionStates then
            for _, part in ipairs(character:GetDescendants()) do
                if part:IsA("BasePart") and getfenv().originalCollisionStates[part] ~= nil then
                    part.CanCollide = getfenv().originalCollisionStates[part]
                    part.Material = Enum.Material.Plastic
                end
            end
            
            if getfenv().characterChildAddedConnection then
                getfenv().characterChildAddedConnection:Disconnect()
                getfenv().characterChildAddedConnection = nil
            end
        end
    end
end)
getgenv().BS_GodMode = {active = false, data = {tables = {}, hooks = {}, metas = {}, modules = {}}, scanStat = {deep = 0, total = 0}, patterns = {attr = {"stam","energy","health","hp","mana","hunger","thirst","fatigue","endu","cool","delay","timer","charge","power","strength","magic","speed","jump","armor","defense","attack","damage","ammo","clip","magazine","durability","xp","exp","experience","level","rank","radiation","toxic","oxygen","breath","sanity","stress","temperature","heat","cold","wetness","wet","radiation","rad","bleed","bleeding","pain","infection","disease","poison","toxicity","hunger","thirst","fatigue","sleep","rest","morale","mood","social","reputation","fame","honor","karma","alignment","skill","ability","talent","perk","trait","stats","stat","attribute","core","vitality","spirit","willpower","focus","concentration","mana","magic","arcane","faith","divine","fury","rage","combo","spree","multiplier","bonus","multi","mod","modifier","buff","debuff"}, func = {"take.*damage","apply.*damage","deal.*damage","inflict","damage","consume","deplete","reduce","cost","use","spend","drain","decrease","subtract","lower","remove","burn","waste","expend","pay","cooldown","wait","delay","timer","timeout","interval","tick","countdown","regenerate","replenish","restore","refresh","heal","recover","repair","recharge","refill","reload","execute","cast","activate","trigger","perform","ability","skill","consume.*resource","use.*mana","cost.*energy"}}}
local function protectMeta(t)
    local meta = getrawmetatable(t) or {}
    if not getgenv().BS_GodMode.data.metas[t] then
        getgenv().BS_GodMode.data.metas[t] = meta
        setreadonly(meta, false)
        meta.__newindex = meta.__newindex or function(tbl,k,v)
            if type(k) == "string" then
                for _,pat in ipairs(getgenv().BS_GodMode.patterns.attr) do
                    if k:lower():find(pat) and type(v) == "number" then
                        return rawset(tbl,k,math.huge)
                    end
                end
            end
            return rawset(tbl,k,v)
        end
        debug.setmetatable(t, meta)
    end
end
local function deepScan(obj, path, depth, visited)
    if depth > 6 or visited[tostring(obj)] then return end; visited[tostring(obj)] = true
    getgenv().BS_GodMode.scanStat.deep = math.max(getgenv().BS_GodMode.scanStat.deep, depth)
    if type(obj) == "table" then
        protectMeta(obj)
        for k,v in pairs(obj) do
            if type(k) == "string" and type(v) == "number" then
                for _,pat in ipairs(getgenv().BS_GodMode.patterns.attr) do
                    if k:lower():find(pat) then
                        getgenv().BS_GodMode.data.total = getgenv().BS_GodMode.data.total + 1
                        table.insert(getgenv().BS_GodMode.data.tables, {tbl = obj, key = k, val = v, path = path.."."..k})
                        obj[k] = math.huge
                        break
                    end
                end
            elseif type(v) == "table" then
                deepScan(v, path.."."..tostring(k), depth+1, visited)
            elseif type(v) == "function" then
                local i = debug.getinfo(v)
                if i and i.name then
                    for _,pat in ipairs(getgenv().BS_GodMode.patterns.func) do
                        if i.name:lower():match(pat) then
                            getgenv().BS_GodMode.data.hooks[v] = hookfunction(v, function(...) return math.huge end)
                            break
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    end
end
local function scanGame()
    local visited = {}
    pcall(function() for _,v in pairs(getgc(true)) do deepScan(v, "gc", 0, visited) end end)
    pcall(function() for _,v in pairs(getreg()) do deepScan(v, "reg", 0, visited) end end)
    pcall(function() for _,v in pairs(game:GetDescendants()) do if v.ClassName:find("Script") then deepScan(getfenv(v), "env."..v:GetFullName(), 0, visited) end end end)
    pcall(function() for _,p in pairs(game.Players:GetPlayers()) do deepScan(getfenv(p), "player."..p.Name, 0, visited) end end)
    pcall(function() for _,m in pairs(getloadedmodules()) do deepScan(require(m), "module."..tostring(m), 0, visited) end end)
end
generalV3:Toggle("无限属性(部分服务器可用)", "Instant_Interaction", false, function(state)
    if state and not getgenv().BS_GodMode.active then
        getgenv().BS_GodMode.active = true; getgenv().BS_GodMode.scanStat = {deep = 0, total = 0}
        scanGame()
        getgenv().BS_GodMode.loop = game:GetService("RunService").RenderStepped:Connect(function()
            for _,d in ipairs(getgenv().BS_GodMode.data.tables) do
                if d.tbl and type(d.tbl[d.key]) == "number" and d.tbl[d.key] < 999999 then
                    d.tbl[d.key] = math.huge
                end
            end
        end)
    elseif not state and getgenv().BS_GodMode.active then
        getgenv().BS_GodMode.active = false
        if getgenv().BS_GodMode.loop then getgenv().BS_GodMode.loop:Disconnect() end
        for _,d in ipairs(getgenv().BS_GodMode.data.tables) do if d.tbl and d.key then d.tbl[d.key] = d.val end end
        for f,orig in pairs(getgenv().BS_GodMode.data.hooks) do pcall(function() hookfunction(f, orig) end) end
        for t,meta in pairs(getgenv().BS_GodMode.data.metas) do pcall(function() if meta.__original then debug.setmetatable(t, meta.__original) end end) end
        getgenv().BS_GodMode = {active = false, data = {tables = {}, hooks = {}, metas = {}, modules = {}}, scanStat = {deep = 0, total = 0}, patterns = getgenv().BS_GodMode.patterns}
    end
end)
generalV3:Button("播放声音(别人可以听见)", function()
local ScreenGui = Instance.new("ScreenGui")
local Draggable = Instance.new("Frame")

	ScreenGui:Destroy()

local Mute = false
IY.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
	Mute = false
end)

_1E.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
	Mute = true
	while Mute == true do 
		wait()
		for _, sound in next, workspace:GetDescendants() do
			if sound:IsA("Sound") then
				sound:Stop()
			end
		end
	end
end)

_3E.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
	for _, sound in next, workspace:GetDescendants() do
		if sound:IsA("Sound") then
			sound:Play()
		end
	end
end)

local Active = true
SE.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
	Active = true
	while Active == true do
		local StringValue = Wait.Text
		wait(StringValue)
		for _, sound in next, workspace:GetDescendants() do
			if sound:IsA("Sound") then
				sound:Play()
			end
		end
	end
end)

Stop.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
	Active = false
end)

notification:Play()

--Check:
while true do
	wait(0.5)
	local setting = game:GetService("SoundService").RespectFilteringEnabled
	if setting == true then
		Time.TextColor = BrickColor.new(255,0,0)
		Time.Text ="别人能否听到：否"
	elseif setting == false then
		Time.Text ="别人能否听到：能"
		Time.TextColor = BrickColor.new(0,255,0)
	end
end
end)

local function gp(p,n,cl)

    if typeof(p)=="Instance" then

        local c=p:GetChildren()

        for i=1,#c do

            local v=c[i]

            if (v.Name==n) and v:IsA(cl) then

                return v

            end

        end

    end

    return nil

end

local i=Instance.new 

local v2=Vector2.new 

local bc=BrickColor.new 

local c3=Color3.new 

local u2=UDim2.new 

local sc,mr=string.char,math.random 

local function rs(l) 

    l=l or mr(8,15) 

    local s="" 

    for i=1,l do 

        if mr(1,2)==1 then 

            s=s..sc(mr(65,90)) 

        else 

            s=s..sc(mr(97,122)) 

        end 

    end 

    return s 

end

local function Draggable(window,obj)

    local MB1enum = e.UserInputType.MouseButton1

    local TOUCHenum = e.UserInputType.Touch

    obj = obj or window

    local activeEntered = 0

    local mouseStart = nil

    local dragStart = nil

    local inputbegancon = nil

    local rendersteppedcon = nil

    local inputendedcon = nil

    local function inputendedf(a)

        a=a.UserInputType

        if (a==MB1enum) or (a==TOUCHenum) then

            rendersteppedcon:Disconnect()

            inputendedcon:Disconnect()

        end

    end

    local function rendersteppedf()

        local off = uis:GetMouseLocation()-mouseStart

        window.Position=dragStart+u2(0,off.X,0,off.Y)

    end

    local function inputbeganf(a)

        a=a.UserInputType

        if ((a==MB1enum) or (a==TOUCHenum)) and (activeEntered==0) and not uis:GetFocusedTextBox() then

            mouseStart=uis:GetMouseLocation()

            dragStart=window.Position

            if rendersteppedcon then rendersteppedcon:Disconnect() end

            rendersteppedcon = renderstepped:Connect(rendersteppedf)

            if inputendedcon then inputendedcon:Disconnect() end

            inputendedcon = uis.InputEnded:Connect(inputendedf)

        end

    end

    obj.MouseEnter:Connect(function()

        if inputbegancon then inputbegancon:Disconnect() end

        inputbegancon = uis.InputBegan:Connect(inputbeganf)

    end)

    obj.MouseLeave:Connect(function()

        inputbegancon:Disconnect()

    end)

    local function ondes(d)

        if d:IsA("GuiObject") then

            local thisEntered = false

            local thisAdded = false

            local con0 = d.MouseEnter:Connect(function()

                thisEntered = true

                if (not thisAdded) and d.Active then

                    activeEntered = activeEntered + 1

                    thisAdded = true

                end

            end)

            local con1 = d.MouseLeave:Connect(function()

                thisEntered = false

                if thisAdded then

                    activeEntered = activeEntered - 1

                    thisAdded = false

                end

            end)

            local con2 = d:GetPropertyChangedSignal("Active"):Connect(function()

                if thisEntered then

                    if thisAdded and not d.Active then

                        activeEntered = activeEntered - 1

                        thisAdded = false

                    elseif d.Active and not thisAdded then

                        activeEntered = activeEntered + 1

                        thisAdded = true

                    end

                end

            end)

            local con3 = nil

            con3 = d.AncestryChanged:Connect(function()

                if not d:IsDescendantOf(window) then

                    if thisEntered then

                        activeEntered = activeEntered - 1

                    end

                    con0:Disconnect()

                    con1:Disconnect()

                    con2:Disconnect()

                    con3:Disconnect()

                end

            end)

        end

    end

    window.DescendantAdded:Connect(ondes)

    local des=window:GetDescendants()

    for i=1,#des do 

        ondes(des[i])

    end

end

Draggable(i1)

local others={}

for i,v in pairs(plrs:GetPlayers()) do

    if v~=lp then

        others[v]=true

    end

end

plrs.PlayerAdded:Connect(function(plr)

    others[plr]=true

end)

local function findplr(txt)
    if txt == "" then
        return nil
    end
    local lowerTxt = slower(txt)
    for v,_ in pairs(others) do
        if v.DisplayName == txt or v.Name == txt then
            return v
        end
    end
    for v,_ in pairs(others) do
        local lowerDN = slower(v.DisplayName)
        local lowerName = slower(v.Name)
        if string.find(lowerDN, lowerTxt) or string.find(lowerName, lowerTxt) then
            return v
        end
    end
    return nil
end

local target=nil

i4:GetPropertyChangedSignal("Text"):Connect(function()

    local txt=i4.Text

    target=findplr(txt)

    if target then

        if (target.DisplayName) and (target.DisplayName~="") and (target.DisplayName~=target.Name) then

            i7.Text=target.DisplayName.." @"..target.Name

        else

            i7.Text="@"..target.Name

        end

        i5.TextColor3=c3(0.301961,1,0) 

    else

        i7.Text=""

        i5.TextColor3=c3(0.55,0.55,0.55) 

    end

end)

plrs.PlayerRemoving:Connect(function(plr)

    others[plr]=nil

    if plr==target then

        target=nil

        i7.Text=""

        i5.TextColor3=c3(0.55,0.55,0.55) 

    end

end)

local notifyid=0

local function notify(txt)

    notifyid=notifyid+1

    local thisid=notifyid

    i6.Text=txt

    twait(2)

    if notifyid==thisid then

        i6.Text=""

    end

end

local bringing=false

i5.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()

    if bringing then

        bringing=false

        i5.Text="带来"

        return

    end

    if not target then

        return

    end

    local c=lp.Character

    local c1=target.Character

    if not (c and c1) then

        return notify("未找到角色")

    end

    if not (c:IsDescendantOf(ws) and c1:IsDescendantOf(ws)) then

        return notify("角色未显示(不在工作区)")

    end

    local hrp=gp(c,"HumanoidRootPart","BasePart")

    local hrp1=gp(c1,"HumanoidRootPart","BasePart")

    if not (hrp and hrp1) then

        return notify("缺少关键人型根部件")

    end

    bringing=true

    i5.Text="请等待" 

    local from=hrp1.CFrame

    local fromP=from.Position

    local to=hrp.CFrame

    local toP=to.Position

    local mag=(fromP-toP).Magnitude-3

    local lv=cf(fromP,toP).LookVector

    local vel=0

    local pos=from.Position-v3_010*2--→2/3.5

    toP=toP-v3_010*2--→2/3.5

    local sine=osclock()

    local lastsine=sine

    local way=0

    local reachedmaxspeed=false

    while bringing and c:IsDescendantOf(ws) and c1:IsDescendantOf(ws) do

        sine=osclock()

        local deltaTime=sine-lastsine

        lastsine=sine

        if reachedmaxspeed then

            if mag-way<reachedmaxspeed then

                vel=vel-deltaTime*speeding

                if vel<0 then

                    break

                end

            end

        else

            if way>mag/2 then

                vel=vel-deltaTime*speeding

                if vel<0 then

                    break

                end

            else

                vel=vel+deltaTime*speeding

                if vel>maxspeed then

                    reachedmaxspeed=way

                    vel=maxspeed

                end

            end

        end

        way=way+vel*deltaTime

        if not hrp:IsGrounded() then

            hrp.CFrame=cf(pos+lv*way,toP)*off

            hrp.Velocity=lv*(vel+1)

            hrp.RotVelocity=v3_0

        end

        twait()

    end

    hrp.CFrame=to

    hrp.Velocity=v3_0

    hrp.RotVelocity=v3_0

    bringing=false

    i5.Text="带来"

end)

local iscg,_=pcall(function()

    i8.Parent=game:FindFirstChildOfClass("CoreGui")

end)

if not iscg then

    i8.Parent=lp:FindFirstChildOfClass("PlayerGui")

end
end)
local invisThread = nil
local Part = nil
local FakeCharacter = nil
local RealCharacter = nil
local StoredCF = nil

generalV3:Toggle("隐身", "开关", false, function(State)
    if invisThread then
        task.cancel(invisThread)
        invisThread = nil
    end
    
    if State then
        invisThread = task.spawn(function()
            local Player = game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer
            RealCharacter = Player.Character or Player.CharacterAdded:Wait()
            RealCharacter.Archivable = true
            FakeCharacter = RealCharacter:Clone()
            Part = Instance.new("Part")
            Part.Anchored = true
            Part.Size = Vector3.new(200, 1, 200)
            Part.CFrame = CFrame.new(0, -500, 0)
            Part.CanCollide = true
            Part.Parent = workspace
            FakeCharacter.Parent = workspace
            FakeCharacter.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = Part.CFrame * CFrame.new(0, 5, 0)
            
            for _, v in pairs(RealCharacter:GetChildren()) do
                if v:IsA("LocalScript") then
                    local clone = v:Clone()
                    clone.Disabled = true
                    clone.Parent = FakeCharacter
                end
            end
            
            for _, v in pairs(FakeCharacter:GetDescendants()) do
                if v:IsA("BasePart") then
                    v.Transparency = 0.7
                end
            end
            
            local function EnableInvisibility()
                StoredCF = RealCharacter.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame
                RealCharacter.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = FakeCharacter.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame
                FakeCharacter.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = StoredCF
                RealCharacter.Humanoid:UnequipTools()
                Player.Character = FakeCharacter
                workspace.CurrentCamera.CameraSubject = FakeCharacter.Humanoid
                RealCharacter.HumanoidRootPart.Anchored = true
                
                for _, v in pairs(FakeCharacter:GetChildren()) do
                    if v:IsA("LocalScript") then
                        v.Disabled = false
                    end
                end
            end
            
            RealCharacter.Humanoid.Died:Connect(function()
                if Part then Part:Destroy() end
                if FakeCharacter then FakeCharacter:Destroy() end
                Player.Character = RealCharacter
            end)
            
            EnableInvisibility()
            
            game:GetService("RunService").RenderStepped:Connect(function()
                if RealCharacter and RealCharacter:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") and Part then
                    RealCharacter.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = Part.CFrame * CFrame.new(0, 5, 0)
                end
            end)
        end)
    else
        if Part then Part:Destroy() Part = nil end
        if FakeCharacter then FakeCharacter:Destroy() FakeCharacter = nil end
        if RealCharacter then
            RealCharacter.HumanoidRootPart.Anchored = false
            RealCharacter.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = StoredCF
            game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer.Character = RealCharacter
            workspace.CurrentCamera.CameraSubject = RealCharacter.Humanoid
        end
    end
end)

local WaterWalkEnabled = false
local waterWalkConnection = nil

generalV3:Toggle("水上行走", "开关", false, function(State)
    WaterWalkEnabled = State
    
    if waterWalkConnection then
        waterWalkConnection:Disconnect()
        waterWalkConnection = nil
    end
    
    if State then
        waterWalkConnection = game:GetService("RunService").Heartbeat:Connect(function()
            local character = game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character
            if character and character:FindFirstChild("Humanoid") then
                character.Humanoid:SetStateEnabled(Enum.HumanoidStateType.Swimming, false)
            end
        end)
    else
        local character = game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character
        if character and character:FindFirstChild("Humanoid") then
            character.Humanoid:SetStateEnabled(Enum.HumanoidStateType.Swimming, true)
        end
    end
end)

local AntiPushEnabled = false
local antiPushConnection = nil

generalV3:Toggle("反推保护", "开关", false, function(State)
    AntiPushEnabled = State
    
    if antiPushConnection then
        antiPushConnection:Disconnect()
        antiPushConnection = nil
    end
    
    if State then
        antiPushConnection = game:GetService("RunService").Heartbeat:Connect(function()
            local character = game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character
            if character and character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                character.HumanoidRootPart.AssemblyLinearVelocity = Vector3.new(0, 0, 0)
                character.HumanoidRootPart.AssemblyAngularVelocity = Vector3.new(0, 0, 0)
            end
        end)
    end
end)

local InfiniteDeathEnabled = false
local deathThread = nil

generalV3:Toggle("无限死亡", "开关", false, function(State)
    InfiniteDeathEnabled = State
    
    if deathThread then
        task.cancel(deathThread)
        deathThread = nil
    end
    
    if InfiniteDeathEnabled then
        deathThread = task.spawn(function()
            local Players = game:GetService("Players")
            local lp = Players.LocalPlayer
            
            while InfiniteDeathEnabled do
                local character = lp.Character
                if character and character:FindFirstChild("Humanoid") then
                    character.Humanoid.Health = 0
                end
                task.wait(0.1)
            end
        end)
    end
end)

local InstantRespawnEnabled = false
local respawnThread = nil

generalV3:Toggle("秒复活", "开关", false, function(State)
    InstantRespawnEnabled = State
    
    if respawnThread then
        task.cancel(respawnThread)
        respawnThread = nil
    end
    
    if InstantRespawnEnabled then
        respawnThread = task.spawn(function()
            local Players = game:GetService("Players")
            local lp = Players.LocalPlayer
            
            while InstantRespawnEnabled do
                local character = lp.Character
                if character and character:FindFirstChild("Humanoid") then
                    local humanoid = character.Humanoid
                    
                    if humanoid.Health <= 0 then
                        lp:LoadCharacter()
                        task.wait(0.5)
                    end
                end
                task.wait(0.1)
            end
        end)
    end
end)

StatusLabel.Size = UDim2.fromScale(0.9, 0.12)
StatusLabel.Position = UDim2.fromScale(0.05, 0.8)
StatusLabel.BackgroundTransparency = 1
StatusLabel.Text = "就绪"
StatusLabel.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(180, 180, 180)
StatusLabel.TextSize = 13
StatusLabel.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left
StatusLabel.Parent = ContentFrame

GenerateButton.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
    local description = DescriptionBox.Text
    if description == "" then
        return
    end

    StatusLabel.Text = "生成中"
    StatusLabel.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(150, 255, 150)
    GenerateButton.Text = "生成中"
    GenerateButton.Active = false

    local prompt = "生成一个Roblox脚本：" .. description

    local success, response = pcall(function()
        return HttpService:RequestAsync({
            Url = "https://api.deepseek.com/v1/chat/completions",
            Method = "POST",
            Headers = {
                ["Authorization"] = "Bearer sk-378c6084f93f48fb8ed347da1fc4951f",
                ["Content-Type"] = "application/json"
            },
            Body = HttpService:JSONEncode({
                model = "deepseek-chat",
                messages = {
                    {
                        role = "system",
                        content = "你是一个Roblox客户端作弊脚本生成器。请生成可以直接在Roblox localscript执行的Luau脚本。只返回纯代码，不要添加任何解释或标记。"
                    },
                    {
                        role = "user",
                        content = prompt
                    }
                },
                max_tokens = 1500,
                temperature = 0.7
            })
        })
    end)

    if not success then
        StatusLabel.Text = "请求失败"
        StatusLabel.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 100, 100)
        GenerateButton.Text = "生成"
        GenerateButton.Active = true
        return
    end

    if not response.Success then
        StatusLabel.Text = "响应失败"
        StatusLabel.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 100, 100)
        GenerateButton.Text = "生成"
        GenerateButton.Active = true
        return
    end

    local data = HttpService:JSONDecode(response.Body)

    if not data.choices then
        return
    end

    if not data.choices[1] then
        return
    end

    generatedScript = data.choices[1].message.content
        :gsub("^```lua\n", "")
        :gsub("\n```$", "")
        :gsub("^```\n", "")
        :gsub("\n```$", "")

    if not generatedScript then
        return
    end

    StatusLabel.Text = "成功"
    StatusLabel.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(150, 255, 150)
    GenerateButton.Text = "生成"
    GenerateButton.Active = true
end)

ExecuteButton.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
    if generatedScript == "" then
        return
    end

    if pcall(loadstring(generatedScript)) then
        StatusLabel.Text = "成功"
    end
    StatusLabel.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(150, 255, 150)
end)

        dragging = false
    end
end)

local HttpService = game:GetService("HttpService")

local TweenService = game:GetService("TweenService")

local screenSize = workspace.CurrentCamera.ViewportSize

local config = {

        outer = Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0),

local connections = {}
local function hook(signal, fn)
    local conn = signal:Connect(fn)
    table.insert(connections, conn)
    return conn
end

local function create(className, props)
    local inst = Instance.new(className)
    for key, value in pairs(props or {}) do
        if key ~= "Parent" then
            inst[key] = value
        end
    end
    if props.Parent then
        inst.Parent = props.Parent
    end
    return inst
end

local function makeBorder(parent, size, position)
    local outer = create("Frame", {
        Size = size,
        Position = position,
        BackgroundColor3 = config.colors.outer,
        BorderSizePixel = 0,
        Parent = parent
    })
    local mid = create("Frame", {
        Size = UDim2.new(1, -2, 1, -2),
        Position = UDim2.new(0, 1, 0, 1),
        BackgroundColor3 = config.colors.mid,
        BorderSizePixel = 0,
        Parent = outer
    })
    local inner = create("Frame", {
        Size = UDim2.new(1, -2, 1, -2),
        Position = UDim2.new(0, 1, 0, 1),
        BackgroundColor3 = config.colors.bg,
        BorderSizePixel = 0,
        Parent = mid
    })
    return outer, inner
end

local function makeButton(parent, text, size, position, isPrimary)
    local btn = create("TextButton", {
        Text = text,
        Size = size,
        Position = position,
        BackgroundColor3 = isPrimary and config.colors.accent or config.colors.button,
        BorderColor3 = config.colors.mid,
        BorderSizePixel = 1,
        TextColor3 = isPrimary and Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0) or config.colors.text,
        Font = Enum.Font.Code,
        TextSize = isMobile and 10 or 12,
        Parent = parent
    })
    
    btn.MouseEnter:Connect(function()
        btn.BackgroundColor3 = isPrimary and config.colors.accentDark or config.colors.buttonHover
    end)
    btn.MouseLeave:Connect(function()
        btn.BackgroundColor3 = isPrimary and config.colors.accent or config.colors.button
    end)
    
    return btn
end

local function makeToggleButton(parent, text, size, position, initialState)
    local state = initialState or false
    local btn = create("TextButton", {
        Text = text,
        Size = size,
        Position = position,
        BackgroundColor3 = state and config.colors.accent or config.colors.button,
        BorderColor3 = config.colors.mid,
        BorderSizePixel = 1,
        TextColor3 = state and Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0) or config.colors.text,
        Font = Enum.Font.Code,
        TextSize = isMobile and 9 or 11,
        Parent = parent
    })
    
    local function updateVisual()
        btn.BackgroundColor3 = state and config.colors.accent or config.colors.button
        btn.TextColor3 = state and Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0) or config.colors.text
    end
    
    btn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
        state = not state
        updateVisual()
    end)
    
    return btn, function() return state end, function(s) state = s updateVisual() end
end

local function MakeDraggable(handle, object)
    local dragging, dragInput, dragStart, startPos
    handle.InputBegan:Connect(function(input)
        if input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1 or input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Touch then
            dragging = true
            dragStart = input.Position
            startPos = object.Position
            input.Changed:Connect(function()
                if input.UserInputState == Enum.UserInputState.End then
                    dragging = false
                end
            end)
        end
    end)
    handle.InputChanged:Connect(function(input)
        if input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseMovement or input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Touch then
            dragInput = input
        end
    end)
    UserInputService.InputChanged:Connect(function(input)
        if dragging and input == dragInput then
            local delta = input.Position - dragStart
            object.Position = UDim2.new(startPos.X.Scale, startPos.X.Offset + delta.X, startPos.Y.Scale, startPos.Y.Offset + delta.Y)
        end
    end)
end

local function MakeResizable(handle, target, minSize)
    minSize = minSize or Vector2.new(300, 200)
    local resizing, dragInput, dragStart, startSize
    handle.InputBegan:Connect(function(input)
        if input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1 or input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Touch then
            resizing = true
            dragStart = input.Position
            startSize = target.AbsoluteSize
            input.Changed:Connect(function()
                if input.UserInputState == Enum.UserInputState.End then
                    resizing = false
                end
            end)
        end
    end)
    handle.InputChanged:Connect(function(input)
        if input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseMovement or input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Touch then
            dragInput = input
        end
    end)
    UserInputService.InputChanged:Connect(function(input)
        if resizing and input == dragInput then
            local delta = input.Position - dragStart
            local newX = math.max(minSize.X, startSize.X + delta.X)
            local newY = math.max(minSize.Y, startSize.Y + delta.Y)
            target.Size = UDim2.new(0, newX, 0, newY)
        end
    end)
end

local function formatNumber(num)
    local str = tostring(num or 0)
    return str:reverse():gsub("%d%d%d", "%1,"):reverse():gsub("^,", "")
end

local function formatDate(iso)
    if not iso or type(iso) ~= "string" then
        return "未知"
    end
    local y, m, d = iso:match("^(%d+)%-(%d+)%-(%d+)")
    if not y then
        return "未知"
    end
    return string.format("%s年%s月%s日", y, m, d)
end

local isMinimized = false
local savedSize = mainFrame.Size

hook(minBtn.MouseButton1Click, function()
    isMinimized = not isMinimized
    if isMinimized then
        savedSize = mainFrame.Size
        contentFrame.Visible = false
        resizeGrip.Visible = false
        mainFrame:TweenSize(UDim2.new(0, savedSize.X.Offset, 0, 32), "Out", "Quad", 0.3, true)
        minBtn.Text = "+"
    else
        contentFrame.Visible = true
        resizeGrip.Visible = true
        mainFrame:TweenSize(savedSize, "Out", "Quad", 0.3, true)
        minBtn.Text = "-"
    end
end)

hook(closeBtn.MouseButton1Click, function()
    _G.__ScriptSearcherLoaded = nil
    for _, conn in ipairs(connections) do
        pcall(function() conn:Disconnect() end)
    end
    gui:Destroy()
end)

local function showLoader(state)
    loaderFrame.Visible = state
end

local function clearList()
    for _, child in ipairs(scriptList:GetChildren()) do
        if child:IsA("Frame") then
            child:Destroy()
        end
    end
end

local function updateCanvas()
    task.wait()
    local layout = scriptList:FindFirstChildOfClass("UIListLayout")
    if layout then
        scriptList.CanvasSize = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, layout.AbsoluteContentSize.Y + 10)
    end
end

local selectedCard = nil
local currentSlug = nil
local currentScript = nil

local function rawUrl(data)
    if data and data.slug then
        return "https://scriptblox.com/api/script/raw/" .. HttpService:UrlEncode(data.slug)
    end
    return ""
end

local function updateDetail(data)
    currentSlug = data and data.slug or nil
    currentScript = data and data.script or nil
    detailTitle.Text = data and data.title or "请选择一个脚本"
    
    if data then
        local infoText = string.format(
            "游戏: %s\n浏览: %s | %s\n发布: %s | 密钥: %s",
            (data.game and data.game.name) or "未知",
            formatNumber(data.views),
            data.verified and "已验证" or "社区",
            formatDate(data.createdAt),
            data.key and "需要" or "不需要"
        )
        detailInfo.Text = infoText
    else
        detailInfo.Text = ""
    end
    
    codeLabel.Text = data and (data.script or "加载中...") or "选择脚本后在此预览代码"
end

local function loadRawScript(data)
    if data.script or not data.slug then
        updateDetail(data)
        return
    end
    codeLabel.Text = "正在加载脚本..."
    
    task.spawn(function()
        local ok, resp = pcall(function()
            return game:HttpGet(rawUrl(data))
        end)
        if ok then
            local success, decoded = pcall(function()
                return HttpService:JSONDecode(resp)
            end)
            if success and decoded and decoded.script then
                if type(decoded.script) == "table" and decoded.script.script then
                    data.script = decoded.script.script
                elseif type(decoded.script) == "string" then
                    data.script = decoded.script
                end
            end
        end
        currentScript = data.script
        updateDetail(data)
    end)
end

local function makeScriptCard(scriptData)
    local cardFrame, cardContent = makeBorder(scriptList, UDim2.new(1, -10, 0, isMobile and 65 or 75), UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, 0))
    cardFrame.LayoutOrder = 1
    
    local titleLbl = create("TextLabel", {
        Text = scriptData.title or "无标题",
        TextColor3 = config.colors.text,
        Font = Enum.Font.Code,
        TextSize = isMobile and 11 or 13,
        Size = UDim2.new(1, isMobile and -100 or -150, 0, 18),
        Position = UDim2.new(0, 8, 0, 5),
        BackgroundTransparency = 1,
        TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left,
        TextTruncate = Enum.TextTruncate.AtEnd,
        Parent = cardContent
    })
    
    local gameLbl = create("TextLabel", {
        Text = "游戏: " .. ((scriptData.game and scriptData.game.name) or "未知"),
        TextColor3 = config.colors.dim,
        Font = Enum.Font.Code,
        TextSize = isMobile and 9 or 11,
        Size = UDim2.new(1, isMobile and -100 or -150, 0, 14),
        Position = UDim2.new(0, 8, 0, 24),
        BackgroundTransparency = 1,
        TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left,
        TextTruncate = Enum.TextTruncate.AtEnd,
        Parent = cardContent
    })
    
    local infoLbl = create("TextLabel", {
        Text = string.format(
            "浏览: %s | %s",
            formatNumber(scriptData.views),
            scriptData.verified and "已验证" or "社区"
        ),
        TextColor3 = config.colors.dim,
        Font = Enum.Font.Code,
        TextSize = isMobile and 8 or 10,
        Size = UDim2.new(1, isMobile and -100 or -150, 0, 14),
        Position = UDim2.new(0, 8, 0, 39),
        BackgroundTransparency = 1,
        TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left,
        Parent = cardContent
    })
    
    local statusLbl = create("TextLabel", {
        Text = scriptData.isPatched and "已失效" or "可用",
        TextColor3 = scriptData.isPatched and config.colors.danger or config.colors.success,
        Font = Enum.Font.Code,
        TextSize = isMobile and 8 or 10,
        Size = UDim2.new(1, isMobile and -100 or -150, 0, 14),
        Position = UDim2.new(0, 8, 0, 54),
        BackgroundTransparency = 1,
        TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left,
        Parent = cardContent
    })
    
    local cardCopyBtn = makeButton(cardContent, "复制", UDim2.new(0, isMobile and 40 or 45, 0, isMobile and 18 or 20), UDim2.new(1, isMobile and -90 or -140, 0, 8), true)
    local cardExecBtn = makeButton(cardContent, "执行", UDim2.new(0, isMobile and 40 or 45, 0, isMobile and 18 or 20), UDim2.new(1, isMobile and -45 or -90, 0, 8), false)
    local cardViewBtn = makeButton(cardContent, "查看", UDim2.new(0, isMobile and 85 or 100, 0, isMobile and 18 or 20), UDim2.new(1, isMobile and -90 or -140, 0, isMobile and 32 or 34), false)
    
    hook(cardCopyBtn.MouseButton1Click, function()
        if setclipboard then
            setclipboard(scriptData.script or codeLabel.Text or "")
            statusLabel.Text = "已复制!"
            task.delay(2, function() statusLabel.Text = "就绪" end)
        end
    end)
    
    hook(cardExecBtn.MouseButton1Click, function()
        local source = scriptData.script or codeLabel.Text
        if loadstring and source and source ~= "" then
            local fn = loadstring(source)
            if fn then
                task.spawn(fn)
                statusLabel.Text = "已执行!"
                task.delay(2, function() statusLabel.Text = "就绪" end)
            end
        end
    end)
    
    hook(cardViewBtn.MouseButton1Click, function()
        if selectedCard then
            selectedCard.BackgroundColor3 = config.colors.bg
        end
        selectedCard = cardContent
        cardContent.BackgroundColor3 = config.colors.mid
        updateDetail(scriptData)
        loadRawScript(scriptData)
    end)
    
    updateCanvas()
end

local currentPage = 1
local lastQuery = ""
local totalPages = 1
local currentMode = "fetch"

local function buildQuery(baseUrl)
    local params = {}
    
    for key, data in pairs(filterButtons) do
        if data.getState() then
            if key == "keyless" then
                table.insert(params, "key=0")
            elseif key == "patched" then
                table.insert(params, "patched=0")
            else
                table.insert(params, key .. "=1")
            end
        end
    end
    
    table.insert(params, "mode=" .. filterState.mode)
    table.insert(params, "sortBy=" .. filterState.sortBy)
    table.insert(params, "strict=" .. tostring(getStrict()))
    
    if filterState.placeId then
        table.insert(params, "placeId=" .. tostring(filterState.placeId))
    end
    
    table.insert(params, "page=" .. tostring(currentPage))
    table.insert(params, "max=15")
    
    if #params > 0 then
        return baseUrl .. "?" .. table.concat(params, "&")
    end
    return baseUrl
end

local function fetchScripts()
    clearList()
    scriptList.CanvasPosition = Vector2.new(0, 0)
    statusLabel.Text = "加载中..."
    pageLabel.Text = "第 " .. currentPage .. " 页"
    showLoader(true)
    
    local url
    if currentMode == "trending" then
        url = "https://scriptblox.com/api/script/trending"
    elseif currentMode == "search" and lastQuery ~= "" then
        url = buildQuery("https://scriptblox.com/api/script/search?q=" .. HttpService:UrlEncode(lastQuery))
    else
        url = buildQuery("https://scriptblox.com/api/script/fetch")
    end
    
    task.spawn(function()
        local success, response = pcall(function()
            return game:HttpGet(url)
        end)
        
        if not success then
            showLoader(false)
            statusLabel.Text = "请求失败"
            return
        end
        
        local ok, data = pcall(function()
            return HttpService:JSONDecode(response)
        end)
        
        if not ok then
            showLoader(false)
            statusLabel.Text = "解析错误"
            return
        end
        
        local result = data.result or {}
        local scripts = result.scripts or {}
        totalPages = result.totalPages or 1
        
        if #scripts == 0 then
            showLoader(false)
            statusLabel.Text = "无结果"
            return
        end
        
        for _, scriptData in ipairs(scripts) do
            makeScriptCard(scriptData)
        end
        
        pageLabel.Text = string.format("第 %d/%d 页", currentPage, totalPages)
        statusLabel.Text = string.format("已加载 %d 个脚本", #scripts)
        showLoader(false)
    end)
end

hook(searchBtn.MouseButton1Click, function()
    lastQuery = searchBox.Text or ""
    currentPage = 1
    currentMode = "search"
    filterState.placeId = nil
    fetchScripts()
end)

hook(searchBox.FocusLost, function(enterPressed)
    if enterPressed then
        lastQuery = searchBox.Text or ""
        currentPage = 1
        currentMode = "search"
        filterState.placeId = nil
        fetchScripts()
    end
end)

hook(trendingBtn.MouseButton1Click, function()
    lastQuery = ""
    currentPage = 1
    currentMode = "trending"
    filterState.placeId = nil
    fetchScripts()
end)

hook(byGameBtn.MouseButton1Click, function()
    lastQuery = ""
    currentPage = 1
    currentMode = "fetch"
    filterState.placeId = game.PlaceId
    fetchScripts()
end)

hook(clearBtn.MouseButton1Click, function()
    searchBox.Text = ""
    lastQuery = ""
    currentPage = 1
    currentMode = "fetch"
    filterState.placeId = nil
    fetchScripts()
end)

hook(refreshBtn.MouseButton1Click, function()
    fetchScripts()
end)

hook(prevBtn.MouseButton1Click, function()
    if currentPage > 1 then
        currentPage = currentPage - 1
        fetchScripts()
    end
end)

hook(nextBtn.MouseButton1Click, function()
    if currentPage < totalPages then
        currentPage = currentPage + 1
        fetchScripts()
    end
end)

local modeLabels = { free = "免费", paid = "付费" }
hook(modeBtn.MouseButton1Click, function()
    filterState.mode = filterState.mode == "free" and "paid" or "free"
    modeBtn.Text = "模式: " .. modeLabels[filterState.mode]
    currentPage = 1
    fetchScripts()
end)

local sortOptions = { "updatedAt", "createdAt", "views", "likeCount" }
local sortLabels = { "更新", "创建", "浏览", "点赞" }
local sortIndex = 1

hook(sortBtn.MouseButton1Click, function()
    sortIndex = sortIndex % #sortOptions + 1
    filterState.sortBy = sortOptions[sortIndex]
    sortBtn.Text = "排序: " .. sortLabels[sortIndex]
    currentPage = 1
    fetchScripts()
end)

for key, data in pairs(filterButtons) do
    hook(data.btn.MouseButton1Click, function()
        if key == "key" and filterButtons.keyless.getState() then
            filterButtons.keyless.setState(false)
        elseif key == "keyless" and filterButtons.key.getState() then
            filterButtons.key.setState(false)
        end
        currentPage = 1
        fetchScripts()
    end)
end

hook(strictBtn.MouseButton1Click, function()
    currentPage = 1
    fetchScripts()
end)

hook(copyBtn.MouseButton1Click, function()
    if setclipboard and currentScript then
        setclipboard(currentScript)
        statusLabel.Text = "脚本已复制!"
        task.delay(2, function() statusLabel.Text = "就绪" end)
    end
end)

hook(copyRawBtn.MouseButton1Click, function()
    if setclipboard and currentSlug then
        setclipboard(rawUrl({ slug = currentSlug }))
        statusLabel.Text = "链接已复制!"
        task.delay(2, function() statusLabel.Text = "就绪" end)
    end
end)

hook(executeBtn.MouseButton1Click, function()
    if loadstring and currentScript and currentScript ~= "" then
        local fn = loadstring(currentScript)
        if fn then
            task.spawn(fn)
            statusLabel.Text = "已执行!"
            task.delay(2, function() statusLabel.Text = "就绪" end)
        end
    end
end)

local keybind = Enum.KeyCode.RightShift

hook(UserInputService.InputBegan, function(input, gameProcessed)
    if not gameProcessed and input.KeyCode == keybind then
        mainFrame.Visible = not mainFrame.Visible
    end
end)

fetchScripts()
end)

generalV4:Button("世界聊天大厅",function()
