generalV4:Button("生成一个珍妮",function()
local ChatService = game:GetService("Chat")
local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local RunService = game:GetService("RunService")

local LocalPlayer = Players.LocalPlayer

local NPCModel = nil
local PlayerCharacter = nil
local NPCHumanoidRootPart = nil
local PlayerHumanoidRootPart = nil
local NPCHumanoid = nil
local PlayerHumanoid = nil

local IdleAnimation = nil
local WalkAnimation = nil
local RunAnimation = nil
local DanceAnimation1 = nil
local DanceAnimation2 = nil
local CatPawAnimation = nil
local HugAnimation = nil
local NeedyAnimation = nil
local HulaDanceAnimation = nil

local CurrentVelocity = nil
local CurrentSpeed = 0

local IsFollowing = false
local IsPerformingEmote = false

local DialogueResponses = {
    follow = {
        "好的亲爱的，我会跟着你去任何地方！",
        "好的甜心，我就在你后面！",
        "来啦！不要丢下我哦~",
        "我会照你说的做。"
    },
    
    stay = {
        "好的，我就在这里等你。",
        "我会在这里等你回来。",
        "明白了，我停下。"
    },
    
    emote = {
        "看这个！",
        "你喜欢这个动作吗？",
        "嘿嘿，看我的！"
    },
    
    hello = {
        "你好呀甜心！"
    },
    
    hi = {
        "嗨～亲爱的！"
    },
    
    cute = {
        "哎呀，你真贴心。",
        "你让我脸红啦！",
        "别这样，可爱的是你才对。"
    },
    
    where = {
        "在你身边，一直都在。",
        "别担心，我离你很近。"
    }
}

local AnimationIDs = {
    Idle = "rbxassetid://616136790",
    Walk = "rbxassetid://616146177",
    Run = "rbxassetid://616140816",
    SummerDance = "rbxassetid://71742037362291",
    CatPaw = "rbxassetid://71970944840848",
    HugMe = "rbxassetid://133544319055112",
    Needy = "rbxassetid://86519407452355",
    Hooladance = "rbxassetid://75741651676549",
    Dance2 = "rbxassetid://104648192385462"
}

local function CreateAnimation(animationId, looped, priority)
    local anim = Instance.new("Animation")
    anim.AnimationId = animationId
    
    return anim
end

local function LoadAnimationSafe(animator, animationId, looped, priority)
    local success, result = pcall(function()
        local anim = CreateAnimation(animationId, looped, priority)
        local loadedAnim = animator:LoadAnimation(anim)
        loadedAnim.Looped = looped or false
        
        if priority then
            loadedAnim.Priority = Enum.AnimationPriority[priority]
        end
        
        return loadedAnim
    end)
    
    if success then
        return result
    else
        warn("加载动画失败: " .. animationId)
        return nil
    end
end

local function GetRandomResponse(category)
    local responses = DialogueResponses[category]
    if responses and #responses > 0 then
        return responses[math.random(1, #responses)]
    end
    return nil
end

local function NPCSpeak(message)
    if NPCModel and NPCModel:FindFirstChild("Head") then
        game:GetService("Chat"):Chat(NPCModel.Head, message, Enum.ChatColor.White)
    end
end

local function StopNPCMovement()
    if NPCHumanoid and NPCHumanoidRootPart then
        NPCHumanoid.WalkSpeed = 0
        NPCHumanoid:MoveTo(NPCHumanoidRootPart.Position)
        task.wait(0.1)
        NPCHumanoid.WalkSpeed = 16
    end
end

local function PlayEmoteAnimation(animation)
    if not animation then return end
    
    IsPerformingEmote = true
    
    -- 停止所有移动动画
    if WalkAnimation and WalkAnimation.IsPlaying then
        WalkAnimation:Stop()
    end
    if RunAnimation and RunAnimation.IsPlaying then
        RunAnimation:Stop()
    end
    if IdleAnimation and IdleAnimation.IsPlaying then
        IdleAnimation:Stop()
    end
    
    -- 播放表演动画
    animation:Play()
    
    -- 等待动画完整播放完毕
    local animLength = animation.Length
    if animLength and animLength > 0 then
        task.wait(animLength)
    else
        task.wait(10) -- 默认等待10秒
    end
    
    animation:Stop()
    IsPerformingEmote = false
    
    -- 恢复待机动画
    if IdleAnimation then
        IdleAnimation:Play()
    end
end

local function CheckChatKeyword(message)
    local lowerMessage = string.lower(message)
    
    if string.find(lowerMessage, "follow") or string.find(lowerMessage, "跟随") or string.find(lowerMessage, "跟着") then
        IsFollowing = true
        NPCSpeak(GetRandomResponse("follow"))
        return
    end
    
    if string.find(lowerMessage, "stay") or string.find(lowerMessage, "stop") or 
       string.find(lowerMessage, "停") or string.find(lowerMessage, "等") or
       string.find(lowerMessage, "别跟") or string.find(lowerMessage, "不要跟") or
       string.find(lowerMessage, "取消") then
        IsFollowing = false
        StopNPCMovement()
        NPCSpeak(GetRandomResponse("stay"))
        return
    end
    
    if string.find(lowerMessage, "dance") or string.find(lowerMessage, "emote") or
       string.find(lowerMessage, "跳舞") or string.find(lowerMessage, "表演") then
        NPCSpeak(GetRandomResponse("emote"))
        local emotes = {DanceAnimation1, DanceAnimation2, CatPawAnimation, 
                       HugAnimation, NeedyAnimation, HulaDanceAnimation}
        local randomEmote = emotes[math.random(1, #emotes)]
        if randomEmote then
            task.spawn(function()
                PlayEmoteAnimation(randomEmote)
            end)
        end
        return
    end
    
    if string.find(lowerMessage, "hello") or string.find(lowerMessage, "hi") or
       string.find(lowerMessage, "你好") or string.find(lowerMessage, "嗨") then
        NPCSpeak(GetRandomResponse("hello"))
        return
    end
    
    if string.find(lowerMessage, "cute") or string.find(lowerMessage, "pretty") or
       string.find(lowerMessage, "可爱") or string.find(lowerMessage, "漂亮") then
        NPCSpeak(GetRandomResponse("cute"))
        return
    end
    
    if string.find(lowerMessage, "where") or string.find(lowerMessage, "哪里") or string.find(lowerMessage, "在哪") then
        NPCSpeak(GetRandomResponse("where"))
        return
    end
end

local success, npcModel = pcall(function()
    return game:GetObjects("rbxassetid://103193147017190")[1]
end)

if success and npcModel then
    NPCModel = npcModel
    NPCModel.Parent = workspace
    
    PlayerCharacter = LocalPlayer.Character
    
    if PlayerCharacter and PlayerCharacter.PrimaryPart then
        local offset = Vector3.new(-2.5, 0, 4)
        NPCModel:PivotTo(CFrame.new(offset) * PlayerCharacter.PrimaryPart.CFrame)
    end
    
    NPCHumanoidRootPart = NPCModel:WaitForChild("HumanoidRootPart")
    
    local npcHumanoid = NPCModel:WaitForChild("Humanoid")
    local animator = npcHumanoid:FindFirstChild("Animator")
    
    if animator then
        IdleAnimation = LoadAnimationSafe(animator, AnimationIDs.Idle, true, nil)
        WalkAnimation = LoadAnimationSafe(animator, AnimationIDs.Walk, true, nil)
        RunAnimation = LoadAnimationSafe(animator, AnimationIDs.Run, true, nil)
        
        DanceAnimation1 = LoadAnimationSafe(animator, AnimationIDs.SummerDance, true, "Action")
        DanceAnimation2 = LoadAnimationSafe(animator, AnimationIDs.Dance2, true, "Action")
        CatPawAnimation = LoadAnimationSafe(animator, AnimationIDs.CatPaw, true, "Action")
        HugAnimation = LoadAnimationSafe(animator, AnimationIDs.HugMe, true, "Action")
        NeedyAnimation = LoadAnimationSafe(animator, AnimationIDs.Needy, true, "Action")
        HulaDanceAnimation = LoadAnimationSafe(animator, AnimationIDs.Hooladance, true, "Action")
        
        if IdleAnimation then
            IdleAnimation:Play()
        end
    end
    
    local proximityPrompt = Instance.new("ProximityPrompt")
    proximityPrompt.ObjectText = "Jenny"
    proximityPrompt.ActionText = "对话"
    proximityPrompt.KeyboardKeyCode = Enum.KeyCode.E
    proximityPrompt.HoldDuration = 0.5
    proximityPrompt.RequiresLineOfSight = false
    proximityPrompt.MaxActivationDistance = 4
    proximityPrompt.Parent = NPCHumanoidRootPart
    
    proximityPrompt.Triggered:Connect(function(player)
        for _, descendant in pairs(NPCModel:GetDescendants()) do
            if descendant:IsA("ScreenGui") and descendant.Name == "NPCMenu" then
                local menuClone = descendant:Clone()
                menuClone.Parent = player.PlayerGui
                
                local closeButton = Instance.new("TextButton")
                closeButton.Size = UDim2.new(0, 30, 0, 30)
                closeButton.Position = UDim2.new(1, -35, 0, 5)
                closeButton.Text = "X"
                closeButton.TextSize = 20
                closeButton.Font = Enum.Font.GothamBold
                closeButton.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 0, 0)
                closeButton.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
                
                for _, child in pairs(menuClone:GetDescendants()) do
                    if child:IsA("Frame") then
                        closeButton.Parent = child
                        break
                    end
                end
                
                closeButton.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
                    menuClone:Destroy()
                end)
                
                for _, child in pairs(menuClone:GetDescendants()) do
                    if child:IsA("Frame") then
                        for _, button in pairs(child:GetChildren()) do
                            if button:IsA("TextButton") and button ~= closeButton then
                                if button.Text == "跟随我" or button.Text == "Follow me" then
                                    button.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
                                        IsFollowing = true
                                        NPCSpeak(GetRandomResponse("follow"))
                                        menuClone:Destroy()
                                    end)
                                end
                                
                                if button.Text == "停下" or button.Text == "Stay" or button.Text == "停止跟随" then
                                    button.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
                                        IsFollowing = false
                                        StopNPCMovement()
                                        NPCSpeak(GetRandomResponse("stay"))
                                        menuClone:Destroy()
                                    end)
                                end
                                
                                if button.Text == "表演" or button.Text == "Emote" then
                                    button.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
                                        NPCSpeak(GetRandomResponse("emote"))
                                        local emotes = {DanceAnimation1, CatPawAnimation, HugAnimation}
                                        local randomEmote = emotes[math.random(1, #emotes)]
                                        if randomEmote then
                                            task.spawn(function()
                                                PlayEmoteAnimation(randomEmote)
                                            end)
                                        end
                                        menuClone:Destroy()
                                    end)
                                end
                            end
                        end
                    end
                end
                
                break
            end
        end
    end)
else
    warn("加载NPC模型失败")
end

LocalPlayer.Chatted:Connect(function(message)
    if not NPCModel or not NPCModel:FindFirstChild("Head") then
        return
    end
    
    if not PlayerCharacter then
        PlayerCharacter = LocalPlayer.Character
    end
    
    if not PlayerCharacter or not PlayerCharacter:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
        return
    end
    
    local playerRoot = PlayerCharacter.HumanoidRootPart
    
    local distance = (playerRoot.Position - NPCHumanoidRootPart.Position).Magnitude
    if distance < 15 then
        CheckChatKeyword(message)
    end
end)

RunService.Heartbeat:Connect(function(deltaTime)
    PlayerCharacter = LocalPlayer.Character
    
    if not PlayerCharacter then
        return
    end
    
    NPCHumanoid = NPCModel and NPCModel:FindFirstChild("Humanoid")
    NPCHumanoidRootPart = NPCModel and NPCModel:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
    PlayerHumanoidRootPart = PlayerCharacter:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
    PlayerHumanoid = PlayerCharacter:FindFirstChild("Humanoid")
    
    if not NPCHumanoid or not NPCHumanoidRootPart or not PlayerHumanoidRootPart then
        return
    end
    
    if IsFollowing and not IsPerformingEmote then
        local targetPosition = PlayerHumanoidRootPart.Position
        local npcPosition = NPCHumanoidRootPart.Position
        local distance = (targetPosition - npcPosition).Magnitude
        
        if distance > 5 then
            local lookVector = PlayerHumanoidRootPart.CFrame.LookVector
            local offset = Vector3.new(-2.5, 0, 4)
            local followPosition = targetPosition - (lookVector * 3)
            
            NPCHumanoid:MoveTo(followPosition)
            NPCHumanoid.WalkSpeed = math.clamp(distance * 2, 16, 50)
        else
            NPCHumanoid.WalkSpeed = 16
        end
    end
    
    if NPCHumanoidRootPart then
        CurrentVelocity = NPCHumanoidRootPart.Velocity
        CurrentSpeed = CurrentVelocity.Magnitude
        
        if not IsPerformingEmote then
            if CurrentSpeed < 0.1 then
                if IdleAnimation and not IdleAnimation.IsPlaying then
                    if RunAnimation and RunAnimation.IsPlaying then
                        RunAnimation:Stop()
                    end
                    if WalkAnimation and WalkAnimation.IsPlaying then
                        WalkAnimation:Stop()
                    end
                    IdleAnimation:Play()
                end
            elseif CurrentSpeed > 18 then
                if RunAnimation and not RunAnimation.IsPlaying then
                    if IdleAnimation and IdleAnimation.IsPlaying then
                        IdleAnimation:Stop()
                    end
                    if WalkAnimation and WalkAnimation.IsPlaying then
                        WalkAnimation:Stop()
                    end
                    RunAnimation:Play()
                end
            else
                if WalkAnimation and not WalkAnimation.IsPlaying then
                    if IdleAnimation and IdleAnimation.IsPlaying then
                        IdleAnimation:Stop()
                    end
                    if RunAnimation and RunAnimation.IsPlaying then
                        RunAnimation:Stop()
                    end
                    WalkAnimation:Play()
                end
            end
        end
    end
end)
end)
