generalV4:Toggle("人物不可见状态", "Invisible Character", false, function(enabled)
  
  local localPlayer = game.Players.LocalPlayer
  for _, child in pairs((localPlayer.Character or localPlayer.CharacterAdded:Wait()):GetChildren()) do
    local isBasePart = child:IsA("BasePart")
    if isBasePart then
      if enabled then
        isBasePart = 1
      else
        isBasePart = 0
      end
      child.Transparency = isBasePart
      child.CanCollide = not enabled
    elseif child:IsA("Accessory") then
      local handle = child.Handle
      local transparency = nil	
      if enabled then
        transparency = 1
      else
        transparency = 0
      end
      handle.Transparency = transparency
    end
  end
end)
local fakeLagEnabled = false
local fakeLagCoroutine = nil
local player = game.Players.LocalPlayer
local char = player.Character or player.CharacterAdded:Wait()

player.CharacterAdded:Connect(function(newChar)
    char = newChar
end)

generalV4:Toggle("慢移动/人物快速移动", "FengYu", false, function(state)
    local Players = game:GetService("Players")
    local player = Players.LocalPlayer
    
    local runAnimId = "rbxassetid://913376220"
    local runTrack = nil
    local runConnection = nil
    
    local function playRunAnimation(humanoid)
        local animator = humanoid:FindFirstChildWhichIsA("Animator")
        if not animator then
            animator = Instance.new("Animator", humanoid)
        end

        local runAnim = Instance.new("Animation")
        runAnim.AnimationId = runAnimId
        runTrack = animator:LoadAnimation(runAnim)
        runTrack.Priority = Enum.AnimationPriority.Movement
        runTrack:AdjustSpeed(6)
        runTrack:Play()

        runConnection = game:GetService("RunService").RenderStepped:Connect(function()
            if humanoid.MoveDirection.Magnitude == 0 then
                if runTrack.IsPlaying then runTrack:Stop() end
            else
                if not runTrack.IsPlaying then
                    runTrack:Play()
                    runTrack:AdjustSpeed(6)
                end
            end
        end)
    end

    local function stopRunAnimation()
        if runTrack then runTrack:Stop() end
        if runConnection then runConnection:Disconnect() end
    end

    local function enableEgor()
        local char = player.Character
        if not char then return end
        local humanoid = char:FindFirstChild("Humanoid")
        if not humanoid then return end

        humanoid.WalkSpeed = 3
        playRunAnimation(humanoid)
    end

    local function disableEgor()
        local char = player.Character
        if not char then return end
        local humanoid = char:FindFirstChild("Humanoid")
        if not humanoid then return end

        humanoid.WalkSpeed = 16
        stopRunAnimation()
    end

    local function onCharacterAdded(char)
        local humanoid = char:WaitForChild("Humanoid")
        char:WaitForChild("Animate")
        task.wait(0.5)

        if state then
            enableEgor()
        else
            disableEgor()
        end
    end

    if state then
        if player.Character then
            onCharacterAdded(player.Character)
        end
        player.CharacterAdded:Connect(onCharacterAdded)
    else
        if player.Character then
            disableEgor()
        end
        player.CharacterAdded:Disconnect()
    end
end)
  
generalV4:Toggle("假延迟开关", "FakeLagToggle", false, function(state)
    fakeLagEnabled = state
    
    if fakeLagEnabled then
        fakeLagCoroutine = coroutine.create(function()
            while fakeLagEnabled and char do
                if char:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                    char.HumanoidRootPart.Anchored = true
                    wait(fakeLagDelay or 2)
                    if char and char:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                        char.HumanoidRootPart.Anchored = false
                    end
                end
                wait(0.05)
            end
            if char and char:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                char.HumanoidRootPart.Anchored = false
            end
        end)
        coroutine.resume(fakeLagCoroutine)
    else
        if char and char:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
            char.HumanoidRootPart.Anchored = false
        end
    end
end)

local fakeLagDelay = 0.1
generalV4:Textbox("假延迟延迟", "FengYu", "0.1", function(text)
    fakeLagDelay = tonumber(text) or 0.1
end)

generalV4:Toggle("假死开关", "FengYu", false, function(state)
    ragdollEnabled = state
    
    if state then
        if not isRagdolled then
            toggleRagdoll()
        end
    else
        if isRagdolled then
            toggleRagdoll()
        end
    end
end)

local bringSection = Tab3:section("带来玩家", true)

local targetPlayer = nil
local bringing = false
local speedSettings = {
    speeding = 32,
    maxspeed = 75
}

local bringStatus = bringSection:Label("状态: 等待选择...")
local bringButton = nil

local function getOtherPlayers()
    local list = {}
    for _, plr in ipairs(game:GetService("Players"):GetPlayers()) do
        if plr ~= game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer then
            table.insert(list, plr.Name)
        end
    end
    return list
end

local function findPlayer(txt)
    if txt == "" then return nil end
    local lowerTxt = string.lower(txt)
    local Players = game:GetService("Players")
    
    for _, v in ipairs(Players:GetPlayers()) do
        if v ~= Players.LocalPlayer then
            if v.DisplayName == txt or v.Name == txt then
                return v
            end
        end
    end
    
    for _, v in ipairs(Players:GetPlayers()) do
        if v ~= Players.LocalPlayer then
            local lowerDN = string.lower(v.DisplayName)
            local lowerName = string.lower(v.Name)
            if string.find(lowerDN, lowerTxt, 1, true) or string.find(lowerName, lowerTxt, 1, true) then
                return v
            end
        end
    end
    return nil
end

local playerDropdown = bringSection:Dropdown("选择玩家", "bring_target", getOtherPlayers(), function(selected)
    targetPlayer = game:GetService("Players"):FindFirstChild(selected)
    if targetPlayer and bringStatus then
        bringStatus.Text = "目标: " .. targetPlayer.DisplayName .. " (@" .. targetPlayer.Name .. ")"
    end
end)

game:GetService("Players").PlayerAdded:Connect(function()
    task.wait(0.5)
    if playerDropdown and playerDropdown.SetOptions then
        playerDropdown:SetOptions(getOtherPlayers())
    end
end)

game:GetService("Players").PlayerRemoving:Connect(function()
    task.wait(0.5)
    if playerDropdown and playerDropdown.SetOptions then
        playerDropdown:SetOptions(getOtherPlayers())
    end
end)

bringSection:Textbox("或输入玩家名搜索", "bring_input", "", function(text)
    if text ~= "" then
        local found = findPlayer(text)
        if found and bringStatus then
            targetPlayer = found
            bringStatus.Text = "找到: " .. found.DisplayName .. " (@" .. found.Name .. ")"
        elseif bringStatus then
            bringStatus.Text = "未找到匹配玩家"
        end
    end
end)

bringSection:Slider("加速度", "bring_accel", 32, 1, 1000, false, function(value)
    speedSettings.speeding = value
end)

bringSection:Slider("最大速度", "bring_maxspeed", 75, 2, 2000, false, function(value)
    speedSettings.maxspeed = value
end)

local function bringPlayer()
    if not targetPlayer then
        if bringStatus then bringStatus.Text = "错误: 请先选择目标玩家" end
        return
    end
    
    local plrs = game:GetService("Players")
    local lp = plrs.LocalPlayer
    local ws = game:GetService("Workspace")
    local twait = task.wait
    local osclock = os.clock
    local cf = CFrame.new
    local v3 = Vector3.new
    local v3_010 = v3(0,1,0)
    local v3_0 = v3(0,0,0)
    local off = CFrame.Angles(-1.5707963267948966,0,0)
    
    local c = lp.Character
    local c1 = targetPlayer.Character
    
    if not (c and c1) then
        if bringStatus then bringStatus.Text = "错误: 角色未加载" end
        return
    end
    
    if not (c:IsDescendantOf(ws) and c1:IsDescendantOf(ws)) then
        if bringStatus then bringStatus.Text = "错误: 角色不在工作区" end
        return
    end
    
    local hrp = c:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
    local hrp1 = c1:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
    
    if not (hrp and hrp1) then
        if bringStatus then bringStatus.Text = "错误: 缺少 HumanoidRootPart" end
        return
    end
    
    bringing = true
    if bringButton then bringButton.Text = "请等待" end
    
    local from = hrp1.CFrame
    local fromP = from.Position
    local to = hrp.CFrame
    local toP = to.Position
    
    local mag = (fromP - toP).Magnitude - 3
    local lv = cf(fromP, toP).LookVector
    local vel = 0
    local pos = fromP - v3_010 * 2
    toP = toP - v3_010 * 2
    
    local sine = osclock()
    local lastsine = sine
    local way = 0
    local reachedmaxspeed = false
    
    while bringing and c:IsDescendantOf(ws) and c1:IsDescendantOf(ws) do
        sine = osclock()
        local deltaTime = sine - lastsine
        lastsine = sine
        
        if reachedmaxspeed then
            if mag - way < reachedmaxspeed then
                vel = vel - deltaTime * speedSettings.speeding
                if vel < 0 then break end
            end
        else
            if way > mag / 2 then
                vel = vel - deltaTime * speedSettings.speeding
                if vel < 0 then break end
            else
                vel = vel + deltaTime * speedSettings.speeding
                if vel > speedSettings.maxspeed then
                    reachedmaxspeed = way
                    vel = speedSettings.maxspeed
                end
            end
        end
        
        way = way + vel * deltaTime
        
        if not hrp:IsGrounded() then
            hrp.CFrame = cf(pos + lv * way, toP) * off
            hrp.Velocity = lv * (vel + 1)
            hrp.RotVelocity = v3_0
        end
        
        twait()
    end
    
    if hrp then
        hrp.CFrame = to
        hrp.Velocity = v3_0
        hrp.RotVelocity = v3_0
    end
    
    bringing = false
    if bringButton then bringButton.Text = "带来" end
end

bringButton = bringSection:Button("带来", function()
    if bringing then
        bringing = false
        if bringButton then bringButton.Text = "带来" end
        if bringStatus then bringStatus.Text = "状态: 已停止" end
    else
        task.spawn(bringPlayer)
    end
end)

bringSection:Button("刷新玩家列表", function()
    if playerDropdown and playerDropdown.SetOptions then
        playerDropdown:SetOptions(getOtherPlayers())
    end
    if bringStatus then bringStatus.Text = "状态: 列表已刷新" end
end)
local browserSection = Tab3:section("浏览器", true)
browserSection:Label("部份注入器支持该功能")

local urlInput = ""
browserSection:Textbox("输入网址 (URL)", "browser_url", "", function(text)
    urlInput = text
end)

browserSection:Button("打开网站", function()
    if urlInput == "" then
        _G.NotifyWarning("错误", "请输入网址", 2)
        return
    end
    
    local fullUrl = urlInput
    if not string.find(urlInput, "^https?://") then
        fullUrl = "https://" .. urlInput
    end
    
    local GuiService = game:GetService("GuiService")
    local HttpService = game:GetService("HttpService")
    
    local info = {
        presentationStyle = 1,
        url = fullUrl,
        title = "",
        visible = true,
    }
    
    local message = HttpService:JSONEncode(info)
    GuiService:BroadcastNotification(message, 20)
    
    _G.NotifySuccess("正在打开", fullUrl, 2)
end)

browserSection:Button("复制网址到剪贴板", function()
    if urlInput == "" then
        _G.NotifyError("错误", "请输入网址", 2)
        return
    end
    
    local fullUrl = urlInput
    if not string.find(urlInput, "^https?://") then
        fullUrl = "https://" .. urlInput
    end
    
    if setclipboard then
        setclipboard(fullUrl)
        _G.Notify("已复制", fullUrl, 2)
    else
        _G.NotifyError("错误", "不支持剪贴板功能", 2)
    end
end)
local AttrSection = Tab3:section("修改游戏属性", true)

local attrName = ""
AttrSection:Textbox("属性名称", "attr_name", "输入要修改的属性名(如: health, stamina, ammo等)", function(text)
    attrName = text
end)

local attrValue = 999999
AttrSection:Textbox("属性数值", "attr_value", "999999", function(text)
    local num = tonumber(text)
    if num then
        attrValue = num
    end
end)

AttrSection:Button("应用修改", function()
    if attrName == "" then
        warn("请输入属性名称!")
        return
    end
    
    local Players = game:GetService("Players")
    local LocalPlayer = Players.LocalPlayer
    
    pcall(function()
        if LocalPlayer:FindFirstChild(attrName) then
            LocalPlayer[attrName] = attrValue
        end
    end)
    
    pcall(function()
        if LocalPlayer.Character then
            if LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild(attrName) then
                LocalPlayer.Character[attrName] = attrValue
            end
            local hum = LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
            if hum and hum:FindFirstChild(attrName) then
                hum[attrName] = attrValue
            end
            for _,v in pairs(LocalPlayer.Character:GetDescendants()) do
                if (v:IsA("NumberValue") or v:IsA("IntValue")) and v.Name:lower() == attrName:lower() then
                    v.Value = attrValue
                end
            end
        end
    end)
    
    pcall(function()
        for _,v in pairs(game:GetDescendants()) do
            if (v:IsA("NumberValue") or v:IsA("IntValue")) and v.Name:lower() == attrName:lower() then
                v.Value = attrValue
            end
            if v:IsA("ModuleScript") then
                pcall(function()
                    local env = require(v)
                    if type(env) == "table" then
                        for k,_ in pairs(env) do
                            if k:lower() == attrName:lower() and type(env[k]) == "number" then
                                env[k] = attrValue
                            end
                        end
                    end
                end)
            end
        end
    end)
    
    pcall(function()
        for _,v in pairs(getgc(true)) do
            if type(v) == "table" then
                for k,val in pairs(v) do
                    if k:lower() == attrName:lower() and type(val) == "number" then
                        v[k] = attrValue
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    end)
    
    print("已尝试修改属性: " .. attrName .. " = " .. tostring(attrValue))
end)

local lockActive = false
AttrSection:Toggle("锁定属性值", "lock_attr", false, function(state)
    lockActive = state
    if state then
        getgenv().BS_AttrLock = game:GetService("RunService").Heartbeat:Connect(function()
            if attrName == "" then return end
            pcall(function()
                local Players = game:GetService("Players")
                local LocalPlayer = Players.LocalPlayer
                if LocalPlayer.Character then
                    for _,v in pairs(LocalPlayer.Character:GetDescendants()) do
                        if (v:IsA("NumberValue") or v:IsA("IntValue")) and v.Name:lower() == attrName:lower() then
                            if v.Value ~= attrValue then
                                v.Value = attrValue
                            end
                        end
                    end
                end
            end)
            pcall(function()
                for _,v in pairs(game:GetDescendants()) do
                    if (v:IsA("NumberValue") or v:IsA("IntValue")) and v.Name:lower() == attrName:lower() then
                        if v.Value ~= attrValue then
                            v.Value = attrValue
                        end
                    end
                end
            end)
        end)
    else
        if getgenv().BS_AttrLock then
            getgenv().BS_AttrLock:Disconnect()
            getgenv().BS_AttrLock = nil
        end
    end
end)
end
do
    local TabDesync = Window:Tab("潜出脱步", '139835795227752')
    task.wait(0.1)
    local DesyncSection = TabDesync:section("Desync控制", true)

    local Players = game:GetService("Players")
    local RunService = game:GetService("RunService")
    local UserInputService = game:GetService("UserInputService")
    local TweenService = game:GetService("TweenService")
    local Workspace = game:GetService("Workspace")
    local CoreGui = game:GetService("CoreGui")

    local player = Players.LocalPlayer
    if not player then return end

    local GENV = getgenv()
    GENV.DesyncNormal = GENV.DesyncNormal or false
    GENV.DesyncFast = GENV.DesyncFast or false
    GENV.DesyncFix = GENV.DesyncFix or false
    GENV.SelectedMode = GENV.SelectedMode or "Normal"
    GENV.HideAuto = GENV.HideAuto or false

    local desyncActive = false
    local currentMode = "Normal"
    local serverFrozenPosition = nil
    local serverModel = nil
    local showServerPos = false
    local rotationConnection = nil
    
    local NumericFlags = {
        {"GameNetPVHeaderRotationalVelocityZeroCutoffExponent","-5000"},
        {"TimestepArbiterVelocityCriteriaThresholdTwoDt","2147483646"},
        {"S2PhysicsSenderRate","15000"},
        {"MaxDataPacketPerSend","2147483647"},
        {"PhysicsSenderMaxBandwidthBps","20000"},
        {"CheckPVCachedVelThresholdPercent","10"},
        {"MaxMissedWorldStepsRemembered","-2147483648"},
        {"CheckPVDifferencesForInterpolationMinVelThresholdStudsPerSecHundredth","1"},
        {"StreamJobNOUVolumeLengthCap","2147483647"},
        {"DebugSendDistInSteps","-2147483648"},
        {"GameNetDontSendRedundantNumTimes","1"},
        {"CheckPVLinearVelocityIntegrateVsDeltaPositionThresholdPercent","1"},
        {"CheckPVCachedRotVelThresholdPercent","10"},
        {"ReplicationFocusNouExtentsSizeCutoffForPauseStuds","2147483647"},
        {"CheckPVDifferencesForInterpolationMinRotVelThresholdRadsPerSecHundredth","1"},
        {"GameNetDontSendRedundantDeltaPositionMillionth","1"},
        {"InterpolationFrameVelocityThresholdMillionth","5"},
        {"StreamJobNOUVolumeCap","2147483647"},
        {"InterpolationFrameRotVelocityThresholdMillionth","5"},
        {"WorldStepMax","30"},
        {"TimestepArbiterHumanoidLinearVelThreshold","1"},
        {"InterpolationFramePositionThresholdMillionth","5"},
        {"TimestepArbiterHumanoidTurningVelThreshold","1"},
        {"GameNetPVHeaderLinearVelocityZeroCutoffExponent","-5000"},
        {"SimOwnedNOUCountThresholdMillionth","2147483647"},
        {"TimestepArbiterOmegaThou","1073741823"},
        {"MaxAcceptableUpdateDelay","1"}
    }

    local function ToggleRaknetDesync(state)
        pcall(function()
            if raknet and type(raknet.desync) == "function" then
                raknet.desync(state)
            end
        end)
    end

    local function ApplyFixFlags(apply)
        if apply then
            for _, flagData in ipairs(NumericFlags) do
                pcall(function() 
                    setfflag(flagData[1], flagData[2]) 
                end)
            end
        end
    end

    local function CreateServerModel(positionCFrame)
        if serverModel then
            serverModel:Destroy()
            serverModel = nil
        end
        if rotationConnection then
            rotationConnection:Disconnect()
            rotationConnection = nil
        end
        
        local model = Instance.new("Model")
        model.Name = "ServerPositionIndicator"
        
        local platform = Instance.new("Part")
        platform.Name = "ServerPlatform"
        platform.Size = Vector3.new(4, 0.2, 4)
        platform.CFrame = positionCFrame * CFrame.new(0, -3, 0)
        platform.Anchored = true
        platform.CanCollide = false
        platform.Transparency = 0.3
        platform.Material = Enum.Material.Neon
        platform.Color = Color3.fromRGB(255, 30, 30)
        platform.Parent = model
        Instance.new("CylinderMesh").Parent = platform
        
        local pillar = Instance.new("Part")
        pillar.Name = "ServerPillar"
        pillar.Size = Vector3.new(0.3, 50, 0.3)
        pillar.CFrame = positionCFrame * CFrame.new(0, 25, 0)
        pillar.Anchored = true
        pillar.CanCollide = false
        pillar.Transparency = 0.5
        pillar.Material = Enum.Material.Neon
        pillar.Color = Color3.fromRGB(255, 30, 30)
        pillar.Parent = model
        
        local characterOutline = Instance.new("Part")
        characterOutline.Name = "CharacterOutline"
        characterOutline.Size = Vector3.new(4, 4, 4)
        characterOutline.CFrame = positionCFrame
        characterOutline.Anchored = true
        characterOutline.CanCollide = false
        characterOutline.Transparency = 0.7
        characterOutline.Material = Enum.Material.ForceField
        characterOutline.Color = Color3.fromRGB(255, 30, 30)
        characterOutline.CastShadow = false
        characterOutline.Parent = model
        
        model.Parent = Workspace
        
        local angle = 0
        rotationConnection = RunService.Heartbeat:Connect(function()
            if model and model.Parent then
                angle = angle + 2
                if platform and platform.Parent then
                    platform.CFrame = positionCFrame * CFrame.new(0, -3, 0) * CFrame.Angles(0, math.rad(angle), 0)
                end
            else
                if rotationConnection then rotationConnection:Disconnect() end
                rotationConnection = nil
            end
        end)
        
        return model
    end

    local function DestroyServerModel()
        if serverModel then
            serverModel:Destroy()
            serverModel = nil
        end
        if rotationConnection then
            rotationConnection:Disconnect()
            rotationConnection = nil
        end
    end

    local function RefreshServerModel()
        if showServerPos and desyncActive and serverFrozenPosition then
            serverModel = CreateServerModel(serverFrozenPosition)
        else
            DestroyServerModel()
        end
    end

    local function StartDesync(mode)
        if desyncActive then return end
        
        currentMode = mode
        desyncActive = true
        
        local character = player.Character
        if character then
            local hrp = character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
            if hrp then
                serverFrozenPosition = hrp.CFrame
            end
        end
        
        if mode == "Fix" then
            ApplyFixFlags(true)
            ToggleRaknetDesync(true)
        elseif mode == "Fast" then
            ToggleRaknetDesync(true)
            pcall(function()
                if game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage"):FindFirstChild("__V") then
                    game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage").__V.Value = 2
                end
            end)
        else
            ToggleRaknetDesync(true)
        end
        
        if character then
            local hrp = character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
            if hrp then
                pcall(function()
                    hrp:SetNetworkOwner(nil)
                end)
            end
        end
        
        RefreshServerModel()
    end

    local function StopDesync()
        if not desyncActive then return end
        
        desyncActive = false
        ToggleRaknetDesync(false)
        ApplyFixFlags(false)
        DestroyServerModel()
        serverFrozenPosition = nil
        
        local character = player.Character
        if character then
            local hrp = character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
            if hrp then
                pcall(function()
                    hrp:SetNetworkOwnershipAuto()
                end)
            end
        end
    end

    local function FastRespawn(isHide)
        if not desyncActive then 
            return false
        end
        
        local char = player.Character
        if not char then return false end
        
        local hrp = char:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
        if not hrp then return false end
        
        local ogpos = hrp.CFrame
        local ogcam = Workspace.CurrentCamera.CFrame
        
        local hum = char:FindFirstChildWhichIsA("Humanoid")
        if hum then 
            hum.Health = 0 
        end
        
        task.spawn(function()
            local newChar = player.CharacterAdded:Wait()
            local newHrp = newChar:WaitForChild("HumanoidRootPart", 10)
            if not newHrp then return end
            
            if isHide then
                local vheight = math.random(5000, 9888)
                newHrp.CFrame = ogpos + Vector3.new(0, vheight, 0)
                Workspace.CurrentCamera.CFrame = ogcam
                task.wait(0.5)
                newHrp.CFrame = ogpos
            else
                newHrp.CFrame = ogpos
                Workspace.CurrentCamera.CFrame = ogcam
            end
        end)
        
        return true
    end

    local ModeDropdown = DesyncSection:Dropdown("选择不同步模式", "desync_mode", {"Normal", "Fast", "Fix"}, function(value)
        currentMode = value
        GENV.SelectedMode = value
        if desyncActive then
            StopDesync()
            task.wait(0.2)
            StartDesync(currentMode)
        end
    end)
    
    local DesyncToggle = DesyncSection:Toggle("不同步状态", "DesyncMainToggle", false, function(state)
        if state then
            StartDesync(currentMode)
        else
            StopDesync()
        end
    end)
    
    DesyncSection:Toggle("显示服务器位置", "ShowServerPos", false, function(state)
        showServerPos = state
        RefreshServerModel()
    end)
    
    DesyncSection:Toggle("快速重生 (隐藏模式)", "FastRespawnHide", false, function(state)
        GENV.HideAuto = state
    end)
    
    DesyncSection:Button("执行快速重生", function()
        FastRespawn(GENV.HideAuto)
    end)
    
    UserInputService.InputBegan:Connect(function(input, gameProcessed)
        if not gameProcessed and input.KeyCode == Enum.KeyCode.RightControl then
            local newState = not desyncActive
            if DesyncToggle and DesyncToggle.Set then
                DesyncToggle:Set(newState)
            end
            if newState then
                StartDesync(currentMode)
            else
                StopDesync()
            end
        end
    end)
    
    player.CharacterAdded:Connect(function(newCharacter)
        task.wait(1)
        if desyncActive then
            local hrp = newCharacter:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
            if hrp then
                serverFrozenPosition = hrp.CFrame
                pcall(function()
                    hrp:SetNetworkOwner(nil)
                end)
            end
            RefreshServerModel()
        end
    end)
end
do
    local BlackHoleCenter_BS = {}
    BlackHoleCenter_BS.Version = "1.0"
    BlackHoleCenter_BS.LoadTime = tick()
    
    local TabDraw = Window:Tab("绘制与子弹", '127035535799640')
task.wait(0.1)
    local SectionDraw1 = TabDraw:section("绘制开关", true)
    local SectionDraw = TabDraw:section("绘制选项", true)
    
    local BH_DrawSettings = {
        enabled = false,
        players = false,
        npcs = false,
        boxes = false,
        names = false,
        distances = false,
        healthbars = false,
        teamColor = false,
        showTools = false,
        showBackpack = false,
        hideEnemies = false,
        hideTeammates = false,
        showBoxes = false,
        showLines = false,
        lineThickness = 0.1,
        maxLineDistance = 500000
    }
    
    local BH_DrawObjects = {}
    local BH_DrawConnections = {}
    local BH_IsDrawRunning = false
    
    local function BH_SetupPlayerListeners()
        BH_DrawConnections.playerAdded = game.Players.PlayerAdded:Connect(function(player)
            if BH_DrawSettings.enabled and BH_DrawSettings.players then
                local function waitForCharacter()
                    if not player.Character then
                        player.CharacterAdded:Wait()
                    end
                    task.wait(0.5)
                    if BH_DrawSettings.enabled and BH_DrawSettings.players and BH_ShouldDrawPlayer(player) then
                        BH_UpdateDrawings()
                    end
                end
                coroutine.wrap(waitForCharacter)()
            end
        end)
        
        for _, player in ipairs(game.Players:GetPlayers()) do
            if player ~= game.Players.LocalPlayer then
                BH_DrawConnections["characterAdded_" .. player.UserId] = player.CharacterAdded:Connect(function(character)
                    if BH_DrawSettings.enabled and BH_DrawSettings.players and BH_ShouldDrawPlayer(player) then
                        task.wait(0.5)
                        BH_UpdateDrawings()
                    end
                end)
            end
        end
    end
    
    local function BH_SetupNPCListeners()
        BH_DrawConnections.descendantAdded = workspace.DescendantAdded:Connect(function(descendant)
            if BH_DrawSettings.enabled and BH_DrawSettings.npcs and BH_IsNPC(descendant) then
                task.wait(0.3)
                BH_UpdateDrawings()
            end
        end)
    end
    
    local function BH_CreateCharacterBox(character)
        if not character then return nil end
        
        local box = Instance.new("BoxHandleAdornment")
        box.Name = "BH_PlayerDrawBox"
        box.Size = Vector3.new(4, 6, 2)
        box.Color3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 255, 0)
        box.Transparency = 0.3
        box.AlwaysOnTop = true
        box.Visible = true
        box.Adornee = character
        box.ZIndex = 1
        
        local humanoidRootPart = character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
        if humanoidRootPart then
            box.Adornee = humanoidRootPart
        else
            box.Adornee = character.PrimaryPart or character:FindFirstChild("Torso") or character:FindFirstChild("UpperTorso")
        end
        
        box.Parent = character
        return box
    end
    
    local function BH_CreateNPCBox(character)
        if not character then return nil end
        
        local box = Instance.new("BoxHandleAdornment")
        box.Name = "BH_NPCDrawBox"
        box.Size = Vector3.new(4, 6, 2)
        box.Color3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 0, 0)
        box.Transparency = 0.3
        box.AlwaysOnTop = true
        box.Visible = true
        box.Adornee = character
        box.ZIndex = 1
        
        local humanoidRootPart = character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
        if humanoidRootPart then
            box.Adornee = humanoidRootPart
        else
            box.Adornee = character.PrimaryPart or character:FindFirstChild("Torso") or character:FindFirstChild("UpperTorso")
        end
        
        box.Parent = character
        return box
    end
    
    local function BH_CreateLineConnection(fromCharacter, toCharacter, color)
        if not fromCharacter or not toCharacter then return nil end
        
        local fromPart = fromCharacter:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") or fromCharacter.PrimaryPart
        local toPart = toCharacter:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") or toCharacter.PrimaryPart
        
        if not fromPart or not toPart then return nil end
        
        local beam = Instance.new("Beam")
        beam.Name = "BH_DrawLine"
        beam.Color = ColorSequence.new(color)
        beam.Width0 = BH_DrawSettings.lineThickness
        beam.Width1 = BH_DrawSettings.lineThickness
        beam.Transparency = NumberSequence.new(0.5)
        
        local attachment0 = Instance.new("Attachment")
        attachment0.Name = "BH_LineAttachment0"
        attachment0.Parent = fromPart
        
        local attachment1 = Instance.new("Attachment")
        attachment1.Name = "BH_LineAttachment1"
        attachment1.Parent = toPart
        
        beam.Attachment0 = attachment0
        beam.Attachment1 = attachment1
        beam.Parent = fromPart
        
        return {beam = beam, attachment0 = attachment0, attachment1 = attachment1}
    end
    
    local function BH_CreateLineInfo(character, distance, isNPC)
        if not character then return nil end
        
        local billboard = Instance.new("BillboardGui")
        billboard.Name = "BH_LineInfo"
        billboard.Size = UDim2.new(0, 150, 0, 40)
        billboard.StudsOffset = Vector3.new(0, 4.5, 0)
        billboard.AlwaysOnTop = true
        billboard.Adornee = character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") or character.PrimaryPart
        
        local background = Instance.new("Frame")
        background.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 1, 0)
        background.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(0, 0, 0)
        background.BackgroundTransparency = 0.3
        background.BorderSizePixel = 1
        background.BorderColor3 = Color3.new(1, 1, 1)
        background.Parent = billboard
        
        local nameLabel = Instance.new("TextLabel")
        nameLabel.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0.5, 0)
        nameLabel.BackgroundTransparency = 1
        nameLabel.Text = isNPC and "NPC" or character.Name
        nameLabel.TextColor3 = isNPC and Color3.new(1, 0, 0) or Color3.new(1, 1, 1)
        nameLabel.TextScaled = true
        nameLabel.Font = Enum.Font.GothamBold
        nameLabel.Parent = background
        
        local distanceLabel = Instance.new("TextLabel")
        distanceLabel.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0.5, 0)
        distanceLabel.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0.5, 0)
        distanceLabel.BackgroundTransparency = 1
        distanceLabel.Text = string.format("距离: %d", math.floor(distance))
        distanceLabel.TextColor3 = Color3.new(1, 1, 0)
        distanceLabel.TextScaled = true
        distanceLabel.Font = Enum.Font.Gotham
        distanceLabel.Parent = background
        
        billboard.Parent = character
        
        return {billboard = billboard, nameLabel = nameLabel, distanceLabel = distanceLabel}
    end
    
    local function BH_CreateHighlight(character)
        if not character then return nil end
        
        local highlight = Instance.new("Highlight")
        highlight.Name = "BH_PlayerDrawHighlight"
        highlight.FillColor = Color3.fromRGB(0, 255, 0)
        highlight.OutlineColor = Color3.new(1, 1, 1)
        highlight.FillTransparency = 0.8
        highlight.OutlineTransparency = 0
        highlight.DepthMode = Enum.HighlightDepthMode.AlwaysOnTop
        highlight.Parent = character
        
        return highlight
    end
    
    local function BH_CreateNameTag(player, character)
        if not character then return nil end
        
        local billboard = Instance.new("BillboardGui")
        billboard.Name = "BH_PlayerDrawNameTag"
        billboard.Size = UDim2.new(0, 120, 0, 30)
        billboard.StudsOffset = Vector3.new(0, 3, 0)
        billboard.AlwaysOnTop = true
        billboard.Adornee = character:FindFirstChild("Head") or character.PrimaryPart
        
        local nameLabel = Instance.new("TextLabel")
        nameLabel.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0.5, 0)
        nameLabel.BackgroundTransparency = 1
        nameLabel.Text = player.Name
        nameLabel.TextColor3 = Color3.new(1, 1, 1)
        nameLabel.TextScaled = true
        nameLabel.Font = Enum.Font.GothamBold
        nameLabel.Parent = billboard
        
        local distanceLabel = Instance.new("TextLabel")
        distanceLabel.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0.5, 0)
        distanceLabel.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0.5, 0)
        distanceLabel.BackgroundTransparency = 1
        distanceLabel.TextColor3 = Color3.new(1, 1, 0)
        distanceLabel.TextScaled = true
        distanceLabel.Font = Enum.Font.Gotham
        distanceLabel.Parent = billboard
        
        billboard.Parent = character
        
        return {billboard = billboard, nameLabel = nameLabel, distanceLabel = distanceLabel}
    end
    
    local function BH_CreateNPCNameTag(npcName, character)
        if not character then return nil end
        
        local billboard = Instance.new("BillboardGui")
        billboard.Name = "BH_NPCDrawNameTag"
        billboard.Size = UDim2.new(0, 120, 0, 30)
        billboard.StudsOffset = Vector3.new(0, 3, 0)
        billboard.AlwaysOnTop = true
        billboard.Adornee = character:FindFirstChild("Head") or character.PrimaryPart
        
        local nameLabel = Instance.new("TextLabel")
        nameLabel.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0.5, 0)
        nameLabel.BackgroundTransparency = 1
        nameLabel.Text = npcName
        nameLabel.TextColor3 = Color3.new(1, 0, 0)
        nameLabel.TextScaled = true
        nameLabel.Font = Enum.Font.GothamBold
        nameLabel.Parent = billboard
        
        local distanceLabel = Instance.new("TextLabel")
        distanceLabel.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0.5, 0)
        distanceLabel.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0.5, 0)
        distanceLabel.BackgroundTransparency = 1
        distanceLabel.TextColor3 = Color3.new(1, 1, 0)
        distanceLabel.TextScaled = true
        distanceLabel.Font = Enum.Font.Gotham
        distanceLabel.Parent = billboard
        
        billboard.Parent = character
        
        return {billboard = billboard, nameLabel = nameLabel, distanceLabel = distanceLabel}
    end
    
    local function BH_CreateHealthBar(character)
        if not character then return nil end
        
        local billboard = Instance.new("BillboardGui")
        billboard.Name = "BH_PlayerDrawHealthBar"
        billboard.Size = UDim2.new(0, 80, 0, 6)
        billboard.StudsOffset = Vector3.new(0, 2.5, 0)
        billboard.AlwaysOnTop = true
        billboard.Adornee = character:FindFirstChild("Head") or character.PrimaryPart
        
        local background = Instance.new("Frame")
        background.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 1, 0)
        background.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(0, 0, 0)
        background.BorderSizePixel = 1
        background.BorderColor3 = Color3.new(1, 1, 1)
        background.Parent = billboard
        
        local healthBar = Instance.new("Frame")
        healthBar.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 1, 0)
        healthBar.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(0, 1, 0)
        healthBar.BorderSizePixel = 0
        healthBar.Parent = background
        
        billboard.Parent = character
        
        return {billboard = billboard, healthBar = healthBar, background = background}
    end
    
    local function BH_CreateToolDisplay(character)
        if not character then return nil end
        
        local billboard = Instance.new("BillboardGui")
        billboard.Name = "BH_PlayerDrawTool"
        billboard.Size = UDim2.new(0, 25, 0, 25)
        billboard.StudsOffset = Vector3.new(0, 4, 0)
        billboard.AlwaysOnTop = true
        billboard.Adornee = character:FindFirstChild("Head") or character.PrimaryPart
        
        local toolImage = Instance.new("ImageLabel")
        toolImage.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 1, 0)
        toolImage.BackgroundTransparency = 1
        toolImage.Visible = false
        toolImage.Parent = billboard
        
        billboard.Parent = character
        
        return {billboard = billboard, toolImage = toolImage}
    end
    
    local function BH_CreateBackpackDisplay(character)
        if not character then return nil end
        
        local billboard = Instance.new("BillboardGui")
        billboard.Name = "BH_PlayerDrawBackpack"
        billboard.Size = UDim2.new(0, 80, 0, 25)
        billboard.StudsOffset = Vector3.new(1.5, 0.8, 0)
        billboard.AlwaysOnTop = true
        billboard.Adornee = character:FindFirstChild("Head") or character.PrimaryPart
        
        local container = Instance.new("Frame")
        container.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 1, 0)
        container.BackgroundTransparency = 0.8
        container.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(0, 0, 0)
        container.Parent = billboard
        
        local uiListLayout = Instance.new("UIListLayout")
        uiListLayout.FillDirection = Enum.FillDirection.Horizontal
        uiListLayout.Padding = UDim.new(0, 2)
        uiListLayout.Parent = container
        
        billboard.Parent = character
        
        return {billboard = billboard, container = container, uiListLayout = uiListLayout}
    end
    
    local function BH_GetEquippedTool(character)
        if not character then return nil end
        
        for _, tool in ipairs(character:GetChildren()) do
            if tool:IsA("Tool") and tool.Parent == character then
                return tool
            end
        end
        
        return nil
    end
    
    local function BH_GetPlayerBackpackIcons(player)
        if not player then return {} end
        
        local icons = {}
        local backpack = player:FindFirstChild("Backpack")
        
        if backpack then
            for _, item in ipairs(backpack:GetChildren()) do
                if item:IsA("Tool") then
                    table.insert(icons, item.TextureId or "rbxasset://textures/ui/Toolbox/Toolbox_Icon.png")
                end
            end
        end
        
        return icons
    end
    
    local function BH_IsNPC(model)
        if not model:IsA("Model") then return false end
        if not model:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid") then return false end
        
        for _, player in ipairs(game.Players:GetPlayers()) do
            if player.Character == model then
                return false
            end
        end
        
        return true
    end
    
    local function BH_IsEnemy(player)
        local localPlayer = game.Players.LocalPlayer
        if not localPlayer.Team or not player.Team then
            return true
        end
        
        return localPlayer.Team ~= player.Team
    end
    
    local function BH_IsTeammate(player)
        local localPlayer = game.Players.LocalPlayer
        if not localPlayer.Team or not player.Team then
            return false
        end
        
        return localPlayer.Team == player.Team
    end
    
    local function BH_ShouldDrawPlayer(player)
        if not BH_DrawSettings.players then
            return false
        end
        
        if BH_DrawSettings.hideEnemies and BH_IsEnemy(player) then
            return false
        end
        
        if BH_DrawSettings.hideTeammates and BH_IsTeammate(player) then
            return false
        end
        
        return true
    end
    
    local function BH_UpdateLineStats()
        if not BH_DrawSettings.showLines then return end
        
        local localPlayer = game.Players.LocalPlayer
        local localCharacter = localPlayer.Character
        if not localCharacter then return end
        
        local localRoot = localCharacter:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
        if not localRoot then return end
        
        if BH_DrawSettings.players then
            for _, player in ipairs(game.Players:GetPlayers()) do
                if player ~= localPlayer and BH_ShouldDrawPlayer(player) then
                    local character = player.Character
                    if character and character:FindFirstChild("Humanoid") then
                        local humanoid = character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
                        local rootPart = character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
                        
                        if humanoid and rootPart and humanoid.Health > 0 then
                            local distance = (localRoot.Position - rootPart.Position).Magnitude
                            
                            if distance <= BH_DrawSettings.maxLineDistance then
                                if not BH_DrawObjects[player] then
                                    BH_DrawObjects[player] = {}
                                end
                                
                                if not BH_DrawObjects[player].line then
                                    local lineColor = BH_DrawSettings.teamColor and player.Team and player.Team.TeamColor.Color or Color3.fromRGB(0, 255, 0)
                                    BH_DrawObjects[player].line = BH_CreateLineConnection(localCharacter, character, lineColor)
                                    BH_DrawObjects[player].lineInfo = BH_CreateLineInfo(character, distance, false)
                                else
                                    if BH_DrawObjects[player].lineInfo then
                                        BH_DrawObjects[player].lineInfo.distanceLabel.Text = string.format("距离: %d", math.floor(distance))
                                    end
                                end
                            else
                                if BH_DrawObjects[player] and BH_DrawObjects[player].line then
                                    BH_DrawObjects[player].line.beam:Destroy()
                                    BH_DrawObjects[player].line.attachment0:Destroy()
                                    BH_DrawObjects[player].line.attachment1:Destroy()
                                    if BH_DrawObjects[player].lineInfo then
                                        BH_DrawObjects[player].lineInfo.billboard:Destroy()
                                    end
                                    BH_DrawObjects[player].line = nil
                                    BH_DrawObjects[player].lineInfo = nil
                                end
                            end
                        else
                            if BH_DrawObjects[player] and BH_DrawObjects[player].line then
                                BH_DrawObjects[player].line.beam:Destroy()
                                BH_DrawObjects[player].line.attachment0:Destroy()
                                BH_DrawObjects[player].line.attachment1:Destroy()
                                if BH_DrawObjects[player].lineInfo then
                                    BH_DrawObjects[player].lineInfo.billboard:Destroy()
                                end
                                BH_DrawObjects[player].line = nil
                                BH_DrawObjects[player].lineInfo = nil
                            end
                        end
                    else
                        if BH_DrawObjects[player] and BH_DrawObjects[player].line then
                            BH_DrawObjects[player].line.beam:Destroy()
                            BH_DrawObjects[player].line.attachment0:Destroy()
                            BH_DrawObjects[player].line.attachment1:Destroy()
                            if BH_DrawObjects[player].lineInfo then
                                BH_DrawObjects[player].lineInfo.billboard:Destroy()
                            end
                            BH_DrawObjects[player].line = nil
                            BH_DrawObjects[player].lineInfo = nil
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
        end
        
        if BH_DrawSettings.npcs then
            for _, model in ipairs(workspace:GetDescendants()) do
                if BH_IsNPC(model) then
                    local humanoid = model:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
                    local rootPart = model:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
                    
                    if humanoid and rootPart and humanoid.Health > 0 then
                        local distance = (localRoot.Position - rootPart.Position).Magnitude
                        
                        if distance <= BH_DrawSettings.maxLineDistance then
                            if not BH_DrawObjects[model] then
                                BH_DrawObjects[model] = {}
                            end
                            
                            if not BH_DrawObjects[model].line then
                                BH_DrawObjects[model].line = BH_CreateLineConnection(localCharacter, model, Color3.new(1, 0, 0))
                                BH_DrawObjects[model].lineInfo = BH_CreateLineInfo(model, distance, true)
                            else
                                if BH_DrawObjects[model].lineInfo then
                                    BH_DrawObjects[model].lineInfo.distanceLabel.Text = string.format("距离: %d", math.floor(distance))
                                end
                            end
                        else
                            if BH_DrawObjects[model] and BH_DrawObjects[model].line then
                                BH_DrawObjects[model].line.beam:Destroy()
                                BH_DrawObjects[model].line.attachment0:Destroy()
                                BH_DrawObjects[model].line.attachment1:Destroy()
                                if BH_DrawObjects[model].lineInfo then
                                    BH_DrawObjects[model].lineInfo.billboard:Destroy()
                                end
                                BH_DrawObjects[model].line = nil
                                BH_DrawObjects[model].lineInfo = nil
                            end
                        end
                    else
                        if BH_DrawObjects[model] and BH_DrawObjects[model].line then
                            BH_DrawObjects[model].line.beam:Destroy()
                            BH_DrawObjects[model].line.attachment0:Destroy()
                            BH_DrawObjects[model].line.attachment1:Destroy()
                            if BH_DrawObjects[model].lineInfo then
                                BH_DrawObjects[model].lineInfo.billboard:Destroy()
                            end
                            BH_DrawObjects[model].line = nil
                            BH_DrawObjects[model].lineInfo = nil
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    end
    
    local function BH_UpdateDrawings()
        if not BH_DrawSettings.enabled or not BH_IsDrawRunning then return end
        
        local localPlayer = game.Players.LocalPlayer
        local localCharacter = localPlayer.Character
        local localRoot = localCharacter and localCharacter:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
        
        if not localRoot then return end
        
        BH_UpdateLineStats()
        
        if BH_DrawSettings.players then
            for _, player in ipairs(game.Players:GetPlayers()) do
                if player ~= localPlayer and BH_ShouldDrawPlayer(player) then
                    local character = player.Character
                    
                    if character and character:FindFirstChild("Humanoid") then
                        local humanoid = character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
                        local rootPart = character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
                        
                        if humanoid and rootPart and humanoid.Health > 0 then
                            local distance = (localRoot.Position - rootPart.Position).Magnitude
                            
                            if not BH_DrawObjects[player] then
                                BH_DrawObjects[player] = {}
                            end
                            
                            if BH_DrawSettings.showBoxes then
                                if not BH_DrawObjects[player].box then
                                    BH_DrawObjects[player].box = BH_CreateCharacterBox(character)
                                end
                                
                                local box = BH_DrawObjects[player].box
                                if box then
                                    box.Visible = true
                                    
                                    if BH_DrawSettings.teamColor and player.Team then
                                        box.Color3 = player.Team.TeamColor.Color
                                    else
                                        box.Color3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 255, 0)
                                    end
                                end
                            else
                                if BH_DrawObjects[player].box then
                                    BH_DrawObjects[player].box.Visible = false
                                end
                            end
                            
                            if BH_DrawSettings.boxes then
                                if not BH_DrawObjects[player].highlight then
                                    BH_DrawObjects[player].highlight = BH_CreateHighlight(character)
                                end
                                
                                local highlight = BH_DrawObjects[player].highlight
                                if highlight then
                                    highlight.Enabled = true
                                    
                                    if BH_DrawSettings.teamColor and player.Team then
                                        highlight.FillColor = player.Team.TeamColor.Color
                                    else
                                        highlight.FillColor = Color3.fromRGB(0, 255, 0)
                                    end
                                end
                            else
                                if BH_DrawObjects[player].highlight then
                                    BH_DrawObjects[player].highlight.Enabled = false
                                end
                            end
                            
                            if BH_DrawSettings.names or BH_DrawSettings.distances then
                                if not BH_DrawObjects[player].nameTag then
                                    BH_DrawObjects[player].nameTag = BH_CreateNameTag(player, character)
                                end
                                
                                local nameTag = BH_DrawObjects[player].nameTag
                                if nameTag then
                                    nameTag.billboard.Enabled = true
                                    
                                    if BH_DrawSettings.names then
                                        nameTag.nameLabel.Visible = true
                                        if BH_DrawSettings.teamColor and player.Team then
                                            nameTag.nameLabel.TextColor3 = player.Team.TeamColor.Color
                                        else
                                            nameTag.nameLabel.TextColor3 = Color3.new(1, 1, 1)
                                        end
                                    else
                                        nameTag.nameLabel.Visible = false
                                    end
                                    
                                    if BH_DrawSettings.distances then
                                        nameTag.distanceLabel.Visible = true
                                        nameTag.distanceLabel.Text = string.format("[%d]", math.floor(distance))
                                    else
                                        nameTag.distanceLabel.Visible = false
                                    end
                                end
                            else
                                if BH_DrawObjects[player].nameTag then
                                    BH_DrawObjects[player].nameTag.billboard.Enabled = false
                                end
                            end
                            
                            if BH_DrawSettings.healthbars then
                                if not BH_DrawObjects[player].healthBar then
                                    BH_DrawObjects[player].healthBar = BH_CreateHealthBar(character)
                                end
                                
                                local healthBar = BH_DrawObjects[player].healthBar
                                if healthBar then
                                    healthBar.billboard.Enabled = true
                                    
                                    local healthPercent = humanoid.Health / humanoid.MaxHealth
                                    healthBar.healthBar.Size = UDim2.new(healthPercent, 0, 1, 0)
                                    
                                    if healthPercent > 0.5 then
                                        healthBar.healthBar.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(0, 1, 0)
                                    elseif healthPercent > 0.25 then
                                        healthBar.healthBar.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(1, 1, 0)
                                    else
                                        healthBar.healthBar.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(1, 0, 0)
                                    end
                                end
                            else
                                if BH_DrawObjects[player].healthBar then
                                    BH_DrawObjects[player].healthBar.billboard.Enabled = false
                                end
                            end
                            
                            if BH_DrawSettings.showTools then
                                if not BH_DrawObjects[player].toolDisplay then
                                    BH_DrawObjects[player].toolDisplay = BH_CreateToolDisplay(character)
                                end
                                
                                local toolDisplay = BH_DrawObjects[player].toolDisplay
                                if toolDisplay then
                                    local equippedTool = BH_GetEquippedTool(character)
                                    if equippedTool then
                                        toolDisplay.billboard.Enabled = true
                                        toolDisplay.toolImage.Image = equippedTool.TextureId or "rbxasset://textures/ui/Toolbox/Toolbox_Icon.png"
                                        toolDisplay.toolImage.Visible = true
                                    else
                                        toolDisplay.billboard.Enabled = false
                                        toolDisplay.toolImage.Visible = false
                                    end
                                end
                            else
                                if BH_DrawObjects[player].toolDisplay then
                                    BH_DrawObjects[player].toolDisplay.billboard.Enabled = false
                                end
                            end
                            
                            if BH_DrawSettings.showBackpack then
                                if not BH_DrawObjects[player].backpackDisplay then
                                    BH_DrawObjects[player].backpackDisplay = BH_CreateBackpackDisplay(character)
                                end
                                
                                local backpackDisplay = BH_DrawObjects[player].backpackDisplay
                                if backpackDisplay then
                                    backpackDisplay.billboard.Enabled = true
                                    
                                    for _, child in ipairs(backpackDisplay.container:GetChildren()) do
                                        if child:IsA("ImageLabel") then
                                            child:Destroy()
                                        end
                                    end
                                    
                                    local backpackIcons = BH_GetPlayerBackpackIcons(player)
                                    for i, icon in ipairs(backpackIcons) do
                                        if i <= 3 then
                                            local imageLabel = Instance.new("ImageLabel")
                                            imageLabel.Size = UDim2.new(0, 20, 0, 20)
                                            imageLabel.BackgroundTransparency = 1
                                            imageLabel.Image = icon
                                            imageLabel.Parent = backpackDisplay.container
                                        end
                                    end
                                end
                            else
                                if BH_DrawObjects[player].backpackDisplay then
                                    BH_DrawObjects[player].backpackDisplay.billboard.Enabled = false
                                end
                            end
                        else
                            if BH_DrawObjects[player] then
                                if BH_DrawObjects[player].box then
                                    BH_DrawObjects[player].box.Visible = false
                                end
                                if BH_DrawObjects[player].highlight then
                                    BH_DrawObjects[player].highlight.Enabled = false
                                end
                                if BH_DrawObjects[player].nameTag then
                                    BH_DrawObjects[player].nameTag.billboard.Enabled = false
                                end
                                if BH_DrawObjects[player].healthBar then
                                    BH_DrawObjects[player].healthBar.billboard.Enabled = false
                                end
                                if BH_DrawObjects[player].toolDisplay then
                                    BH_DrawObjects[player].toolDisplay.billboard.Enabled = false
                                end
                                if BH_DrawObjects[player].backpackDisplay then
                                    BH_DrawObjects[player].backpackDisplay.billboard.Enabled = false
                                end
                            end
                        end
                    else
                        if BH_DrawObjects[player] then
                            if BH_DrawObjects[player].box then
                                BH_DrawObjects[player].box:Destroy()
                            end
                            if BH_DrawObjects[player].highlight then
                                BH_DrawObjects[player].highlight:Destroy()
                            end
                            if BH_DrawObjects[player].nameTag then
                                BH_DrawObjects[player].nameTag.billboard:Destroy()
                            end
                            if BH_DrawObjects[player].healthBar then
                                BH_DrawObjects[player].healthBar.billboard:Destroy()
                            end
                            if BH_DrawObjects[player].toolDisplay then
                                BH_DrawObjects[player].toolDisplay.billboard:Destroy()
                            end
                            if BH_DrawObjects[player].backpackDisplay then
                                BH_DrawObjects[player].backpackDisplay.billboard:Destroy()
                            end
                            BH_DrawObjects[player] = nil
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
        end
        
        if BH_DrawSettings.npcs then
            for _, model in ipairs(workspace:GetDescendants()) do
                if BH_IsNPC(model) then
                    local humanoid = model:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
                    local rootPart = model:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
                    
                    if humanoid and rootPart and humanoid.Health > 0 then
                        local distance = (localRoot.Position - rootPart.Position).Magnitude
                        
                        if not BH_DrawObjects[model] then
                            BH_DrawObjects[model] = {}
                        end
                        
                        if BH_DrawSettings.showBoxes then
                            if not BH_DrawObjects[model].box then
                                BH_DrawObjects[model].box = BH_CreateNPCBox(model)
                            end
                            BH_DrawObjects[model].box.Visible = true
                        else
                            if BH_DrawObjects[model].box then
                                BH_DrawObjects[model].box.Visible = false
                            end
                        end
                        
                        if BH_DrawSettings.boxes then
                            if not BH_DrawObjects[model].highlight then
                                BH_DrawObjects[model].highlight = BH_CreateHighlight(model)
                                BH_DrawObjects[model].highlight.FillColor = Color3.new(1, 0, 0)
                            end
                            BH_DrawObjects[model].highlight.Enabled = true
                        else
                            if BH_DrawObjects[model].highlight then
                                BH_DrawObjects[model].highlight.Enabled = false
                            end
                        end
                        
                        if BH_DrawSettings.names or BH_DrawSettings.distances then
                            if not BH_DrawObjects[model].nameTag then
                                BH_DrawObjects[model].nameTag = BH_CreateNPCNameTag(model.Name, model)
                            end
                            
                            local nameTag = BH_DrawObjects[model].nameTag
                            if nameTag then
                                nameTag.billboard.Enabled = true
                                
                                if BH_DrawSettings.names then
                                    nameTag.nameLabel.Visible = true
                                    nameTag.nameLabel.TextColor3 = Color3.new(1, 0, 0)
                                else
                                    nameTag.nameLabel.Visible = false
                                end
                                
                                if BH_DrawSettings.distances then
                                    nameTag.distanceLabel.Visible = true
                                    nameTag.distanceLabel.Text = string.format("[%d]", math.floor(distance))
                                else
                                    nameTag.distanceLabel.Visible = false
                                end
                            end
                        else
                            if BH_DrawObjects[model].nameTag then
                                BH_DrawObjects[model].nameTag.billboard.Enabled = false
                            end
                        end
                        
                        if BH_DrawSettings.healthbars then
                            if not BH_DrawObjects[model].healthBar then
                                BH_DrawObjects[model].healthBar = BH_CreateHealthBar(model)
                            end
                            
                            local healthBar = BH_DrawObjects[model].healthBar
                            if healthBar then
                                healthBar.billboard.Enabled = true
                                
                                local healthPercent = humanoid.Health / humanoid.MaxHealth
                                healthBar.healthBar.Size = UDim2.new(healthPercent, 0, 1, 0)
                                
                                if healthPercent > 0.5 then
                                    healthBar.healthBar.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(0, 1, 0)
                                elseif healthPercent > 0.25 then
                                    healthBar.healthBar.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(1, 1, 0)
                                else
                                    healthBar.healthBar.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(1, 0, 0)
                                end
                            end
                        else
                            if BH_DrawObjects[model].healthBar then
                                BH_DrawObjects[model].healthBar.billboard.Enabled = false
                            end
                        end
                    else
                        if BH_DrawObjects[model] then
                            if BH_DrawObjects[model].box then
                                BH_DrawObjects[model].box.Visible = false
                            end
                            if BH_DrawObjects[model].highlight then
                                BH_DrawObjects[model].highlight.Enabled = false
                            end
                            if BH_DrawObjects[model].nameTag then
                                BH_DrawObjects[model].nameTag.billboard.Enabled = false
                            end
                            if BH_DrawObjects[model].healthBar then
                                BH_DrawObjects[model].healthBar.billboard.Enabled = false
                            end
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    end
    
    local function BH_ClearDrawings()
        for key, objects in pairs(BH_DrawObjects) do
            if objects.box then
                objects.box:Destroy()
            end
            if objects.highlight then
                objects.highlight:Destroy()
            end
            if objects.nameTag then
                objects.nameTag.billboard:Destroy()
            end
            if objects.healthBar then
                objects.healthBar.billboard:Destroy()
            end
            if objects.toolDisplay then
                objects.toolDisplay.billboard:Destroy()
            end
            if objects.backpackDisplay then
                objects.backpackDisplay.billboard:Destroy()
            end
            if objects.line then
                objects.line.beam:Destroy()
                objects.line.attachment0:Destroy()
                objects.line.attachment1:Destroy()
            end
            if objects.lineInfo then
                objects.lineInfo.billboard:Destroy()
            end
        end
        BH_DrawObjects = {}
        
        for _, connection in pairs(BH_DrawConnections) do
            if connection then
                connection:Disconnect()
            end
        end
        BH_DrawConnections = {}
    end

            BH_UpdateDrawings()
        end

    -- 监听玩家离开
    BH_DrawConnections.playerRemoving = game.Players.PlayerRemoving:Connect(function(player)
        if BH_DrawObjects[player] then
            if BH_DrawObjects[player].box then
                BH_DrawObjects[player].box:Destroy()
            end
            if BH_DrawObjects[player].highlight then

            end

                BH_DrawObjects[player].nameTag.billboard:Destroy()
            end
            if BH_DrawObjects[player].healthBar then
                BH_DrawObjects[player].healthBar.billboard:Destroy()
            end
            if BH_DrawObjects[player].toolDisplay then
                BH_DrawObjects[player].toolDisplay.billboard:Destroy()
            end
            if BH_DrawObjects[player].backpackDisplay then
