        if vflyBG then vflyBG:Destroy() vflyBG=nil end
    end

    local function startCfly(speed)
        local char = LocalPlayer.Character or LocalPlayer.CharacterAdded:Wait()
        local root = getRoot(char) if not root then return end
        CFLYING = true
        
        updateAnimationState(false)
        
        local cam = camera
        cflyConn = RunService.Heartbeat:Connect(function()
            if not CFLYING or not root.Parent then 
                stopAllAnimations()
                return 
            end
            
            local dir = Vector3.zero
            local hasInput = false
            
            if UserInputService:IsKeyDown(Enum.KeyCode.W) then 
                dir = dir + cam.CFrame.LookVector 
                hasInput = true
            end
            if UserInputService:IsKeyDown(Enum.KeyCode.S) then 
                dir = dir - cam.CFrame.LookVector 
                hasInput = true
            end
            if UserInputService:IsKeyDown(Enum.KeyCode.A) then 
                dir = dir - cam.CFrame.RightVector 
                hasInput = true
            end
            if UserInputService:IsKeyDown(Enum.KeyCode.D) then 
                dir = dir + cam.CFrame.RightVector 
                hasInput = true
            end
            if UserInputService:IsKeyDown(Enum.KeyCode.Space) then 
                dir = dir + Vector3.yAxis 
                hasInput = true
            end
            if UserInputService:IsKeyDown(Enum.KeyCode.LeftControl) then 
                dir = dir - Vector3.yAxis 
                hasInput = true
            end
            
            if hasInput then
                updateAnimationState(true)
            else
                updateAnimationState(false)
            end
            
            if dir.Magnitude>0 then
                dir = dir.Unit*speed*0.25
                root.CFrame = root.CFrame + Vector3.new(dir.X,dir.Y,dir.Z)
            end
        end)
    end
    local function stopCfly()
        CFLYING = false
        if cflyConn then cflyConn:Disconnect() cflyConn=nil end
        stopAllAnimations()
    end

    local function startFreecam()
        if freecamObj then freecamObj:Destroy() end
        local cam = camera
        local oldCamType = cam.CameraType
        cam.CameraType = Enum.CameraType.Scriptable
        local root = getRoot(LocalPlayer.Character) or Vector3.zero

        local part = Instance.new'Part'
        part.Anchored,part.CanCollide,part.Transparency = true,false,1
        part.Size = Vector3.one
        part.CFrame = CFrame.new(cam.CFrame.Position)
        part.Parent = workspace

        local gyro = Instance.new'BodyGyro'
        gyro.MaxTorque = Vector3.new(1e9,1e9,1e9)
        gyro.P = 1000
        gyro.D = 100
        gyro.Parent = part

        local velocity = Instance.new'BodyVelocity'
        velocity.MaxForce = Vector3.new(1e9,1e9,1e9)
        velocity.Velocity = Vector3.zero
        velocity.Parent = part

        freecamObj = {part=part,gyro=gyro,velocity=velocity,oldCamType=oldCamType}

        local spd = 50
        local conn
        conn = RunService.RenderStepped:Connect(function()
            if not freecamObj then conn:Disconnect() return end
            cam.CFrame = part.CFrame
            local dir = Vector3.zero
            if UserInputService:IsKeyDown(Enum.KeyCode.W) then dir = dir + cam.CFrame.LookVector end
            if UserInputService:IsKeyDown(Enum.KeyCode.S) then dir = dir - cam.CFrame.LookVector end
            if UserInputService:IsKeyDown(Enum.KeyCode.A) then dir = dir - cam.CFrame.RightVector end
            if UserInputService:IsKeyDown(Enum.KeyCode.D) then dir = dir + cam.CFrame.RightVector end
            if UserInputService:IsKeyDown(Enum.KeyCode.Space) then dir = dir + Vector3.yAxis end
            if UserInputService:IsKeyDown(Enum.KeyCode.LeftControl) then dir = dir - Vector3.yAxis end
            if dir.Magnitude>0 then dir = dir.Unit*spd end
            velocity.Velocity = dir
            gyro.CFrame = CFrame.new(part.Position,part.Position+cam.CFrame.LookVector)
        end)
    end
    local function stopFreecam()
        if freecamObj then
            camera.CameraType = freecamObj.oldCamType
            freecamObj.part:Destroy()
            freecamObj = nil
        end
    end

    local function setNoclip(on)
        NOCLIP = on
        if flyClipConn then flyClipConn:Disconnect() end
        if on then
            flyClipConn = RunService.Stepped:Connect(function()
                if not NOCLIP then return end
                local char = LocalPlayer.Character if not char then return end
                for _,p in pairs(char:GetDescendants()) do
                    if p:IsA'BasePart' then p.CanCollide = false end
                end
            end)
        end
    end

    local function removeCmd(name)
        for i=#Library.Commands,1,-1 do
            if Library.Commands[i].NAME:lower()==name:lower() then
                table.remove(Library.Commands,i)
            end
        end
        for _,v in pairs(Library.MainFrame.CMDsF:GetChildren()) do
            if v:IsA'TextButton' and v.Text:lower()==name:lower() then v:Destroy() end
        end
    end

    local Tab = Window:Tab("飞行", '126985561580989')
task.wait(0.1)
    local flySec = Tab:section("飞行", true)
    flySec:Label("需要键盘才能使用")
    flySec:Toggle("Fly(可以飞车)", "iyFlyToggle", false, function(s)
        if s then startFly(iyflyspeed) else stopFly() end
    end)
    flySec:Textbox("Fly速度设置", "iyFlySpeedBox", "50", function(v)
        iyflyspeed = tonumber(v) or 50
    end)
    
    flySec:Textbox("移动时动画ID", "movingFlyAnimIdBox", "", function(v)
        movingAnimationId = v
        if v == "" then
            notify("飞行动作", "已清除移动时动画ID")
        else
            notify("飞行动作", "已设置移动时动画ID: " .. v)
        end
    end)
    
    flySec:Textbox("停止时动画ID", "idleFlyAnimIdBox", "", function(v)
        idleAnimationId = v
        if v == "" then
            notify("飞行动作", "已清除停止时动画ID")
        else
            notify("飞行动作", "已设置停止时动画ID: " .. v)
        end
    end)
    
    flySec:Label("输入Roblox动画ID，留空则不播放动画")
    flySec:Label("动画会在飞行时根据移动状态自动切换")

    local cflySec = Tab:section("CFrame 飞行(防检测)", true)
    cflySec:Toggle("CFly", "iyCflyToggle", false, function(s)
        if s then startCfly(cflyspeed) else stopCfly() end
    end)
    cflySec:Textbox("CflySpeed", "iyCflySpeedBox", "50", function(v) cflyspeed = tonumber(v) or 50 end)

    local otherSec = Tab:section("其他", true)
    otherSec:Toggle("飞行自动Noclip", "iyFlyNoclip", false, function(s) setNoclip(s) end)
end

local OrientationTab = Window:Tab("角色朝向", '115123411028382')
task.wait(0.1)
local OrientationSection = OrientationTab:section("角色朝向控制", true)

local playerList = {}
for _, player in ipairs(game.Players:GetPlayers()) do
    if player ~= game.Players.LocalPlayer then
        table.insert(playerList, player.Name)
    end
end

local playerDropdown = OrientationSection:Dropdown("选择玩家", "PlayerOrientation", playerList, function(Value)
    _G.OrientationTargetPlayer = Value
end)

_G.CreateHeartbeatConnection(function()
    local newPlayerList = {}
    for _, player in ipairs(game.Players:GetPlayers()) do
        if player ~= game.Players.LocalPlayer then
            table.insert(newPlayerList, player.Name)
        end
    end
    
    if #newPlayerList ~= #playerList then
        playerList = newPlayerList
        playerDropdown:SetOptions(playerList)
    end
end)

OrientationSection:Toggle("朝向指定玩家", "FaceSpecificPlayer", false, function(Value)
    _G.FaceSpecificPlayer = Value
    
    if Value then
        _G.SpecificPlayerLoop = _G.CreateHeartbeatConnection(function()
            if not _G.OrientationTargetPlayer then return end
            
            for _, player in ipairs(game.Players:GetPlayers()) do
                if player.Name == _G.OrientationTargetPlayer and player.Character then
                    local localCharacter = game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character
                    if localCharacter then
                        local localRoot = localCharacter:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
                        local targetRoot = player.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
                        if localRoot and targetRoot then
                            local lookVector = (targetRoot.Position - localRoot.Position).Unit
                            local newCFrame = CFrame.new(localRoot.Position, localRoot.Position + Vector3.new(lookVector.X, 0, lookVector.Z))
                            localRoot.CFrame = newCFrame
                        end
                    end
                    break
                end
            end
        end)
    else
        if _G.SpecificPlayerLoop then
            _G.SpecificPlayerLoop:Disconnect()
            _G.SpecificPlayerLoop = nil
        end
    end
end)

OrientationSection:Toggle("自动朝向最近玩家", "AutoFaceNearestPlayer", false, function(Value)
    if _G.OrientationLoop then
        _G.OrientationLoop:Disconnect()
        _G.OrientationLoop = nil
    end
    
    _G.AutoFaceNearestPlayer = Value
    
    if Value then
        _G.OrientationLoop = _G.CreateHeartbeatConnection(function()
            local localPlayer = game.Players.LocalPlayer
            local localCharacter = localPlayer.Character
            if not localCharacter then return end
            
            local localRoot = localCharacter:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
            if not localRoot then return end
            
            local nearestPlayer = nil
            local nearestDistance = math.huge
            
            for _, player in ipairs(game.Players:GetPlayers()) do
                if player ~= localPlayer and player.Character then
                    local character = player.Character
                    local rootPart = character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
                    
                    if rootPart then
                        local shouldIgnore = false
                        
                        if _G.IgnoreFriends then
                            local success, result = pcall(function()
                                return localPlayer:IsFriendsWith(player.UserId)
                            end)
                            if success and result then
                                shouldIgnore = true
                            end
                        end
                        
                        if _G.IgnoreTeammates then
                            local localPlayerTeam = localPlayer.Team
                            local targetPlayerTeam = player.Team
                            if localPlayerTeam and targetPlayerTeam and localPlayerTeam == targetPlayerTeam then
                                shouldIgnore = true
                            end
                        end
                        
                        if not shouldIgnore then
                            local distance = (localRoot.Position - rootPart.Position).Magnitude
                            if distance < nearestDistance then
                                nearestDistance = distance
                                nearestPlayer = player
                            end
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
            
            if nearestPlayer and nearestPlayer.Character then
                local targetRoot = nearestPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
                if targetRoot then
                    local lookVector = (targetRoot.Position - localRoot.Position).Unit
                    local newCFrame = CFrame.new(localRoot.Position, localRoot.Position + Vector3.new(lookVector.X, 0, lookVector.Z))
                    localRoot.CFrame = newCFrame
                end
            end
        end)
    end
end)

OrientationSection:Toggle("自动朝向最近NPC", "AutoFaceNearestNPC", false, function(Value)
    if _G.OrientationLoop then
        _G.OrientationLoop:Disconnect()
        _G.OrientationLoop = nil
    end
    
    _G.AutoFaceNearestNPC = Value
    
    if Value then
        _G.OrientationLoop = _G.CreateHeartbeatConnection(function()
            local localPlayer = game.Players.LocalPlayer
            local localCharacter = localPlayer.Character
            if not localCharacter then return end
            
            local localRoot = localCharacter:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
            if not localRoot then return end
            
            local nearestNPC = nil
            local nearestDistance = math.huge
            
            for _, obj in pairs(workspace:GetDescendants()) do
                if obj:IsA("Model") and obj:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid") then
                    local isPlayer = game.Players:GetPlayerFromCharacter(obj)
                    if not isPlayer and obj.Name ~= localPlayer.Character.Name then
                        local rootPart = obj:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") or obj.PrimaryPart
                        if rootPart then
                            local distance = (localRoot.Position - rootPart.Position).Magnitude
                            if distance < nearestDistance then
                                nearestDistance = distance
                                nearestNPC = obj
                            end
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
            
            if nearestNPC then
                local targetRoot = nearestNPC:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") or nearestNPC.PrimaryPart
                if targetRoot then
                    local lookVector = (targetRoot.Position - localRoot.Position).Unit
                    local newCFrame = CFrame.new(localRoot.Position, localRoot.Position + Vector3.new(lookVector.X, 0, lookVector.Z))
                    localRoot.CFrame = newCFrame
                end
            end
        end)
    end
end)

OrientationSection:Toggle("自动朝向最近好友", "AutoFaceNearestFriend", false, function(Value)
    if _G.OrientationLoop then
        _G.OrientationLoop:Disconnect()
        _G.OrientationLoop = nil
    end
    
    _G.AutoFaceNearestFriend = Value
    
    if Value then
        _G.OrientationLoop = _G.CreateHeartbeatConnection(function()
            local localPlayer = game.Players.LocalPlayer
            local localCharacter = localPlayer.Character
            if not localCharacter then return end
            
            local localRoot = localCharacter:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
            if not localRoot then return end
            
            local nearestFriend = nil
            local nearestDistance = math.huge
            
            for _, player in ipairs(game.Players:GetPlayers()) do
                if player ~= localPlayer and player.Character then
                    local success, result = pcall(function()
                        return localPlayer:IsFriendsWith(player.UserId)
                    end)
                    
                    if success and result then
                        local character = player.Character
                        local rootPart = character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
                        
                        if rootPart then
                            local distance = (localRoot.Position - rootPart.Position).Magnitude
                            if distance < nearestDistance then
                                nearestDistance = distance
                                nearestFriend = player
                            end
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
            
            if nearestFriend and nearestFriend.Character then
                local targetRoot = nearestFriend.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
                if targetRoot then
                    local lookVector = (targetRoot.Position - localRoot.Position).Unit
                    local newCFrame = CFrame.new(localRoot.Position, localRoot.Position + Vector3.new(lookVector.X, 0, lookVector.Z))
                    localRoot.CFrame = newCFrame
                end
            end
        end)
    end
end)

OrientationSection:Toggle("不朝向好友", "IgnoreFriends", false, function(Value)
    _G.IgnoreFriends = Value
end)

OrientationSection:Toggle("不朝向队友", "IgnoreTeammates", false, function(Value)
    _G.IgnoreTeammates = Value
end)

OrientationSection:Button("停止所有朝向", function()
    if _G.OrientationLoop then
        _G.OrientationLoop:Disconnect()
        _G.OrientationLoop = nil
    end
    if _G.SpecificPlayerLoop then
        _G.SpecificPlayerLoop:Disconnect()
        _G.SpecificPlayerLoop = nil
    end
    
    _G.FaceSpecificPlayer = false
    _G.AutoFaceNearestPlayer = false
    _G.AutoFaceNearestNPC = false
    _G.AutoFaceNearestFriend = false
end)

OrientationSection:Button("重置朝向", function()
    local localPlayer = game.Players.LocalPlayer
    local localCharacter = localPlayer.Character
    if localCharacter then
        local localRoot = localCharacter:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
        if localRoot then
            localRoot.CFrame = CFrame.new(localRoot.Position, localRoot.Position + Vector3.new(0, 0, -1))
        end
    end
end)

game.Players.LocalPlayer.CharacterAdded:Connect(function()
    if _G.OrientationLoop then
        _G.OrientationLoop:Disconnect()
        _G.OrientationLoop = nil
    end
    if _G.SpecificPlayerLoop then
        _G.SpecificPlayerLoop:Disconnect()
        _G.SpecificPlayerLoop = nil
    end
end)

local CoordinateSystem = {}

function CoordinateSystem.init()
    CoordinateSystem.config = {
        saveFile = "tubers93脚本/坐标保存.txt"
    }
    
    CoordinateSystem.state = {
        SavedCoordinates = {},
        CurrentCoordinate = nil,
        LoopTeleportEnabled = false,
        LoopTeleportThread = nil,
        LoopTeleportInputEnabled = false,
        LoopTeleportInputThread = nil
    }
    
    if not isfolder("tubers93脚本") then
        makefolder("tubers93脚本")
    end
    
    if isfile(CoordinateSystem.config.saveFile) then
        local success, data = pcall(function()
            return game:GetService("HttpService"):JSONDecode(readfile(CoordinateSystem.config.saveFile))
        end)
        if success and data then
            CoordinateSystem.state.SavedCoordinates = data
        end
    end
    
    if not _G.SavedCoordinates then
        _G.SavedCoordinates = {}
    end
    _G.SavedCoordinates = CoordinateSystem.state.SavedCoordinates
end

function CoordinateSystem.saveCoordinatesToFile()
    pcall(function()
        writefile(CoordinateSystem.config.saveFile, game:GetService("HttpService"):JSONEncode(CoordinateSystem.state.SavedCoordinates))
    end)
end

function CoordinateSystem.updateCoordinateDropdown()
    local coordinateNames = {"暂无坐标"}
    for name, _ in pairs(CoordinateSystem.state.SavedCoordinates or {}) do
        table.insert(coordinateNames, name)
    end
    if CoordinateSystem.coordinateDropdown then
        CoordinateSystem.coordinateDropdown:SetOptions(coordinateNames)
    end
end

function CoordinateSystem.setCurrentCoordinate()
    local character = game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character
    if character and character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
        local position = character.HumanoidRootPart.Position
        local coordinateName = "坐标_" .. os.date("%H:%M:%S")
        
        CoordinateSystem.state.SavedCoordinates[coordinateName] = {
            name = coordinateName,
            position = {X = position.X, Y = position.Y, Z = position.Z},
            timestamp = os.time()
        }
        
        CoordinateSystem.updateCoordinateDropdown()
        CoordinateSystem.state.CurrentCoordinate = CoordinateSystem.state.SavedCoordinates[coordinateName]
        CoordinateSystem.saveCoordinatesToFile()
    end
end

function CoordinateSystem.setCustomCoordinate(name)
    if name and name ~= "" then
        local character = game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character
        if character and character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
            local position = character.HumanoidRootPart.Position
            
            CoordinateSystem.state.SavedCoordinates[name] = {
                name = name,
                position = {X = position.X, Y = position.Y, Z = position.Z},
                timestamp = os.time()
            }
            
            CoordinateSystem.updateCoordinateDropdown()
            CoordinateSystem.state.CurrentCoordinate = CoordinateSystem.state.SavedCoordinates[name]
            CoordinateSystem.saveCoordinatesToFile()
        end
    end
end

function CoordinateSystem.teleportToCoordinate()
    if CoordinateSystem.state.CurrentCoordinate then
        local character = game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character
        if character and character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
            local coord = CoordinateSystem.state.CurrentCoordinate.position
            character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(coord.X, coord.Y, coord.Z)
        end
    end
end

function CoordinateSystem.toggleLoopTeleport(state)
    CoordinateSystem.state.LoopTeleportEnabled = state
    
    if state then
        if not CoordinateSystem.state.CurrentCoordinate then
            CoordinateSystem.state.LoopTeleportEnabled = false
            return
        end
        
        CoordinateSystem.state.LoopTeleportThread = task.spawn(function()
            while CoordinateSystem.state.LoopTeleportEnabled do
                local character = game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character
                if character and character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                    local coord = CoordinateSystem.state.CurrentCoordinate.position
                    character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(coord.X, coord.Y, coord.Z)
                end
                task.wait(0.1)
            end
        end)
    else
        if CoordinateSystem.state.LoopTeleportThread then
            task.cancel(CoordinateSystem.state.LoopTeleportThread)
            CoordinateSystem.state.LoopTeleportThread = nil
        end
    end
end

function CoordinateSystem.saveAllCoordinates()
    if next(CoordinateSystem.state.SavedCoordinates or {}) == nil then
        return
    end
    
    local coordinateData = "保存的坐标列表:\n\n"
    for name, coord in pairs(CoordinateSystem.state.SavedCoordinates) do
        coordinateData = coordinateData .. string.format("坐标名称: %s\n位置: X=%.2f, Y=%.2f, Z=%.2f\n保存时间: %s\n\n", 
            coord.name, coord.position.X, coord.position.Y, coord.position.Z, 
            os.date("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S", coord.timestamp))
    end
    
    pcall(function()
        writefile("坐标保存列表.txt", coordinateData)
    end)
    setclipboard(coordinateData)
end

function CoordinateSystem.deleteSelectedCoordinate()
    if CoordinateSystem.state.CurrentCoordinate then
        local coordinateName = CoordinateSystem.state.CurrentCoordinate.name
        CoordinateSystem.state.SavedCoordinates[coordinateName] = nil
        CoordinateSystem.state.CurrentCoordinate = nil
        CoordinateSystem.updateCoordinateDropdown()
        CoordinateSystem.saveCoordinatesToFile()
    end
end

function CoordinateSystem.deleteAllCoordinates()
    if next(CoordinateSystem.state.SavedCoordinates or {}) == nil then
        return
    end
    
    CoordinateSystem.state.SavedCoordinates = {}
    CoordinateSystem.state.CurrentCoordinate = nil
    CoordinateSystem.updateCoordinateDropdown()
    CoordinateSystem.saveCoordinatesToFile()
    
    if CoordinateSystem.state.LoopTeleportThread then
        task.cancel(CoordinateSystem.state.LoopTeleportThread)
        CoordinateSystem.state.LoopTeleportThread = nil
    end
    CoordinateSystem.state.LoopTeleportEnabled = false
end

function CoordinateSystem.copyCurrentCoordinate()
    local character = game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character
    if character and character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
        local position = character.HumanoidRootPart.Position
        local coordText = "Vector3.new(" .. math.floor(position.X) .. ", " .. math.floor(position.Y) .. ", " .. math.floor(position.Z) .. ")"
        setclipboard(coordText)
    end
end

function CoordinateSystem.parseCoordinateInput(input)
    if not input or input == "" then
        return nil
    end
    
    local x, y, z
    
    if input:match("Vector3%.new%(") then
        local pattern = "Vector3%.new%(([%d%.%-]+),%s*([%d%.%-]+),%s*([%d%.%-]+)%)"
        local match1, match2, match3 = input:match(pattern)
        if match1 and match2 and match3 then
            x = tonumber(match1)
            y = tonumber(match2)
            z = tonumber(match3)
        end
    else
        local numbers = {}
        for num in input:gmatch("[%d%.%-]+") do
            table.insert(numbers, tonumber(num))
        end
        if #numbers >= 3 then
            x, y, z = numbers[1], numbers[2], numbers[3]
        end
    end
    
    if x and y and z then
        return {X = x, Y = y, Z = z}
    end
    
    return nil
end

function CoordinateSystem.teleportToInput()
    local inputText = CoordinateSystem.coordinateInput:Get()
    if not inputText or inputText == "" then
        if CoordinateSystem.coordinateInputLabel then
            CoordinateSystem.coordinateInputLabel:Set("请输入坐标")
        end
        return
    end
    
    local position = CoordinateSystem.parseCoordinateInput(inputText)
    
    if position then
        local character = game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character
        if character and character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
            character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(position.X, position.Y, position.Z)
            if CoordinateSystem.coordinateInputLabel then
                CoordinateSystem.coordinateInputLabel:Set("传送成功!")
            end
        else
            if CoordinateSystem.coordinateInputLabel then
                CoordinateSystem.coordinateInputLabel:Set("角色未加载")
            end
        end
    else
        if CoordinateSystem.coordinateInputLabel then
            CoordinateSystem.coordinateInputLabel:Set("坐标格式错误")
        end
    end
end

function CoordinateSystem.toggleLoopTeleportInput(state)
    CoordinateSystem.state.LoopTeleportInputEnabled = state
    
    if state then
        CoordinateSystem.state.LoopTeleportInputThread = task.spawn(function()
            while CoordinateSystem.state.LoopTeleportInputEnabled do
                local inputText = CoordinateSystem.coordinateInput:Get()
                local position = CoordinateSystem.parseCoordinateInput(inputText)
                
                if position then
                    local character = game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character
                    if character and character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                        character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(position.X, position.Y, position.Z)
                    end
                end
                task.wait(0.1)
            end
        end)
    else
        if CoordinateSystem.state.LoopTeleportInputThread then
            task.cancel(CoordinateSystem.state.LoopTeleportInputThread)
            CoordinateSystem.state.LoopTeleportInputThread = nil
        end
    end
end

function CoordinateSystem.createUI(coordinateTab)
    local CoordinateSection1 = coordinateTab:section("坐标管理", true)

    CoordinateSystem.coordinateDropdown = CoordinateSection1:Dropdown("选择坐标", "CoordinateSelect", {"暂无坐标"}, function(Value)
        if Value ~= "暂无坐标" then
            CoordinateSystem.state.CurrentCoordinate = CoordinateSystem.state.SavedCoordinates[Value]
        end
    end)

    CoordinateSection1:Button("设置当前坐标", CoordinateSystem.setCurrentCoordinate)

    CoordinateSection1:Textbox("自定义坐标名称", "CustomCoordinateName", "输入坐标名称", function(Value)
        CoordinateSystem.setCustomCoordinate(Value)
    end)

    local CoordinateSection2 = coordinateTab:section("传送操作", true)

    CoordinateSection2:Button("传送至坐标", CoordinateSystem.teleportToCoordinate)

    CoordinateSection2:Toggle("循环传送坐标", "LoopTeleportCoordinate", false, function(State)
        CoordinateSystem.toggleLoopTeleport(State)
    end)

    local CoordinateSection3 = coordinateTab:section("坐标工具", true)

    CoordinateSection3:Button("保存所有坐标", CoordinateSystem.saveAllCoordinates)

    CoordinateSection3:Button("删除选中坐标", CoordinateSystem.deleteSelectedCoordinate)

    CoordinateSection3:Button("删除所有坐标", CoordinateSystem.deleteAllCoordinates)
end

function CoordinateSystem.setup(coordinateTab)
    CoordinateSystem.init()
    CoordinateSystem.createUI(coordinateTab)

    game.Players.LocalPlayer.CharacterAdded:Connect(function()
        if CoordinateSystem.state.LoopTeleportThread then
            task.cancel(CoordinateSystem.state.LoopTeleportThread)
            CoordinateSystem.state.LoopTeleportThread = nil
        end
        if CoordinateSystem.state.LoopTeleportInputThread then
            task.cancel(CoordinateSystem.state.LoopTeleportInputThread)
            CoordinateSystem.state.LoopTeleportInputThread = nil
        end
        CoordinateSystem.state.LoopTeleportEnabled = false
        CoordinateSystem.state.LoopTeleportInputEnabled = false
    end)

    CoordinateSystem.updateCoordinateDropdown()
end

do
    local CoordinateTab = Window:Tab("坐标系统", '122438676546804')
task.wait(0.1)
    CoordinateSystem.setup(CoordinateTab)
end

do
    local HitboxEnabled = false
    local HitboxSize = 25
    local HitboxTransparency = 0.7
    local HitboxColor = "Really red"
    local HitboxMaterial = "Neon"
    local HitboxCanCollide = false
    local HitboxShowOnlyEnemies = false
    local HitboxTeamCheck = true
    local HitboxRainbowEffect = false
    local HitboxPulseEffect = false
    local HitboxGlowEffect = false
    local HitboxOutline = true
    local HitboxAutoResize = false
    local HitboxResizeSpeed = 1
    local HitboxConnection = nil

    local HeadSizeEnabled = false
    local HeadSize = 10
    local HeadSizeTransparency = 0.7
    local HeadSizeColor = "Really red"
    local HeadSizeMaterial = "Neon"
    local HeadSizeCanCollide = false
    local HeadSizeRainbowEffect = false
    local HeadSizeGlowEffect = false
    local HeadSizeOutline = true
    local HeadSizePulseEffect = false
    local HeadSizeAutoResize = false
    local HeadSizeResizeSpeed = 1
    local OriginalHeadSizes = {}

    local colorOptions = {"Really red", "Bright red", "Neon orange", "Bright yellow", "Lime green", "Bright green", "Really blue", "Bright blue", "Royal purple", "Hot pink", "White", "Black"}
    local materialOptions = {"Neon", "Plastic", "Wood", "Slate", "Concrete", "CorrodedMetal", "DiamondPlate", "Foil", "Grass", "Ice", "Marble", "Granite", "Brick", "Pebble", "Sand", "Fabric", "SmoothPlastic", "Metal", "WoodPlanks", "Cobblestone"}

    local function shouldShowHitboxFunction(player)
        if player == game.Players.LocalPlayer then 
            return false 
        end
        if HitboxShowOnlyEnemies then
            local localPlayerTeam = game.Players.LocalPlayer.Team
            local playerTeam = player.Team
            if HitboxTeamCheck and localPlayerTeam and playerTeam and localPlayerTeam == playerTeam then 
                return false
            end
        end
        return true
    end

    local function getRainbowColorFunction()
        local hue = (tick() % 5) / 5
        return Color3.fromHSV(hue, 1, 1)
    end

    local function getPulseSizeFunction(baseSize, isHead)
        if isHead then
            if not HeadSizePulseEffect then 
                return baseSize
            end
            local pulse = math.sin(tick() * HeadSizeResizeSpeed * 2) * 0.2 + 1
            return baseSize * pulse
        else
            if not HitboxPulseEffect then 
                return baseSize
            end
            local pulse = math.sin(tick() * HitboxResizeSpeed * 2) * 0.2 + 1
            return baseSize * pulse
        end
    end

    local function applyHitboxEffectsFunction(part, isHead)
        local isRainbow = isHead and HeadSizeRainbowEffect or HitboxRainbowEffect
        local isGlow = isHead and HeadSizeGlowEffect or HitboxGlowEffect
        local isOutline = isHead and HeadSizeOutline or HitboxOutline
        local color = isHead and HeadSizeColor or HitboxColor
        
        if isRainbow then
            part.BrickColor = BrickColor.new("Bright red")
            part.Color = getRainbowColorFunction()
        else
            part.BrickColor = BrickColor.new(color)
        end
        
        if isGlow then
            local pointLight = part:FindFirstChildOfClass("PointLight") or Instance.new("PointLight")
            pointLight.Name = isHead and "HeadSizeLight_" .. tostring(tick()) or "HitboxLight_" .. tostring(tick())
            pointLight.Brightness = 2
            pointLight.Range = 10
            pointLight.Color = part.Color
            pointLight.Parent = part
        else
            for _, child in pairs(part:GetChildren()) do
                if (isHead and child.Name:find("HeadSizeLight")) or (not isHead and child.Name:find("HitboxLight")) then
                    child:Destroy()
                end
            end
        end
        
        if isOutline then
            local highlight = part:FindFirstChildOfClass("Highlight") or Instance.new("Highlight")
            highlight.Name = isHead and "HeadSizeHighlight_" .. tostring(tick()) or "HitboxHighlight_" .. tostring(tick())
            highlight.FillTransparency = 1
            highlight.OutlineColor = part.Color
            highlight.OutlineTransparency = 0
            highlight.Parent = part
        else
            for _, child in pairs(part:GetChildren()) do
                if (isHead and child.Name:find("HeadSizeHighlight")) or (not isHead and child.Name:find("HitboxHighlight")) then
                    child:Destroy()
                end
            end
        end
    end

    local function updateHitboxFunction()
        for _, player in pairs(game:GetService('Players'):GetPlayers()) do
            if player ~= game.Players.LocalPlayer and shouldShowHitboxFunction(player) and player.Character then
                if HitboxEnabled then
                    local humanoidRootPart = player.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
                    if humanoidRootPart then
                        pcall(function()
                            local currentSize = getPulseSizeFunction(HitboxSize, false)
                            if HitboxAutoResize then
                                currentSize = currentSize * (1 + math.sin(tick() * HitboxResizeSpeed) * 0.3)
                            end
                            humanoidRootPart.Size = Vector3.new(currentSize, currentSize, currentSize)
                            humanoidRootPart.Transparency = HitboxTransparency
                            humanoidRootPart.Material = Enum.Material[HitboxMaterial]
                            humanoidRootPart.CanCollide = HitboxCanCollide
                            applyHitboxEffectsFunction(humanoidRootPart, false)
                        end)
                    end
                end
                
                if HeadSizeEnabled then
                    local head = player.Character:FindFirstChild("Head")
                    if head and head:IsA("BasePart") then
                        pcall(function()
                            if not OriginalHeadSizes[player] then
                                OriginalHeadSizes[player] = head.Size
                            end
                            
                            local currentSize = getPulseSizeFunction(HeadSize, true)
                            if HeadSizeAutoResize then
                                currentSize = currentSize * (1 + math.sin(tick() * HeadSizeResizeSpeed) * 0.3)
                            end
                            
                            head.Size = Vector3.new(currentSize, currentSize, currentSize)
                            head.Transparency = HeadSizeTransparency
                            head.Material = Enum.Material[HeadSizeMaterial]
                            head.CanCollide = HeadSizeCanCollide
                            applyHitboxEffectsFunction(head, true)
                            
                            local neck = player.Character:FindFirstChild("Neck", true)
                            if neck and neck:IsA("Motor6D") then
                                neck.C0 = CFrame.new(0, 1, 0) * neck.C0.Rotation
                                neck.C1 = CFrame.new(0, -0.5, 0) * neck.C1.Rotation
                            end
                        end)
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    end

    local function startHitboxFunction()
        if HitboxConnection then 
            HitboxConnection:Disconnect() 
        end
        HitboxConnection = game:GetService('RunService').RenderStepped:Connect(updateHitboxFunction)
    end

    local function stopHitboxFunction()
        if HitboxConnection then
            HitboxConnection:Disconnect()
            HitboxConnection = nil
        end
        
        for _, player in pairs(game:GetService('Players'):GetPlayers()) do
            if player ~= game.Players.LocalPlayer then
                if player.Character then
                    local humanoidRootPart = player.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
                    if humanoidRootPart then
                        pcall(function()
                            humanoidRootPart.Size = Vector3.new(2, 2, 1)
                            humanoidRootPart.Transparency = 0
                            humanoidRootPart.BrickColor = BrickColor.new("Medium stone grey")
                            humanoidRootPart.Material = Enum.Material.Plastic
                            humanoidRootPart.CanCollide = true
                            for _, child in pairs(humanoidRootPart:GetChildren()) do
                                if child.Name:find("HitboxLight") or child.Name:find("HitboxHighlight") then
                                    child:Destroy()
                                end
                            end
                        end)
                    end
                    
                    local head = player.Character:FindFirstChild("Head")
                    if head then
                        pcall(function()
                            local originalSize = OriginalHeadSizes[player] or Vector3.new(1, 1, 1)
                            head.Size = originalSize
                            head.Transparency = 0
                            head.BrickColor = BrickColor.new("Medium stone grey")
                            head.Material = Enum.Material.Plastic
                            head.CanCollide = false
                            
                            for _, child in pairs(head:GetChildren()) do
                                if child.Name:find("HeadSizeLight") or child.Name:find("HeadSizeHighlight") then
                                    child:Destroy()
                                end
                            end
                        end)
                    end
                end
            end
        end
        
        OriginalHeadSizes = {}
    end

    local function resetHitboxSettingsFunction()
        HitboxSize = 25
        HitboxTransparency = 0.7
        HitboxColor = "Really red"
        HitboxMaterial = "Neon"
        HitboxCanCollide = false
        HitboxShowOnlyEnemies = false
        HitboxTeamCheck = true
        HitboxRainbowEffect = false
        HitboxPulseEffect = false
        HitboxGlowEffect = false
        HitboxOutline = true
        HitboxAutoResize = false
        HitboxResizeSpeed = 1
        
        HeadSizeEnabled = false
        HeadSize = 10
        HeadSizeTransparency = 0.7
        HeadSizeColor = "Really red"
        HeadSizeMaterial = "Neon"
        HeadSizeCanCollide = false
        HeadSizeRainbowEffect = false
        HeadSizeGlowEffect = false
        HeadSizeOutline = true
        HeadSizePulseEffect = false
        HeadSizeAutoResize = false
        HeadSizeResizeSpeed = 1
    end

    local ToolHitboxEnabled = false
    local ToolHitboxSize = 10
    local ToolHitboxColor = "Bright blue"
    local ToolHitboxMaterial = "Neon"
    local ToolHitboxCanCollide = false 
    local ToolHitboxConnection = nil
    local ToolHitboxShapes = {} 

    local function createSquareHitboxFunction(handle)
        if not ToolHitboxShapes[handle] then
            ToolHitboxShapes[handle] = {
                Size = handle.Size,
                Shape = handle.Shape,
                MeshId = handle:FindFirstChildOfClass("SpecialMesh") and handle:FindFirstChildOfClass("SpecialMesh").MeshId or nil
            }
        end
        
        handle.Size = Vector3.new(ToolHitboxSize, ToolHitboxSize, ToolHitboxSize)
        handle.Shape = Enum.PartType.Block 
        handle.Transparency = 0.5
        handle.BrickColor = BrickColor.new(ToolHitboxColor)
        handle.Material = Enum.Material[ToolHitboxMaterial]
        handle.CanCollide = ToolHitboxCanCollide
        
        local mesh = handle:FindFirstChildOfClass("SpecialMesh")
        if mesh then
            mesh.VertexColor = Vector3.new(1, 1, 1)
            mesh.TextureId = ""
        end
    end

    local function restoreOriginalShapeFunction(handle)
        if ToolHitboxShapes[handle] then
            pcall(function()
                handle.Size = ToolHitboxShapes[handle].Size
                handle.Shape = ToolHitboxShapes[handle].Shape
                handle.Transparency = 1
                handle.CanCollide = true
                
                local mesh = handle:FindFirstChildOfClass("SpecialMesh")
                if mesh and ToolHitboxShapes[handle].MeshId then
                    mesh.MeshId = ToolHitboxShapes[handle].MeshId
                end
            end)
            ToolHitboxShapes[handle] = nil
        else
            pcall(function()
                handle.Size = Vector3.new(1, 1, 1)
                handle.Transparency = 1
                handle.CanCollide = true
            end)
        end
    end

    local function updateToolHitboxFunction()
        local localPlayer = game.Players.LocalPlayer
        if not localPlayer then return end
        
        for _, tool in ipairs(localPlayer.Backpack:GetChildren()) do
            if tool:IsA("Tool") and tool:FindFirstChild("Handle") then
                pcall(function()
                    createSquareHitboxFunction(tool.Handle)
                end)
            end
        end
        
        local character = localPlayer.Character
        if character then
            for _, tool in ipairs(character:GetChildren()) do
                if tool:IsA("Tool") and tool:FindFirstChild("Handle") then
                    pcall(function()
                        createSquareHitboxFunction(tool.Handle)
                    end)
                end
            end
        end
    end

    local function startToolHitboxFunction()
        if ToolHitboxConnection then 
            ToolHitboxConnection:Disconnect() 
        end
        ToolHitboxConnection = game:GetService("RunService").RenderStepped:Connect(updateToolHitboxFunction)
    end

    local function stopToolHitboxFunction()
        if ToolHitboxConnection then
            ToolHitboxConnection:Disconnect()
            ToolHitboxConnection = nil
        end
        
        local localPlayer = game.Players.LocalPlayer
        if not localPlayer then return end
        
        for _, tool in ipairs(localPlayer.Backpack:GetChildren()) do
            if tool:IsA("Tool") and tool:FindFirstChild("Handle") then
                pcall(function()
                    restoreOriginalShapeFunction(tool.Handle)
                end)
            end
        end
        
        local character = localPlayer.Character
        if character then
            for _, tool in ipairs(character:GetChildren()) do
                if tool:IsA("Tool") and tool:FindFirstChild("Handle") then
                    pcall(function()
                        restoreOriginalShapeFunction(tool.Handle)
                    end)
                end
            end
        end
        
        ToolHitboxShapes = {}
    end

    if Window then
        local HitboxTab = Window:Tab("碰撞箱", '101102319625624')
        task.wait(0.1)
        
        local HitboxSection1 = HitboxTab:section("身体碰撞箱", true)
        HitboxSection1:Toggle("碰撞箱开关", "HitboxEnabled", false, function(Value)
            HitboxEnabled = Value
            if Value then 
                startHitboxFunction() 
            else 
                stopHitboxFunction() 
            end
        end)
        HitboxSection1:Textbox("碰撞箱大小", "HitboxSize", "25", function(Value)
            HitboxSize = tonumber(Value) or 25
        end)
        HitboxSection1:Textbox("透明度", "HitboxTransparency", "0.7", function(Value)
            local transparency = tonumber(Value)
            if transparency then 
                HitboxTransparency = transparency 
            end
        end)
        HitboxSection1:Dropdown("颜色", "HitboxColor", colorOptions, function(Value)
            HitboxColor = Value
        end)
        HitboxSection1:Dropdown("材质", "HitboxMaterial", materialOptions, function(Value)
            HitboxMaterial = Value
        end)
        HitboxSection1:Toggle("禁用碰撞", "HitboxNoCollide", false, function(Value)
            HitboxCanCollide = not Value
        end)
        
        local HitboxSection2 = HitboxTab:section("碰撞箱效果设置", true)
        HitboxSection2:Toggle("彩虹效果", "HitboxRainbow", false, function(Value)
            HitboxRainbowEffect = Value
        end)
        HitboxSection2:Toggle("脉动效果", "HitboxPulse", false, function(Value)
            HitboxPulseEffect = Value
        end)
        HitboxSection2:Toggle("发光效果", "HitboxGlow", false, function(Value)
            HitboxGlowEffect = Value
        end)
        HitboxSection2:Toggle("轮廓", "HitboxOutline", true, function(Value)
            HitboxOutline = Value
        end)
        HitboxSection2:Toggle("自动调整", "HitboxAutoResize", false, function(Value)
            HitboxAutoResize = Value
        end)
        HitboxSection2:Textbox("调整速度", "HitboxResizeSpeed", "1", function(Value)
            local speed = tonumber(Value)
            if speed then 
                HitboxResizeSpeed = speed 
            end
        end)
        
        local HeadSection = HitboxTab:section("头部大小和头部设置", true)
        HeadSection:Toggle("头部扩展开关", "HeadSizeEnabled", false, function(Value)
            HeadSizeEnabled = Value
            if not HitboxEnabled and Value then
                startHitboxFunction()
            elseif not HitboxEnabled and not Value then
                stopHitboxFunction()
            end
        end)
        HeadSection:Textbox("头部大小", "HeadSize", "10", function(Value)
            HeadSize = tonumber(Value) or 10
        end)
        HeadSection:Textbox("头部透明度", "HeadSizeTransparency", "0.7", function(Value)
            local transparency = tonumber(Value)
            if transparency then 
                HeadSizeTransparency = transparency 
            end
        end)
        HeadSection:Dropdown("头部颜色", "HeadSizeColor", colorOptions, function(Value)
            HeadSizeColor = Value
        end)
        HeadSection:Dropdown("头部材质", "HeadSizeMaterial", materialOptions, function(Value)
            HeadSizeMaterial = Value
        end)
        HeadSection:Toggle("头部禁用碰撞", "HeadSizeNoCollide", false, function(Value)
            HeadSizeCanCollide = not Value
        end)
        HeadSection:Toggle("头部彩虹效果", "HeadSizeRainbow", false, function(Value)
            HeadSizeRainbowEffect = Value
        end)
        HeadSection:Toggle("头部脉动效果", "HeadSizePulse", false, function(Value)
            HeadSizePulseEffect = Value
        end)
        HeadSection:Toggle("头部发光效果", "HeadSizeGlow", false, function(Value)
            HeadSizeGlowEffect = Value
        end)
        HeadSection:Toggle("头部轮廓", "HeadSizeOutline", true, function(Value)
            HeadSizeOutline = Value
        end)
        HeadSection:Toggle("头部自动调整", "HeadSizeAutoResize", false, function(Value)
            HeadSizeAutoResize = Value
        end)
        HeadSection:Textbox("头部调整速度", "HeadSizeResizeSpeed", "1", function(Value)
            local speed = tonumber(Value)
            if speed then 
                HeadSizeResizeSpeed = speed 
            end
        end)

        local FilterSection = HitboxTab:section("显示过滤", true)
        FilterSection:Toggle("仅显示敌人", "HitboxShowEnemies", false, function(Value)
            HitboxShowOnlyEnemies = Value
        end)
        FilterSection:Toggle("队伍检查", "HitboxTeamCheck", true, function(Value)
            HitboxTeamCheck = Value
        end)
        
        local HitboxSection3 = HitboxTab:section("应用设置", true)
        HitboxSection3:Button("立即应用设置", function()
            if HitboxEnabled then
                stopHitboxFunction()
                startHitboxFunction()
            end
        end)
        HitboxSection3:Button("重置设置", resetHitboxSettingsFunction)
        
        local ToolHitboxSection = HitboxTab:section("工具设置", true)
        ToolHitboxSection:Toggle("工具碰撞箱开关", "ToolHitboxEnabled", false, function(Value)
            ToolHitboxEnabled = Value
            if Value then
                startToolHitboxFunction()
            else
                stopToolHitboxFunction()
            end
        end)
        ToolHitboxSection:Textbox("工具碰撞箱大小", "ToolHitboxSize", "10", function(Value)
            ToolHitboxSize = tonumber(Value) or 10
        end)
        ToolHitboxSection:Dropdown("工具碰撞箱颜色", "ToolHitboxColor", colorOptions, function(Value)
            ToolHitboxColor = Value
        end)
        ToolHitboxSection:Dropdown("工具碰撞箱材质", "ToolHitboxMaterial", materialOptions, function(Value)
            ToolHitboxMaterial = Value
        end)
        ToolHitboxSection:Toggle("禁止使用工具碰撞", "ToolHitboxNoCollide", false, function(Value)
            ToolHitboxCanCollide = not Value
            if ToolHitboxEnabled then
                updateToolHitboxFunction()
            end
        end)
    else
        warn("Window 未找到，碰撞箱功能无法初始化")
    end

    game.Players.PlayerRemoving:Connect(function(player)
        if player.Character then
            local humanoidRootPart = player.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
            if humanoidRootPart then
                pcall(function()
                    humanoidRootPart.Size = Vector3.new(2, 2, 1)
                    humanoidRootPart.Transparency = 0
                    humanoidRootPart.BrickColor = BrickColor.new("Medium stone grey")
                    humanoidRootPart.Material = Enum.Material.Plastic
                    humanoidRootPart.CanCollide = true
                end)
            end
        end
    end)

    game.Players.LocalPlayer.CharacterAdded:Connect(function(character)
        character:WaitForChild("HumanoidRootPart")
    end)
end

do
local tool = Window:Tab("更多工具设置", '112148279212860')
task.wait(0.1)
local Sect = tool:section("设置", true)
local lp   = game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer

local reachSize = 1
Sect:Textbox("攻击范围大小","ReachSize","1",function(v)
    local n = tonumber(v)
    if n and n>0 then reachSize = n end
end)
Sect:Button("生效攻击范围",function()
    local tool = lp.Character and lp.Character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Tool")
    if not tool then return end
    local h = tool:FindFirstChild("Handle") or tool
    h.Size = Vector3.new(reachSize,reachSize,reachSize)
    h.Transparency = 1
    h.CanCollide = false
end)

local boxSize = 1
Sect:Textbox("方框范围边长","BoxReachSize","1",function(v)
    local n = tonumber(v)
    if n and n>0 then boxSize = n end
end)
Sect:Button("生效方框范围",function()
    local tool = lp.Character and lp.Character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Tool")
    if not tool then return end
    local h = tool:FindFirstChild("Handle") or tool
    h.Size = Vector3.new(boxSize,boxSize,boxSize)
    h.Shape = Enum.PartType.Block
    h.Transparency = 1
    h.CanCollide = false
end)

Sect:Button("关闭范围修改",function()
    local tool = lp.Character and lp.Character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Tool")
    if not tool then return end
    local h = tool:FindFirstChild("Handle")
    if h then
        h.Size = Vector3.new(1,1,1)
        h.Shape = Enum.PartType.Block
        h.Transparency = 0
    end
end)

local gx,gy,gz = 0,0,0
Sect:Textbox("偏移X","GripX","0",function(v) gx = tonumber(v) or 0 end)
Sect:Textbox("偏移Y","GripY","0",function(v) gy = tonumber(v) or 0 end)
Sect:Textbox("偏移Z","GripZ","0",function(v) gz = tonumber(v) or 0 end)
Sect:Button("设置握持偏移",function()
    local tool = lp.Character and lp.Character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Tool")
    if tool then tool.GripPos = Vector3.new(gx,gy,gz) end
end)

local useCnt = 1
local useGap = 0
Sect:Textbox("使用次数","UseCnt","1",function(v) useCnt = tonumber(v) or 1 end)
Sect:Textbox("间隔秒数","UseGap","0",function(v) useGap = tonumber(v) or 0 end)
Sect:Button("开始连续使用",function()
    for i = 1,useCnt do
        for _,t in ipairs(lp.Backpack:GetChildren()) do
            if t:IsA("Tool") then
                t.Parent = lp.Character
                t:Activate()
                t:Deactivate()
            end
        end
        if useGap > 0 then task.wait(useGap) end
    end
end)

local banName = ""
Sect:Textbox("工具名字","BanName","",function(v) banName = v end)
Sect:Button("加入自动删除",function()
    if banName == "" then return end
    lp.Backpack.ChildAdded:Connect(function(t)
        if t.Name == banName then t:Destroy() end
    end)
end)

local autoEquip = false
Sect:Toggle("新工具自动装备","AutoEquipNewTool",false,function(v)
    autoEquip = v
end)
lp.Backpack.ChildAdded:Connect(function(t)
    if autoEquip and t:IsA("Tool") then t.Parent = lp.Character end
end)

local autoDrop = false
Sect:Toggle("拾取后自动掉落","AutoDropTool",false,function(v)
    autoDrop = v
end)
lp.Character.ChildAdded:Connect(function(t)
    if autoDrop and t:IsA("Tool") then t.Parent = workspace end
end)

local lockTool = false
Sect:Toggle("锁定当前工具","LockCurrentTool",false,function(v)
    lockTool = v
end)
lp.Character.ChildAdded:Connect(function(t)
    if lockTool and t:IsA("Tool") then t.CanBeDropped = false end
end)

Sect:Button("解锁全部工具",function()
    for _,t in ipairs(lp.Backpack:GetChildren()) do
        if t:IsA("Tool") then t.CanBeDropped = true end
    end
    for _,t in ipairs(lp.Character:GetChildren()) do
        if t:IsA("Tool") then t.CanBeDropped = true end
    end
end)

local transVal = 0
Sect:Textbox("透明度数值","TransVal","0",function(v)
    local n = tonumber(v)
    if n and n>=0 and n<=1 then transVal = n end
end)
Sect:Button("应用透明度",function()
    local tool = lp.Character and lp.Character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Tool")
    if tool then
        for _,v in ipairs(tool:GetDescendants()) do
            if v:IsA("BasePart") or v:IsA("Decal") then v.Transparency = transVal end
        end
    end
end)

local matList = {}
for _,m in ipairs(Enum.Material:GetEnumItems()) do table.insert(matList,m.Name) end
local selectedMat = "SmoothPlastic"
Sect:Dropdown("选择材质","MatSelect",matList,function(v) selectedMat = v end)
Sect:Button("应用材质",function()
    local tool = lp.Character and lp.Character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Tool")
    if tool then
        for _,v in ipairs(tool:GetDescendants()) do
            if v:IsA("BasePart") then v.Material = Enum.Material[selectedMat] end
        end
    end
end)
end

do
local TriggerTab = Window:Tab("触发类", '130551565616516')
task.wait(0.1)

local ESP = {
    Objects = {}
}

function ESP:Create(obj, text, color)
    if not obj then return end
    
    local part
    if obj:IsA("BasePart") then
        part = obj
    else
        part = obj.Parent
        if not part or not part:IsA("BasePart") then return end
    end
    
    if part:FindFirstChild("BS_ESP") then return end
    
    local highlight = Instance.new("Highlight")
    highlight.Name = "BS_ESP"
    highlight.FillColor = color or Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 0)
    highlight.OutlineColor = color or Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 0)
    highlight.FillTransparency = 0.7
    highlight.OutlineTransparency = 0.3
    highlight.Parent = part
    
    local billboard = Instance.new("BillboardGui")
    billboard.Name = "BS_ESPText"
    billboard.Size = UDim2.new(0, 100, 0, 30)
    billboard.AlwaysOnTop = true
    billboard.Adornee = part
    billboard.Parent = part
    
    local textLabel = Instance.new("TextLabel")
    textLabel.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 1, 0)
    textLabel.Text = text
    textLabel.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
    textLabel.BackgroundTransparency = 1
    textLabel.TextScaled = true
    textLabel.Parent = billboard
    
    self.Objects[part] = true
end

function ESP:Clear()
    for obj in pairs(self.Objects) do
        pcall(function()
            if obj then
                local h = obj:FindFirstChild("BS_ESP")
                local t = obj:FindFirstChild("BS_ESPText")
                if h then h:Destroy() end
                if t then t:Destroy() end
            end
        end)
    end
    self.Objects = {}
end

local TouchInterestsSection = TriggerTab:section("TouchInterests 可触碰类物体", false)

getgenv().AutoTouchActive = false
getgenv().TouchTriggerRange = 20

TouchInterestsSection:Button("触发所有 TouchInterests", function()
    local Players = game:GetService("Players")
    local Workspace = game:GetService("Workspace")
    local LocalPlayer = Players.LocalPlayer
    local Character = LocalPlayer.Character
    if not Character then return end
    
    local HumanoidRootPart = Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
    if not HumanoidRootPart then return end
    
    local currentRange = getgenv().TouchTriggerRange or 20
    
    for _, v in pairs(Workspace:GetDescendants()) do
        if v:IsA("TouchTransmitter") or v.Name == "TouchInterest" then
            pcall(function()
                if not v.Parent then return end
                local touchPart = v.Parent
                if not touchPart:IsA("BasePart") then return end
                
                if currentRange > 0 then
                    local distance = (HumanoidRootPart.Position - touchPart.Position).Magnitude
                    if distance > currentRange then return end
                end
                
                if firetouchinterest then
                    firetouchinterest(touchPart, HumanoidRootPart, 0)
                    firetouchinterest(touchPart, HumanoidRootPart, 1)
                end
            end)
        end
    end
end)

TouchInterestsSection:Toggle("自动触发 TouchInterest", "AutoTriggerTouchInterest", false, function(state)
    getgenv().AutoTouchActive = state
    
    if state then
        spawn(function()
            while getgenv().AutoTouchActive do
                local Players = game:GetService("Players")
                local Workspace = game:GetService("Workspace")
                local LocalPlayer = Players.LocalPlayer
                
                local Character = LocalPlayer.Character
                if Character then
                    local HumanoidRootPart = Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
                    if HumanoidRootPart then
                        local currentRange = getgenv().TouchTriggerRange or 20
                        
                        for _, v in pairs(Workspace:GetDescendants()) do
                            if not getgenv().AutoTouchActive then break end
                            
                            if v:IsA("TouchTransmitter") or v.Name == "TouchInterest" then
                                pcall(function()
                                    if not v.Parent then return end
                                    local touchPart = v.Parent
                                    if not touchPart:IsA("BasePart") then return end
                                    
                                    if currentRange > 0 then
                                        local distance = (HumanoidRootPart.Position - touchPart.Position).Magnitude
                                        if distance > currentRange then return end
                                    end
                                    
                                    if firetouchinterest then
                                        firetouchinterest(touchPart, HumanoidRootPart, 0)
                                        firetouchinterest(touchPart, HumanoidRootPart, 1)
                                    end
                                end)
                                task.wait(0.01)
                            end
                        end
                    end
                end
                
                task.wait(0.1)
            end
        end)
    end
end)

TouchInterestsSection:Textbox("设定范围", "TouchRange", "输入范围值 (默认: 20)", function(value)
    local numValue = tonumber(value)
    if numValue and numValue > 0 then
        getgenv().TouchTriggerRange = numValue
    else
        getgenv().TouchTriggerRange = 20
    end
end)

TouchInterestsSection:Toggle("透视 TouchInterests", "ESP_TouchInterests", false, function(state)
    getgenv().ESPTouchInterests = state
    if state then
        spawn(function()
            while getgenv().ESPTouchInterests do
                ESP:Clear()
                for _, v in pairs(game:GetService("Workspace"):GetDescendants()) do
                    if v:IsA("TouchTransmitter") or v.Name == "TouchInterest" then
                        ESP:Create(v, "Touch", Color3.fromRGB(255, 0, 255))
                    end
                end
                task.wait(1)
            end
        end)
    else
        ESP:Clear()
    end
end)

local ClickDetectorsSection = TriggerTab:section("ClickDetectors 可点击类物体", false)

ClickDetectorsSection:Button("触发所有 ClickDetectors", function()
    for i, v in pairs(game:GetService("Workspace"):GetDescendants()) do
        if v:IsA("ClickDetector") then
            pcall(function()
                fireclickdetector(v)
            end)
        end
    end
end)

    getgenv().AutoTriggerClick = state
    if state then
        spawn(function()
            while getgenv().AutoTriggerClick do
                for i, v in pairs(game:GetService("Workspace"):GetDescendants()) do
                    if v:IsA("ClickDetector") then
                        pcall(function()
                            fireclickdetector(v)
                        end)
                    end
                end
                task.wait(0.5)
            end
        end)
    end
end)

ClickDetectorsSection:Toggle("透视 ClickDetectors", "ESP_ClickDetectors", false, function(state)
    getgenv().ESPClickDetectors = state
    if state then
        spawn(function()
            while getgenv().ESPClickDetectors do
                ESP:Clear()
                for _, v in pairs(game:GetService("Workspace"):GetDescendants()) do
                    if v:IsA("ClickDetector") then
                        ESP:Create(v, "Click", Color3.fromRGB(0, 255, 0))
                    end
                end
                task.wait(1)
            end
        end)
    else
        ESP:Clear()
    end
end)

local ProximityPromptsSection = TriggerTab:section("ProximityPrompts 可互动类物体", false)

ProximityPromptsSection:Button("触发所有 ProximityPrompts", function()
    for i, v in pairs(game:GetService("Workspace"):GetDescendants()) do
        if v:IsA("ProximityPrompt") then
            pcall(function()
                fireproximityprompt(v)
            end)
        end
    end
end)

ProximityPromptsSection:Toggle("自动触发 ProximityPrompt(自动互动)", "AutoInteract", false, function(state)

    if state then
        spawn(function()
            while getgenv().autoInteract do
                for _, descendant in pairs(workspace:GetDescendants()) do
                    if descendant:IsA("ProximityPrompt") then
                        pcall(function()
                            fireproximityprompt(descendant)
                        end)
                    end
                end
                task.wait(0.25)
            end
        end)
    end
end)

    getgenv().ESPProximityPrompts = state
    if state then
        spawn(function()
            while getgenv().ESPProximityPrompts do
                ESP:Clear()
                for _, v in pairs(game:GetService("Workspace"):GetDescendants()) do
                    if v:IsA("ProximityPrompt") then
                        ESP:Create(v, "Prompt", Color3.fromRGB(0, 150, 255))
                    end
                end
                task.wait(1)
            end
        end)
    else
        ESP:Clear()
    end
end)

ProximityPromptsSection:Button("快速互动", function()
    for i, v in pairs(game:GetService("Workspace"):GetDescendants()) do
        if v:IsA("ProximityPrompt") then
            pcall(function()
                v["HoldDuration"] = 0
            end)
        end
    end
    
    pcall(function()
        game:GetService("ProximityPromptService").PromptButtonHoldBegan:Connect(function(v)
            v["HoldDuration"] = 0
        end)
    end)
end)

        getgenv().InteractDistance = numValue
    end
