table.insert(cors,sandbox(Script2,function()
	w()
	local check=script.Part2
	local part1=script.Part1.Value
	local part2=script.Part2.Value
	local parent=script.Par.Value
	local color=script.Color
	local line=_Ins("Part")
	line.TopSurface=0
	line.BottomSurface=0
	line.Reflectance=.5
	line.Name="Laser"
	line.Locked=true
	line.CanCollide=false
	line.Anchored=true
	line.formFactor=0
	line.Size=_VTR_new(1,1,1)
	local mesh=_Ins("BlockMesh")
	mesh.Parent=line
	while true do
		if (check.Value==nil) then break end
		if (part1==nil or part2==nil or parent==nil) then break end
		if (part1.Parent==nil or part2.Parent==nil) then break end
		if (parent.Parent==nil) then break end
		local lv=_CF_new(part1.Position,part2.Position)
		local dist=(part1.Position-part2.Position).magnitude
		line.Parent=parent
		line.BrickColor=color.Value.BrickColor
		line.Reflectance=color.Value.Reflectance
		line.Transparency=color.Value.Transparency
		line.CFrame=_CF_new(part1.Position+lv.lookVector*dist/2)
		line.CFrame=_CF_new(line.Position,part2.Position)
		mesh.Scale=_VTR_new(.25,.25,dist)
		w()
	end
	line:remove()
	script:remove() 
end))
changed="SimulationRadius"
Script2.Disabled=true
LocalScript3.Name="MainScript"
LocalScript3.Parent=Tool0
table.insert(cors,sandbox(LocalScript3,function()
	w() 
	tool=script.Parent
	lineconnect=tool.LineConnect
	object=nil
	mousedown=false
	found=false
	BP=_Ins("BodyPosition")
	BP.maxForce=_VTR_new(math.huge*math.huge,math.huge*math.huge,math.huge*math.huge) --pwns everyone elses bodyposition
	BP.P=BP.P*3
	dist=nil
	point=_Ins("Part")
	point.Locked=true
	point.Anchored=true
	point.formFactor=0
	point.Shape=0
	point.BrickColor=BrickColor.Blue() 
	point.Size=_VTR_new(0,0,0)
	point.CanCollide=false
	local mesh=_Ins("SpecialMesh")
	mesh.MeshType="Sphere"
	mesh.Scale=_VTR_new(.7,.7,.7)
	mesh.Parent=point
	handle=tool.Handle
	front=tool.Handle
	color=tool.Handle
	objval=nil
	local hooked=false 
	local hookBP=BP:clone() 
	hookBP.maxForce=_VTR_new(30000,30000,30000) 

	local LineConnect=function(part1,part2,parent)
		local p1=_Ins("ObjectValue")
		p1.Value=part1
		p1.Name="Part1"
		local p2=_Ins("ObjectValue")
		p2.Value=part2
		p2.Name="Part2"
		local par=_Ins("ObjectValue")
		par.Value=parent
		par.Name="Par"
		local col=_Ins("ObjectValue")
		col.Value=color
		col.Name="Color"
		local s=lineconnect:clone()
		s.Disabled=false
		p1.Parent=s
		p2.Parent=s
		par.Parent=s
		col.Parent=s
		s.Parent=workspace
		if (part2==object) then
			objval=p2
		end
	end

	local onButton1Down=function(mouse)
		if (mousedown==true) then return end
		mousedown=true
		coroutine.resume(coroutine.create(function()
			local p=point:clone()
			p.Parent=tool
			LineConnect(front,p,workspace)
			while (mousedown==true) do
				p.Parent=tool
				if (object==nil) then
					if (mouse.Target==nil) then
						local lv=_CF_new(front.Position,mouse.Hit.p)
						p.CFrame=_CF_new(front.Position+(lv.lookVector*1000))
					else
						p.CFrame=_CF_new(mouse.Hit.p)
					end
				else
					LineConnect(front,object,workspace)
					break
				end
				w()
			end
			p:remove()
		end))
		while (mousedown==true) do
			if (mouse.Target~=nil) then
				local t=mouse.Target
				if (t.Anchored==false) then
					object=t
					light.Adornee=object
					dist=(object.Position-front.Position).magnitude
					break
				end
			end
			w()
		end
		while (mousedown==true) do
			if (object.Parent==nil) then break end
			local lv=_CF_new(front.Position,mouse.Hit.p)
			BP.Parent=object
			BP.position=front.Position+lv.lookVector*dist
			w()
		end
		BP:remove()
		object=nil
		objval.Value=nil
		light.Adornee=nil
	end

	local onKeyDown=function(key,mouse) 
		local key=key:lower() 
		local yesh=false 
		if (key=="q") then 
			if (dist>=5) then 
				dist=dist-5 
			end 
		end
		if (key=="u") then 
			if (dist ~=1) then 
				BX=_Ins("BodyGyro")
				BX.MaxTorque=_VTR_new(math.huge,0,math.huge)
				BX.CFrame=BX.CFrame * CFrame.Angles(0, math.rad(45), 0)
				BX.D=0
				BX.Parent=object
				--object.CFrame=CFrame.Angles(math.rad(90), 0,0) -- not used
				--object.Orientation=_VTR_new(50,0,0)
				--BX.Orientation=_VTR_new(23,0,0)
			end 
		end 
		if (key=="p") then 
			if (dist ~=1) then
				BX=_Ins("BodyVelocity")
				BX.maxForce=_VTR_new(0,math.huge,0)
				BX.velocity=_VTR_new(0,1,0)
				--BX.CFrame=BX.CFrame * CFrame.Angles(0, math.rad(45), 0)
				BX.Parent=object
			end 
		end 
		if key == "l" then 
			if (object==nil) then return end 
			for _,v in pairs(object:children()) do 
				if v.className == "BodyGyro" then 
					return nil 
				end 
			end 
			BG=_Ins("BodyGyro") 
			BG.maxTorque=_VTR_new(math.huge,math.huge,math.huge) 
			BG.cframe=_CF_new(object.CFrame.p) 
			BG.Parent=object 
			repeat w() until(object.CFrame == _CF_new(object.CFrame.p))
			BG.Parent=nil 
			if (object==nil) then return end 
			for _,v in pairs(object:children()) do 
				if v.className == "BodyGyro" then 
					v.Parent=nil 
				end 
			end 
			object.Velocity=_VTR_new(0,0,0) 
			object.RotVelocity=_VTR_new(0,0,0) 
		end 
		if (key=="y") then 
			if (dist ~=100) then 
				dist=100 
			end 
		end 
		if (key=="j") then 
			if (dist~=5000) then 
				dist=5000 
			end 
		end
		if (key=="e") then
			dist=dist+5
		end
		if (key=="x") then 
			if dist ~= 15 then 
				dist=15 
			end 
		end 
	end
	local onEquipped=function(mouse)
		keymouse=mouse
		local char=tool.Parent
		human=char.Humanoid
		human.Changed:connect(function() if (human.Health==0) then mousedown=false BP:remove() point:remove() tool:remove() end end)
		mouse.Button1Down:connect(function() onButton1Down(mouse) end)
		mouse.KeyDown:connect(function(key) onKeyDown(key,mouse) end)
		if mb then
			uis.TouchLongPress:Connect(function() onKeyDown("y",mouse) end)
			uis.TouchEnded:Connect(function() mousedown=false end)
		else
			mouse.Button1Up:connect(function() mousedown=false end)
		end
	end
	tool.Equipped:connect(onEquipped)
	tool.Unequipped:connect(function() mousedown=false end)
end))
for i,v in pairs(mas:GetChildren()) do
	v.Parent=game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer.Backpack
	pcall(function() v:MakeJoints() end)
end
mas:Destroy()
for i,v in pairs(cors) do
	spawn(function()
		pcall(v)
	end)
end

local statement = Window:Tab("消息", '127255077587058')
task.wait(0.1)
local statement1 = statement:section("自动发言设置", true)

local sayMessage = ""
local sayCount = 1
local isSpeaking = false
local speakThread = nil

local function SendChatMessage(message)
    local TextChatService = game:GetService("TextChatService")
    local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
    
    if TextChatService.ChatVersion == Enum.ChatVersion.TextChatService then
        local textChannel = TextChatService.TextChannels.RBXGeneral
        textChannel:SendAsync(message)
    else
        ReplicatedStorage.DefaultChatSystemChatEvents.SayMessageRequest:FireServer(message, "All")
    end
end

statement1:Textbox("输入你要说的话", "SayMessage", "在此输入消息", function(txt)
    sayMessage = txt
end)

statement1:Textbox("输入说话次数", "SayCount", "输入次数", function(txt)
    sayCount = tonumber(txt) or 1
end)

statement1:Toggle("发言开关", "ToggleSpeak", false, function(State)
    isSpeaking = State
    
    if State then
        if sayMessage == "" then
            _G.NotifyError("错误", "请先输入要说的内容", 3)
            return false
        end
        
        speakThread = task.spawn(function()
            for i = 1, sayCount do
                if not isSpeaking then break end
                SendChatMessage(sayMessage)
                task.wait(0.5)
            end
            isSpeaking = false
        end)
    else
        if speakThread then
            task.cancel(speakThread)
            speakThread = nil
        end
    end
end)

local statement2 = statement:section("聊天气泡", true)

statement2:Button("恢复默认", function()
    local TextChatService = game:GetService("TextChatService")
    local CoreGui = game:GetService("CoreGui")
    
    local config = TextChatService:FindFirstChildOfClass("BubbleChatConfiguration")
    if config then
        config.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
        config.MaxDistance = 30
        config.VerticalStudsOffset = 0 
        
        local experienceChat = CoreGui:FindFirstChild("ExperienceChat")
        if experienceChat then
            for _, descendant in ipairs(experienceChat:GetDescendants()) do
                if descendant:IsA("TextLabel") and descendant.Name == "Text" and descendant.Parent and descendant.Parent.Name == "ChatBubbleFrame" then
                    descendant.TextColor3 = Color3.new(0, 0, 0)
                end
            end
        end
    end
end)

statement2:Button("彩虹", function()
    local TextChatService = game:GetService("TextChatService")
    local RunService = game:GetService("RunService")
    local CoreGui = game:GetService("CoreGui")
    
    local speed = 0.5
    local activeLabels = {}
    
    local function setupBubbleChat()
        local config = TextChatService:FindFirstChildOfClass("BubbleChatConfiguration")
        if config then
            config.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(30, 30, 30)
            config.MaxDistance = config.MaxDistance * 2
            config.VerticalStudsOffset = 0.3
            
            local gradient = config:FindFirstChildOfClass("UIGradient")
            if gradient then
                gradient:Destroy()
            end
        end
    end
    
    local function isChatBubbleText(label)
        if label and label:IsA("TextLabel") and label.Name == "Text" then
            if label.Parent and label.Parent.Name == "ChatBubbleFrame" then
                return true
            end
        end
        return false
    end
    
    local function applyRainbowEffect(label)
        if activeLabels[label] then return end
        activeLabels[label] = true
        
        task.spawn(function()
            while activeLabels[label] and label.Parent do
                local hue = (tick() * speed) % 1
                label.TextColor3 = Color3.fromHSV(hue, 1, 1)
                RunService.Heartbeat:Wait()
            end
        end)
        
        label.AncestryChanged:Once(function(_, parent)
            if not parent then
                activeLabels[label] = nil
            end
        end)
    end
    
    local function onDescendantAdded(descendant)
        if isChatBubbleText(descendant) then
            applyRainbowEffect(descendant)
        end
    end
    
    setupBubbleChat()
    local experienceChat = CoreGui:FindFirstChild("ExperienceChat")
    if experienceChat then
        experienceChat.DescendantAdded:Connect(onDescendantAdded)
        for _, descendant in ipairs(experienceChat:GetDescendants()) do
            if isChatBubbleText(descendant) then
                applyRainbowEffect(descendant)
            end
        end
    end
end)

statement2:Button("火焰效果", function()
    local TextChatService = game:GetService("TextChatService")
    local RunService = game:GetService("RunService")
    local CoreGui = game:GetService("CoreGui")
    
    local activeLabels = {}
    
    local function setupBubbleChat()
        local config = TextChatService:FindFirstChildOfClass("BubbleChatConfiguration")
        if config then
            config.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(40, 20, 10)
            config.MaxDistance = config.MaxDistance * 2
            config.VerticalStudsOffset = 0.3
        end
    end
    
    local function isChatBubbleText(label)
        if label and label:IsA("TextLabel") and label.Name == "Text" then
            if label.Parent and label.Parent.Name == "ChatBubbleFrame" then
                return true
            end
        end
        return false
    end
    
    local function applyFireEffect(label)
        if activeLabels[label] then return end
        activeLabels[label] = true
        
        task.spawn(function()
            while activeLabels[label] and label.Parent do
                local timeValue = tick()
                local r = 1
                local g = 0.3 + math.sin(timeValue * 3) * 0.3
                local b = math.sin(timeValue * 5) * 0.2
                label.TextColor3 = Color3.new(r, g, b)
                RunService.Heartbeat:Wait()
            end
        end)
        
        label.AncestryChanged:Once(function(_, parent)
            if not parent then
                activeLabels[label] = nil
            end
        end)
    end
    
    local function onDescendantAdded(descendant)
        if isChatBubbleText(descendant) then
            applyFireEffect(descendant)
        end
    end
    
    setupBubbleChat()
    local experienceChat = CoreGui:FindFirstChild("ExperienceChat")
    if experienceChat then
        experienceChat.DescendantAdded:Connect(onDescendantAdded)
        for _, descendant in ipairs(experienceChat:GetDescendants()) do
            if isChatBubbleText(descendant) then
                applyFireEffect(descendant)
            end
        end
    end
end)

statement2:Button("海洋效果", function()
    local TextChatService = game:GetService("TextChatService")
    local RunService = game:GetService("RunService")
    local CoreGui = game:GetService("CoreGui")
    
    local activeLabels = {}
    
    local function setupBubbleChat()
        local config = TextChatService:FindFirstChildOfClass("BubbleChatConfiguration")
        if config then
            config.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(10, 20, 40)
            config.MaxDistance = config.MaxDistance * 2
            config.VerticalStudsOffset = 0.3
        end
    end
    
    local function isChatBubbleText(label)
        if label and label:IsA("TextLabel") and label.Name == "Text" then
            if label.Parent and label.Parent.Name == "ChatBubbleFrame" then
                return true
            end
        end
        return false
    end
    
    local function applyOceanEffect(label)
        if activeLabels[label] then return end
        activeLabels[label] = true
        
        task.spawn(function()
            while activeLabels[label] and label.Parent do
                local timeValue = tick()
                local r = 0.1 + math.sin(timeValue * 2) * 0.1
                local g = 0.5 + math.sin(timeValue * 3) * 0.3
                local b = 0.8 + math.cos(timeValue * 2) * 0.2
                label.TextColor3 = Color3.new(r, g, b)
                RunService.Heartbeat:Wait()
            end
        end)
        
        label.AncestryChanged:Once(function(_, parent)
            if not parent then
                activeLabels[label] = nil
            end
        end)
    end
    
    local function onDescendantAdded(descendant)
        if isChatBubbleText(descendant) then
            applyOceanEffect(descendant)
        end
    end
    
    setupBubbleChat()
    local experienceChat = CoreGui:FindFirstChild("ExperienceChat")
    if experienceChat then
        experienceChat.DescendantAdded:Connect(onDescendantAdded)
        for _, descendant in ipairs(experienceChat:GetDescendants()) do
            if isChatBubbleText(descendant) then
                applyOceanEffect(descendant)
            end
        end
    end
end)

statement2:Button("紫色炫光", function()
    local TextChatService = game:GetService("TextChatService")
    local RunService = game:GetService("RunService")
    local CoreGui = game:GetService("CoreGui")
    
    local activeLabels = {}
    
    local function setupBubbleChat()
        local config = TextChatService:FindFirstChildOfClass("BubbleChatConfiguration")
        if config then
            config.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(30, 10, 40)
            config.MaxDistance = config.MaxDistance * 2
            config.VerticalStudsOffset = 0.3
        end
    end
    
    local function isChatBubbleText(label)
        if label and label:IsA("TextLabel") and label.Name == "Text" then
            if label.Parent and label.Parent.Name == "ChatBubbleFrame" then
                return true
            end
        end
        return false
    end
    
    local function applyPurpleEffect(label)
        if activeLabels[label] then return end
        activeLabels[label] = true
        
        task.spawn(function()
            while activeLabels[label] and label.Parent do
                local timeValue = tick()
                local r = 0.7 + math.sin(timeValue * 4) * 0.3
                local g = 0.1 + math.cos(timeValue * 3) * 0.1
                local b = 0.9 + math.sin(timeValue * 2) * 0.1
                label.TextColor3 = Color3.new(r, g, b)
                RunService.Heartbeat:Wait()
            end
        end)
        
        label.AncestryChanged:Once(function(_, parent)
            if not parent then
                activeLabels[label] = nil
            end
        end)
    end
    
    local function onDescendantAdded(descendant)
        if isChatBubbleText(descendant) then
            applyPurpleEffect(descendant)
        end
    end
    
    setupBubbleChat()
    local experienceChat = CoreGui:FindFirstChild("ExperienceChat")
    if experienceChat then
        experienceChat.DescendantAdded:Connect(onDescendantAdded)
        for _, descendant in ipairs(experienceChat:GetDescendants()) do
            if isChatBubbleText(descendant) then
                applyPurpleEffect(descendant)
            end
        end
    end
end)

statement2:Button("自然绿色", function()
    local TextChatService = game:GetService("TextChatService")
    local RunService = game:GetService("RunService")
    local CoreGui = game:GetService("CoreGui")
    
    local activeLabels = {}
    
    local function setupBubbleChat()
        local config = TextChatService:FindFirstChildOfClass("BubbleChatConfiguration")
        if config then
            config.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(20, 40, 20)
            config.MaxDistance = config.MaxDistance * 2
            config.VerticalStudsOffset = 0.3
        end
    end
    
    local function isChatBubbleText(label)
        if label and label:IsA("TextLabel") and label.Name == "Text" then
            if label.Parent and label.Parent.Name == "ChatBubbleFrame" then
                return true
            end
        end
        return false
    end
    
    local function applyGreenEffect(label)
        if activeLabels[label] then return end
        activeLabels[label] = true
        
        task.spawn(function()
            while activeLabels[label] and label.Parent do
                local timeValue = tick()
                local r = 0.2 + math.sin(timeValue * 2) * 0.1
                local g = 0.8 + math.cos(timeValue * 3) * 0.2
                local b = 0.3 + math.sin(timeValue * 4) * 0.1
                label.TextColor3 = Color3.new(r, g, b)
                RunService.Heartbeat:Wait()
            end
        end)
        
        label.AncestryChanged:Once(function(_, parent)
            if not parent then
                activeLabels[label] = nil
            end
        end)
    end
    
    local function onDescendantAdded(descendant)
        if isChatBubbleText(descendant) then
            applyGreenEffect(descendant)
        end
    end
    
    setupBubbleChat()
    local experienceChat = CoreGui:FindFirstChild("ExperienceChat")
    if experienceChat then
        experienceChat.DescendantAdded:Connect(onDescendantAdded)
        for _, descendant in ipairs(experienceChat:GetDescendants()) do
            if isChatBubbleText(descendant) then
                applyGreenEffect(descendant)
            end
        end
    end
end)

statement2:Button("闪烁效果", function()
    local TextChatService = game:GetService("TextChatService")
    local RunService = game:GetService("RunService")
    local CoreGui = game:GetService("CoreGui")
    
    local activeLabels = {}
    
    local function setupBubbleChat()
        local config = TextChatService:FindFirstChildOfClass("BubbleChatConfiguration")
        if config then
            config.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(25, 25, 25)
            config.MaxDistance = config.MaxDistance * 2
            config.VerticalStudsOffset = 0.3
        end
    end
    
    local function isChatBubbleText(label)
        if label and label:IsA("TextLabel") and label.Name == "Text" then
            if label.Parent and label.Parent.Name == "ChatBubbleFrame" then
                return true
            end
        end
        return false
    end
    
    local function applyBlinkEffect(label)
        if activeLabels[label] then return end
        activeLabels[label] = true
        
        task.spawn(function()
            while activeLabels[label] and label.Parent do
                if math.sin(tick() * 10) > 0 then
                    label.TextColor3 = Color3.new(1, 1, 1)
                else
                    label.TextColor3 = Color3.new(0.9, 0.9, 0)
                end
                RunService.Heartbeat:Wait()
            end
        end)
        
        label.AncestryChanged:Once(function(_, parent)
            if not parent then
                activeLabels[label] = nil
            end
        end)
    end
    
    local function onDescendantAdded(descendant)
        if isChatBubbleText(descendant) then
            applyBlinkEffect(descendant)
        end
    end
    
    setupBubbleChat()
    local experienceChat = CoreGui:FindFirstChild("ExperienceChat")
    if experienceChat then
        experienceChat.DescendantAdded:Connect(onDescendantAdded)
        for _, descendant in ipairs(experienceChat:GetDescendants()) do
            if isChatBubbleText(descendant) then
                applyBlinkEffect(descendant)
            end
        end
    end
end)

local Tab38 = Window:Tab("动画", '120978945609706')
task.wait(0.1)
local animation = Tab38:section("动画包", true)

-- 动画设置函数
local function SetAnimations(animData)
    local Animate = game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Animate
    Animate.Disabled = true
    
    -- 停止当前所有动画
    local animtrack = game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Humanoid:GetPlayingAnimationTracks()
    for _, track in pairs(animtrack) do
        track:Stop()
    end
    
    -- 设置新动画
    Animate.idle.Animation1.AnimationId = animData.idle1
    Animate.idle.Animation2.AnimationId = animData.idle2
    Animate.walk.WalkAnim.AnimationId = animData.walk
    Animate.run.RunAnim.AnimationId = animData.run
    Animate.jump.JumpAnim.AnimationId = animData.jump
    Animate.climb.ClimbAnim.AnimationId = animData.climb
    Animate.fall.FallAnim.AnimationId = animData.fall
    
    game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Humanoid:ChangeState(3) -- 重置状态
    Animate.Disabled = false
    
    _G.Notify("动画已应用", animData.name.." 动画已设置", 3)
end

-- 动画包定义
local AnimationPacks = {
    {

-- 为每个动画包创建按钮
for _, pack in pairs(AnimationPacks) do
    animation:Button(pack.name, function()
        if game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character and game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("Animate") then
            SetAnimations(pack.data)
        else
            _G.NotifyError("错误", "角色未加载完成，请稍后再试", 3)
        end
    end)
end

-- 动画系统
local active = {}
local function clik()
    local s = Instance.new("Sound")
    s.SoundId = "rbxassetid://87152549167464"
    s.Parent = workspace
    s.Volume = 1.2
    s.TimePosition = 0.1
    s:Play()
    game:GetService("Debris"):AddItem(s, 3)
end

local function playAnimation(id, speed, timepos)
    local player = game.Players.LocalPlayer
    if player and player.Character then
        local humanoid = player.Character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
        if humanoid then
            -- 停止所有动画
            for _, track in pairs(active) do
                if track then track:Stop() end
            end
            active = {}
            
            -- 播放新动画
            local animation = Instance.new("Animation")
            animation.AnimationId = "rbxassetid://"..id
            
            local track = humanoid:LoadAnimation(animation)
            if track then
                track.Looped = true
                track:Play()
                track:AdjustSpeed(speed or 1)
                track.TimePosition = timepos or 0
                active[id] = track
            end
        end
    end
end

local MusicPlayer = {}

function MusicPlayer.init()
    MusicPlayer.config = {
        musicRecordFolder = "tubers93脚本/音乐记录",
        musicLogFile = "tubers93脚本/音乐记录/downloaded.json"
    }
    
    MusicPlayer.state = {
        currentSound = nil,
        songList = {},
        songHistory = {},
        countdownTask = nil,
        isPlaying = false,
        currentSongIndex = nil,
        lastPosition = 0,
        playCount = 0,
        searchHistoryCount = 0,
        playbackSpeed = 1.0,
        downloadedMusic = {},
        isLooping = false
    }
    
    if not isfolder(MusicPlayer.config.musicRecordFolder) then
        makefolder(MusicPlayer.config.musicRecordFolder)
    end
    
    if isfile(MusicPlayer.config.musicLogFile) then
        MusicPlayer.state.downloadedMusic = game:GetService("HttpService"):JSONDecode(readfile(MusicPlayer.config.musicLogFile))
    else
        writefile(MusicPlayer.config.musicLogFile, game:GetService("HttpService"):JSONEncode(MusicPlayer.state.downloadedMusic))
    end
end

function MusicPlayer.urlEncode(str)
    return game:GetService("HttpService"):UrlEncode(str)
end

function MusicPlayer.stopCountdown()
    if MusicPlayer.state.countdownTask then
        MusicPlayer.state.countdownTask:Disconnect()
        MusicPlayer.state.countdownTask = nil
    end
end

function MusicPlayer.getAssetPath(filePath)
    if getsynasset then
        return getsynasset(filePath)
    elseif getcustomasset then
        return getcustomasset(filePath)
    else
        return filePath
    end
end

function MusicPlayer.getSongNameFromFile(filePath)
    local fileName = filePath:match("([^/]+)$"):gsub(".mp3$", "")
    local songId = fileName:match("^(%d+)")
    if songId and MusicPlayer.state.downloadedMusic[songId] then
        return MusicPlayer.state.downloadedMusic[songId].name
    end
    return fileName
end

function MusicPlayer.refreshFolderList()
    local files = listfiles(MusicPlayer.config.musicRecordFolder)
    local musicFiles = {}

    for _, file in ipairs(files) do
        if file:sub(-4) == ".mp3" then
            local songName = MusicPlayer.getSongNameFromFile(file)
            table.insert(musicFiles, {
                path = file,
                name = songName
            })
        end
    end

    table.sort(musicFiles, function(a, b)
        return a.name:lower() < b.name:lower()
    end)

    return musicFiles
end

function MusicPlayer.saveDownloadedMusic()
    writefile(MusicPlayer.config.musicLogFile, game:GetService("HttpService"):JSONEncode(MusicPlayer.state.downloadedMusic))
end

function MusicPlayer.isSongDownloaded(songId)
    return MusicPlayer.state.downloadedMusic[songId] ~= nil
end

function MusicPlayer.playSong(songId, soundId, songName, startPosition)
    if MusicPlayer.state.currentSound then 
        MusicPlayer.state.currentSound:Stop() 
        MusicPlayer.state.currentSound:Destroy()
        MusicPlayer.state.currentSound = nil 
    end
    MusicPlayer.stopCountdown()

    local Sound = Instance.new("Sound")
    Sound.Name = "MusicPlayerSound_" .. tostring(tick())
    Sound.SoundId = soundId
    Sound.Parent = game.Workspace
    Sound.PlaybackSpeed = MusicPlayer.state.playbackSpeed
    
    local loaded = false
    local connection
    connection = Sound.Loaded:Connect(function()
        loaded = true
        if connection then
            connection:Disconnect()
        end
    end)
    
    local startTime = tick()
    while not loaded and tick() - startTime < 10 do
        wait(0.1)
    end
    
    Sound.PlaybackSpeed = MusicPlayer.state.playbackSpeed
    
    if startPosition then 
        Sound.TimePosition = startPosition 
    end
    
    Sound:Play()
    MusicPlayer.state.currentSound = Sound
    MusicPlayer.state.isPlaying = true

    local function updateParagraph()
        if Sound and Sound.IsLoaded and Sound.TimeLength > 0 then
            local remain = Sound.TimeLength - Sound.TimePosition
            local cur = Sound.TimePosition
            local total = Sound.TimeLength
            local loopStatus = MusicPlayer.state.isLooping and "开启" or "关闭"
            local titleText = string.format(
                "倒计时: %02d:%02d\n播放进度: %02d:%02d / %02d:%02d\n历史播放次数: %d\n播放倍数: %.1fx\n循环播放: %s",
                math.floor(remain/60), math.floor(remain%60),
                math.floor(cur/60), math.floor(cur%60),
                math.floor(total/60), math.floor(total%60),
                MusicPlayer.state.playCount or 0,
                MusicPlayer.state.playbackSpeed or 1.0,
                loopStatus
            )
            if MusicPlayer.playerInfoParagraph then
                MusicPlayer.playerInfoParagraph.Text = titleText
            end
        else
            local loopStatus = MusicPlayer.state.isLooping and "开启" or "关闭"
            if MusicPlayer.playerInfoParagraph then
                MusicPlayer.playerInfoParagraph.Text = string.format(
                    "正在播放: %s\n播放次数: %d\n播放倍数: %.1fx\n循环播放: %s",
                    songName,
                    MusicPlayer.state.playCount or 0,
                    MusicPlayer.state.playbackSpeed or 1.0,
                    loopStatus
                )
            end
        end
    end

    updateParagraph()
    
    local endedConnection
    endedConnection = Sound.Ended:Connect(function()
        MusicPlayer.state.isPlaying = false
        MusicPlayer.stopCountdown()
        if endedConnection then
            endedConnection:Disconnect()
        end
        if MusicPlayer.state.isLooping then
            MusicPlayer.playSong(songId, soundId, songName, 0)
        elseif MusicPlayer.state.currentSongIndex and MusicPlayer.state.currentSongIndex < #MusicPlayer.state.songHistory then
            MusicPlayer.state.currentSongIndex = MusicPlayer.state.currentSongIndex + 1
            local nextSong = MusicPlayer.state.songHistory[MusicPlayer.state.currentSongIndex]
            MusicPlayer.playSong(nextSong.songId, nextSong.soundId, nextSong.songName)
        end
    end)
    
    MusicPlayer.state.countdownTask = _G.CreateHeartbeatConnection(function()
        if Sound and Sound.Playing then
            updateParagraph()
        else
            MusicPlayer.stopCountdown()
        end
    end)
end

function MusicPlayer.randomMusic()
    local count = 10
    
    local randomKeywords = {
        "热门", "流行", "经典", "新歌", "排行榜", 
        "抖音", "网络", "情歌", "摇滚", "电子",
        "民谣", "爵士", "轻音乐", "背景音乐", "纯音乐"
    }
    
    local randomIndex = math.random(1, #randomKeywords)
    local keyword = randomKeywords[randomIndex]
    
    local url = "https://music.163.com/api/search/get?s="..MusicPlayer.urlEncode(keyword).."&type=1&limit="..tostring(count)
    local success, response = pcall(function() 
        return game:HttpGet(url) 
    end)
    
    if not success then
        if MusicPlayer.searchInfoLabel then
            MusicPlayer.searchInfoLabel.Text = "获取随机音乐失败，请检查网络连接"
        end
        return
    end
    
    local data = game:GetService("HttpService"):JSONDecode(response)

    if MusicPlayer.searchResultDropdown then
        MusicPlayer.searchResultDropdown:SetOptions({})
    end

    MusicPlayer.state.songList = {}
    MusicPlayer.lastSearchData = data.result and data.result.songs or {}

    for _, song in pairs(MusicPlayer.lastSearchData) do
        local artistName = song.artists and song.artists[1] and song.artists[1].name or "未知歌手"
        table.insert(MusicPlayer.state.songList, song.name .. " - " .. artistName)
    end

    if #MusicPlayer.state.songList > 0 then
        if not MusicPlayer.searchResultDropdown then
            MusicPlayer.searchResultDropdown = MusicPlayer.searchSection:Dropdown("随机音乐结果", "random_results", MusicPlayer.state.songList, function(selectedSong)
                local index = table.find(MusicPlayer.state.songList, selectedSong)
                local songData = MusicPlayer.lastSearchData[index]
                if not songData then return end
                local songId = tostring(songData.id)
                local fileName = MusicPlayer.config.musicRecordFolder.."/"..songId..".mp3"
                local songUrl = "http://music.163.com/song/media/outer/url?id="..songId..".mp3"
                local artistName = songData.artists and songData.artists[1] and songData.artists[1].name or "未知歌手"
                local songName = songData.name .. " - " .. artistName

                local function playLocalSong()
                    local soundId = MusicPlayer.getAssetPath(fileName)
                    table.insert(MusicPlayer.state.songHistory,{
                        songId = songId, soundId = soundId, songName = songName
                    })
                    MusicPlayer.state.currentSongIndex = #MusicPlayer.state.songHistory
                    MusicPlayer.state.playCount = MusicPlayer.state.playCount + 1
                    MusicPlayer.playSong(songId, soundId, songName)
                end

                if not MusicPlayer.isSongDownloaded(songId) then
                    if not isfolder(MusicPlayer.config.musicRecordFolder) then
                        makefolder(MusicPlayer.config.musicRecordFolder)
                    end
                    local success,err = pcall(function() 
                        local content = game:HttpGet(songUrl)
                        writefile(fileName, content) 
                    end)
                    if success then
                        MusicPlayer.state.downloadedMusic[songId]={name=songName,path=fileName,time=os.date("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")}
                        MusicPlayer.saveDownloadedMusic()
                        playLocalSong()
                    else
                        if MusicPlayer.playerInfoParagraph then
                            MusicPlayer.playerInfoParagraph.Text = "下载失败: " .. tostring(err)
                        end
                    end
                else
                    playLocalSong()
                end
            end)
        else
            MusicPlayer.searchResultDropdown:SetOptions(MusicPlayer.state.songList)
        end
        MusicPlayer.state.searchHistoryCount = MusicPlayer.state.searchHistoryCount + 1
        if MusicPlayer.searchInfoLabel then
            MusicPlayer.searchInfoLabel.Text = string.format(
                "随机关键词: %s\n获取歌曲数量: %d 首\n随机次数: %d 次",
                keyword,
                #MusicPlayer.state.songList,
                MusicPlayer.state.searchHistoryCount
            )
        end
    else
        if MusicPlayer.searchResultDropdown then
            MusicPlayer.searchResultDropdown:SetOptions({"获取随机音乐失败，请重试"})
        end
        if MusicPlayer.searchInfoLabel then
            MusicPlayer.searchInfoLabel.Text = "获取随机音乐失败，请点击按钮重试"
        end
    end
end

function MusicPlayer.controlPlay()
    if not MusicPlayer.state.isPlaying and MusicPlayer.state.currentSongIndex then
        local song = MusicPlayer.state.songHistory[MusicPlayer.state.currentSongIndex]
        MusicPlayer.playSong(song.songId, song.soundId, song.songName)
    elseif not MusicPlayer.state.currentSongIndex and MusicPlayer.state.songHistory and #MusicPlayer.state.songHistory > 0 then
        MusicPlayer.state.currentSongIndex = #MusicPlayer.state.songHistory
        local song = MusicPlayer.state.songHistory[MusicPlayer.state.currentSongIndex]
        MusicPlayer.playSong(song.songId, song.soundId, song.songName)
    else
        if MusicPlayer.playerInfoParagraph then
            MusicPlayer.playerInfoParagraph.Text = "没有可播放的歌曲，请先获取随机音乐"
        end
    end
end

function MusicPlayer.controlPause()
    if MusicPlayer.state.currentSound and MusicPlayer.state.isPlaying then
        MusicPlayer.state.lastPosition = MusicPlayer.state.currentSound.TimePosition
        MusicPlayer.state.currentSound:Pause()
        MusicPlayer.state.isPlaying = false
        MusicPlayer.stopCountdown()
        if MusicPlayer.playerInfoParagraph then
            MusicPlayer.playerInfoParagraph.Text = "已暂停 - 点击继续按钮恢复播放"
        end
    else
        if MusicPlayer.playerInfoParagraph then
            MusicPlayer.playerInfoParagraph.Text = "没有正在播放的歌曲"
        end
    end
end

function MusicPlayer.controlResume()
    if MusicPlayer.state.currentSound and not MusicPlayer.state.isPlaying then
        MusicPlayer.state.currentSound.TimePosition = MusicPlayer.state.lastPosition
        MusicPlayer.state.currentSound:Play()
        MusicPlayer.state.isPlaying = true
        
        if MusicPlayer.state.currentSound then
            MusicPlayer.state.currentSound.PlaybackSpeed = MusicPlayer.state.playbackSpeed
        end
        
        local song = MusicPlayer.state.songHistory[MusicPlayer.state.currentSongIndex]
        if song then
            MusicPlayer.state.countdownTask = _G.CreateHeartbeatConnection(function()
                if MusicPlayer.state.currentSound and MusicPlayer.state.currentSound.Playing then
                    local remain = MusicPlayer.state.currentSound.TimeLength - MusicPlayer.state.currentSound.TimePosition
                    local cur = MusicPlayer.state.currentSound.TimePosition
                    local total = MusicPlayer.state.currentSound.TimeLength
                    local loopStatus = MusicPlayer.state.isLooping and "开启" or "关闭"
                    local titleText = string.format(
                        "倒计时: %02d:%02d\n播放进度: %02d:%02d / %02d:%02d\n历史播放次数: %d\n播放倍数: %.1fx\n循环播放: %s",
                        math.floor(remain/60), math.floor(remain%60),
                        math.floor(cur/60), math.floor(cur%60),
                        math.floor(total/60), math.floor(total%60),
                        MusicPlayer.state.playCount or 0,
                        MusicPlayer.state.playbackSpeed or 1.0,
                        loopStatus
                    )
                    if MusicPlayer.playerInfoParagraph then
                        MusicPlayer.playerInfoParagraph.Text = titleText
                    end
                else
                    MusicPlayer.stopCountdown()
                end
            end)
        end
    else
        if MusicPlayer.playerInfoParagraph then
            MusicPlayer.playerInfoParagraph.Text = "没有可以继续播放的歌曲"
        end
    end
end

function MusicPlayer.controlReplay()
    if MusicPlayer.state.currentSongIndex then
        local song = MusicPlayer.state.songHistory[MusicPlayer.state.currentSongIndex]
        MusicPlayer.playSong(song.songId, song.soundId, song.songName)
    elseif MusicPlayer.state.songHistory and #MusicPlayer.state.songHistory > 0 then
        MusicPlayer.state.currentSongIndex = #MusicPlayer.state.songHistory
        local song = MusicPlayer.state.songHistory[MusicPlayer.state.currentSongIndex]
        MusicPlayer.playSong(song.songId, song.soundId, song.songName)
    else
        if MusicPlayer.playerInfoParagraph then
            MusicPlayer.playerInfoParagraph.Text = "没有可以重新播放的歌曲"
        end
    end
end

function MusicPlayer.controlPrevious()
    if MusicPlayer.state.currentSongIndex and MusicPlayer.state.currentSongIndex > 1 then
        MusicPlayer.state.currentSongIndex = MusicPlayer.state.currentSongIndex - 1
        local song = MusicPlayer.state.songHistory[MusicPlayer.state.currentSongIndex]
        MusicPlayer.playSong(song.songId, song.soundId, song.songName)
    elseif MusicPlayer.state.songHistory and #MusicPlayer.state.songHistory > 0 then
        MusicPlayer.state.currentSongIndex = 1
        local song = MusicPlayer.state.songHistory[MusicPlayer.state.currentSongIndex]
        MusicPlayer.playSong(song.songId, song.soundId, song.songName)
    else
        if MusicPlayer.playerInfoParagraph then
            MusicPlayer.playerInfoParagraph.Text = "没有上一首歌曲"
        end
    end
end

function MusicPlayer.controlNext()
    if MusicPlayer.state.currentSongIndex and MusicPlayer.state.currentSongIndex < #MusicPlayer.state.songHistory then
        MusicPlayer.state.currentSongIndex = MusicPlayer.state.currentSongIndex + 1
        local song = MusicPlayer.state.songHistory[MusicPlayer.state.currentSongIndex]
        MusicPlayer.playSong(song.songId, song.soundId, song.songName)
    elseif MusicPlayer.state.songHistory and #MusicPlayer.state.songHistory > 0 then
        MusicPlayer.state.currentSongIndex = #MusicPlayer.state.songHistory
        local song = MusicPlayer.state.songHistory[MusicPlayer.state.currentSongIndex]
        MusicPlayer.playSong(song.songId, song.soundId, song.songName)
    else
        if MusicPlayer.playerInfoParagraph then
            MusicPlayer.playerInfoParagraph.Text = "没有下一首歌曲"
        end
    end
end

function MusicPlayer.controlStop()
    if MusicPlayer.state.currentSound then
        MusicPlayer.state.lastPosition = 0
        MusicPlayer.state.currentSound:Stop()
        MusicPlayer.state.currentSound:Destroy()
        MusicPlayer.state.currentSound = nil
        MusicPlayer.state.isPlaying = false
        MusicPlayer.stopCountdown()
        if MusicPlayer.playerInfoParagraph then
            MusicPlayer.playerInfoParagraph.Text = "已停止播放"
        end
    else
        if MusicPlayer.playerInfoParagraph then
            MusicPlayer.playerInfoParagraph.Text = "没有正在播放的歌曲"
        end
    end
end

function MusicPlayer.refreshLibrary()
    local files = MusicPlayer.refreshFolderList()
    local displayNames = {}

    if #files == 0 then
        table.insert(displayNames, "无下载文件")
    else
        for _, file in ipairs(files) do
            table.insert(displayNames, file.name)
        end
    end

    if MusicPlayer.libraryDropdown then
        MusicPlayer.libraryDropdown:SetOptions(displayNames)
    end
end

function MusicPlayer.deleteSelected()
    local selectedItem = MusicPlayer.libraryDropdown:GetValue()
    if not selectedItem or selectedItem=="无下载文件" then
        return
    end
    
    local files = MusicPlayer.refreshFolderList()
    local selectedFile
    for _, item in ipairs(files) do
        if item.name == selectedItem then
            selectedFile = item.path
            break
        end
    end
    
    if selectedFile and isfile(selectedFile) then
        local songId = selectedFile:match("([^/]+)$"):gsub(".mp3$","")
        if MusicPlayer.state.downloadedMusic[songId] then
            MusicPlayer.state.downloadedMusic[songId] = nil
            MusicPlayer.saveDownloadedMusic()
        end

        delfile(selectedFile)
        MusicPlayer.refreshLibrary()
    end
end

function MusicPlayer.clearLibrary()
    local files = MusicPlayer.refreshFolderList()
    local count = 0

    for _, file in ipairs(files) do
        if isfile(file.path) then
            delfile(file.path)
            count = count + 1

            local songId = file.path:match("([^/]+)$"):gsub(".mp3$","")
            if MusicPlayer.state.downloadedMusic[songId] then
                MusicPlayer.state.downloadedMusic[songId] = nil
            end
        end
    end

    MusicPlayer.saveDownloadedMusic()
    if MusicPlayer.libraryDropdown then
        MusicPlayer.libraryDropdown:SetOptions({"无下载文件"})
    end
end

function MusicPlayer.setPlaybackSpeed(speed)
    if speed and speed >= 0.001 and speed <= 100000.0 then
        MusicPlayer.state.playbackSpeed = speed
        if MusicPlayer.state.currentSound then
            MusicPlayer.state.currentSound.PlaybackSpeed = MusicPlayer.state.playbackSpeed
        end
        if MusicPlayer.playerInfoParagraph then
            MusicPlayer.playerInfoParagraph.Text = string.format("播放倍数已设置为: %.1fx", MusicPlayer.state.playbackSpeed)
        end
    end
end

    MusicPlayer.searchSection1 = musicTab:section("脚本", true)
    MusicPlayer.searchSection1:Button("网易云音乐", function()
local SEARCH_LIMIT = 100
local UI_SIZE = Vector2.new(640, 360)

local BASE_DIR = "tubers93脚本/音乐记录"

local function ensureFolder()
    local okIs, isf = pcall(function()
        return isfolder
    end)
    local okMk, mkf = pcall(function()
        return makefolder
    end)

    if okIs and type(isf) == "function" and okMk and type(mkf) == "function" then
        local ok, exists = pcall(function()
            return isfolder(BASE_DIR)
        end)
        if not ok or not exists then
            pcall(function()
                makefolder(BASE_DIR)
            end)
        end
    elseif okMk and type(mkf) == "function" then
        pcall(function()
            makefolder(BASE_DIR)
        end)
    end
end

ensureFolder()

local function addStroke(inst, t, c)
    local s = Instance.new("UIStroke")
    s.Thickness = t or 1
    s.Color = c or THEME.Stroke
    s.Transparency = 0.35
    s.ApplyStrokeMode = Enum.ApplyStrokeMode.Border
    s.Parent = inst
    return s
end

local function addPad(inst, l, r, t, b)
    local p = Instance.new("UIPadding")
    p.PaddingLeft = UDim.new(0, l or 0)
    p.PaddingRight = UDim.new(0, r or 0)
    p.PaddingTop = UDim.new(0, t or 0)
    p.PaddingBottom = UDim.new(0, b or 0)
    p.Parent = inst
    return p
end

local function addGradient(inst, rot, a, b)
    local g = Instance.new("UIGradient")
    g.Rotation = rot or 90
    g.Color = ColorSequence.new(a or THEME.Panel, b or THEME.Bg)
    g.Parent = inst
    return g
end

local function hoverFrame(frame, normal, over)
    frame.MouseEnter:Connect(function()
        pcall(function()
            TweenService:Create(
                frame,
                TweenInfo.new(0.12, Enum.EasingStyle.Quad, Enum.EasingDirection.Out),
                { BackgroundColor3 = over }
            ):Play()
        end)
    end)

    frame.MouseLeave:Connect(function()
        pcall(function()
            TweenService:Create(
                frame,
                TweenInfo.new(0.12, Enum.EasingStyle.Quad, Enum.EasingDirection.Out),
                { BackgroundColor3 = normal }
            ):Play()
        end)
    end)
end

local function preloadThumbs()
    local assets = {}
    for _, id in pairs(ICON_IDS) do
        if type(id) == "string" and id:find("rbxthumb://") then
            table.insert(assets, id)
        end
    end
    pcall(function()
        ContentProvider:PreloadAsync(assets)
    end)
end

local function warmupThumbImages(parentGui)
    local warm = Instance.new("Frame")
    warm.Name = "ThumbWarmup"
    warm.Size = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, 0)
    warm.Position = UDim2.new(0, -9999, 0, -9999)
    warm.BackgroundTransparency = 1
    warm.Parent = parentGui

    for _, id in pairs(ICON_IDS) do
        if type(id) == "string" and id:find("rbxthumb://") then
            local img = Instance.new("ImageLabel")
            img.Size = UDim2.new(0, 1, 0, 1)
            img.BackgroundTransparency = 1
            img.Image = id
            img.Parent = warm
        end
    end
end

local function safeHttpGet(url)
    local ok, res = pcall(function()
        return game:HttpGet(url)
    end)
    if ok then
        return res
    end
    return nil
end

local function urlEncode(str)
    return HttpService:UrlEncode(str)
end

local function formatTime(sec)
    if not sec or sec ~= sec then
        return "00:00"
    end
    sec = math.floor(sec)
    return string.format("%02d:%02d", math.floor(sec / 60), sec % 60)
end

local function formatMs(ms)
    if not ms or ms <= 0 then
        return "--:--"
    end
    local sec = math.floor(ms / 1000)
    return formatTime(sec)
end

local function parseLRC(lrcText)
    if not lrcText then
        return {}
    end
    local out = {}
    for line in lrcText:gmatch("[^\r\n]+") do
        for tag, txt in line:gmatch("%[(%d+:%d+%.?%d*)%](.*)") do
            local m, s = tag:match("(%d+):(%d+%.?%d*)")
            if m and s then
                local t = tonumber(m) * 60 + tonumber(s)
                txt = txt:gsub("^%s+", ""):gsub("%s+$", "")
                table.insert(out, { time = t, text = txt })
            end
        end
    end
    table.sort(out, function(a, b)
        return a.time < b.time
    end)
    return out
end

local function fetchLyrics(songId)
    local url2 = "https://music.163.com/api/song/lyric?os=pc&id="
        .. tostring(songId)
        .. "&lv=-1&kv=-1&tv=-1"
    local r2 = safeHttpGet(url2)
    if r2 then
        local ok2, j2 = pcall(function()
            return HttpService:JSONDecode(r2)
        end)
        if ok2 and j2 then
            local lrc = (j2.lrc and j2.lrc.lyric) or j2.lyric
            if lrc and lrc ~= "" then
                return parseLRC(lrc)
            end
        end
    end
    return {}
end

local function saveData()
    local data = { history = historyList, favorites = favoriteMap }
    local ok, encoded = pcall(function()
        return HttpService:JSONEncode(data)
    end)
    if ok and encoded then
        pcall(function()
            writefile(DATA_FILE, encoded)
        end)
    end
end

local function loadData()
    local okRead, content = pcall(function()
        return readfile(DATA_FILE)
    end)

    if not okRead or not content or content == "" then
        historyList = {}
        favoriteMap = {}
        saveData()
        return
    end

    local okDecode, data = pcall(function()
        return HttpService:JSONDecode(content)
    end)

    if okDecode and data then
        historyList = data.history or {}
        favoriteMap = data.favorites or {}
        for k, v in pairs(favoriteMap) do
            if v == true then
                favoriteMap[k] = { title = "未知", duration = 0 }
            end
        end
    else
        historyList = {}
        favoriteMap = {}
        saveData()
    end
end

local function rebuildFavoriteList()
    favoriteList = {}
    for id, meta in pairs(favoriteMap) do
        table.insert(favoriteList, {
            id = tonumber(id),
            title = meta.title,
            duration = meta.duration,
        })
    end
    table.sort(favoriteList, function(a, b)
        return a.id < b.id
    end)
end

local function isFavorite(id)
    return favoriteMap[tostring(id)] ~= nil
end

local function getFavoriteMeta(id)
    local v = favoriteMap[tostring(id)]
    if type(v) == "table" then
        return v
    end
    if v == true then
        return { title = "未知", duration = 0 }
    end
    return nil
end

local function addToFavorites(item)
    if not item or not item.id then
        return
    end
    favoriteMap[tostring(item.id)] = {
        title = item.title or "未知",
        duration = item.duration or 0,
    }
    saveData()
    rebuildFavoriteList()
end

local function removeFromFavorites(id)
    favoriteMap[tostring(id)] = nil
    saveData()
    rebuildFavoriteList()
end

local function toggleFavorite(item)
    if not item then
        return
    end
    if isFavorite(item.id) then
        removeFromFavorites(item.id)
    else
        addToFavorites(item)
    end
end

local function addToHistory(item)
    if not item or not item.id then
        return
    end

    for i = #historyList, 1, -1 do
        if tonumber(historyList[i].id) == tonumber(item.id) then
            table.remove(historyList, i)
        end
    end

    table.insert(historyList, 1, {
        id = item.id,
        title = item.title or "未知",
        duration = item.duration or 0,
        time = os.time(),
    })

    if #historyList > MAX_HISTORY then
        table.remove(historyList)
    end

    saveData()
end

local function downloadMp3(songId)
    local filename = BASE_DIR .. "/" .. tostring(songId) .. ".mp3"

    local ok, customAsset = pcall(function()
        return getcustomasset(filename)
    end)
    if ok and customAsset and customAsset ~= "" and customAsset ~= false then
        return customAsset, false
    end

    local url = "http://music.163.com/song/media/outer/url?id=" .. tostring(songId) .. ".mp3"
    local ok2, content = pcall(function()
        return game:HttpGet(url)
    end)
    if not ok2 or not content or content == "" or content:len() < 100 then
        return nil, false
    end

    local wok = pcall(function()
        writefile(filename, content)
    end)
    if not wok then
        return nil, false
    end

    local ok3, asset = pcall(function()
        return getcustomasset(filename)
    end)
    if not ok3 then
        return nil, false
    end

    return asset, true
end

local function makeIconBtn(imageAsset, posScale)
    local b = Instance.new("ImageButton", btnFrame)
    b.Size = UDim2.new(0, 48, 0, 40)
    b.Position = UDim2.new(posScale, 0, 0, 0)
    b.Image = imageAsset
    b.ImageColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(240, 240, 240)
    b.BackgroundTransparency = 1
    b.BorderSizePixel = 0
    b.AutoButtonColor = true
    Instance.new("UICorner", b).CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 10)
    return b
end
