timeLabel.TextColor3 = THEME.SubText

local function updatePlayingHighlight()
    if not currentIndex or not playQueue[currentIndex] then
        return
    end

    local playingId = playQueue[currentIndex].id
    for _, r in ipairs(results:GetChildren()) do
        if r:IsA("Frame") then
            local rid = r:GetAttribute("SongId")
            local nameL = r:FindFirstChild("SongName")
            local active = (rid ~= nil and rid == playingId)

            if nameL then
                nameL.TextColor3 = active and THEME.Red or THEME.Text
                nameL.Font = active and Enum.Font.GothamBold or Enum.Font.Gotham
            end
        end
    end
end

local function highlightLyricByTime(pos)
    if #lyrics == 0 or #lyricLabels == 0 then
        return
    end

    local idx = 1
    for i = 1, #lyrics do
        if lyrics[i].time <= pos then
            idx = i
        else
            break
        end
    end

    for i, lbl in ipairs(lyricLabels) do
        if lbl and lbl:IsA("TextLabel") then
            if i == idx then
                lbl.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
                lbl.Font = Enum.Font.GothamBold
                lbl.TextSize = 18
            else
                lbl.TextColor3 = THEME.SubText
                lbl.Font = Enum.Font.Gotham
                lbl.TextSize = 16
            end
        end
    end
end

local function updateLyricsUI(pos)
    for _, child in pairs(lyricsScroll:GetChildren()) do
        if child:IsA("TextLabel") then
            child:Destroy()
        end
    end
    lyricLabels = {}

    if #lyrics == 0 then
        local lbl = Instance.new("TextLabel", lyricsScroll)
        lbl.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, 40)
        lbl.BackgroundTransparency = 1
        lbl.Font = Enum.Font.Gotham
        lbl.TextSize = 16
        lbl.TextColor3 = THEME.SubText
        lbl.Text = "未找到歌词"
        lbl.TextWrapped = true
        table.insert(lyricLabels, lbl)
    else
        for idx, ln in ipairs(lyrics) do
            local lbl = Instance.new("TextLabel", lyricsScroll)
            lbl.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, LYRICS_LINE_HEIGHT)
            lbl.BackgroundTransparency = 1
            lbl.Font = Enum.Font.Gotham
            lbl.TextSize = 16
            lbl.TextColor3 = THEME.SubText
            lbl.Text = ln.text ~= "" and ln.text or "..."
            lbl.TextWrapped = true
            lbl.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Center
            lbl.LayoutOrder = idx
            lbl:SetAttribute("LyricIndex", idx)
            table.insert(lyricLabels, lbl)
        end
    end

    task.wait(0.02)
    local totalH = llayout.AbsoluteContentSize.Y + 10
    lyricsScroll.CanvasSize = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, totalH)
    lyricsScroll.CanvasPosition = Vector2.new(0, 0)

    if pos then
        highlightLyricByTime(pos)
    end
end

local function handlePlaybackHeartbeat()
    if playHeartbeat then
        playHeartbeat:Disconnect()
        playHeartbeat = nil
    end
    if lyricHeartbeat then
        lyricHeartbeat:Disconnect()
        lyricHeartbeat = nil
    end

    playHeartbeat = RunService.Heartbeat:Connect(function()
        if currentSound and isPlaying and not draggingProgress then
            local pos = currentSound.TimePosition
            local total = currentSound.TimeLength or 0
            if total == 0 then
                timeLabel.Text = formatTime(pos) .. " / --:--"
            else
                timeLabel.Text = formatTime(pos) .. " / " .. formatTime(total)
                local r = math.clamp(pos / total, 0, 1)
                progressFill.Size = UDim2.new(r, 0, 1, 0)
                progressThumb.Position = UDim2.new(r, 0, 0.5, 0)
            end
        end
    end)

    lyricHeartbeat = RunService.Heartbeat:Connect(function()
        if not currentSound or not currentSound.Playing or #lyrics == 0 then
            return
        end
        highlightLyricByTime(currentSound.TimePosition)
    end)
end

local lyricTapInput = nil
local lyricTapStartPos = nil
local lyricTapValid = false
local TAP_MOVE_THRESHOLD = 10

local function pointInGui(guiObj, screenPos)
    local p = guiObj.AbsolutePosition
    local s = guiObj.AbsoluteSize
    return screenPos.X >= p.X
        and screenPos.X <= p.X + s.X
        and screenPos.Y >= p.Y
        and screenPos.Y <= p.Y + s.Y
end

local function trySeekLyricAt(screenPos)
    if not currentSound or #lyrics == 0 or #lyricLabels == 0 then
        return
    end

    local p0 = lyricsScroll.AbsolutePosition
    local s0 = lyricsScroll.AbsoluteSize
    if screenPos.X < p0.X
        or screenPos.X > p0.X + s0.X
        or screenPos.Y < p0.Y
        or screenPos.Y > p0.Y + s0.Y
    then
        return
    end

    for i, lbl in ipairs(lyricLabels) do
        if lbl and lbl:IsA("TextLabel") and lbl.Visible then
            local p = lbl.AbsolutePosition
            local s = lbl.AbsoluteSize

            if screenPos.X >= p.X
                and screenPos.X <= p.X + s.X
                and screenPos.Y >= p.Y
                and screenPos.Y <= p.Y + s.Y
            then
                local tb = lbl.TextBounds
                if tb.X > 0 and tb.Y > 0 then
                    local textLeft = p.X + (s.X - tb.X) / 2
                    local textTop = p.Y + (s.Y - tb.Y) / 2
                    local textRight = textLeft + tb.X
                    local textBottom = textTop + tb.Y

                    if screenPos.X < textLeft
                        or screenPos.X > textRight
                        or screenPos.Y < textTop
                        or screenPos.Y > textBottom
                    then
                        return
                    end
                end

                local ln = lyrics[i]
                if ln and ln.time then
                    local t = ln.time
                    if currentSound.TimeLength and currentSound.TimeLength > 0 then
                        t = math.clamp(t, 0, math.max(0, currentSound.TimeLength - 0.05))
                    end
                    currentSound.TimePosition = t
                    highlightLyricByTime(t)
                end
                return
            end
        end
    end
end

UserInputService.InputBegan:Connect(function(input)
    if input.UserInputType ~= Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1
        and input.UserInputType ~= Enum.UserInputType.Touch
    then
        return
    end

    if pointInGui(lyricsScroll, input.Position) then
        lyricTapInput = input
        lyricTapStartPos = input.Position
        lyricTapValid = true
    else
        lyricTapInput = nil
        lyricTapStartPos = nil
        lyricTapValid = false
    end
end)

UserInputService.InputEnded:Connect(function(input)
    if not lyricTapValid then
        return
    end
    if input ~= lyricTapInput then
        return
    end

    local startPos = lyricTapStartPos
    lyricTapInput = nil
    lyricTapStartPos = nil
    lyricTapValid = false

    if not startPos then
        return
    end

    local moved = (input.Position - startPos).Magnitude
    if moved > TAP_MOVE_THRESHOLD then
        return
    end

    trySeekLyricAt(input.Position)
end)

local function skipToNextFrom(index)
    if PLAY_MODE == 2 then
        task.spawn(function()
            playSongByIndex(index, 0)
        end)
    else
        local nextIndex = index + 1
        if nextIndex <= #playQueue then
            task.spawn(function()
                playSongByIndex(nextIndex, 0)
            end)
        else
            isPlaying = false
            playToggle.Image = ICON_IDS.Play
        end
    end
end

function playSongByIndex(index, seekTime)
    if isChangingSong then
        return
    end
    isChangingSong = true

    local item = playQueue[index]
    if not item then
        isChangingSong = false
        return
    end

    currentIndex = index
    pausedTimePosition = nil

    if currentSound then
        pcall(function()
            currentSound:Stop()
        end)
        pcall(function()
            currentSound:Destroy()
        end)
        currentSound = nil
    end

    if not item.asset then
        local asset = downloadMp3(item.id)
        if not asset then
            isChangingSong = false
            skipToNextFrom(index)
            return
        end
        item.asset = asset
        playQueue[index].asset = asset
    end

    local snd = Instance.new("Sound")
    snd.SoundId = item.asset
    snd.Volume = currentVolume
    snd.Looped = false
    snd.TimePosition = seekTime or 0
    snd.Parent = workspace

    if not snd.IsLoaded then
        pcall(function()
            snd.Loaded:Wait(5)
        end)
    end

    if (not snd.IsLoaded) or snd.TimeLength == 0 then
        pcall(function()
            snd:Destroy()
        end)
        currentSound = nil
        isChangingSong = false
        skipToNextFrom(index)
        return
    end

    snd:Play()
    currentSound = snd
    isPlaying = true
    playToggle.Image = ICON_IDS.Pause
    titleLabel.Text = item.title

    addToHistory(item)

    lyrics = fetchLyrics(item.id)
    updateLyricsUI(seekTime or 0)
    handlePlaybackHeartbeat()

    snd.Ended:Once(function()
        if PLAY_MODE == 2 then
            task.spawn(function()
                playSongByIndex(currentIndex, 0)
            end)
        else
            if currentIndex < #playQueue then
                task.spawn(function()
                    playSongByIndex(currentIndex + 1, 0)
                end)
            else
                task.spawn(function()
                    playSongByIndex(1, 0)
                end)
            end
        end
    end)

    isChangingSong = false
    updatePlayingHighlight()
end

local function clearResults()
    for _, c in pairs(results:GetChildren()) do
        if c:IsA("Frame") or c:IsA("TextLabel") then
            c:Destroy()
        end
    end
end

local function findTitleById(id)
    for _, it in ipairs(playQueue) do
        if tonumber(it.id) == tonumber(id) and it.title then
            return it.title
        end
    end
    for _, it in ipairs(historyList) do
        if tonumber(it.id) == tonumber(id) and it.title then
            return it.title
        end
    end
    for _, s in ipairs(songList) do
        if tonumber(s.id) == tonumber(id) then
            local t = s.name or "未知"
            local artist = (s.artists and s.artists[1] and s.artists[1].name) or "未知"
            return t .. " - " .. artist
        end
    end
    local favMeta = getFavoriteMeta(id)
    if favMeta and favMeta.title then
        return favMeta.title
    end
    return "未知"
end

local function findDurationById(id)
    for _, it in ipairs(playQueue) do
        if tonumber(it.id) == tonumber(id) and it.duration then
            return it.duration
        end
    end
    for _, it in ipairs(historyList) do
        if tonumber(it.id) == tonumber(id) and it.duration then
            return it.duration
        end
    end
    for _, s in ipairs(songList) do
        if tonumber(s.id) == tonumber(id) then
            return s.duration or s.dt or 0
        end
    end
    local favMeta = getFavoriteMeta(id)
    if favMeta and favMeta.duration then
        return favMeta.duration
    end
    return 0
end

local function buildQueueFromList(list, startIndex)
    playQueue = {}
    for _, item in ipairs(list) do
        table.insert(playQueue, {
            id = item.id,
            asset = item.asset,
            title = item.title or findTitleById(item.id),
            duration = item.duration or findDurationById(item.id),
        })
    end
    currentIndex = startIndex or 1
    task.spawn(function()
        playSongByIndex(currentIndex)
    end)
end

local function setHeader(title, count)
    leftHeader.Text = string.format("%s (%d)", title, count or 0)
end

local function renderList(list, headerName, emptyHint)
    clearResults()
    setHeader(headerName or "列表", list and #list or 0)
    clearHistoryBtn.Visible = (leftView == "history")

    if not list or #list == 0 then
        local hint = Instance.new("TextLabel", results)
        hint.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, 36)
        hint.BackgroundTransparency = 1
        hint.Font = Enum.Font.Gotham
        hint.TextSize = 13
        hint.TextColor3 = THEME.Muted
        hint.Text = emptyHint or "暂无内容"
        hint.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Center
        hint.LayoutOrder = 1
        return
    end

    for i, s in ipairs(list) do
        local id = s.id
        local titleText = s.title or findTitleById(id)
        local durationMs = s.duration or findDurationById(id)

        local row = Instance.new("Frame", results)
        row:SetAttribute("SongId", id)
        row.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, 48)
        row.BackgroundColor3 = THEME.Panel2
        row.BackgroundTransparency = 0
        row.BorderSizePixel = 0
        Instance.new("UICorner", row).CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 10)
        addStroke(row, 1, THEME.Stroke)

        local idxL = Instance.new("TextLabel", row)
        idxL.Size = UDim2.new(0, 30, 1, 0)
        idxL.Position = UDim2.new(0, 14, 0, 0)
        idxL.BackgroundTransparency = 1
        idxL.Font = Enum.Font.GothamBold
        idxL.TextSize = 14
        idxL.TextColor3 = THEME.Muted
        idxL.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left
        idxL.Text = string.format("%02d", i)

        local playBtn = Instance.new("TextButton", row)
        playBtn.Size = UDim2.new(1, -86 - 40, 1, 0)
        playBtn.Position = UDim2.new(0, 40, 0, 0)
        playBtn.BackgroundTransparency = 1
        playBtn.Text = ""
        playBtn.AutoButtonColor = false

        local nameL = Instance.new("TextLabel", row)
        nameL.Name = "SongName"
        nameL.Size = UDim2.new(1, -135, 1, 0)
        nameL.Position = UDim2.new(0, 38, 0, 0)
        nameL.BackgroundTransparency = 1
        nameL.Font = Enum.Font.Gotham
        nameL.TextSize = 14
        nameL.TextColor3 = THEME.Text
        nameL.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left
        nameL.Text = titleText
        nameL.TextTruncate = Enum.TextTruncate.AtEnd
        nameL.ClipsDescendants = true

        local durL = Instance.new("TextLabel", row)
        durL.Size = UDim2.new(0, 42, 1, 0)
        durL.Position = UDim2.new(1, -82, 0, 0)
        durL.BackgroundTransparency = 1
        durL.Font = Enum.Font.Gotham
        durL.TextSize = 12
        durL.TextColor3 = THEME.SubText
        durL.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Right
        durL.Text = formatMs(durationMs)

        local favBtn = Instance.new("TextButton", row)
        favBtn.Size = UDim2.new(0, 40, 1, 0)
        favBtn.Position = UDim2.new(1, -40, 0, 0)
        favBtn.BackgroundTransparency = 1
        favBtn.Font = Enum.Font.GothamBold
        favBtn.TextSize = 18
        favBtn.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 214, 120)
        favBtn.Text = isFavorite(id) and "★" or "☆"
        favBtn.AutoButtonColor = false
        favBtn.MouseEnter:Connect(function()
            favBtn.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 232, 160)
        end)
        favBtn.MouseLeave:Connect(function()
            favBtn.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 214, 120)
        end)

        favBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
            toggleFavorite({ id = id, title = titleText, duration = durationMs })
            favBtn.Text = isFavorite(id) and "★" or "☆"
            if leftView == "favorite" then
                refreshLeftView()
            end
        end)

        playBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
            currentPlayingRow = row
            currentPlayingText = nameL
            updatePlayingHighlight()
            buildQueueFromList(list, i)
        end)

        row.LayoutOrder = i
    end

    updatePlayingHighlight()
end

local function renderSearchResults(songs)
    local list = {}
    for _, s in ipairs(songs) do
        local t = s.name or "未知"
        local artist = (s.artists and s.artists[1] and s.artists[1].name) or "未知"
        local dms = s.duration or s.dt or 0
        table.insert(list, {
            id = s.id,
            title = t .. " - " .. artist,
            duration = dms,
            asset = nil,
        })
    end
    renderList(list, "搜索结果", "未搜索任何歌曲")
end

local function renderHistory()
    local list = {}
    for _, h in ipairs(historyList) do
        table.insert(list, {
            id = h.id,
            title = h.title or findTitleById(h.id),
            duration = h.duration or 0,
            asset = nil,
        })
    end
    renderList(list, "播放列表", "未播放任何歌曲")
end

local function renderFavorites()
    rebuildFavoriteList()
    for _, it in ipairs(favoriteList) do
        it.title = it.title or findTitleById(it.id)
        it.duration = it.duration or findDurationById(it.id)
        it.asset = nil
    end
    renderList(favoriteList, "收藏列表", "未收藏任何歌曲")
end

local function setTabActive(btn, active)
    btn.TextColor3 = active and THEME.Text or THEME.SubText
    local ind = btn:FindFirstChild("Indicator")
    if ind then
        ind.Visible = active
    end
end

refreshLeftView = function()
    setTabActive(tabSearch, leftView == "search")
    setTabActive(tabHistory, leftView == "history")
    setTabActive(tabFav, leftView == "favorite")

    if leftView == "search" then
        renderSearchResults(songList)
    elseif leftView == "history" then
        renderHistory()
    else
        renderFavorites()
    end

    updatePlayingHighlight()
end

local scrollMemoryY = { search = 0, history = 0, favorite = 0 }

local function saveScrollPos()
    if results then
        scrollMemoryY[leftView] = results.CanvasPosition.Y
    end
end

local function restoreScrollPos(viewKey)
    task.spawn(function()
        RunService.Heartbeat:Wait()
        RunService.Heartbeat:Wait()

        local y = scrollMemoryY[viewKey] or 0
        local maxY = 0
        pcall(function()
            maxY = math.max(0, results.AbsoluteCanvasSize.Y - results.AbsoluteSize.Y)
        end)

        results.CanvasPosition = Vector2.new(0, math.clamp(y, 0, maxY))
    end)
end

local function search(keyword)
    if not keyword or keyword == "" then
        return
    end

    scrollMemoryY.search = 0
    local url = ("https://music.163.com/api/search/get?s=%s&type=1&offset=0&total=true&limit=%d"):format(
        urlEncode(keyword),
        SEARCH_LIMIT
    )

    local res = safeHttpGet(url)
    if not res then
        return
    end

    local ok, j = pcall(function()
        return HttpService:JSONDecode(res)
    end)
    if not ok or not j or not j.result or not j.result.songs then
        return
    end

    songList = j.result.songs
    leftView = "search"
    refreshLeftView()
end

searchBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
    search(searchBox.Text)
end)

searchBox.FocusLost:Connect(function(enter)
    if enter then
        search(searchBox.Text)
    end
end)

toggleBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
    main.Visible = not main.Visible
    toggleBtn.TextColor3 = main.Visible and TOGGLE_ON_COLOR or TOGGLE_OFF_COLOR
end)

tabSearch.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
    saveScrollPos()
    leftView = "search"
    refreshLeftView()
    restoreScrollPos("search")
end)

tabHistory.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
    saveScrollPos()
    leftView = "history"
    refreshLeftView()
    restoreScrollPos("history")
end)

tabFav.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
    saveScrollPos()
    leftView = "favorite"
    refreshLeftView()
    restoreScrollPos("favorite")
end)

clearHistoryBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
    historyList = {}
    saveData()
    refreshLeftView()
end)

progressBg.Active = true
progressBg.Selectable = true

local draggingInput = nil
local dragPointerX = 0
local wasPlayingBeforeDrag = false

local targetRatio = 0
local smoothRatio = 0
local lastSeek = 0

local dragStepConn, dragChangedConn, dragEndedConn

local function ratioFromScreenX(screenX)
    local x = screenX - progressBg.AbsolutePosition.X
    return math.clamp(x / progressBg.AbsoluteSize.X, 0, 1)
end

local function applyVisual(r)
    progressFill.Size = UDim2.new(r, 0, 1, 0)
    progressThumb.Position = UDim2.new(r, 0, 0.5, 0)
end

local function seekToRatio(r)
    if not currentSound or currentSound.TimeLength == 0 then
        return
    end
    local target = r * currentSound.TimeLength
    currentSound.TimePosition = target
    timeLabel.Text = formatTime(target) .. " / " .. formatTime(currentSound.TimeLength)

    if not wasPlayingBeforeDrag then
        pausedTimePosition = target
    end
end

local function stopDragging()
    draggingProgress = false
    draggingInput = nil

    if dragStepConn then
        dragStepConn:Disconnect()
        dragStepConn = nil
    end
    if dragChangedConn then
        dragChangedConn:Disconnect()
        dragChangedConn = nil
    end
    if dragEndedConn then
        dragEndedConn:Disconnect()
        dragEndedConn = nil
    end

    if currentSound then
        if wasPlayingBeforeDrag then
            if not currentSound.Playing then
                currentSound:Play()
            end
            isPlaying = true
            playToggle.Image = ICON_IDS.Pause
        else
            currentSound:Pause()
            isPlaying = false
            playToggle.Image = ICON_IDS.Play
        end
    end
end

progressBg.InputBegan:Connect(function(input)
    if draggingProgress then
        return
    end
    if input.UserInputType ~= Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1
        and input.UserInputType ~= Enum.UserInputType.Touch
    then
        return
    end
    if not currentSound or currentSound.TimeLength == 0 then
        return
    end

    draggingProgress = true
    draggingInput = input
    dragPointerX = input.Position.X

    wasPlayingBeforeDrag = (isPlaying and currentSound.Playing)

    targetRatio = ratioFromScreenX(dragPointerX)
    smoothRatio = targetRatio
    applyVisual(smoothRatio)
    seekToRatio(smoothRatio)

    if wasPlayingBeforeDrag and not currentSound.Playing then
        currentSound:Play()
    end

    dragChangedConn = UserInputService.InputChanged:Connect(function(changed)
        if not draggingProgress then
            return
        end
        if draggingInput and changed == draggingInput then
            dragPointerX = changed.Position.X
        elseif draggingInput == nil and changed.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Touch then
            dragPointerX = changed.Position.X
        end
    end)

    dragEndedConn = UserInputService.InputEnded:Connect(function(ended)
        if not draggingProgress then
            return
        end
        if draggingInput and ended == draggingInput then
            stopDragging()
        end
    end)

    dragStepConn = RunService.RenderStepped:Connect(function(dt)
        if not draggingProgress or not currentSound then
            return
        end

        targetRatio = ratioFromScreenX(dragPointerX)

        local alpha = 1 - math.exp(-dt * 22)
        smoothRatio = smoothRatio + (targetRatio - smoothRatio) * alpha

        applyVisual(smoothRatio)

        if tick() - lastSeek >= 0.03 then
            lastSeek = tick()
            seekToRatio(smoothRatio)
        end

        if wasPlayingBeforeDrag and not currentSound.Playing then
            currentSound:Play()
        end
    end)
end)

local function setVolume(ratio)
    local r = math.clamp(ratio, 0, 1)
    currentVolume = r
    volumeFill.Size = UDim2.new(r, 0, 1, 0)
    if currentSound then
        currentSound.Volume = r
    end
    if r == 0 and not isMuted then
        isMuted = true
    elseif r > 0 and isMuted then
        isMuted = false
    end
end

local function updateVolume(input)
    local relativeX = input.Position.X - volumeBg.AbsolutePosition.X
    setVolume(relativeX / volumeBg.AbsoluteSize.X)
end

volumeBg.InputBegan:Connect(function(input)
    if input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1
        or input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Touch
    then
        draggingVolume = true
        updateVolume(input)
    end
end)

volumeBg.InputChanged:Connect(function(input)
    if draggingVolume then
        updateVolume(input)
    end
end)

volumeBg.InputEnded:Connect(function()
    draggingVolume = false
end)

local function setMuteIcon(iconUrl)
    muteToggle.Image = iconUrl
    muteToggle.ImageTransparency = 0.3
    task.spawn(function()
        local t0 = tick()
        while tick() - t0 < 3 do
            if muteToggle.IsLoaded then
                break
            end
            task.wait(0.05)
        end
        muteToggle.ImageTransparency = 0
    end)
end

muteToggle.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
    if isMuted then
        isMuted = false
        local restored = lastVolume > 0.05 and lastVolume or 0.5
        setVolume(restored)
        setMuteIcon(ICON_IDS.Mute_Off)
    else
        isMuted = true
        lastVolume = currentVolume
        setVolume(0)
        setMuteIcon(ICON_IDS.Mute_On)
    end
end)

playToggle.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
    if not currentSound then
        return
    end

    if isPlaying then
        pausedTimePosition = currentSound.TimePosition
        currentSound:Pause()
        isPlaying = false
        playToggle.Image = ICON_IDS.Play
    else
        if pausedTimePosition and pausedTimePosition > 0 then
            currentSound.TimePosition = pausedTimePosition
        end
        currentSound:Play()
        isPlaying = true
        playToggle.Image = ICON_IDS.Pause
    end
end)

prevBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
    if isChangingSong then
        return
    end
    if currentIndex and currentIndex > 1 then
        playSongByIndex(currentIndex - 1)
    end
end)

nextBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
    if isChangingSong then
        return
    end
    if currentIndex and currentIndex < #playQueue then
        playSongByIndex(currentIndex + 1)
    end
end)

modeToggle.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
    PLAY_MODE = (PLAY_MODE == 1) and 2 or 1
    modeToggle.Image = MODE_ICONS[PLAY_MODE]

    if PLAY_MODE == 2 then
        if (not currentSound) or (not currentSound.Playing) then
            if currentIndex then
                task.spawn(function()
                    playSongByIndex(currentIndex, 0)
                end)
            end
        end
    end
end)

loadData()
rebuildFavoriteList()
refreshLeftView()
    end)        
    MusicPlayer.searchSection1:Button("关闭网易云音乐", function()
local player = game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer
local playerGui = player:FindFirstChildOfClass("PlayerGui")

local gui = playerGui:FindFirstChild("NeteaseMiniPlayer")
if gui then
    gui:Destroy()
end
    end)
    MusicPlayer.searchSection = musicTab:section("获取音乐(随机音乐类)", false)
    MusicPlayer.searchSection:Button("随机音乐", MusicPlayer.randomMusic)
    MusicPlayer.searchInfoLabel = MusicPlayer.searchSection:Label("点击获取随机音乐按钮来获取随机音乐")

    MusicPlayer.playerSection = musicTab:section("音乐播放器(随机音乐类)", false)
    MusicPlayer.playerInfoParagraph = MusicPlayer.playerSection:Label("播放器就绪")

    MusicPlayer.playerSection:Textbox("播放倍数", "playback_speed", "1.0", function(value)
        local speed = tonumber(value)
        MusicPlayer.setPlaybackSpeed(speed)
    end)

    local speedButtons = {
        {"0.5x 慢速", 0.5},
        {"1.0x 正常", 1.0},
        {"1.5x 快速", 1.5},
        {"2.0x 倍速", 2.0}
    }

    for _, btn in ipairs(speedButtons) do
        MusicPlayer.playerSection:Button(btn[1], function()
            MusicPlayer.setPlaybackSpeed(btn[2])
        end)
    end

    MusicPlayer.playerSection:Toggle("循环播放", "LoopPlayback", false, function(State)
        MusicPlayer.state.isLooping = State
        local loopStatus = State and "开启" or "关闭"
        if MusicPlayer.playerInfoParagraph then
            MusicPlayer.playerInfoParagraph.Text = "循环播放已" .. loopStatus
        end
    end)

    local controlButtons = {
        {"播放", MusicPlayer.controlPlay},
        {"暂停", MusicPlayer.controlPause},
        {"继续", MusicPlayer.controlResume},
        {"重新播放", MusicPlayer.controlReplay},
        {"上一首", MusicPlayer.controlPrevious},
        {"下一首", MusicPlayer.controlNext},
        {"停止", MusicPlayer.controlStop}
    }

    for _, btn in ipairs(controlButtons) do
        MusicPlayer.playerSection:Button(btn[1], btn[2])
    end

    local librarySection = musicTab:section("历史音乐库(随机音乐类)", false)

    MusicPlayer.libraryDropdown = librarySection:Dropdown("历史音乐", "local_music", {"无下载文件"}, function(selectedItem)
        if selectedItem == "无下载文件" then return end
        
        local files = MusicPlayer.refreshFolderList()
        local selectedFile
        for _, item in ipairs(files) do
            if item.name == selectedItem then
                selectedFile = item.path
                break
            end
        end

        if selectedFile then
            local soundId = MusicPlayer.getAssetPath(selectedFile)
            local songName = MusicPlayer.getSongNameFromFile(selectedFile)

            table.insert(MusicPlayer.state.songHistory,{
                songId = selectedFile:match("([^/]+)$"):gsub(".mp3$",""),
                soundId = soundId,
                songName = songName
            })

            MusicPlayer.state.currentSongIndex = #MusicPlayer.state.songHistory
            MusicPlayer.state.playCount = MusicPlayer.state.playCount + 1
            MusicPlayer.playSong(selectedFile, soundId, songName)
        end
    end)

    librarySection:Button("刷新音乐库", MusicPlayer.refreshLibrary)
    librarySection:Button("删除选中音乐", MusicPlayer.deleteSelected)
    librarySection:Button("清空音乐库", MusicPlayer.clearLibrary)

    MusicPlayer.refreshLibrary()
end

function MusicPlayer.setup(musicTab)
    MusicPlayer.init()
    MusicPlayer.createUI(musicTab)
end

do
    local musicTab = Window:Tab("在线音乐", '85611589536956')
    MusicPlayer.setup(musicTab)
local about = musicTab:section("搜索音乐类", false)

local MusicPlayerSystem = {}
MusicPlayerSystem.Variables = {
    HttpService = game:GetService("HttpService"),
    RunService = game:GetService("RunService"),
    
    currentSound = nil,
    songList = {},
    songHistory = {},
    countdownTask = nil,
    isPlaying = false,
    currentSongIndex = nil,
    lastPosition = 0,
    playCount = 0,
    searchHistoryCount = 0,
    
    musicRecordFolder = "tubers93脚本/音乐记录",
    musicLogFile = "tubers93脚本/音乐记录/downloaded.json",
    downloadedMusic = {},
    
    searchLimit = 5,
    playerInfoParagraph = nil,
    searchInfoParagraph = nil,
    libraryDropdown = nil,
    lastSearchData = nil
}

MusicPlayerSystem.InfoLabels = {}

function MusicPlayerSystem.Variables:Initialize()
    if not isfolder(self.musicRecordFolder) then
        makefolder(self.musicRecordFolder)
    end
    
    if isfile(self.musicLogFile) then
        self.downloadedMusic = self.HttpService:JSONDecode(readfile(self.musicLogFile))
    else
        writefile(self.musicLogFile, self.HttpService:JSONEncode(self.downloadedMusic))
    end
end

function MusicPlayerSystem.Variables:getAssetPath(filePath)
    if getsynasset then
        return getsynasset(filePath)
    elseif getcustomasset then
        return getcustomasset(filePath)
    else
        Notification:Warning("脚本", "你的注入器可能不兼容！！", 3)
        error("你的注入器可能不兼容！！")
    end
end

function MusicPlayerSystem.Variables:saveDownloadedMusic()
    writefile(self.musicLogFile, self.HttpService:JSONEncode(self.downloadedMusic))
end

function MusicPlayerSystem.Variables:isSongDownloaded(songId)
    return self.downloadedMusic[songId] ~= nil
end

function MusicPlayerSystem.Variables:stopCountdown()
    if self.countdownTask then
        self.countdownTask:Disconnect()
        self.countdownTask = nil
    end
end

function MusicPlayerSystem.Variables:urlEncode(str)
    return self.HttpService:UrlEncode(str)
end

function MusicPlayerSystem.Variables:getSongNameFromFile(filePath)
    local fileName = filePath:match("([^/]+)$"):gsub(".mp3$", "")
    local songId = fileName:match("^(%d+)")
    if songId and self.downloadedMusic[songId] then
        return self.downloadedMusic[songId].name
    end
    return fileName
end

function MusicPlayerSystem.Variables:refreshFolderList()
    local files = listfiles(self.musicRecordFolder)
    local musicFiles = {}

    for _, file in ipairs(files) do
        if file:sub(-4) == ".mp3" then
            local songName = self:getSongNameFromFile(file)
            table.insert(musicFiles, {
                path = file,
                name = songName
            })
        end
    end

    table.sort(musicFiles, function(a, b)
        return a.name:lower() < b.name:lower()
    end)

    return musicFiles
end

function MusicPlayerSystem.Variables:playSong(songId, soundId, songName, startPosition)
    if self.currentSound then 
        self.currentSound:Stop() 
        self.currentSound:Destroy()
        self.currentSound = nil 
    end
    self:stopCountdown()

    local Sound = Instance.new("Sound")
    Sound.SoundId = soundId
    Sound.Parent = game.Workspace
    if startPosition then Sound.TimePosition = startPosition end
    Sound:Play()
    self.currentSound = Sound
    self.isPlaying = true
end

function MusicPlayerSystem.Variables:updateLibraryUI()
    local files = self:refreshFolderList()
    local displayNames = {}

    if #files == 0 then
        table.insert(displayNames, "无下载文件")
    else
        for _, file in ipairs(files) do
            table.insert(displayNames, file.name)
        end
    end

    if not self.libraryDropdown then
        about:Dropdown("本地音乐", "选择要播放的歌曲", displayNames, function(selectedItem)
            if selectedItem == "无下载文件" then return end
            local selectedFile
            for _, item in ipairs(files) do
                if item.name == selectedItem then
                    selectedFile = item.path
                    break
                end
            end

            if selectedFile then
                local soundId = self:getAssetPath(selectedFile)
                local songName = self:getSongNameFromFile(selectedFile)

                table.insert(self.songHistory,{
                    songId = selectedFile:match("([^/]+)$"):gsub(".mp3$",""),
                    soundId = soundId,
                    songName = songName
                })

                self.currentSongIndex = #self.songHistory
                self.playCount += 1
                self:playSong(selectedFile, soundId, songName)
            end
        end)
    end
end

MusicPlayerSystem.Variables:Initialize()

about:Textbox("搜索数量限制", "输入1-200的数字", "5", function(value)
    local num = tonumber(value)
    if num and num >=1 and num<=200 then
        MusicPlayerSystem.Variables.searchLimit = num
    else
        Notification:Warning("提示", "请输入1-200之间的数字", 3)
    end
end)

about:Textbox("搜索音乐", "输入歌曲名称后按回车", "", function(query)
    if query == "" then return end

    local url = "https://music.163.com/api/search/get?s="..MusicPlayerSystem.Variables:urlEncode(query).."&type=1&limit="..tostring(MusicPlayerSystem.Variables.searchLimit or 5)
    local success, response = pcall(function()
        return game:HttpGet(url)
    end)
    if not success then
        Notification:Warning("搜索失败", "无法连接到音乐API", 3)
        return
    end

    local data = MusicPlayerSystem.Variables.HttpService:JSONDecode(response)
    local songs = (data.result and data.result.songs) or {}
    local songList = {}
    for _, song in pairs(songs) do
        table.insert(songList, song.name.." - "..song.artists[1].name)
    end

    MusicPlayerSystem.Variables.songList = songList
    MusicPlayerSystem.Variables.lastSearchData = songs
    MusicPlayerSystem.Variables.searchHistoryCount = (MusicPlayerSystem.Variables.searchHistoryCount or 0) + 1

    local paragraphText = string.format(
        "当前搜索: %s\n搜索结果: %d 首歌曲\n搜索历史: %d 次",
        query,
        #songList,
        MusicPlayerSystem.Variables.searchHistoryCount
    )
    
    about:Label(paragraphText)

    task.defer(function()
        if #songList > 0 then
            local currentSearchData = songs
            about:Dropdown("搜索结果", "选择要下载的歌曲", songList, function(selectedSong)
                local index = table.find(songList, selectedSong)
                local songData = currentSearchData[index]
                if not songData then return end

                local songId = tostring(songData.id)
                local fileName = MusicPlayerSystem.Variables.musicRecordFolder.."/"..songId..".mp3"
                local songUrl = "http://music.163.com/song/media/outer/url?id="..songId..".mp3"

                local function playLocalSong()
                    local soundId = MusicPlayerSystem.Variables:getAssetPath(fileName)
                    table.insert(MusicPlayerSystem.Variables.songHistory,{
                        songId = songId, soundId = soundId, songName = selectedSong
                    })
                    MusicPlayerSystem.Variables.currentSongIndex = #MusicPlayerSystem.Variables.songHistory
                    MusicPlayerSystem.Variables.playCount += 1
                    MusicPlayerSystem.Variables:playSong(songId, soundId, selectedSong)
                end

                if not MusicPlayerSystem.Variables:isSongDownloaded(songId) then
                    if not isfolder(MusicPlayerSystem.Variables.musicRecordFolder) then
                        makefolder(MusicPlayerSystem.Variables.musicRecordFolder)
                    end
                    Notification:Warning("下载中", "正在下载: "..selectedSong, 2)
                    local s, e = pcall(function()
                        local content = game:HttpGet(songUrl)
                        writefile(fileName, content)
                    end)
                    if s then
                        MusicPlayerSystem.Variables.downloadedMusic[songId] = {name=selectedSong, path=fileName, time=os.date("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")}
                        MusicPlayerSystem.Variables:saveDownloadedMusic()
                        Notification:Warning("下载完成", "已下载: "..selectedSong, 3)
                        playLocalSong()
                    else
                        Notification:Warning("下载失败", "无法下载歌曲: "..e, 5)
                    end
                else
                    Notification:Warning("已存在", "歌曲已存在本地: "..selectedSong, 3)
                    playLocalSong()
                end
            end)
            Notification:Warning("搜索完成", "找到 "..#songList.." 首歌曲", 2)
        else
            about:Dropdown("搜索结果", "未找到歌曲", {}, function() end)
            Notification:Warning("无结果", "未找到匹配的歌曲", 3)
        end
    end)
end)

about:Button("刷新音乐库", function()
    MusicPlayerSystem.Variables:updateLibraryUI()
    Notification:Warning("音乐库", "已刷新 ("..#MusicPlayerSystem.Variables:refreshFolderList().." 首歌曲)", 3)
end)

about:Button("删除选中音乐", function()
    if not MusicPlayerSystem.Variables.libraryDropdown then
        Notification:Warning("", "请先选择一首歌曲", 3)
        return
    end
    local files = MusicPlayerSystem.Variables:refreshFolderList()
    local selectedFile
    for _, item in ipairs(files) do
        if item.name == selectedItem then
            selectedFile = item.path
            break
        end
    end
    if selectedFile and isfile(selectedFile) then
        local songId = selectedFile:match("([^/]+)$"):gsub(".mp3$","")
        if MusicPlayerSystem.Variables.downloadedMusic[songId] then
            MusicPlayerSystem.Variables.downloadedMusic[songId] = nil
            MusicPlayerSystem.Variables:saveDownloadedMusic()
        end

        delfile(selectedFile)
        Notification:Warning("删除成功", "已删除: "..MusicPlayerSystem.Variables:getSongNameFromFile(selectedFile), 3)
        MusicPlayerSystem.Variables:updateLibraryUI()
    end
end)

about:Button("清空音乐库", function()
    local files = MusicPlayerSystem.Variables:refreshFolderList()
    local count = 0

    for _, file in ipairs(files) do
        if isfile(file.path) then
            delfile(file.path)
            count += 1

            local songId = file.path:match("([^/]+)$"):gsub(".mp3$","")
            if MusicPlayerSystem.Variables.downloadedMusic[songId] then
                MusicPlayerSystem.Variables.downloadedMusic[songId] = nil
            end
        end
    end

    MusicPlayerSystem.Variables:saveDownloadedMusic()
    MusicPlayerSystem.Variables:updateLibraryUI()
    Notification:Warning("清空完成", "已删除 "..count.." 首歌曲", 5)
end)

about:Button("播放", function()
    if not MusicPlayerSystem.Variables.isPlaying and MusicPlayerSystem.Variables.currentSongIndex then
        local song = MusicPlayerSystem.Variables.songHistory[MusicPlayerSystem.Variables.currentSongIndex]
        MusicPlayerSystem.Variables:playSong(song.songId, song.soundId, song.songName)
    end
end)

about:Button("暂停", function()
    if MusicPlayerSystem.Variables.currentSound then
        MusicPlayerSystem.Variables.lastPosition = MusicPlayerSystem.Variables.currentSound.TimePosition
        MusicPlayerSystem.Variables.currentSound:Pause()
        MusicPlayerSystem.Variables.isPlaying = false
        MusicPlayerSystem.Variables:stopCountdown()
    end
end)

about:Button("继续", function()
    if MusicPlayerSystem.Variables.currentSongIndex then
        local song = MusicPlayerSystem.Variables.songHistory[MusicPlayerSystem.Variables.currentSongIndex]
        MusicPlayerSystem.Variables:playSong(song.songId, song.soundId, song.songName, MusicPlayerSystem.Variables.lastPosition)
    end
end)

about:Button("重新播放", function()
    if MusicPlayerSystem.Variables.currentSongIndex then
        local song = MusicPlayerSystem.Variables.songHistory[MusicPlayerSystem.Variables.currentSongIndex]
        MusicPlayerSystem.Variables:playSong(song.songId, song.soundId, song.songName)
    end
end)

about:Button("上一首", function()
    if MusicPlayerSystem.Variables.currentSongIndex and MusicPlayerSystem.Variables.currentSongIndex>1 then
        MusicPlayerSystem.Variables.currentSongIndex -= 1
        local song = MusicPlayerSystem.Variables.songHistory[MusicPlayerSystem.Variables.currentSongIndex]
        MusicPlayerSystem.Variables:playSong(song.songId, song.soundId, song.songName)
    end
end)

about:Button("下一首", function()
    if MusicPlayerSystem.Variables.currentSongIndex and MusicPlayerSystem.Variables.currentSongIndex<#MusicPlayerSystem.Variables.songHistory then
        MusicPlayerSystem.Variables.currentSongIndex += 1
        local song = MusicPlayerSystem.Variables.songHistory[MusicPlayerSystem.Variables.currentSongIndex]
        MusicPlayerSystem.Variables:playSong(song.songId, song.soundId, song.songName)
    end
end)

MusicPlayerSystem.InfoLabels = {
    remainTime = about:Label("剩余时间: 00:00"),
    progress = about:Label("播放进度: 00:00 / 00:00"),
    playCount = about:Label("播放次数: 0"),
    currentSong = about:Label("当前歌曲: 未播放音乐")
}

local function updatePlayerInfo()
    local vars = MusicPlayerSystem.Variables
    
    if not vars.currentSound or not vars.isPlaying then
     
        MusicPlayerSystem.InfoLabels.remainTime.Text = "剩余时间: 00:00"
        MusicPlayerSystem.InfoLabels.progress.Text = "播放进度: 00:00 / 00:00"
        
        local songName = "未播放音乐"
        if vars.currentSongIndex and vars.songHistory[vars.currentSongIndex] then
            songName = vars.songHistory[vars.currentSongIndex].songName
        end
        MusicPlayerSystem.InfoLabels.currentSong.Text = "当前歌曲: " .. songName
        MusicPlayerSystem.InfoLabels.playCount.Text = "播放次数: " .. (vars.playCount or 0)
        return
    end
    
    local Sound = vars.currentSound
    if not Sound or not Sound.Playing then
        return
    end
    
    local remain = Sound.TimeLength - Sound.TimePosition
    local cur = Sound.TimePosition
    local total = Sound.TimeLength
    
    local curSongInfo = "未播放音乐"
    if vars.currentSongIndex and vars.songHistory[vars.currentSongIndex] then
        curSongInfo = vars.songHistory[vars.currentSongIndex].songName
    end
    
    local remainTimeText = "00:00"
    if remain > 0 then
        remainTimeText = string.format("%02d:%02d", math.floor(remain/60), math.floor(remain%60))
    end
    
    local curTimeText = "00:00"
    local totalTimeText = "00:00"
    if cur > 0 and total > 0 then
        curTimeText = string.format("%02d:%02d", math.floor(cur/60), math.floor(cur%60))
        totalTimeText = string.format("%02d:%02d", math.floor(total/60), math.floor(total%60))
    end
    
    MusicPlayerSystem.InfoLabels.remainTime.Text = "剩余时间: " .. remainTimeText
    MusicPlayerSystem.InfoLabels.progress.Text = "播放进度: " .. curTimeText .. " / " .. totalTimeText
    MusicPlayerSystem.InfoLabels.currentSong.Text = "当前歌曲: " .. curSongInfo
    MusicPlayerSystem.InfoLabels.playCount.Text = "播放次数: " .. (vars.playCount or 0)
end
task.spawn(function()
    while true do
        updatePlayerInfo()
        task.wait(0.1) 
    end
end)

MusicPlayerSystem.Variables:updateLibraryUI()
end

local actionTab = Window:Tab("动作", '94212016861936')
wait(0.001)

local actionSection = actionTab:section("列表", true)

actionSection:Button("停止所有", function()
    for _, track in pairs(active) do
        if track then track:Stop() end
    end
    active = {}
    clik()
end)

actionSection:Button("恶搞(需要自己重生关闭)", function() 
local char = player.Character or player.CharacterAdded:Wait()
local hrp = char:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
if hrp then
    local humanoid = char:WaitForChild("Humanoid")
    local animator = humanoid:FindFirstChildOfClass("Animator") or Instance.new("Animator", humanoid)
    local anim = Instance.new("Animation")
    anim.AnimationId = "rbxassetid://136720812089001"
    local track = animator:LoadAnimation(anim)
    track.Looped = true
    track.Priority = Enum.AnimationPriority.Action
    track:Play(0, 99)
    track:AdjustSpeed(1)
    hrp.CFrame = hrp.CFrame * CFrame.Angles(0, math.rad(180), 0)
end
end)

local jewelryTab = Window:Tab("美化包", '86350350950064')
task.wait(0.1)
local jewelryTab1 = jewelryTab:section("超过15厘米才能使用", true)

jewelryTab1:Button("删除所有饰品", function()
local char = game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character
if char then
    for _, item in ipairs(char:GetChildren()) do
        if item:IsA("Accessory") or item:IsA("Hat") then
            item:Destroy()
        end
    end
end
end)
jewelryTab1:Button("删除所有饰品和衣服", function()
local function ultraSafeRemoveAccessories()
    local char = game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character
    if not char then return end
    
    local count = 0
    
    for _, item in ipairs(char:GetChildren()) do
        local itemType = item.ClassName
        
        local shouldRemove = false
        
        if itemType == "Accessory" then
            shouldRemove = true
        elseif itemType == "Hat" then
            shouldRemove = true
        elseif itemType == "Tool" then
            shouldRemove = true
        elseif itemType == "ShirtGraphic" then
            shouldRemove = true
        elseif itemType == "Part" or itemType == "MeshPart" or itemType == "UnionOperation" then
            shouldRemove = false  
        elseif itemType == "Humanoid" then
            shouldRemove = false 
        elseif itemType == "Shirt" or itemType == "Pants" then
            shouldRemove = true  
        end
        
        if shouldRemove then
            item:Destroy()
            count = count + 1
        end
    end
    
    print("超安全删除完成！移除了 " .. count .. " 个饰品")
end

ultraSafeRemoveAccessories()
game.Players.LocalPlayer.CharacterAdded:Connect(function()
    wait(1)
    ultraSafeRemoveAccessories()
end)
end)
jewelryTab1:Button("角色所有零件随机颜色", function()
local function forceRandomColors()
    local char = game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character
    if not char then return end
    
    local count = 0
    
    for _, obj in ipairs(char:GetDescendants()) do
        if obj:IsA("BasePart") then
            if obj.Name ~= "HumanoidRootPart" then
                obj.BrickColor = BrickColor.random()
                count = count + 1
            end
        end
    end
    
    print("强制随机颜色完成！改变了 " .. count .. " 个部件")
end

forceRandomColors()
game.Players.LocalPlayer.CharacterAdded:Connect(function()
    wait(1)
    forceRandomColors()
end)
end)
jewelryTab1:Button("彩虹角色", function()
local colorCycleConnection
local function startColorCycle()
    local char = game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character
    if not char then return end
    
    if colorCycleConnection then
        colorCycleConnection:Disconnect()
    end
    
    local cycleColors = {
        Color3.fromRGB(255, 0, 0),     
        Color3.fromRGB(255, 165, 0),    
        Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 0),    
        Color3.fromRGB(0, 255, 0),     
        Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 255),      
        Color3.fromRGB(75, 0, 130),     
        Color3.fromRGB(238, 130, 238)   
    }
    
    local currentColorIndex = 1
    
    colorCycleConnection = _G.CreateHeartbeatConnection(function()
        local currentChar = game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character
        if not currentChar then return end
        
        for _, obj in ipairs(currentChar:GetDescendants()) do
            if obj:IsA("BasePart") and obj.Name ~= "HumanoidRootPart" then
                obj.Color = cycleColors[currentColorIndex]
                obj.Material = Enum.Material.Neon
            end
        end
        
        currentColorIndex = currentColorIndex + 1
        if currentColorIndex > #cycleColors then
            currentColorIndex = 1
        end
        
        wait(1)
    end)
    
    print("颜色循环已启动！")
end

local function stopColorCycle()
    if colorCycleConnection then
        colorCycleConnection:Disconnect()
        colorCycleConnection = nil
        print("颜色循环已停止")
    end
end

startColorCycle()

game.Players.LocalPlayer.CharacterAdded:Connect(function()
    wait(1)
    startColorCycle()
end)
end)
jewelryTab1:Toggle("断腿", "BrokenLegBeauty", false, function(Value)
    if Value then
        local char = game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character
        if char then
            local rightLeg = char:FindFirstChild("RightLeg") or char:FindFirstChild("Right Leg")
            if rightLeg then
                for _, child in pairs(rightLeg:GetChildren()) do
                    if child:IsA("SpecialMesh") then
                        child:Destroy()
                    end
                end
                
                local specialMesh = Instance.new("SpecialMesh")
                specialMesh.MeshId = "rbxassetid://101851696"
                specialMesh.TextureId = "rbxassetid://115727863"
                specialMesh.Scale = Vector3.new(1, 1, 1)
                specialMesh.Parent = rightLeg
            end
        end
    else
        local char = game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character
        if char then
            local rightLeg = char:FindFirstChild("RightLeg") or char:FindFirstChild("Right Leg")
            if rightLeg then
                for _, child in pairs(rightLeg:GetChildren()) do
                    if child:IsA("SpecialMesh") then
                        child:Destroy()
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    end
end)
jewelryTab1:Toggle("跑车", "SportsCarToggle", false, function(Value)
    if Value then
        local success, Car = pcall(function()
            return game:GetObjects("rbxassetid://14215126016")[1]
        end)
        
        if success and Car then
            _G.SportsCar = Car
            
            local function disableAllPhysics(obj)
                if obj:IsA("Part") or obj:IsA("MeshPart") or obj:IsA("UnionOperation") then
                    obj.CanCollide = false
                    obj.CanTouch = false
                    obj.CanQuery = false
                    obj.Anchored = true
                    obj.Massless = true
                    obj.CastShadow = false
                    
                    for _, connection in ipairs(obj:GetChildren()) do
                        if connection:IsA("Weld") or connection:IsA("WeldConstraint") or 
                           connection:IsA("Attachment") or connection:IsA("Constraint") then
                            connection:Destroy()
                        end
                    end
                elseif obj:IsA("Model") then
                    for _, child in ipairs(obj:GetDescendants()) do
                        if child:IsA("Part") or child:IsA("MeshPart") or child:IsA("UnionOperation") then
                            child.CanCollide = false
                            child.CanTouch = false
                            child.CanQuery = false
                            child.Anchored = true
                            child.Massless = true
                            child.CastShadow = false
                            
                            for _, connection in ipairs(child:GetChildren()) do
                                if connection:IsA("Weld") or connection:IsA("WeldConstraint") or 
                                   connection:IsA("Attachment") or connection:IsA("Constraint") then
                                    connection:Destroy()
                                end
                            end
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
            
            disableAllPhysics(Car)
            
            Car.Parent = workspace
            Car:SetAttribute("NoCollision", true)
            
            local carCFrame = Car:GetPivot()
            local carSize = Car:GetExtentsSize()
            
            _G.SportsCarConnection = game:GetService("RunService").RenderStepped:Connect(function()
                local character = game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character
                if character and character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") and _G.SportsCar then
                    local humanoidRootPart = character.HumanoidRootPart
                    
                    local rightOffset = humanoidRootPart.CFrame.RightVector * 1
                    local backOffset = humanoidRootPart.CFrame.LookVector * -2
                    local heightOffset = Vector3.new(0, carSize.Y/2 - 4.5, 0)
                    
                    local targetPosition = humanoidRootPart.Position + rightOffset + backOffset + heightOffset
                    
                    local lookVector = humanoidRootPart.CFrame.LookVector
                    local rightVector = humanoidRootPart.CFrame.RightVector
                    local upVector = humanoidRootPart.CFrame.UpVector
                    
                    local targetCFrame = CFrame.fromMatrix(targetPosition, rightVector, upVector, -lookVector)
                    
                    Car:PivotTo(targetCFrame)
                end
            end)
            
            print("跑车跟随已启用 - 完全无碰撞模式")
        else
            warn("车辆加载失败，请检查资源ID是否正确")
        end
    else
        if _G.SportsCarConnection then
            _G.SportsCarConnection:Disconnect()
            _G.SportsCarConnection = nil
        end
        
        if _G.SportsCar then
            _G.SportsCar:Destroy()
            _G.SportsCar = nil
        end
        
        print("跑车跟随已禁用")
    end
end)
jewelryTab1:Toggle("卡车", "TruckToggle", false, function(Value)
    if Value then
        local Car = game:GetObjects("rbxassetid://78896584994504")[1]
        Car.car.CanCollide = false
        Car.Parent = workspace
        spawn(function()
            ToggleCar = game:GetService("RunService").RenderStepped:Connect(function()
                Car.car:PivotTo(game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:WaitForChild("HumanoidRootPart").CFrame * CFrame.new(1.3, 0, 1.6))
            end)
        end)
    else
        if ToggleCar then
            ToggleCar:Disconnect()
            Car:Destroy()
        end
    end
end)
jewelryTab1:Toggle("无头", "NoHead", false, function(State)
    if State then
        local char = game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character
        if char then
            local head = char:FindFirstChild("Head")
            if head then
                head.Transparency = 1
                local decal = head:FindFirstChildOfClass("Decal")
                if decal then
                    decal:Destroy()
                end
            end
        end
    else
        local char = game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character
        if char then
            local head = char:FindFirstChild("Head")
            if head then
                head.Transparency = 0
            end
        end
    end
end)

        setclipboard("1710433791")

            Title = "已复制",
            Content = "无",
            Icon = "check",
        })
    end
})

if success and result then

local languageCodes = {
    ["自动检测"] = "auto",
    ["中文(简体)"] = "zh-CN",
    ["中文(繁体)"] = "zh-TW",
    ["英语"] = "en",
    ["日语"] = "ja",
    ["韩语"] = "ko",
    ["法语"] = "fr",
    ["德语"] = "de",
    ["西班牙语"] = "es",
    ["俄语"] = "ru",
    ["阿拉伯语"] = "ar",

    ["意大利语"] = "it",

    ["希腊语"] = "el",
    ["印地语"] = "hi",
    ["土耳其语"] = "tr",
    ["越南语"] = "vi",
    ["泰语"] = "th"
}

local languageList = {
    "自动检测",
    "中文(简体)",
    "中文(繁体)",
    "英语",
    "日语",
    "韩语",
    "法语",

local translationCache = {}
local isTranslating = false
local lastTranslatedText = ""
local lastUsedAPI = "Google"

local YOUDAO_APP_ID = "015e4bc650d16a48"
local YOUDAO_APP_KEY = "wXwwoaeESXz9CzB3yeTDe54JuOzkVbH7"

local SUPPORTED_UI_TYPES = {
    "TextLabel", "TextButton", "TextBox", "TextLabel", 
    "Frame", "ScrollingFrame", "ImageButton", "ImageLabel"
}

local DANGEROUS_COMMANDS = {
    "neon", "shine", "ghost", "gold", "spin", 
    "bighead", "smallhead", "giantdwarf", "squash"
}

local LANGUAGE_PATTERNS = {
    ["zh-CN"] = {
        pattern = "[\199-\244][\128-\191]*[\128-\191]",
        exclude = "[\227][\128-\191][\128-\191]"
    },
    ["zh-TW"] = {
        pattern = "[\227][\128-\191][\128-\191]"
    },
    ["ja"] = {
        pattern = "[\123-\125]|[\199-\244][\128-\191]*[\128-\191]",
        exclude = "[\199-\244][\128-\191]*[\128-\191]"
    },
    ["ko"] = {
        pattern = "[\234-\235][\128-\191][\128-\191]|[\236-\237][\128-\191][\128-\191]"
    },
    ["ar"] = {
        pattern = "[\216-\219][\128-\191]"
    },
    ["ru"] = {
        pattern = "[\208-\209][\128-\191]"
    },
    ["th"] = {
        pattern = "[\224-\231][\128-\191]"
    },
    ["en"] = {
        pattern = "[A-Za-z]",
        exclude = "[\199-\244][\128-\191]*[\128-\191]"
    }
}

local TARGET_LANGUAGE = "zh-CN"
local SCAN_INTERVAL = 2
local MAX_TEXT_LENGTH = 5000

local translatedCache = {}
local translatedObjects = {}
local isTranslationEnabled = false
local connection = nil

local BATCH_SIZE = 20
local MAX_CACHE_SIZE = 3000
local lastScanTime = 0
local SCAN_COOLDOWN = 0.02
local TRANSLATION_DELAY = 0.01
local MAX_CONCURRENT_REQUESTS = 10

local function isDangerousText(text)
    if not text or type(text) ~= "string" then return false end
    local lowerText = text:lower()
    for _, cmd in ipairs(DANGEROUS_COMMANDS) do
        if lowerText:find(cmd) then
            return true
        end
    end
    return false
end

local function shouldSkipTranslation(text)
    if not text or text == "" or translatedCache[text] then
        return true
    end
    
    if text:match("^%s*$") or 
       text:match("^[0-9%.%s,:/]+$") or 
       #text > MAX_TEXT_LENGTH or
       isDangerousText(text) then
        translatedCache[text] = text
        return true
    end
    
    return false
end

local function detectLanguage(text)
    if not text or type(text) ~= "string" or text == "" then
        return "en"
    end
    
    if text:match(LANGUAGE_PATTERNS["zh-CN"].pattern) and 
       (not LANGUAGE_PATTERNS["zh-CN"].exclude or not text:match(LANGUAGE_PATTERNS["zh-CN"].exclude)) then
        return "zh-CN"
    end
    
    if text:match(LANGUAGE_PATTERNS["zh-TW"].pattern) then
        return "zh-TW"
    end
    
    if text:match(LANGUAGE_PATTERNS["ja"].pattern) and 
       (not LANGUAGE_PATTERNS["ja"].exclude or not text:match(LANGUAGE_PATTERNS["ja"].exclude)) then
        return "ja"
    end
    
    if text:match(LANGUAGE_PATTERNS["ko"].pattern) then
        return "ko"
    end
    
    if text:match(LANGUAGE_PATTERNS["ar"].pattern) then
        return "ar"
    end
    
    if text:match(LANGUAGE_PATTERNS["ru"].pattern) then
        return "ru"
    end
    
    if text:match(LANGUAGE_PATTERNS["th"].pattern) then
        return "th"
    end
    
    return "en"
end

local function googleTranslate(text, targetLang, sourceLang)
    if not text or text == "" then return text end
    
    sourceLang = sourceLang or "auto"
    
    local cacheKey = "google_"..text.."|"..sourceLang.."|"..targetLang
    if translationCache[cacheKey] then
        return translationCache[cacheKey]
    end
    
    local url = string.format(
        "https://translate.googleapis.com/translate_a/single?client=gtx&sl=%s&tl=%s&dt=t&q=%s",
        sourceLang, targetLang, HttpService:UrlEncode(text)
    )
    
    local success, response = pcall(function()
        return game:HttpGet(url, true)
    end)
    
    if success and response then
        local success2, data = pcall(function()
            return HttpService:JSONDecode(response)
        end)
        
        if success2 and data and data[1] then
            local result = ""
            for i, segment in ipairs(data[1]) do
                if segment[1] then
                    result = result .. segment[1]
                end
            end
            
            if result ~= "" and result ~= text then
                translationCache[cacheKey] = result
                lastUsedAPI = "Google"
                return result
            end
        end
    end
    
    return nil
end

local function youdaoTranslate(text, targetLang, sourceLang)
    if not text or text == "" then return text end
    
    sourceLang = sourceLang or "auto"
    
    local cacheKey = "youdao_"..text.."|"..sourceLang.."|"..targetLang
    if translationCache[cacheKey] then
        return translationCache[cacheKey]
    end
    
    local salt = tostring(tick())
    local input = text
    if #input > 20 then
        input = input:sub(1, 10) .. #input .. input:sub(-10)
    end
    
    local signStr = YOUDAO_APP_ID .. input .. salt .. YOUDAO_APP_KEY
    local sign = game:GetService("HashService"):ComputeMD5Async(signStr)
    
    local url = string.format(
        "https://openapi.youdao.com/api?q=%s&from=%s&to=%s&appKey=%s&salt=%s&sign=%s",
        HttpService:UrlEncode(text),
        sourceLang == "auto" and "auto" or sourceLang,
        targetLang,
        YOUDAO_APP_ID,
        salt,
        sign
    )
    
    local success, response = pcall(function()
        return game:HttpGet(url, true)
    end)
    
    if success and response then
        local success2, data = pcall(function()
            return HttpService:JSONDecode(response)
        end)
        
        if success2 and data and data.translation and data.translation[1] then
            local result = data.translation[1]
            
            if result ~= "" and result ~= text then
                translationCache[cacheKey] = result
                lastUsedAPI = "Youdao"
                return result
            end
        end
    end
    
    return nil
end

local function translateText(text, targetLang, sourceLang)
    if not text or text == "" or text:match("^%s*$") then
        return text
    end
    
    if text:match("^[%d%p%s]+$") then
        return text
    end
    
    local detectedLang = detectLanguage(text)
    
    if detectedLang == "zh-CN" or detectedLang == "zh-TW" then
        return text
    end
    
    local result = googleTranslate(text, targetLang, sourceLang)
    if not result or result == text then
        result = youdaoTranslate(text, targetLang, sourceLang)
    end
    return result or text
end

local targetLang = "zh-CN"
local sourceLang = "auto"

local sourceLangDropdown = TabHandles.Translator:Dropdown({
    Title = "被翻译语言",
    Values = languageList,
    Value = "自动检测",

        WindUI:Notify({

            Duration = 2
        })
    end
})

    Title = "翻译语言",
    Values = languageList,
    Value = "中文(简体)",
    Callback = function(option)
        if option ~= "自动检测" then
            targetLang = languageCodes[option] or "zh-CN"
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "翻译语言设置",
                Content = "已选择: " .. option,
                Duration = 2
            })
        else
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "错误",
                Content = "翻译语言不能选择自动检测",

            })
        end
    end
})

local currentMode = 2
local modes = {
    {"快速模式", "置于极速之前"},
    {"标准模式", "上下文翻译"},
    {"基本全翻译模式", "完整翻译"},
    {"极速模式", "速度翻译"}
}

local modeDropdown = TabHandles.Translator:Dropdown({
    Title = "翻译模式",
    Values = {"快速模式", "标准模式", "基本全翻译模式", "极速模式"},
    Value = "自匹配模式",
    Callback = function(option)
        currentMode = table.find({"快速模式", "标准模式", "基本全翻译模式", "极速模式"}, option) or 2
        
        if option == "极速模式" then
            BATCH_SIZE = 50
            SCAN_COOLDOWN = 0.005
            TRANSLATION_DELAY = 0.002
            MAX_CONCURRENT_REQUESTS = 25
        elseif option == "快速模式" then
            BATCH_SIZE = 30
            SCAN_COOLDOWN = 0.01
            TRANSLATION_DELAY = 0.005
            MAX_CONCURRENT_REQUESTS = 15
        elseif option == "标配模式" then
            BATCH_SIZE = 20
            SCAN_COOLDOWN = 0.02
            TRANSLATION_DELAY = 0.01
            MAX_CONCURRENT_REQUESTS = 10
        elseif option == "全翻译模式" then
            BATCH_SIZE = 10
            SCAN_COOLDOWN = 0.05
            TRANSLATION_DELAY = 0.02
            MAX_CONCURRENT_REQUESTS = 5
        end
        
        WindUI:Notify({
            Title = "模式切换",
            Content = modes[currentMode][2],
            Duration = 2
        })
    end
})

local cacheEnabled = true
TabHandles.Translator:Toggle({
    Title = "启用缓存",
    Desc = "提高翻译效率",
    Value = true,
    Callback = function(state)
        cacheEnabled = state
        if not cacheEnabled then
            translationCache = {}
        end
    end
})

TabHandles.Translator:Divider()

local function hasTextContent(gui)
    if gui:IsA("TextLabel") or gui:IsA("TextButton") or gui:IsA("TextBox") then
        return gui.Text and gui.Text ~= ""
    elseif gui:IsA("ImageButton") or gui:IsA("ImageLabel") then
        return gui:GetAttribute("Text") or gui.Name ~= ""
    end
    return false
end

local function getTextContent(gui)
    if gui:IsA("TextLabel") or gui:IsA("TextButton") or gui:IsA("TextBox") then
        return gui.Text
    elseif gui:IsA("ImageButton") or gui:IsA("ImageLabel") then
        return gui:GetAttribute("Text") or gui.Name
    end
    return nil
end

local function setTextContent(gui, text)
    if gui:IsA("TextLabel") or gui:IsA("TextButton") or gui:IsA("TextBox") then
        gui.Text = text
    elseif gui:IsA("ImageButton") or gui:IsA("ImageLabel") then
        gui:SetAttribute("OriginalText", getTextContent(gui))
        gui:SetAttribute("Text", text)
    end
end

local function parallelTranslateBatch(batch)
    local results = {}
    local completed = 0
    local total = #batch
    local activeRequests = 0
    
    local function processItem(item, index)
        if not translatedCache[item.text] then
            activeRequests = activeRequests + 1
            
            local success, translated = pcall(function()
                return translateText(item.text, targetLang, sourceLang)
            end)
            
            if success and translated and translated ~= item.text then
                results[item.gui] = translated
                translatedCache[item.text] = translated
                lastTranslatedText = item.text .. " → " .. translated
                lastUsedAPI = "Google"
            else
                translatedCache[item.text] = item.text
            end
            
            activeRequests = activeRequests - 1
        end
        completed = completed + 1
    end
    
    for i, item in ipairs(batch) do
        while activeRequests >= MAX_CONCURRENT_REQUESTS do
            task.wait()
        end
        
        task.spawn(processItem, item, i)
        
        if i % 5 == 0 then
            task.wait(0.001)
        end
    end
    
    while completed < total do
        task.wait()
    end
    
    return results, total
end

local function fastCollectElements()
    local elementsToTranslate = {}
    local guisToScan = {playerGui, CoreGui}
    
    for _, gui in ipairs(guisToScan) do
        if gui and gui:IsDescendantOf(game) then
            local descendants = gui:GetDescendants()
            for i = 1, #descendants do
                local guiObj = descendants[i]
                if not translatedObjects[guiObj] and table.find(SUPPORTED_UI_TYPES, guiObj.ClassName) then
                    local text = getTextContent(guiObj)
                    if text and text ~= "" and not shouldSkipTranslation(text) then
                        table.insert(elementsToTranslate, {
                            gui = guiObj,
                            text = text
                        })
                        translatedObjects[guiObj] = true
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    end
    
    return elementsToTranslate
end

local function ultraFastTranslateGuiElements()
    local count = 0
    local currentTime = tick()
    
    if currentTime - lastScanTime < SCAN_COOLDOWN then
        return count
    end
    lastScanTime = currentTime
    
    local elementsToTranslate = fastCollectElements()
    
    if #elementsToTranslate > 0 then
        for i = 1, #elementsToTranslate, BATCH_SIZE do
            local batch = {}
            local batchEnd = math.min(i + BATCH_SIZE - 1, #elementsToTranslate)
            
            for j = i, batchEnd do
                table.insert(batch, elementsToTranslate[j])
            end
            
            local batchResults, batchCount = parallelTranslateBatch(batch)
            count = count + batchCount
            
            for gui, translated in pairs(batchResults) do
                if gui and gui.Parent then
                    setTextContent(gui, translated)
                end
            end
            
            if batchCount > 0 then
                task.wait(TRANSLATION_DELAY)
            end
        end
        
        if count > 0 and TabHandles.Translator then
            for _, paragraph in pairs(TabHandles.Translator.Paragraphs or {}) do
                if paragraph.Title == "最近翻译" then
                    paragraph:SetDesc(lastTranslatedText .. " (via " .. lastUsedAPI .. ")")
                    break
                end
            end
        end
    end
    
    if table.count(translatedCache) > MAX_CACHE_SIZE then
        local newCache = {}
        local i = 0
        for k, v in pairs(translatedCache) do
            if i < MAX_CACHE_SIZE / 2 then
                newCache[k] = v
                i = i + 1
            else
                break
            end
        end
        translatedCache = newCache
    end
    
    return count
end

local function deepScanUI()
    local guisToScan = {
        player.PlayerGui,
        CoreGui
    }
    
    for _, service in ipairs({
        game:GetService("StarterGui"),
        game:GetService("CoreGui"),
        game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer.PlayerGui
    }) do
        table.insert(guisToScan, service)
    end
    
    return guisToScan
end

local translateButtonRef
translateButtonRef = TabHandles.Translator:Button({
    Title = "执行翻译",
    Icon = "play",
    Variant = "Primary",
    Callback = function()
        if isTranslating then
            isTranslating = false
            if translateButtonRef then
                translateButtonRef:SetTitle("执行翻译")
            end
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "翻译",
                Content = "翻译已停止",
                Icon = "stop-circle",
                Duration = 2
            })
            return
        end
        
        isTranslating = true
        if translateButtonRef then
            translateButtonRef:SetTitle("停止翻译")
        end
        WindUI:Notify({
            Title = "翻译",
            Content = "极速翻译已启动",
            Icon = "zap",
            Duration = 2
        })
        
        task.spawn(function()
            local startTime = tick()
            local totalTranslated = 0
            
            while isTranslating and tick() - startTime < 5 do
                local count = ultraFastTranslateGuiElements()
                totalTranslated = totalTranslated + count
                
                local elapsed = tick() - startTime
                if elapsed > 3 and count == 0 then
                    break
                end
                
                task.wait(0.03)
            end
            
            if isTranslating then
                isTranslating = false
                if translateButtonRef then
                    translateButtonRef:SetTitle("执行翻译")
                end
                
                WindUI:Notify({
                    Title = "翻译完成",
                    Content = string.format("5秒内翻译了 %d 个元素", totalTranslated),
                    Icon = "check-circle",
                    Duration = 3
                })
            end
        end)
    end
})

local speedSlider = TabHandles.Translator:Slider({
    Title = "翻译速度",
    Desc = "调整翻译速度",
    Value = { Min = 1, Max = 10, Default = 5 },
    Callback = function(value)
        if currentMode ~= 4 then
            BATCH_SIZE = 20 + value * 5
            SCAN_COOLDOWN = 0.01 - (value * 0.001)
            MAX_CONCURRENT_REQUESTS = 10 + value * 2
            
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "速度",
                Content = string.format("速度: %d, 批量: %d, 并发: %d", value, BATCH_SIZE, MAX_CONCURRENT_REQUESTS),
                Duration = 1
            })
        else
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "提示",
                Content = "极速模式下调整速度参数无用",
                Duration = 2
            })
        end
    end
})

TabHandles.Detection:Button({
    Title = "检测UI",
    Icon = "search",
    Callback = function()
        local uiCount = 0
        local textCount = 0
        
        local guisToScan = deepScanUI()
        for _, gui in ipairs(guisToScan) do
            pcall(function()
                for _, child in ipairs(gui:GetDescendants()) do
                    if table.find(SUPPORTED_UI_TYPES, child.ClassName) then
                        uiCount = uiCount + 1
                        if hasTextContent(child) then
                            textCount = textCount + 1
                        end
                    end
                end
            end)
        end
        
        WindUI:Notify({
            Title = "UI检测结果",
            Content = string.format("发现 %d 个UI元素，%d 个有文本内容", uiCount, textCount),
            Duration = 5
        })
    end
})

Window:OnClose(function()
    isTranslating = false
end)

Window:OnDestroy(function()
    isTranslating = false
end)

task.spawn(function()
    local commonTexts = {
        "Play", "Start", "Settings", "Options", "Exit", "Continue",
        "Back", "Next", "Yes", "No", "OK", "Cancel", "Loading"
    }
    
    for _, text in ipairs(commonTexts) do
        pcall(function()
            translateText(text, targetLang, "en")
        end)
    end
end)

local function cleanupMemory()
    collectgarbage("collect")
    
    if table and table.count and table.count(translatedCache) > MAX_CACHE_SIZE then
        local newCache = {}
        local i = 0
        for k, v in pairs(translatedCache) do
            if i < MAX_CACHE_SIZE / 2 then
                newCache[k] = v
                i = i + 1
            else
                break
            end
        end
        translatedCache = newCache
    end
    
    task.wait(5)
end

task.spawn(function()
    while true do
        cleanupMemory()
        task.wait(30)
    end
end)

task.wait(1)
WindUI:Notify({
    Title = "tubers93 已加载完毕",
    Content = "tubers93UI汉化",
    Icon = "check-circle",
    Duration = 3
})
        WindUI:Notify({
            Title = "加载完成",
            Content = "tubers93脚本已加载",
            Icon = "check",
        })
    end
})

server2:Button("Make a Army", function()
local WindUI = loadstring(game:HttpGet("https://github.com/Footagesus/WindUI/releases/latest/download/main.lua"))()
local Window = WindUI:CreateWindow({
    Title = "BS - Make a Army",
    Icon = "users",
    IconThemed = true,
    Author = "BS",
    Folder = "BS_MakeArmy",
    Size = UDim2.fromOffset(460, 340),
    Transparent = true,
    Theme = "Dark",
    User = { Enabled = true },
    SideBarWidth = 200,
    ScrollBarEnabled = true,
})
Window:EditOpenButton({
    Title = "Make a Army",
    Icon = "users",
    CornerRadius = UDim.new(0,16),
    StrokeThickness = 2,
    Color = ColorSequence.new(
        Color3.fromHex("FF0F7B"), 
        Color3.fromHex("F89B29")
    ),
    Draggable = true,
})
local MakeArmyTab = Window:Tab({ Title = "Make a Army", Icon = "users" })
MakeArmyTab:Paragraph({
    Title = "BS Make a Army",
    Desc = "创建军队功能模块",
    Image = "users",
    ImageSize = 65
})
local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local LP = Players.LocalPlayer
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
MakeArmyTab:Toggle({
    Title = "自动刷金币",
    Desc = "自动进行乞讨操作",
    Value = false,
    Callback = function(Value)
        local farmGoldRunning = Value
        if Value then
            spawn(function()
                while farmGoldRunning do
                    pcall(function()
                        local DistanceWalked = ReplicatedStorage.Remotes.DistanceWalked
                        DistanceWalked:FireServer(150, 1e+104, 0)
                    end)
                    wait(0.1)
                end
            end)
        end
    end
})
local function createTroopButton(title, itemName)
    MakeArmyTab:Toggle({
        Title = title,
        Desc = "自动购买" .. title,
        Value = false,
        Callback = function(Value)
            local troopLoops = {}
            troopLoops[itemName] = Value
            if Value then
                spawn(function()
                    while troopLoops[itemName] do
                        pcall(function()
                            local PurchaseItem = ReplicatedStorage.Remotes.PurchaseItem
                            PurchaseItem:FireServer(itemName, "Troops")
                        end)
                        wait(0.1)
                    end
                end)
            end
        end
    })
end
local function createSpellButton(title, itemName)
    MakeArmyTab:Toggle({
        Title = title,
        Desc = "自动购买" .. title,
        Value = false,
        Callback = function(Value)
            local spellLoops = {}
            spellLoops[itemName] = Value
            if Value then
                spawn(function()
                    while spellLoops[itemName] do
                        pcall(function()
                            local PurchaseItem = ReplicatedStorage.Remotes.PurchaseItem
                            PurchaseItem:FireServer(itemName, "Spells")
                        end)
                        wait(0.1)
                    end
                end)
            end
        end
    })
end
