-- 自动刷钱
AutoFunctions:Toggle({
    Title = "自动刷钱",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(state)
        if state then
            autoMoneyThread = task.spawn(function()
                -- 创建平台
                local part = Instance.new("Part")
                part.Position = Vector3.new(0, 60, 0)
                part.Size = Vector3.new(1000, 5, 1000)
                part.Anchored = true
                part.Name = "Keaths Platform"
                part.CollisionGroupId = 5
                part.Parent = workspace

                local part2 = Instance.new("Part")
                part2.Position = Vector3.new(0, 10, 0)
                part2.Size = Vector3.new(1000, 5, 1000)
                part2.Anchored = true
                part2.Name = "Keaths Platform"
                part2.CollisionGroupId = 5
                part2.Parent = workspace

                local part3 = Instance.new("Part")
                part3.Position = Vector3.new(0, 99, 0)
                part3.Size = Vector3.new(1000, 5, 1000)
                part3.Anchored = true
                part3.Name = "Keaths Platform"
                part3.CollisionGroupId = 5
                part3.Parent = workspace

                while state do
                    task.wait(0.1)
                    pcall(function()
                        local player = game.Players.LocalPlayer
                        local chr = player.Character
                        if chr and chr:FindFirstChild("Humanoid") and chr.Humanoid.SeatPart then
                            local car = chr.Humanoid.SeatPart.Parent.Parent
                            car:PivotTo(CFrame.new(0, 0, 0))
                            task.wait(0.81)
                            car:PivotTo(part.CFrame)
                            task.wait(1)
                            car:PivotTo(part2.CFrame)
                            task.wait(1)
                            car:PivotTo(part3.CFrame)
                        end
                    end)
                end
                
                -- 清理平台
                pcall(function()
                    if part and part.Parent then
                        part:Destroy()
                    end
                    if part2 and part2.Parent then
                        part2:Destroy()
                    end
                    if part3 and part3.Parent then
                        part3:Destroy()
                    end
                end)
            end)
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "提示",
                Content = "自动刷钱已开启",
                Duration = 3
            })
        else
            if autoMoneyThread then
                task.cancel(autoMoneyThread)
                autoMoneyThread = nil
            end
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "提示",
                Content = "自动刷钱已关闭",
                Duration = 3
            })
        end
    end
})

-- 自动建造
AutoFunctions:Toggle({
    Title = "自动建造",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(state)
        if state then
            autoBuildThread = task.spawn(function()
                while state do
                    task.wait()
                    pcall(function()
                        local function plot()
                            for i, v in pairs(workspace.Tycoons:GetDescendants()) do
                                if v.Name == "Owner" and v.ClassName == "StringValue" and v.Value == game.Players.LocalPlayer.Name then
                                    return v.Parent
                                end
                            end
                            return nil
                        end
                        
                        local tycoon = plot()
                        if tycoon and tycoon:FindFirstChild("Dealership") and tycoon.Dealership:FindFirstChild("Purchases") then
                            for i, v in pairs(tycoon.Dealership.Purchases:GetChildren()) do
                                if state and v:FindFirstChild("TycoonButton") and v.TycoonButton:FindFirstChild("Button") and v.TycoonButton.Button.Transparency == 0 then
                                    game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage").Remotes.Build:FireServer("BuyItem", v.Name)
                                    task.wait(0.3)
                                end
                            end
                        end
                    end)
                end
            end)
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "提示",
                Content = "自动建造已开启",
                Duration = 3
            })
        else
            if autoBuildThread then
                task.cancel(autoBuildThread)
                autoBuildThread = nil
            end
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "提示",
                Content = "自动建造已关闭",
                Duration = 3
            })
        end
    end
})

-- 自动完成赛季11比赛
RaceFunctions:Toggle({
    Title = "自动完成赛季11比赛",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(state)
        if state then
            season11Thread = task.spawn(function()
                while state do
                    task.wait()
                    pcall(function()
                        local races = workspace.Races
                        if races and races:FindFirstChild("Season") and races.Season:FindFirstChild("Checkpoints") then
                            for i, v in pairs(races.Season.Checkpoints:GetDescendants()) do
                                if v.Name == "IsActive" and v.Value == true then
                                    local player = game.Players.LocalPlayer
                                    local chr = player.Character
                                    if chr and chr:FindFirstChild("Humanoid") and chr.Humanoid.SeatPart then
                                        local car = chr.Humanoid.SeatPart.Parent.Parent
                                        
                                        if v.Parent.Name ~= "20" then
                                            car:PivotTo(CFrame.new(v.Parent.Checkpoint.Position))
                                            task.wait(0.2)
                                        else
                                            car:PivotTo(CFrame.new(v.Parent.Checkpoint.Position))
                                            task.wait(0.2)
                                            if v.Parent.Parent.Parent:FindFirstChild("GoalPart") then
                                                car:PivotTo(CFrame.new(v.Parent.Parent.Parent.GoalPart.Position))
                                            end
                                        end
                                    end
                                end
                                task.wait(0.2)
                            end
                        end
                    end)
                end
            end)
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "提示",
                Content = "自动完成赛季11比赛已开启",
                Duration = 3
            })
        else
            if season11Thread then
                task.cancel(season11Thread)
                season11Thread = nil
            end
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "提示",
                Content = "自动完成赛季11比赛已关闭",
                Duration = 3
            })
        end
    end
})

-- 自动完成漂移赛
RaceFunctions:Toggle({
    Title = "自动完成漂移赛",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(state)
        if state then
            driftThread = task.spawn(function()
                local partvelo = nil
                
                while state do
                    task.wait()
                    pcall(function()
                        local player = game.Players.LocalPlayer
                        local playerGui = player.PlayerGui
                        
                        if playerGui and playerGui:FindFirstChild("Menu") and playerGui.Menu:FindFirstChild("Race") and not playerGui.Menu.Race.Visible then
                            local chr = player.Character
                            if chr and chr:FindFirstChild("Humanoid") and chr.Humanoid.SeatPart then
                                local car = chr.Humanoid.SeatPart.Parent.Parent
                                car:PivotTo(CFrame.new(-2502.25146484375, 601.9251708984375, 2013.3966064453125))
                                if car:FindFirstChild("Engine") then
                                    car.Engine.Velocity = Vector3.new(0, 0, 0)
                                end
                                if chr:FindFirstChild("Head") then
                                    chr.Head.Anchored = true
                                end
                                task.wait(1)
                                if chr:FindFirstChild("Head") then
                                    chr.Head.Anchored = false
                                end
                                task.wait(1)
                                
                                local raceHandler = workspace:FindFirstChild("Races")
                                if raceHandler and raceHandler:FindFirstChild("RaceHandler") then
                                    raceHandler.RaceHandler.StartLobby:FireServer("Drift")
                                end
                                
                                partvelo = nil
                                repeat
                                    task.wait()
                                    if player:DistanceFromCharacter(Vector3.new(-2502.25146484375, 601.9251708984375, 2013.3966064453125)) > 10 then
                                        car:PivotTo(CFrame.new(-2502.25146484375, 601.9251708984375, 2013.3966064453125))
                                        if car:FindFirstChild("Engine") then
                                            car.Engine.Velocity = Vector3.new(0, 0, 0)
                                        end
                                        task.wait(0.1)
                                        if raceHandler and raceHandler:FindFirstChild("RaceHandler") then
                                            raceHandler.RaceHandler.StartLobby:FireServer("Drift")
                                        end
                                    end
                                until (playerGui.Menu.Race and playerGui.Menu.Race.Visible) or not state
                            end
                        elseif playerGui and playerGui:FindFirstChild("Menu") and playerGui.Menu:FindFirstChild("Race") and playerGui.Menu.Race.Visible then
                            if partvelo == nil then
                                local distance = math.huge
                                local driftTrack = workspace:FindFirstChild("DriftTrack")
                                if driftTrack then
                                    for a, b in pairs(driftTrack:GetDescendants()) do
                                        if b.Name == "DriftAsphalt" and b.Parent.Name == "Model" then
                                            local Dist = (Vector3.new(-2567.529296875, 601.9335327148438, 2018.6964111328125) - b.Position).magnitude
                                            if Dist < distance then
                                                distance = Dist
                                                partvelo = b
                                            end
                                        end
                                    end
                                    if partvelo then
                                        partvelo.Velocity = player.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame.LookVector * 1000
                                    end
                                end
                            end
                            
                            if partvelo and player:DistanceFromCharacter(partvelo.Position) > 10 then
                                local chr = player.Character
                                if chr and chr:FindFirstChild("Humanoid") and chr.Humanoid.SeatPart then
                                    local car = chr.Humanoid.SeatPart.Parent.Parent
                                    car:PivotTo(partvelo.CFrame)
                                end
                            end
                        end
                    end)
                end
                
                -- 清理速度
                if partvelo then
                    partvelo.Velocity = Vector3.new(0, 0, 0)
                end
            end)
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "提示",
                Content = "自动完成漂移赛已开启",
                Duration = 3
            })
        else
            if driftThread then
                task.cancel(driftThread)
                driftThread = nil
            end
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "提示",
                Content = "自动完成漂移赛已关闭",
                Duration = 3
            })
        end
    end
})

-- 自动完成警察抓小偷赛

RaceFunctions:Toggle({
    Title = "自动完成城市赛",

    Callback = function(state)
        if state then
            cityThread = task.spawn(function()
                while state do
                    task.wait()

                                            task.wait(0.2)

                                            end

                cityThread = nil
            end
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "提示",
                Content = "自动完成城市赛已关闭",
                Duration = 3
            })
        end
    end
})

-- 自动完成公路赛
RaceFunctions:Toggle({
    Title = "自动完成公路赛",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(state)
        if state then
            highwayThread = task.spawn(function()
                while state do
                    task.wait()
                    pcall(function()
                        local races = workspace.Races
                        if races and races:FindFirstChild("City") and races.City:FindFirstChild("Highway") and races.City.Highway:FindFirstChild("Checkpoints") then
                            for i, v in pairs(races.City.Highway.Checkpoints:GetDescendants()) do
                                if v.Name == "IsActive" and v.Value == true then
                                    local player = game.Players.LocalPlayer
                                    local chr = player.Character
                                    if chr and chr:FindFirstChild("Humanoid") and chr.Humanoid.SeatPart then
                                        local car = chr.Humanoid.SeatPart.Parent.Parent
                                        
                                        if v.Parent.Name ~= "23" then
                                            car:PivotTo(CFrame.new(v.Parent.Checkpoint.Position))
                                            task.wait(0.2)
                                        else
                                            car:PivotTo(CFrame.new(v.Parent.Checkpoint.Position))
                                            task.wait(0.2)
                                            if v.Parent.Parent.Parent:FindFirstChild("GoalPart") then
                                                car:PivotTo(CFrame.new(v.Parent.Parent.Parent.GoalPart.Position))
                                            end
                                        end
                                    end
                                end
                                task.wait(0.2)
                            end
                        end
                    end)
                end
            end)
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "提示",
                Content = "自动完成公路赛已开启",
                Duration = 3
            })
        else
            if highwayThread then
                task.cancel(highwayThread)
                highwayThread = nil
            end
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "提示",
                Content = "自动完成公路赛已关闭",
                Duration = 3
            })
        end
    end
})

-- 自动完成山脉赛
RaceFunctions:Toggle({
    Title = "自动完成山脉赛",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(state)
        if state then
            mountainThread = task.spawn(function()
                while state do
                    task.wait()
                    pcall(function()
                        local races = workspace.Races
                        if races and races:FindFirstChild("Mountain") and races.Mountain:FindFirstChild("Checkpoints") then
                            for i, v in pairs(races.Mountain.Checkpoints:GetDescendants()) do
                                if v.Name == "IsActive" and v.Value == true then
                                    local player = game.Players.LocalPlayer
                                    local chr = player.Character
                                    if chr and chr:FindFirstChild("Humanoid") and chr.Humanoid.SeatPart then
                                        local car = chr.Humanoid.SeatPart.Parent.Parent
                                        
                                        if v.Parent.Name ~= "26" then
                                            car:PivotTo(CFrame.new(v.Parent.Checkpoint.Position))
                                            task.wait(0.2)
                                        else
                                            car:PivotTo(CFrame.new(v.Parent.Checkpoint.Position))
                                            task.wait(0.2)
                                            if v.Parent.Parent.Parent:FindFirstChild("GoalPart") then
                                                car:PivotTo(CFrame.new(v.Parent.Parent.Parent.GoalPart.Position))
                                            end
                                        end
                                    end
                                end
                                task.wait(0.2)
                            end
                        end
                    end)
                end
            end)
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "提示",
                Content = "自动完成山脉赛已开启",
                Duration = 3
            })
        else
            if mountainThread then
                task.cancel(mountainThread)
                mountainThread = nil
            end
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "提示",
                Content = "自动完成山脉赛已关闭",
                Duration = 3
            })
        end
    end

-- 自动完成海绵赛
RaceFunctions:Toggle({
    Title = "自动完成海绵赛",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(state)
        if state then
            spongeThread = task.spawn(function()
                -- 创建平台（用于最后的传送点）
                local part = Instance.new("Part")
                part.Position = Vector3.new(0, 100, 0)
                part.Size = Vector3.new(100, 5, 100)
                part.Anchored = true
                part.Name = "SpongeRacePlatform"
                part.Transparency = 1
                part.CanCollide = false
                part.Parent = workspace
                
                while state do
                    task.wait()
                    pcall(function()
                        local player = game.Players.LocalPlayer
                        local chr = player.Character
                        if chr and chr:FindFirstChild("Humanoid") and chr.Humanoid.SeatPart then
                            local car = chr.Humanoid.SeatPart.Parent.Parent
                            local spongeRace = workspace.Races:FindFirstChild("SpongeBobRace")
                            
                            if spongeRace and spongeRace:FindFirstChild("Checkpoints") then
                                -- 依次传送到各个检查点
                                for i = 1, 10 do
                                    local checkpoint = spongeRace.Checkpoints:FindFirstChild(tostring(i))
                                    if checkpoint and checkpoint:FindFirstChild("Checkpoint") then
                                        car:PivotTo(checkpoint.Checkpoint.CFrame)
                                        task.wait(0.2)
                                    end
                                end
                                -- 最后传送到平台
                                car:PivotTo(part.CFrame)
                            end
                        end
                    end)
                end
                
                -- 清理平台
                if part and part.Parent then
                    part:Destroy()
                end
            end)
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "提示",
                Content = "自动完成海绵赛已开启",
                Duration = 3
            })
        else
            if spongeThread then
                task.cancel(spongeThread)
                spongeThread = nil
            end
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "提示",
                Content = "自动完成海绵赛已关闭",
                Duration = 3
            })
        end
    end
})
end)
server2:Button("7day live", function()
local WindUI = loadstring(game:HttpGet("https://github.com/Footagesus/WindUI/releases/latest/download/main.lua"))()

local Window = WindUI:CreateWindow({
    Title = "7day live",
    Icon = "crown",
    IconThemed = true,
    Author = "tubers93脚本",
    Folder = "CloudHub",
    Size = UDim2.fromOffset(300, 270),
    Transparent = true,
    Theme = "Dark",
    User = {
        Enabled = true,
        Callback = function()
            print("clicked")
        end,
        Anonymous = false
    },
    SideBarWidth = 200,
    HideSearchBar = true,
    ScrollBarEnabled = true,
})

Window:EditOpenButton({
    Title = "tubers93脚本",
    Icon = "image-upscale",
    CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 10),
    StrokeThickness = 3,
    Color = ColorSequence.new(Color3.fromHex("FF0F7B"), Color3.fromHex("F89B29"))
})
local SurvivalTab = Window:Tab({Title = "生存游戏", Icon = "tree-pine"})

-- 创建ESP文件夹
local ESPName = {
    "ScpESPFloder",
    "AnimalESPFloder",
}

for _, v in ipairs(ESPName) do
    local ESPFloder = Instance.new("Folder")
    ESPFloder.Parent = workspace
    ESPFloder.Name = v
end

-- ESP函数
local function ESPMonster(Text, Adornee, Color)
    if not Adornee:FindFirstChild("ROLESPBillboardGui") then
        local ROLESPBillboardGui = Instance.new("BillboardGui")
        ROLESPBillboardGui.Parent = workspace.ScpESPFloder
        ROLESPBillboardGui.Adornee = Adornee
        ROLESPBillboardGui.Size = UDim2.new(0, 20, 0, 20)
        ROLESPBillboardGui.StudsOffset = Vector3.new(0, 3, 0)
        ROLESPBillboardGui.AlwaysOnTop = true
        local ROLESPTextLabel = Instance.new("TextLabel")
        ROLESPTextLabel.Parent = ROLESPBillboardGui
        ROLESPTextLabel.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 1, 0)
        ROLESPTextLabel.BackgroundTransparency = 1
        ROLESPTextLabel.Text = Text
        ROLESPTextLabel.TextColor3 = Color
        ROLESPTextLabel.TextStrokeTransparency = 0.5
        ROLESPTextLabel.TextScaled = true
        ROLESPTextLabel.Name = "ROLESPBillboardGui"
    end
end

local function ESPAnimal(Text, Adornee, Color)
    if not Adornee:FindFirstChild("ROLESPBillboardGui") then
        local ROLESPBillboardGui = Instance.new("BillboardGui")
        ROLESPBillboardGui.Parent = workspace.AnimalESPFloder
        ROLESPBillboardGui.Adornee = Adornee
        ROLESPBillboardGui.Size = UDim2.new(0, 20, 0, 20)
        ROLESPBillboardGui.StudsOffset = Vector3.new(0, 3, 0)
        ROLESPBillboardGui.AlwaysOnTop = true
        local ROLESPTextLabel = Instance.new("TextLabel")
        ROLESPTextLabel.Parent = ROLESPBillboardGui
        ROLESPTextLabel.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 1, 0)
        ROLESPTextLabel.BackgroundTransparency = 1
        ROLESPTextLabel.Text = Text
        ROLESPTextLabel.TextColor3 = Color
        ROLESPTextLabel.TextStrokeTransparency = 0.5
        ROLESPTextLabel.TextScaled = true
        ROLESPTextLabel.Name = "ROLESPBillboardGui"
    end
end

-- 游戏变量
local OAO = game.Players.LocalPlayer
local QWQ = game.ReplicatedStorage
local OvO = {
    instantlycutofftree = false,
    AutoCollectScraps = false,
    AutoCollectDirt = false,
    AutoCollectHarvt = false,
    KillAll = false,
    KillAura = false,
    AutoTpPine = false,
    AutoHeli = false,
    AutoCast = false,
    AutoCollectCabbage = false,
    AutoCollectDeer = false
}

-- 防挂机
game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer.Idled:Connect(function()
    game:GetService("VirtualUser"):Button2Down(Vector2.new(0, 0), workspace.CurrentCamera.CFrame)
    task.wait(1)
    game:GetService("VirtualUser"):Button2Up(Vector2.new(0, 0), workspace.CurrentCamera.CFrame)
    game:GetService("VirtualUser"):CaptureController()
    game:GetService("VirtualUser"):ClickButton2(Vector2.new())
end)

-- 创建主要功能部分
local SurvivalFunctions = SurvivalTab:Section({Title = "主要功能"})

-- 动物透视
local animalConnection
SurvivalFunctions:Toggle({
    Title = "动物透视",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(state)
        if state then
            if animalConnection then 
                animalConnection:Disconnect() 
                animalConnection = nil
            end
            
            pcall(function()
                local animalsFolder = workspace:FindFirstChild("animals")
                if animalsFolder then
                    for _, v in ipairs(animalsFolder:GetChildren()) do
                        ESPAnimal(v.Name, v, Color3.new(1, 0, 0))
                    end
                    
                    animalConnection = animalsFolder.ChildAdded:Connect(function(v)
                        ESPAnimal(v.Name, v, Color3.new(1, 0, 0))
                    end)
                end
            end)
            
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "提示",
                Content = "动物透视已开启",
                Duration = 3
            })
        else
            if animalConnection then 
                animalConnection:Disconnect() 
                animalConnection = nil
            end
            
            pcall(function()
                local animalESP = workspace:FindFirstChild("AnimalESPFloder")
                if animalESP then
                    animalESP:ClearAllChildren()
                end
            end)
            
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "提示",
                Content = "动物透视已关闭",
                Duration = 3
            })
        end
    end
})

-- 怪物透视
local scpConnection
SurvivalFunctions:Toggle({
    Title = "怪物透视",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(state)
        if state then
            if scpConnection then 
                scpConnection:Disconnect() 
                scpConnection = nil
            end
            
            pcall(function()
                local scpsFolder = workspace:FindFirstChild("scps")
                if scpsFolder then
                    for _, v in ipairs(scpsFolder:GetChildren()) do
                        ESPMonster("怪物", v, Color3.new(0, 0, 1))
                    end
                    
                    scpConnection = scpsFolder.ChildAdded:Connect(function(v)
                        ESPMonster("怪物", v, Color3.new(0, 0, 1))
                    end)
                end
            end)
            
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "提示",
                Content = "怪物透视已开启",
                Duration = 3
            })
        else
            if scpConnection then 
                scpConnection:Disconnect() 
                scpConnection = nil
            end
            
            pcall(function()
                local scpESP = workspace:FindFirstChild("ScpESPFloder")
                if scpESP then
                    scpESP:ClearAllChildren()
                end
            end)
            
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "提示",
                Content = "怪物透视已关闭",
                Duration = 3
            })
        end
    end
})

-- 秒砍树
local cutTreeThread
SurvivalFunctions:Toggle({
    Title = "秒砍树",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(state)
        OvO.instantlycutofftree = state
        if state then
            cutTreeThread = task.spawn(function()
                while OvO.instantlycutofftree do
                    task.wait()
                    pcall(function()
                        local remote = QWQ:FindFirstChild("remotes")
                        if remote then
                            local swingAxe = remote:FindFirstChild("swing_axe")
                            if swingAxe then
                                swingAxe:FireServer()
                            end
                        end
                        
                        local logsFolder = workspace:FindFirstChild("logs")
                        if logsFolder then
                            for _, v in ipairs(logsFolder:GetChildren()) do
                                if v.Name == "log" and v:FindFirstChild("main") then
                                    local main = v.main
                                    if main:FindFirstChild("ProximityPrompt") then
                                        fireproximityprompt(main.ProximityPrompt)
                                    end
                                end
                            end
                        end
                    end)
                end
            end)
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "提示",
                Content = "秒砍树已开启",
                Duration = 3
            })
        else
            if cutTreeThread then
                task.cancel(cutTreeThread)
                cutTreeThread = nil
            end
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "提示",
                Content = "秒砍树已关闭",
                Duration = 3
            })
        end
    end
})

-- 自动钓鱼
local fishingThread
SurvivalFunctions:Toggle({
    Title = "自动钓鱼",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(state)
        OvO.AutoCast = state
        if state then
            fishingThread = task.spawn(function()
                while OvO.AutoCast do
                    task.wait()
                    pcall(function()
                        local remote = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage"):FindFirstChild("remotes")
                        if remote then
                            local castRemote = remote:FindFirstChild("cast")
                            local hitFishRemote = remote:FindFirstChild("hit_fish")
                            
                            if castRemote and hitFishRemote then
                                castRemote:FireServer()
                                task.wait(0.2)
                                
                                for i = 1, 8 do
                                    hitFishRemote:FireServer()
                                    task.wait(0.05)
                                end
                            end
                        end
                    end)
                end
            end)
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "提示",
                Content = "自动钓鱼已开启",
                Duration = 3
            })
        else
            if fishingThread then
                task.cancel(fishingThread)
                fishingThread = nil
            end
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "提示",
                Content = "自动钓鱼已关闭",
                Duration = 3
            })
        end
    end
})

-- 秒吃食物按钮
SurvivalFunctions:Button({
    Title = "秒吃食物",
    Callback = function()
        pcall(function()
            local player = game.Players.LocalPlayer
            local char = player.Character
            local backpack = player.Backpack
            
            if char and backpack then
                local hungerValue = char:FindFirstChild("hunger")
                if hungerValue and hungerValue.Value < 30 then
                    for _, v in ipairs(backpack:GetChildren()) do
                        if v:FindFirstChild("eat") then
                            for i = 1, 20 do
                                v.Parent = char
                                char[v.Name].eat:FireServer()
                                task.wait(0.05)
                            end
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "提示",
                Content = "已尝试快速进食",
                Duration = 3
            })
        end)
    end
})

-- 自动收集材料
local collectScrapsThread
SurvivalFunctions:Toggle({
    Title = "自动收集材料",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(state)
        OvO.AutoCollectScraps = state
        if state then
            collectScrapsThread = task.spawn(function()
                while OvO.AutoCollectScraps do
                    task.wait()
                    pcall(function()
                        local player = game.Players.LocalPlayer
                        local char = player.Character
                        
                        if char and char:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                            local oldcf = char.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame
                            local scrapsFolder = workspace:FindFirstChild("scraps")
                            
                            if scrapsFolder then
                                for _, v in ipairs(scrapsFolder:GetChildren()) do
                                    if not OvO.AutoCollectScraps then break end
                                    
                                    local material = v:FindFirstChild("defaultMaterial10")
                                    if material then
                                        local prompt = material:FindFirstChild("ProximityPrompt")
                                        if prompt then
                                            char.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = material.CFrame + Vector3.new(0, 3, 0)
                                            task.wait(0.2)
                                            fireproximityprompt(prompt)
                                            task.wait(0.2)
                                            char.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = oldcf
                                        end
                                    end
                                end
                            end
                        end
                    end)
                end
            end)
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "提示",
                Content = "自动收集材料已开启",
                Duration = 3
            })
        else
            if collectScrapsThread then
                task.cancel(collectScrapsThread)
                collectScrapsThread = nil
            end
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "提示",
                Content = "自动收集材料已关闭",
                Duration = 3
            })
        end
    end
})

-- 传送回出生点按钮
SurvivalFunctions:Button({
    Title = "传送回出生点",
    Callback = function()
        pcall(function()
            local player = game.Players.LocalPlayer
            local char = player.Character
            
            if char and char:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                char.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(57, 42, 416)
                WindUI:Notify({
                    Title = "提示",
                    Content = "已传送回出生点",
                    Duration = 3
                })
            end
        end)
    end
})

-- 自动收集成熟品
local collectHarvestThread
local harvestOldPos = nil
SurvivalFunctions:Toggle({
    Title = "自动收集成熟品",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(state)
        OvO.AutoCollectHarvt = state
        if state then
            local player = game.Players.LocalPlayer
            local char = player.Character
            
            if char and char:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                harvestOldPos = char.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame
            end
            
            collectHarvestThread = task.spawn(function()
                while OvO.AutoCollectHarvt do
                    task.wait()
                    pcall(function()
                        local char = player.Character
                        if char and char:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                            local harvestFolder = workspace:FindFirstChild("harvest")
                            if harvestFolder then
                                for _, v in ipairs(harvestFolder:GetChildren()) do
                                    if not OvO.AutoCollectHarvt then break end
                                    
                                    if v:FindFirstChild("main") and v.main:FindFirstChild("ProximityPrompt") then
                                        char.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = v.main.CFrame
                                        fireproximityprompt(v.main.ProximityPrompt)
                                        task.wait(0.1)
                                    end
                                end
                            end
                        end
                    end)
                end
                
                -- 返回原始位置
                if harvestOldPos then
                    pcall(function()
                        local char = player.Character
                        if char and char:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                            char.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = harvestOldPos
                        end
                    end)
                end
            end)
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "提示",
                Content = "自动收集成熟品已开启",
                Duration = 3
            })
        else
            if collectHarvestThread then
                task.cancel(collectHarvestThread)
                collectHarvestThread = nil
            end
            
            -- 返回原始位置
            if harvestOldPos then
                pcall(function()
                    local player = game.Players.LocalPlayer
                    local char = player.Character
                    if char and char:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                        char.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = harvestOldPos
                    end
                end)
            end
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "提示",
                Content = "自动收集成熟品已关闭",
                Duration = 3
            })
        end
    end
})

-- 自动收集生鹿肉
local collectDeerThread
local deerOldPos = nil
SurvivalFunctions:Toggle({
    Title = "自动收集生鹿肉",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(state)
        OvO.AutoCollectDeer = state
        if state then
            local player = game.Players.LocalPlayer
            local char = player.Character
            
            if char and char:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                deerOldPos = char.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame
            end
            
            collectDeerThread = task.spawn(function()
                while OvO.AutoCollectDeer do
                    task.wait()
                    pcall(function()
                        local char = player.Character
                        if char and char:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                            local interactFolder = workspace:FindFirstChild("interact")
                            if interactFolder then
                                for _, v in ipairs(interactFolder:GetChildren()) do
                                    if not OvO.AutoCollectDeer then break end
                                    
                                    if v.Name == "deer" and v:FindFirstChild("lungs,heart,intestines") then
                                        local intestines = v["lungs,heart,intestines"]
                                        if intestines:FindFirstChild("ProximityPrompt") then
                                            char.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = intestines.CFrame
                                            fireproximityprompt(intestines.ProximityPrompt)
                                            task.wait(0.1)
                                        end
                                    end
                                end
                            end
                        end
                    end)
                end
                
                -- 返回原始位置
                if deerOldPos then
                    pcall(function()
                        local char = player.Character
                        if char and char:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                            char.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = deerOldPos
                        end
                    end)
                end
            end)
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "提示",
                Content = "自动收集生鹿肉已开启",
                Duration = 3
            })
        else
            if collectDeerThread then
                task.cancel(collectDeerThread)
                collectDeerThread = nil
            end
            
            -- 返回原始位置
            if deerOldPos then
                pcall(function()
                    local player = game.Players.LocalPlayer
                    local char = player.Character
                    if char and char:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                        char.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = deerOldPos
                    end
                end)
            end
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "提示",
                Content = "自动收集生鹿肉已关闭",
                Duration = 3
            })
        end
    end
})

-- 自动收集包菜
local collectCabbageThread
local cabbageOldPos = nil
SurvivalFunctions:Toggle({
    Title = "自动收集包菜",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(state)
        OvO.AutoCollectDirt = state
        if state then
            local player = game.Players.LocalPlayer
            local char = player.Character
            
            if char and char:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                cabbageOldPos = char.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame
            end
            
            collectCabbageThread = task.spawn(function()
                while OvO.AutoCollectDirt do
                    task.wait()
                    pcall(function()
                        local char = player.Character
                        if char and char:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                            local builds = workspace:FindFirstChild("builds")
                            if builds then
                                local cabbageFarm = builds:FindFirstChild("Cabbage Farm")
                                if cabbageFarm and cabbageFarm:FindFirstChild("dirt") then
                                    local dirt = cabbageFarm.dirt
                                    if dirt:FindFirstChild("ProximityPrompt") then
                                        char.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = dirt.CFrame
                                        fireproximityprompt(dirt.ProximityPrompt)
                                    end
                                end
                            end
                        end
                    end)
                end
                
                -- 返回原始位置
                if cabbageOldPos then
                    pcall(function()
                        local char = player.Character
                        if char and char:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                            char.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = cabbageOldPos
                        end
                    end)
                end
            end)
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "提示",
                Content = "自动收集包菜已开启",
                Duration = 3
            })
        else
            if collectCabbageThread then
                task.cancel(collectCabbageThread)
                collectCabbageThread = nil
            end
            
            -- 返回原始位置
            if cabbageOldPos then
                pcall(function()
                    local player = game.Players.LocalPlayer
                    local char = player.Character
                    if char and char:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                        char.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = cabbageOldPos
                    end
                end)
            end
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "提示",
                Content = "自动收集包菜已关闭",
                Duration = 3
            })
        end
    end
})

-- 枪械光环
local killAllThread
SurvivalFunctions:Toggle({
    Title = "枪械光环",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(state)
        OvO.KillAll = state
        if state then
            killAllThread = task.spawn(function()
                while OvO.KillAll do
                    task.wait()
                    pcall(function()
                        local remote = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage"):FindFirstChild("remotes")
                        if remote then
                            local shootRemote = remote:FindFirstChild("shoot")
                            local reloadRemote = remote:FindFirstChild("reload")
                            
                            if shootRemote and reloadRemote then
                                -- 攻击怪物
                                local scpsFolder = workspace:FindFirstChild("scps")
                                if scpsFolder then
                                    for _, v in ipairs(scpsFolder:GetChildren()) do
                                        if v:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                                            local args = {
                                                [1] = CFrame.new(v.HumanoidRootPart.Position) * CFrame.Angles(0, 0, 0),
                                                [2] = CFrame.new(v.HumanoidRootPart.Position) * CFrame.Angles(0, 0, 0),
                                            }
                                            shootRemote:FireServer(unpack(args))
                                            reloadRemote:FireServer()
                                        end
                                    end
                                end
                                
                                -- 攻击动物
                                local animalsFolder = workspace:FindFirstChild("animals")
                                if animalsFolder then
                                    for _, v in ipairs(animalsFolder:GetChildren()) do
                                        if v:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                                            local args = {
                                                [1] = CFrame.new(v.HumanoidRootPart.Position) * CFrame.Angles(0, 0, 0),
                                                [2] = CFrame.new(v.HumanoidRootPart.Position) * CFrame.Angles(0, 0, 0),
                                            }
                                            shootRemote:FireServer(unpack(args))
                                            reloadRemote:FireServer()
                                        end
                                    end
                                end
                            end
                        end
                    end)
                end
            end)
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "提示",
                Content = "枪械光环已开启",
                Duration = 3
            })
        else
            if killAllThread then
                task.cancel(killAllThread)
                killAllThread = nil
            end
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "提示",
                Content = "枪械光环已关闭",
                Duration = 3
            })
        end
    end
})

-- 子弹追踪(锁头)
local killAuraThread
SurvivalFunctions:Toggle({
    Title = "子弹追踪(锁头)",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(state)
        OvO.KillAura = state
        if state then
            killAuraThread = task.spawn(function()
                while OvO.KillAura do
                    task.wait()
                    pcall(function()
                        local player = game.Players.LocalPlayer
                        local char = player.Character
                        
                        if char and char:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                            local remote = game.ReplicatedStorage:FindFirstChild("remotes")
                            if remote then
                                local shootRemote = remote:FindFirstChild("shoot")
                                
                                if shootRemote then
                                    -- 攻击怪物
                                    local scpsFolder = workspace:FindFirstChild("scps")
                                    if scpsFolder then
                                        for _, scp in ipairs(scpsFolder:GetChildren()) do
                                            local humanoid = scp:FindFirstChildWhichIsA("Humanoid")
                                            local hitPart = scp:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") or scp:FindFirstChild("Head")
                                            
                                            if hitPart and humanoid and humanoid.Health > 0 then
                                                shootRemote:FireServer(hitPart.CFrame + Vector3.new(0, 0.5, 0), hitPart.CFrame)
                                            end
                                        end
                                    end
                                    
                                    -- 攻击动物
                                    local animalsFolder = workspace:FindFirstChild("animals")
                                    if animalsFolder then
                                        for _, animal in ipairs(animalsFolder:GetChildren()) do
                                            local humanoid = animal:FindFirstChildWhichIsA("Humanoid")
                                            local hitPart = animal:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") or animal:FindFirstChild("Head")
                                            
                                            if hitPart and humanoid and humanoid.Health > 0 then
                                                shootRemote:FireServer(hitPart.CFrame + Vector3.new(0, 0.5, 0), hitPart.CFrame)
                                            end
                                        end
                                    end
                                end
                            end
                        end
                    end)
                end
            end)
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "提示",
                Content = "子弹追踪(锁头)已开启",
                Duration = 3
            })
        else
            if killAuraThread then
                task.cancel(killAuraThread)
                killAuraThread = nil
            end
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "提示",
                Content = "子弹追踪(锁头)已关闭",
                Duration = 3
            })
        end
    end
})

-- 查找最近的松树函数
local function findClosestPine()
    local closestPine = nil
    local shortestDistance = math.huge
    local player = game.Players.LocalPlayer
    local char = player.Character
    
    if char and char:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
        local treesFolder = workspace:FindFirstChild("trees")
        if treesFolder then
            for _, v in ipairs(treesFolder:GetChildren()) do
                if v.Name:find("Pine") and v.PrimaryPart then
                    local distance = (v.PrimaryPart.Position - char.HumanoidRootPart.Position).Magnitude
                    if distance < shortestDistance then
                        closestPine = v
                        shortestDistance = distance
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    end
    return closestPine
end

-- 自动传送最近的木头
local tpPineThread
SurvivalFunctions:Toggle({
    Title = "自动传送最近的木头",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(state)
        OvO.AutoTpPine = state
        if state then
            tpPineThread = task.spawn(function()
                while OvO.AutoTpPine do
                    task.wait()
                    pcall(function()
                        local player = game.Players.LocalPlayer
                        local char = player.Character
                        
                        if char and char:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                            local closestPine = findClosestPine()
                            if closestPine and closestPine.PrimaryPart then
                                local targetPosition = closestPine.PrimaryPart.Position
                                char.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(Vector3.new(targetPosition.X, targetPosition.Y - 30, targetPosition.Z))
                                char.HumanoidRootPart.Anchored = true
                            end
                        end
                    end)
                end
                
                -- 关闭时取消锚定
                pcall(function()
                    local player = game.Players.LocalPlayer
                    local char = player.Character
                    if char and char:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                        char.HumanoidRootPart.Anchored = false
                    end
                end)
            end)
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "提示",
                Content = "自动传送最近的木头已开启",
                Duration = 3
            })
        else
            if tpPineThread then
                task.cancel(tpPineThread)
                tpPineThread = nil
            end
            
            -- 取消锚定
            pcall(function()
                local player = game.Players.LocalPlayer
                local char = player.Character
                if char and char:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                    char.HumanoidRootPart.Anchored = false
                end
            end)
            
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "提示",
                Content = "自动传送最近的木头已关闭",
                Duration = 3
            })
        end
    end
})

-- 自动拾取飞机残骸
local collectHeliThread
SurvivalFunctions:Toggle({
    Title = "自动拾取飞机残骸",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(state)
        OvO.AutoHeli = state
        if state then
            collectHeliThread = task.spawn(function()
                while OvO.AutoHeli do
                    task.wait()
                    pcall(function()
                        local interactFolder = workspace:FindFirstChild("interact")
                        if interactFolder then
                            for _, v in ipairs(interactFolder:GetChildren()) do
                                if not OvO.AutoHeli then break end
                                
                                if v.Name == "heli" and v:FindFirstChild("Body") then
                                    local body = v.Body
                                    if body:FindFirstChild("ProximityPrompt") then
                                        fireproximityprompt(body.ProximityPrompt)
                                        task.wait(0.5)
                                    end
                                end
                            end
                        end
                    end)
                end
            end)
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "提示",
                Content = "自动拾取飞机残骸已开启",
                Duration = 3
            })
        else
            if collectHeliThread then
                task.cancel(collectHeliThread)
                collectHeliThread = nil
            end
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "提示",
                Content = "自动拾取飞机残骸已关闭",
                Duration = 3
            })
        end
    end
})
end)
server2:Button("建造一座岛屿", function()
local WindUI = loadstring(game:HttpGet("https://github.com/Footagesus/WindUI/releases/latest/download/main.lua"))()

local Window = WindUI:CreateWindow({
    Title = "建造一座岛屿",
    Icon = "crown",
    IconThemed = true,
    Author = "tubers93脚本",
    Folder = "CloudHub",
    Size = UDim2.fromOffset(300, 270),
    Transparent = true,
    Theme = "Dark",
    User = {
        Enabled = true,
        Callback = function()
            print("clicked")
        end,
        Anonymous = false
    },
    SideBarWidth = 200,
    HideSearchBar = true,
    ScrollBarEnabled = true,
})

Window:EditOpenButton({
    Title = "tubers93脚本",
    Icon = "image-upscale",
    CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 10),
    StrokeThickness = 3,
    Color = ColorSequence.new(Color3.fromHex("FF0F7B"), Color3.fromHex("F89B29"))
})
local IslandTab = Window:Tab({Title = "岛屿生存", Icon = "island"})

local IslandFunctions = IslandTab:Section({Title = "岛屿功能"})

local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local plr = Players.LocalPlayer
local plot = nil
local land = nil
local resources = nil
local expand = nil

-- 初始化地块
local function initializePlot()
    pcall(function()
        local workspacePlots = workspace:FindFirstChild("Plots")
        if workspacePlots then
            plot = workspacePlots:WaitForChild(plr.Name)
            if plot then
                land = plot:FindFirstChild("Land")
                resources = plot:WaitForChild("Resources")
                expand = plot:WaitForChild("Expand")
            end
        end
    end)
end

-- 初始化设置表
getgenv().settings = {
    farm = false,
    expand = false,
    craft = false,
    sell = false,
    gold = false,
    collect = false,
    harvest = false,
    hive = false,
    auto_buy = false
}

-- 延迟设置
local expand_delay = 0.1
local craft_delay = 0.1

-- 尝试初始化地块
initializePlot()

-- 玩家地块变化监听
if plr then
    plr.CharacterAdded:Connect(function()
        task.wait(2)
        initializePlot()
    end)
end

-- 自动挥舞
local farmThread = nil
IslandFunctions:Toggle({
    Title = "自动挥舞",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(state)
        settings.farm = state
        if state then
            farmThread = task.spawn(function()
                while settings.farm do
                    pcall(function()
                        if resources then
                            for _, r in ipairs(resources:GetChildren()) do
                                local communication = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage"):FindFirstChild("Communication")
                                if communication then
                                    local hitResource = communication:FindFirstChild("HitResource")
                                    if hitResource then
                                        hitResource:FireServer(r)
                                    end
                                end
                                task.wait(0.01)
                            end
                        end
                    end)
                    task.wait(0.1)
                end
            end)
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "提示",
                Content = "自动挥舞已开启",
                Duration = 3
            })
        else
            if farmThread then
                task.cancel(farmThread)
                farmThread = nil
            end
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "提示",
                Content = "自动挥舞已关闭",
                Duration = 3
            })
        end
    end
})

-- 自动建造岛屿
local expandThread = nil
IslandFunctions:Toggle({
    Title = "自动建造岛屿",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(state)
        settings.expand = state
        if state then
            expandThread = task.spawn(function()
                while settings.expand do
                    pcall(function()
                        if expand then
                            for _, exp in ipairs(expand:GetChildren()) do
                                local top = exp:FindFirstChild("Top")
                                if top then
                                    local bGui = top:FindFirstChild("BillboardGui")
                                    if bGui then
                                        for _, contribute in ipairs(bGui:GetChildren()) do
                                            if contribute:IsA("Frame") and contribute.Name ~= "Example" then
                                                local communication = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage"):FindFirstChild("Communication")
                                                if communication then
                                                    local contributeToExpand = communication:FindFirstChild("ContributeToExpand")
                                                    if contributeToExpand then
                                                        local args = {
                                                            exp.Name,
                                                            contribute.Name,
                                                            1
                                                        }
                                                        contributeToExpand:FireServer(unpack(args))
                                                    end
                                                end
                                            end
                                        end
                                    end
                                end
                                task.wait(0.01)
                            end
                        end
                    end)
                    task.wait(expand_delay)
                end
            end)
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "提示",
                Content = "自动建造岛屿已开启",
                Duration = 3
            })
        else
            if expandThread then
                task.cancel(expandThread)
                expandThread = nil
            end
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "提示",
                Content = "自动建造岛屿已关闭",
                Duration = 3
            })
        end
    end
})

                                        local communication = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage"):FindFirstChild("Communication")
                                        if communication then
                                            local craftRemote = communication:FindFirstChild("Craft")
                                            if craftRemote then
                                                craftRemote:FireServer(attachment)
                                            end
                                        end
                                    end
                                end
                            end
                        end
                    end)
                    task.wait(craft_delay)
                end
            end)
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "提示",
                Content = "自动制造已开启",
                Duration = 3
            })
        else
            if craftThread then
                task.cancel(craftThread)
                craftThread = nil

                Title = "提示",
                Content = "自动制造已关闭",
                Duration = 3
            })
        end
    end
})

    Default = false,
    Callback = function(state)
        settings.sell = state
        if state then
            sellThread = task.spawn(function()
                while settings.sell do
                    pcall(function()
                        local backpack = plr.Backpack
                        if backpack then
                            for _, crop in ipairs(backpack:GetChildren()) do
                                if crop:GetAttribute("Sellable") then
                                    local communication = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage"):FindFirstChild("Communication")
                                    if communication then
                                        local sellRemote = communication:FindFirstChild("SellToMerchant")
                                        if sellRemote then
                                            local a = {
                                                false,
                                                {
                                                    crop:GetAttribute("Hash")
                                                }
                                            }
                                            sellRemote:FireServer(unpack(a))
                                        end
                                    end
                                end
                            end
                        end
                    end)
                    task.wait(1)
                end
            end)
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "提示",
                Content = "自动售卖已开启",
                Duration = 3
            })
        else
            if sellThread then
                task.cancel(sellThread)
                sellThread = nil
            end
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "提示",
                Content = "自动售卖已关闭",
                Duration = 3
            })
