-- 获取可购买物品列表
local items = {}
local function updateItemsList()
    items = {}
    pcall(function()
        local playerGui = plr.PlayerGui
        if playerGui then
            local main = playerGui:FindFirstChild("Main")
            if main then
                local menus = main:FindFirstChild("Menus")
                if menus then
                    local merchant = menus:FindFirstChild("Merchant")
                    if merchant then
                        local inner = merchant:FindFirstChild("Inner")
                        if inner then
                            local scrollingFrame = inner:FindFirstChild("ScrollingFrame")
                            if scrollingFrame then
                                local hold = scrollingFrame:FindFirstChild("Hold")
                                if hold then
                                    for _, item in ipairs(hold:GetChildren()) do
                                        if item:IsA("Frame") and item.Name ~= "Example" then
                                            table.insert(items, item.Name)
                                        end
                                    end
                                end
                            end
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    end)
end

-- 初始化物品列表
task.spawn(updateItemsList)

-- 选择的物品
local selectedItem = nil

-- 物品选择下拉菜单
IslandFunctions:Dropdown({
    Title = "选择物品",
    Values = items,
    Default = items[1] or "",
    Callback = function(value)
        selectedItem = value
        WindUI:Notify({
            Title = "物品选择",
            Content = "已选择: " .. (value or "无"),
            Duration = 3
        })
    end
})

-- 购买物品按钮
IslandFunctions:Button({
    Title = "购买物品",
    Callback = function()
        if selectedItem then
            pcall(function()
                local communication = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage"):FindFirstChild("Communication")
                if communication then
                    local buyRemote = communication:FindFirstChild("BuyFromMerchant")
                    if buyRemote then
                        local a = {
                            selectedItem,
                            false
                        }
                        buyRemote:FireServer(unpack(a))
                        WindUI:Notify({
                            Title = "购买成功",
                            Content = "已购买: " .. selectedItem,
                            Duration = 3
                        })
                    end
                end
            end)
        else
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "购买失败",
                Content = "请先选择物品",
                Duration = 3
            })
        end
    end
})

-- 自动购买物品
local autoBuyThread = nil
IslandFunctions:Toggle({
    Title = "自动购买物品",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(state)
        settings.auto_buy = state
        if state then
            autoBuyThread = task.spawn(function()
                while settings.auto_buy do
                    if selectedItem then
                        pcall(function()
                            local communication = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage"):FindFirstChild("Communication")
                            if communication then
                                local buyRemote = communication:FindFirstChild("BuyFromMerchant")
                                if buyRemote then
                                    local a = {
                                        selectedItem,
                                        false
                                    }
                                    buyRemote:FireServer(unpack(a))
                                end
                            end
                        end)
                    end
                    task.wait(0.25)
                end
            end)
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "提示",
                Content = "自动购买物品已开启",
                Duration = 3
            })
        else
            if autoBuyThread then
                task.cancel(autoBuyThread)
                autoBuyThread = nil
            end
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "提示",
                Content = "自动购买物品已关闭",
                Duration = 3
            })
        end
    end
})

-- 刷新物品列表按钮
IslandFunctions:Button({
    Title = "刷新物品列表",
    Callback = function()
        updateItemsList()
        WindUI:Notify({
            Title = "刷新成功",
            Content = "物品列表已刷新，共找到 " .. #items .. " 个物品",
            Duration = 3
        })
    end
})

-- 建造间隔输入框
IslandFunctions:Textbox({
    Title = "建造间隔(秒)",
    Default = "0.1",
    Callback = function(text)
        local num = tonumber(text)
        if num and num > 0 then
            expand_delay = num
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "设置成功",
                Content = "建造间隔已设置为: " .. text .. " 秒",
                Duration = 3
            })
        else
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "设置失败",
                Content = "请输入有效的数字",
                Duration = 3
            })
        end
    end
})

-- 制造间隔输入框
IslandFunctions:Textbox({
    Title = "制造间隔(秒)",
    Default = "0.1",
    Callback = function(text)
        local num = tonumber(text)
        if num and num > 0 then
            craft_delay = num
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "设置成功",
                Content = "制造间隔已设置为: " .. text .. " 秒",
                Duration = 3
            })
        else
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "设置失败",
                Content = "请输入有效的数字",
                Duration = 3
            })
        end
    end
})
end)
server2:Button("挖掘它", function()
local WindUI = loadstring(game:HttpGet("https://github.com/Footagesus/WindUI/releases/latest/download/main.lua"))()

local Window = WindUI:CreateWindow({
    Title = "挖掘它",
    Icon = "crown",
    IconThemed = true,
    Author = "tubers93脚本",
    Folder = "CloudHub",
    Size = UDim2.fromOffset(300, 270),
    Transparent = true,
    Theme = "Dark",
    User = {
        Enabled = true,
        Callback = function()
            print("clicked")
        end,
        Anonymous = false
    },
    SideBarWidth = 200,
    HideSearchBar = true,
    ScrollBarEnabled = true,
})

Window:EditOpenButton({
    Title = "tubers93脚本",
    Icon = "image-upscale",
    CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 10),
    StrokeThickness = 3,
    Color = ColorSequence.new(Color3.fromHex("FF0F7B"), Color3.fromHex("F89B29"))
})
local DiggingTab = Window:Tab({Title = "挖掘游戏", Icon = "shovel"})

local DiggingFunctions = DiggingTab:Section({Title = "挖掘功能"})

local autodig = false
local autoarea = false
local autoCreatePile = false

-- 自动挖掘1
local autoDigThread1 = nil
DiggingFunctions:Toggle({
    Title = "自动挖掘1",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(state)
        autodig = state
        if state then
            autoDigThread1 = task.spawn(function()
                while autodig do
                    task.wait()
                    pcall(function()
                        local player = game.Players.LocalPlayer
                        local character = player.Character
                        
                        if character and character:FindFirstChild("Shovel") then
                            local isDigging = player:GetAttribute("IsDigging")
                            if isDigging == true then
                                local shovel = character:FindFirstChild("Shovel")
                                if shovel and shovel:FindFirstChild("Highlight") then
                                    local highlight = shovel.Highlight
                                    if highlight.Adornee then
                                        local targetPile = highlight.Adornee
                                        local pileIndex = targetPile:GetAttribute("PileIndex")
                                        
                                        if pileIndex then
                                            local replicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
                                            local sourceFolder = replicatedStorage:FindFirstChild("Source")
                                            if sourceFolder then
                                                local network = sourceFolder:FindFirstChild("Network")
                                                if network then
                                                    local remoteFunctions = network:FindFirstChild("RemoteFunctions")
                                                    if remoteFunctions then
                                                        local diggingRemote = remoteFunctions:FindFirstChild("Digging")
                                                        if diggingRemote then
                                                            local args = {
                                                                Command = "DigPile",
                                                                TargetPileIndex = pileIndex
                                                            }
                                                            
                                                            -- 持续挖掘直到完成
                                                            repeat
                                                                diggingRemote:InvokeServer(args)
                                                                task.wait(0.1)
                                                            until player:GetAttribute("IsDigging") == false or not autodig
                                                        end
                                                    end
                                                end
                                            end
                                        end
                                    end
                                end
                            end
                        end
                    end)
                end
            end)
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "提示",
                Content = "自动挖掘1已开启",
                Duration = 3
            })
        else
            if autoDigThread1 then
                task.cancel(autoDigThread1)
                autoDigThread1 = nil
            end
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "提示",
                Content = "自动挖掘1已关闭",
                Duration = 3
            })
        end
    end
})

-- 自动挖掘2（挖掘小游戏辅助）
local autoAreaThread = nil
DiggingFunctions:Toggle({
    Title = "自动挖掘2",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(state)
        autoarea = state
        if state then
            autoAreaThread = task.spawn(function()
                while autoarea do
                    task.wait()
                    pcall(function()
                        local player = game.Players.LocalPlayer
                        local playerGui = player.PlayerGui
                        
                        if playerGui then
                            local main = playerGui:FindFirstChild("Main")
                            if main then
                                local digMinigame = main:FindFirstChild("DigMinigame")
                                if digMinigame then
                                    local cursor = digMinigame:FindFirstChild("Cursor")
                                    local area = digMinigame:FindFirstChild("Area")
                                    
                                    if cursor and area then
                                        -- 将光标移动到区域中心
                                        cursor.Position = area.Position
                                    end
                                end
                            end
                        end
                    end)
                end
            end)
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "提示",
                Content = "自动挖掘2已开启",
                Duration = 3
            })
        else
            if autoAreaThread then
                task.cancel(autoAreaThread)
                autoAreaThread = nil
            end
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "提示",
                Content = "自动挖掘2已关闭",
                Duration = 3
            })
        end
    end
})

-- 自动铲
local autoCreatePileThread = nil
DiggingFunctions:Toggle({
    Title = "自动铲",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(state)
        autoCreatePile = state
        if state then
            autoCreatePileThread = task.spawn(function()
                while autoCreatePile do
                    task.wait()
                    pcall(function()
                        local player = game.Players.LocalPlayer
                        local pileCount = player:GetAttribute("PileCount")
                        
                        if pileCount == 0 then
                            local replicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
                            local sourceFolder = replicatedStorage:FindFirstChild("Source")
                            if sourceFolder then
                                local network = sourceFolder:FindFirstChild("Network")
                                if network then
                                    local remoteFunctions = network:FindFirstChild("RemoteFunctions")
                                    if remoteFunctions then
                                        local diggingRemote = remoteFunctions:FindFirstChild("Digging")
                                        if diggingRemote then
                                            local args = {
                                                Command = "CreatePile"
                                            }
                                            diggingRemote:InvokeServer(args)
                                        end
                                    end
                                end
                            end
                        end
                    end)
                end
            end)
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "提示",
                Content = "自动铲已开启",
                Duration = 3
            })
        else
            if autoCreatePileThread then
                task.cancel(autoCreatePileThread)
                autoCreatePileThread = nil
            end
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "提示",
                Content = "自动铲已关闭",
                Duration = 3
            })
        end
    end
})

-- 添加额外功能按钮
local ExtraFunctions = DiggingTab:Section({Title = "额外功能"})

-- 快速挖掘按钮
ExtraFunctions:Button({
    Title = "快速挖掘",
    Callback = function()
        pcall(function()
            local player = game.Players.LocalPlayer
            local character = player.Character
            
            if character and character:FindFirstChild("Shovel") then
                local shovel = character:FindFirstChild("Shovel")
                if shovel and shovel:FindFirstChild("Highlight") then
                    local highlight = shovel.Highlight
                    if highlight.Adornee then
                        local targetPile = highlight.Adornee
                        local pileIndex = targetPile:GetAttribute("PileIndex")
                        
                        if pileIndex then
                            local replicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
                            local sourceFolder = replicatedStorage:FindFirstChild("Source")
                            if sourceFolder then
                                local network = sourceFolder:FindFirstChild("Network")
                                if network then
                                    local remoteFunctions = network:FindFirstChild("RemoteFunctions")
                                    if remoteFunctions then
                                        local diggingRemote = remoteFunctions:FindFirstChild("Digging")
                                        if diggingRemote then
                                            for i = 1, 10 do
                                                local args = {
                                                    Command = "DigPile",
                                                    TargetPileIndex = pileIndex
                                                }
                                                diggingRemote:InvokeServer(args)
                                                task.wait(0.05)
                                            end
                                            WindUI:Notify({
                                                Title = "挖掘完成",
                                                Content = "已完成10次快速挖掘",
                                                Duration = 3
                                            })
                                        end
                                    end
                                end
                            end
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
        end)
    end
})

-- 重置挖掘状态按钮
ExtraFunctions:Button({
    Title = "重置挖掘状态",
    Callback = function()
        pcall(function()
            local player = game.Players.LocalPlayer
            if player:GetAttribute("IsDigging") == true then
                -- 尝试停止挖掘
                player:SetAttribute("IsDigging", false)
                WindUI:Notify({
                    Title = "状态重置",
                    Content = "挖掘状态已重置",
                    Duration = 3
                })
            end
        end)
    end
})

-- 检查工具按钮
ExtraFunctions:Button({
    Title = "检查工具",
    Callback = function()
        pcall(function()
            local player = game.Players.LocalPlayer
            local character = player.Character
            
            if character then
                local shovel = character:FindFirstChild("Shovel")
                if shovel then
                    local toolInfo = "工具: " .. shovel.Name
                    local isEquipped = "已装备"
                    
                    -- 检查工具状态
                    local pileCount = player:GetAttribute("PileCount") or 0
                    local isDigging = player:GetAttribute("IsDigging") or false
                    
                    toolInfo = toolInfo .. "\n状态: " .. isEquipped
                    toolInfo = toolInfo .. "\n剩余堆数: " .. pileCount
                    toolInfo = toolInfo .. "\n正在挖掘: " .. (isDigging and "是" or "否")
                    
                    WindUI:Notify({
                        Title = "工具信息",
                        Content = toolInfo,
                        Duration = 5
                    })
                else
                    WindUI:Notify({
                        Title = "工具检查",
                        Content = "未装备铲子",
                        Duration = 3
                    })
                end
            end
        end)
    end
})
end)
server2:Button("隐藏或死亡", function()
local WindUI = loadstring(game:HttpGet("https://github.com/Footagesus/WindUI/releases/latest/download/main.lua"))()

local Window = WindUI:CreateWindow({
    Title = "隐藏或死亡",
    Icon = "crown",
    IconThemed = true,
    Author = "tubers93脚本",
    Folder = "CloudHub",
    Size = UDim2.fromOffset(300, 270),
    Transparent = true,
    Theme = "Dark",
    User = {
        Enabled = true,
        Callback = function()
            print("clicked")
        end,
        Anonymous = false
    },
    SideBarWidth = 200,
    HideSearchBar = true,
    ScrollBarEnabled = true,
})

Window:EditOpenButton({
    Title = "tubers93脚本",
    Icon = "image-upscale",
    CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 10),
    StrokeThickness = 3,
    Color = ColorSequence.new(Color3.fromHex("FF0F7B"), Color3.fromHex("F89B29"))
})
local OvO = game.Players
local O_O = OvO.LocalPlayer
local OAO = O_O.Character
local camera = workspace.CurrentCamera

local ESP = {
    "HiderESPFloder",
    "SeekerESPFloder",
}
for _,v in ipairs(ESP) do
    if not workspace:FindFirstChild(v) then
        local ESPFloder = Instance.new("Folder")
        ESPFloder.Parent = workspace
        ESPFloder.Name = v
    end
end

local function ESPHider(Text, Adornee, Color)
    if not Adornee:FindFirstChild("ROLESPBillboardGui") then
        local ROLESPBillboardGui = Instance.new("BillboardGui")
        ROLESPBillboardGui.Parent = workspace.HiderESPFloder
        ROLESPBillboardGui.Adornee = Adornee
        ROLESPBillboardGui.Size = UDim2.new(0, 20, 0, 20)
        ROLESPBillboardGui.StudsOffset = Vector3.new(0, 3, 0)
        ROLESPBillboardGui.AlwaysOnTop = true
        local ROLESPTextLabel = Instance.new("TextLabel")
        ROLESPTextLabel.Parent = ROLESPBillboardGui
        ROLESPTextLabel.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 1, 0)
        ROLESPTextLabel.BackgroundTransparency = 1
        ROLESPTextLabel.Text = Text
        ROLESPTextLabel.TextColor3 = Color
        ROLESPTextLabel.TextStrokeTransparency = 0.5
        ROLESPTextLabel.TextScaled = true
        ROLESPTextLabel.Name = "ROLESPBillboardGui"
    end
end

local function ESPSeeker(Text, Adornee, Color)
    if not Adornee:FindFirstChild("ROLESPBillboardGui") then
        local ROLESPBillboardGui = Instance.new("BillboardGui")
        ROLESPBillboardGui.Parent = workspace.SeekerESPFloder
        ROLESPBillboardGui.Adornee = Adornee
        ROLESPBillboardGui.Size = UDim2.new(0, 20, 0, 20)
        ROLESPBillboardGui.StudsOffset = Vector3.new(0, 3, 0)
        ROLESPBillboardGui.AlwaysOnTop = true
        local ROLESPTextLabel = Instance.new("TextLabel")
        ROLESPTextLabel.Parent = ROLESPBillboardGui
        ROLESPTextLabel.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 1, 0)
        ROLESPTextLabel.BackgroundTransparency = 1
        ROLESPTextLabel.Text = Text
        ROLESPTextLabel.TextColor3 = Color
        ROLESPTextLabel.TextStrokeTransparency = 0.5
        ROLESPTextLabel.TextScaled = true
        ROLESPTextLabel.Name = "ROLESPBillboardGui"
    end
end

local HideSeekTab = Window:Tab({Title = "躲猫猫游戏", Icon = "eye"})

local HideSeekFunctions = HideSeekTab:Section({Title = "主要功能"})

local AimTog = false
local AutoCollectCoins = false
local Noclip = false
local AlwaysSeeker = false

local hiderESPConnection
local seekerESPConnection

local aimThread = nil
local collectCoinsThread = nil
local noclipThread = nil
local alwaysSeekerThread = nil

HideSeekFunctions:Toggle({
    Title = "自瞄躲藏者",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(state)
        AimTog = state
        if state then
            aimThread = task.spawn(function()
                while AimTog do
                    task.wait(0.1)
                    pcall(function()
                        local closestPlayer = nil
                        local closestDistance = math.huge
                        local localCharacter = O_O.Character
                        
                        if localCharacter and localCharacter:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                            for _, v in ipairs(OvO:GetPlayers()) do
                                if v ~= O_O and v.Team and v.Team.Name == "Hider" then
                                    local character = v.Character
                                    if character and character:FindFirstChild("Humanoid") and character.Humanoid.Health > 0 then
                                        local humanoidRootPart = character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
                                        if humanoidRootPart then
                                            local distance = (localCharacter.HumanoidRootPart.Position - humanoidRootPart.Position).magnitude
                                            if distance < closestDistance then
                                                closestDistance = distance
                                                closestPlayer = character
                                            end
                                        end
                                    end
                                end
                            end
                            
                            if closestPlayer and closestPlayer:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                                camera.CFrame = CFrame.lookAt(camera.CFrame.p, closestPlayer.HumanoidRootPart.Position)
                            end
                        end
                    end)
                end
            end)
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "提示",
                Content = "自瞄躲藏者已开启",
                Duration = 3
            })
        else
            if aimThread then
                task.cancel(aimThread)
                aimThread = nil
            end
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "提示",
                Content = "自瞄躲藏者已关闭",
                Duration = 3
            })
        end
    end
})

HideSeekFunctions:Toggle({
    Title = "透视躲藏者",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(state)
        if state then
            if hiderESPConnection then 
                hiderESPConnection:Disconnect() 
                hiderESPConnection = nil
            end
            
            pcall(function()
                for _, v in ipairs(OvO:GetPlayers()) do
                    if v ~= O_O and v.Team and v.Team.Name == "Hider" then
                        local character = v.Character
                        if character then
                            ESPHider("躲藏者"..v.Name, character, Color3.new(0, 0, 1))
                        end
                    end
                end
                
                hiderESPConnection = game.Players.PlayerAdded:Connect(function(player)
                    task.wait(1)
                    if player.Team and player.Team.Name == "Hider" then
                        local character = player.Character
                        if character then
                            ESPHider("躲藏者"..player.Name, character, Color3.new(0, 0, 1))
                        end
                    end
                end)
            end)
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "提示",
                Content = "透视躲藏者已开启",
                Duration = 3
            })
        else
            if hiderESPConnection then 
                hiderESPConnection:Disconnect() 
                hiderESPConnection = nil
            end
            
            pcall(function()
                local hiderESP = workspace:FindFirstChild("HiderESPFloder")
                if hiderESP then
                    hiderESP:ClearAllChildren()
                end
            end)
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "提示",
                Content = "透视躲藏者已关闭",
                Duration = 3
            })
        end
    end
})

HideSeekFunctions:Toggle({
    Title = "透视搜查者",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(state)
        if state then
            if seekerESPConnection then 
                seekerESPConnection:Disconnect() 
                seekerESPConnection = nil
            end
            
            pcall(function()
                for _, v in ipairs(OvO:GetPlayers()) do
                    if v ~= O_O and v.Team and v.Team.Name == "Seeker" then
                        local character = v.Character
                        if character then
                            ESPSeeker("搜查者"..v.Name, character, Color3.new(1, 0, 0))
                        end
                    end
                end
                
                seekerESPConnection = game.Players.PlayerAdded:Connect(function(player)
                    task.wait(1)
                    if player.Team and player.Team.Name == "Seeker" then
                        local character = player.Character
                        if character then
                            ESPSeeker("搜查者"..player.Name, character, Color3.new(1, 0, 0))
                        end
                    end
                end)
            end)
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "提示",
                Content = "透视搜查者已开启",
                Duration = 3
            })
        else
            if seekerESPConnection then 
                seekerESPConnection:Disconnect() 
                seekerESPConnection = nil
            end
            
            pcall(function()
                local seekerESP = workspace:FindFirstChild("SeekerESPFloder")
                if seekerESP then
                    seekerESP:ClearAllChildren()
                end
            end)
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "提示",
                Content = "透视搜查者已关闭",
                Duration = 3
            })
        end
    end
})

HideSeekFunctions:Toggle({
    Title = "自动获取金币",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(state)
        AutoCollectCoins = state
        if state then
            collectCoinsThread = task.spawn(function()
                while AutoCollectCoins do
                    task.wait(0.1)
                    pcall(function()
                        local trash = workspace:FindFirstChild("Trash")
                        if trash then
                            local coins = trash:FindFirstChild("Coins")
                            if coins then
                                local character = O_O.Character
                                if character and character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                                    for _, v in ipairs(coins:GetChildren()) do
                                        local coin = v:FindFirstChild("Coin")
                                        if coin then
                                            firetouchinterest(coin, character.HumanoidRootPart, 0)
                                            firetouchinterest(coin, character.HumanoidRootPart, 1)
                                        end
                                    end
                                end
                            end
                        end
                    end)
                end
            end)
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "提示",
                Content = "自动获取金币已开启",
                Duration = 3
            })
        else
            if collectCoinsThread then
                task.cancel(collectCoinsThread)
                collectCoinsThread = nil
            end
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "提示",
                Content = "自动获取金币已关闭",
                Duration = 3
            })
        end
    end
})

HideSeekFunctions:Toggle({
    Title = "完成岛屿挑战",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(state)
        if state then
            pcall(function()
                local obby = workspace:FindFirstChild("Obby")
                if obby then
                    local pad = obby:FindFirstChild("Pad")
                    if pad then
                        local padPart = pad:FindFirstChild("Pad")
                        if padPart then
                            local character = O_O.Character
                            if character and character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                                firetouchinterest(padPart, character.HumanoidRootPart, 0)
                                firetouchinterest(padPart, character.HumanoidRootPart, 1)
                            end
                        end
                    end
                end
            end)
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "提示",
                Content = "已尝试完成岛屿挑战",
                Duration = 3
            })
        end
    end
})

HideSeekFunctions:Toggle({
    Title = "穿墙",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(state)
        Noclip = state
        if state then
            noclipThread = task.spawn(function()
                while Noclip do
                    task.wait(0.1)
                    pcall(function()
                        local character = O_O.Character
                        if character then
                            for _, part in pairs(character:GetDescendants()) do
                                if part:IsA("BasePart") then
                                    part.CanCollide = false
                                end
                            end
                        end
                    end)
                end
                
                pcall(function()
                    local character = O_O.Character
                    if character then
                        for _, part in pairs(character:GetDescendants()) do
                            if part:IsA("BasePart") then
                                part.CanCollide = true
                            end
                        end
                    end
                end)
            end)
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "提示",
                Content = "穿墙已开启",
                Duration = 3
            })
        else
            if noclipThread then
                task.cancel(noclipThread)
                noclipThread = nil
            end
            
            pcall(function()
                local character = O_O.Character
                if character then
                    for _, part in pairs(character:GetDescendants()) do
                        if part:IsA("BasePart") then
                            part.CanCollide = true
                        end
                    end
                end
            end)
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "提示",
                Content = "穿墙已关闭",
                Duration = 3
            })
        end
    end
})

HideSeekFunctions:Toggle({
    Title = "永远成为搜查者",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(state)
        AlwaysSeeker = state
        if state then
            alwaysSeekerThread = task.spawn(function()
                while AlwaysSeeker do
                    task.wait(0.1)
                    pcall(function()
                        local playerGui = O_O.PlayerGui
                        if playerGui then
                            local frames = playerGui:FindFirstChild("Frames")
                            if frames then
                                local roleReveal = frames:FindFirstChild("role_reveal")
                                if roleReveal then
                                    local seekerChance = roleReveal:FindFirstChild("seeker_chance")
                                    if seekerChance and seekerChance.TextTransparency ~= 1 then
                                        local role = roleReveal:FindFirstChild("role")
                                        if role then
                                            local seeker = role:FindFirstChild("Seeker")
                                            local hider = role:FindFirstChild("Hider")
                                            if seeker then seeker.Visible = true end
                                            if hider then hider.Visible = false end
                                        end
                                    end
                                    seekerChance.Text = "Chance to be seeker: 100%"
                                end
                            end
                        end
                        
                        if not O_O.Team or O_O.Team.Name == "Hider" then
                            local replicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
                            local network = replicatedStorage:FindFirstChild("Network")
                            if network then
                                local match = network:FindFirstChild("match")
                                if match then
                                    local wantsToJoinMatch = match:FindFirstChild("WantsToJoinMatch")
                                    if wantsToJoinMatch then
                                        wantsToJoinMatch:FireServer()
                                    end
                                end
                            end
                            local teams = game:GetService("Teams")
                            local seekerTeam = teams:FindFirstChild("Seeker")
                            if seekerTeam then
                                O_O.Team = seekerTeam
                            end
                        end
                    end)
                end
            end)
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "提示",
                Content = "永远成为搜查者已开启",
                Duration = 3
            })
        else
            if alwaysSeekerThread then
                task.cancel(alwaysSeekerThread)
                alwaysSeekerThread = nil
            end
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "提示",
                Content = "永远成为搜查者已关闭",
                Duration = 3
            })
        end
    end
})

local AttackFunctions = HideSeekTab:Section({Title = "攻击功能"})

AttackFunctions:Button({
    Title = "攻击所有玩家",
    Callback = function()
        pcall(function()
            local replicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
            local network = replicatedStorage:FindFirstChild("Network")
            if network then
                local knife = network:FindFirstChild("knife")
                if knife then
                    local slash = knife:FindFirstChild("slash")
                    if slash then
                        for _, player in ipairs(game.Players:GetPlayers()) do
                            if player ~= O_O then
                                local character = player.Character
                                if character then
                                    local humanoid = character:FindFirstChild("Humanoid")
                                    local pivot = character:GetPivot()
                                    local weapon = O_O.Character:FindFirstChild("Secondary") or O_O.Backpack:FindFirstChild("Secondary")
                                    
                                    if weapon and humanoid and pivot then
                                        for i = 1, 4 do
                                            slash:FireServer(
                                                workspace:GetServerTimeNow(),
                                                weapon,
                                                pivot,
                                                humanoid
                                            )
                                        end
                                    end
                                end
                            end
                        end
                        WindUI:Notify({
                            Title = "攻击完成",
                            Content = "已攻击所有玩家",
                            Duration = 3
                        })
                    end
                end
            end
        end)
    end
})
end)

local WindUI = loadstring(game:HttpGet("https://github.com/Footagesus/WindUI/releases/latest/download/main.lua"))()

local Window = WindUI:CreateWindow({
    Title = "Rope battles",
    Icon = "crown",
    IconThemed = true,
    Author = "tubers93脚本",
    Folder = "CloudHub",
    Size = UDim2.fromOffset(300, 270),
    Transparent = true,
    Theme = "Dark",
    User = {
        Enabled = true,
        Callback = function()
            print("clicked")
        end,
        Anonymous = false
    },
    SideBarWidth = 200,
    HideSearchBar = true,
    ScrollBarEnabled = true,
})

Window:EditOpenButton({
    Title = "tubers93脚本",
    Icon = "image-upscale",
    CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 10),
    StrokeThickness = 3,
    Color = ColorSequence.new(Color3.fromHex("FF0F7B"), Color3.fromHex("F89B29"))
})
local IslandTab = Window:Tab({Title = "岛屿生存", Icon = "island"})

local IslandFunctions = IslandTab:Section({Title = "岛屿功能"})

local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local plr = Players.LocalPlayer
local plot = nil
local land = nil
local resources = nil
local expand = nil

-- 初始化地块
local function initializePlot()
    pcall(function()
        local workspacePlots = workspace:FindFirstChild("Plots")
        if workspacePlots then
            plot = workspacePlots:WaitForChild(plr.Name)
            if plot then
                land = plot:FindFirstChild("Land")
                resources = plot:WaitForChild("Resources")
                expand = plot:WaitForChild("Expand")
            end
        end
    end)
end

-- 初始化设置表
getgenv().settings = {
    farm = false,
    expand = false,
    craft = false,
    sell = false,
    gold = false,
    collect = false,
    harvest = false,
    hive = false,
    auto_buy = false
}

-- 延迟设置
local expand_delay = 0.1
local craft_delay = 0.1

-- 尝试初始化地块
initializePlot()

-- 玩家地块变化监听
if plr then
    plr.CharacterAdded:Connect(function()
        task.wait(2)
        initializePlot()
    end)
end

-- 自动挥舞
local farmThread = nil
IslandFunctions:Toggle({
    Title = "自动挥舞",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(state)
        settings.farm = state
        if state then
            farmThread = task.spawn(function()
                while settings.farm do
                    pcall(function()
                        if resources then
                            for _, r in ipairs(resources:GetChildren()) do
                                local communication = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage"):FindFirstChild("Communication")
                                if communication then
                                    local hitResource = communication:FindFirstChild("HitResource")
                                    if hitResource then
                                        hitResource:FireServer(r)
                                    end
                                end
                                task.wait(0.01)
                            end
                        end
                    end)
                    task.wait(0.1)
                end
            end)
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "提示",
                Content = "自动挥舞已开启",
                Duration = 3
            })
        else
            if farmThread then
                task.cancel(farmThread)
                farmThread = nil
            end
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "提示",
                Content = "自动挥舞已关闭",
                Duration = 3
            })
        end
    end
})

-- 自动建造岛屿
local expandThread = nil
IslandFunctions:Toggle({
    Title = "自动建造岛屿",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(state)
        settings.expand = state
        if state then
            expandThread = task.spawn(function()
                while settings.expand do
                    pcall(function()
                        if expand then
                            for _, exp in ipairs(expand:GetChildren()) do
                                local top = exp:FindFirstChild("Top")
                                if top then
                                    local bGui = top:FindFirstChild("BillboardGui")
                                    if bGui then
                                        for _, contribute in ipairs(bGui:GetChildren()) do
                                            if contribute:IsA("Frame") and contribute.Name ~= "Example" then
                                                local communication = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage"):FindFirstChild("Communication")
                                                if communication then
                                                    local contributeToExpand = communication:FindFirstChild("ContributeToExpand")
                                                    if contributeToExpand then
                                                        local args = {
                                                            exp.Name,
                                                            contribute.Name,
                                                            1
                                                        }
                                                        contributeToExpand:FireServer(unpack(args))
                                                    end
                                                end
                                            end
                                        end
                                    end
                                end
                                task.wait(0.01)
                            end
                        end
                    end)
                    task.wait(expand_delay)
                end
            end)
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "提示",
                Content = "自动建造岛屿已开启",
                Duration = 3
            })
        else
            if expandThread then
                task.cancel(expandThread)
                expandThread = nil
            end
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "提示",
                Content = "自动建造岛屿已关闭",
                Duration = 3
            })
        end
    end
})

-- 自动制造
local craftThread = nil
IslandFunctions:Toggle({
    Title = "自动制造",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(state)
        settings.craft = state
        if state then
            craftThread = task.spawn(function()
                while settings.craft do
                    pcall(function()
                        if plot then
                            for _, c in pairs(plot:GetDescendants()) do
                                if c.Name == "Crafter" then
                                    local attachment = c:FindFirstChildOfClass("Attachment")
                                    if attachment then
                                        local communication = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage"):FindFirstChild("Communication")
                                        if communication then
                                            local craftRemote = communication:FindFirstChild("Craft")
                                            if craftRemote then
                                                craftRemote:FireServer(attachment)
                                            end
                                        end
                                    end
                                end
                            end
                        end
                    end)
                    task.wait(craft_delay)
                end
            end)
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "提示",
                Content = "自动制造已开启",
                Duration = 3
            })
        else
            if craftThread then
                task.cancel(craftThread)
                craftThread = nil
            end
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "提示",
                Content = "自动制造已关闭",
                Duration = 3
            })
        end
    end
})

    Default = false,

                                        local goldmineRemote = communication:FindFirstChild("Goldmine")

                                            goldmineRemote:FireServer(mine.Parent.Name, 1)
                                        end
                                    end
                                end
                            end
                        end

                end
            end)

                                            local a = {

                                                    crop:GetAttribute("Hash")
                                                }
                                            }
                                            sellRemote:FireServer(unpack(a))
                                        end
                                    end
                                end
                            end
                        end
                    end)
                    task.wait(1)
                end
            end)
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "提示",

                Duration = 3

                task.cancel(sellThread)
                sellThread = nil

                Title = "提示",

-- 获取可购买物品列表
local items = {}
local function updateItemsList()
    items = {}
    pcall(function()
        local playerGui = plr.PlayerGui
        if playerGui then
            local main = playerGui:FindFirstChild("Main")
            if main then
                local menus = main:FindFirstChild("Menus")
                if menus then
                    local merchant = menus:FindFirstChild("Merchant")
                    if merchant then
                        local inner = merchant:FindFirstChild("Inner")
                        if inner then
                            local scrollingFrame = inner:FindFirstChild("ScrollingFrame")
                            if scrollingFrame then
                                local hold = scrollingFrame:FindFirstChild("Hold")
                                if hold then
                                    for _, item in ipairs(hold:GetChildren()) do
                                        if item:IsA("Frame") and item.Name ~= "Example" then
                                            table.insert(items, item.Name)
                                        end
                                    end
                                end
                            end
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    end)
end

-- 初始化物品列表
task.spawn(updateItemsList)

-- 选择的物品
local selectedItem = nil

-- 物品选择下拉菜单
IslandFunctions:Dropdown({
    Title = "选择物品",
    Values = items,
    Default = items[1] or "",
    Callback = function(value)
        selectedItem = value
        WindUI:Notify({
            Title = "物品选择",
            Content = "已选择: " .. (value or "无"),
            Duration = 3
        })
    end
})

-- 购买物品按钮
IslandFunctions:Button({
    Title = "购买物品",
    Callback = function()
        if selectedItem then
            pcall(function()
                local communication = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage"):FindFirstChild("Communication")
                if communication then
                    local buyRemote = communication:FindFirstChild("BuyFromMerchant")
                    if buyRemote then
                        local a = {
                            selectedItem,
                            false
                        }
                        buyRemote:FireServer(unpack(a))
                        WindUI:Notify({
                            Title = "购买成功",
                            Content = "已购买: " .. selectedItem,
                            Duration = 3
                        })
                    end
                end
            end)
        else
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "购买失败",
                Content = "请先选择物品",
                Duration = 3
            })
        end
    end
})

-- 自动购买物品
local autoBuyThread = nil
IslandFunctions:Toggle({
    Title = "自动购买物品",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(state)
        settings.auto_buy = state
        if state then
            autoBuyThread = task.spawn(function()
                while settings.auto_buy do
                    if selectedItem then
                        pcall(function()
                            local communication = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage"):FindFirstChild("Communication")
                            if communication then
                                local buyRemote = communication:FindFirstChild("BuyFromMerchant")
                                if buyRemote then
                                    local a = {
                                        selectedItem,
                                        false
                                    }
                                    buyRemote:FireServer(unpack(a))
                                end
                            end
                        end)
                    end
                    task.wait(0.25)
                end
            end)
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "提示",
                Content = "自动购买物品已开启",
                Duration = 3
            })
        else
            if autoBuyThread then
                task.cancel(autoBuyThread)
                autoBuyThread = nil
            end
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "提示",
                Content = "自动购买物品已关闭",
                Duration = 3
            })
        end
    end
})

            Duration = 3
        })
    end
})

-- 建造间隔输入框
IslandFunctions:Textbox({
    Title = "建造间隔(秒)",
    Default = "0.1",
    Callback = function(text)
        local num = tonumber(text)
        if num and num > 0 then
            expand_delay = num
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "设置成功",
                Content = "建造间隔已设置为: " .. text .. " 秒",
                Duration = 3
            })
        else
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "设置失败",
                Content = "请输入有效的数字",
                Duration = 3
            })
        end
    end
})

-- 制造间隔输入框
IslandFunctions:Textbox({
    Title = "制造间隔(秒)",
    Default = "0.1",
    Callback = function(text)
        local num = tonumber(text)
        if num and num > 0 then
            craft_delay = num
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "设置成功",
                Content = "制造间隔已设置为: " .. text .. " 秒",
                Duration = 3
            })
        else
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "设置失败",
                Content = "请输入有效的数字",
                Duration = 3
            })
        end
    end
})
end)

local WindUI = loadstring(game:HttpGet("https://github.com/Footagesus/WindUI/releases/latest/download/main.lua"))()

    Icon = "image-upscale",
    CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 10),
    StrokeThickness = 3,
    Color = ColorSequence.new(Color3.fromHex("FF0F7B"), Color3.fromHex("F89B29"))
})

local ZombieSurvivalTab = Window:Tab({Title = "僵尸生存", Icon = "skull"})
local ZombieFunctions = ZombieSurvivalTab:Section({Title = "基础功能"})

-- 使用独立的变量来控制每个功能
local states = {
    monsterWaveESP = false,
    monsterMapESP = false,
    skipDay = false,
    autoMoney = false,
    autoSurvivors = false,
    autoFire = false,
    autoCreate = false,
    autoPotup = false,
    autoCollection = false,
    killAura = false,
    killAll = false,
    autoHit = false
}

local AttackDistance = 10

-- 保存线程引用
local threads = {}

ZombieFunctions:Toggle({
    Title = "透视怪物浪潮",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(state)
        states.monsterWaveESP = state
        if state then
            if threads.monsterWave then
                threads.monsterWave:Disconnect()
                threads.monsterWave = nil
            end
            
            pcall(function()
                local waveZombies = workspace:FindFirstChild("WaveZombies")
                if waveZombies then
                    for i, v in ipairs(waveZombies:GetChildren()) do
                        if v:IsA("Model") and not v:FindFirstChild("BillboardGui") then
                            local billboard = Instance.new("BillboardGui")
                            billboard.Parent = v
                            billboard.Adornee = v
                            billboard.Size = UDim2.new(0, 20, 0, 20)
                            billboard.StudsOffset = Vector3.new(0, 3, 0)
                            billboard.AlwaysOnTop = true

                            local nameLabel = Instance.new("TextLabel")
                            nameLabel.Parent = billboard
                            nameLabel.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 1, 0)
                            nameLabel.BackgroundTransparency = 1
                            nameLabel.Text = v.Name
                            nameLabel.TextColor3 = Color3.new(1, 0, 0)
                            nameLabel.TextStrokeTransparency = 0.5
                            nameLabel.TextScaled = true
                        end
                    end

                    threads.monsterWave = waveZombies.ChildAdded:Connect(function(Monster)
                        if Monster:IsA("Model") and states.monsterWaveESP then
                            task.wait()
                            if not Monster:FindFirstChild("BillboardGui") then
                                local billboard = Instance.new("BillboardGui")
                                billboard.Parent = Monster
                                billboard.Adornee = Monster
                                billboard.Size = UDim2.new(0, 20, 0, 20)
                                billboard.StudsOffset = Vector3.new(0, 3, 0)
                                billboard.AlwaysOnTop = true

                                local nameLabel = Instance.new("TextLabel")
                                nameLabel.Parent = billboard
                                nameLabel.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 1, 0)
                                nameLabel.BackgroundTransparency = 1
                                nameLabel.Text = Monster.Name
                                nameLabel.TextColor3 = Color3.new(1, 0, 0)
                                nameLabel.TextStrokeTransparency = 0.5
                                nameLabel.TextScaled = true
                            end
                        end
                    end)
                end
            end)
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "提示",
                Content = "透视怪物浪潮已开启",
                Duration = 3
            })
        else
            if threads.monsterWave then
                threads.monsterWave:Disconnect()
                threads.monsterWave = nil
            end

            pcall(function()
                local waveZombies = workspace:FindFirstChild("WaveZombies")
                if waveZombies then
                    for i, v in ipairs(waveZombies:GetChildren()) do
                        if v:FindFirstChild("BillboardGui") then
                            v.BillboardGui:Destroy()
                        end
                    end
                end
            end)
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "提示",
                Content = "透视怪物浪潮已关闭",
                Duration = 3
            })
        end
    end
})

ZombieFunctions:Toggle({
    Title = "透视地图怪物",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(state)
        states.monsterMapESP = state
        if state then
            if threads.monsterMap then
                threads.monsterMap:Disconnect()
                threads.monsterMap = nil
            end
            
            pcall(function()
                local mapZombies = workspace:FindFirstChild("MapZombies")
                if mapZombies then
                    for i, v in ipairs(mapZombies:GetChildren()) do
                        if v:IsA("Model") and not v:FindFirstChild("BillboardGui") then
                            local billboard = Instance.new("BillboardGui")
                            billboard.Parent = v
                            billboard.Adornee = v
                            billboard.Size = UDim2.new(0, 20, 0, 20)
                            billboard.StudsOffset = Vector3.new(0, 3, 0)

                            nameLabel.TextColor3 = Color3.new(1, 0, 0)

                Duration = 3
            })
        end
    end
})

                        local events = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage"):FindFirstChild("Events")
                        if events then
                            local skipDayEvent = events:FindFirstChild("SkipDay")

                                skipDayEvent:FireServer()
                            end
                        end
                    end)
                end
            end)
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "提示",
                Content = "自动跳过一天已开启",

ZombieFunctions:Toggle({
    Title = "自动创建石头",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(state)
        states.autoCreate = state
        if state then
            threads.autoCreate = task.spawn(function()
                while states.autoCreate do
                    task.wait()
                    pcall(function()
                        local player = game.Players.LocalPlayer
                        local character = player.Character
                        if character and character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                            local events = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage"):FindFirstChild("Events")
                            if events then
                                local createItemEvent = events:FindFirstChild("CreateItem")
                                if createItemEvent then
                                    createItemEvent:FireServer(
                                        "stone1",
                                        CFrame.new(
                                            character.HumanoidRootPart.Position.X,
                                            character.HumanoidRootPart.Position.Y,
                                            character.HumanoidRootPart.Position.Z
                                        ) * CFrame.Angles(0, 0, 0),
                                        0.5
                                    )
                                end
                            end
                        end
                    end)
                end
            end)
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "提示",
                Content = "自动创建石头已开启",
                Duration = 3
            })
        else
            if threads.autoCreate then
                task.cancel(threads.autoCreate)
                threads.autoCreate = nil
            end
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "提示",
                Content = "自动创建石头已关闭",
                Duration = 3
            })
        end
    end
})

ZombieFunctions:Toggle({
    Title = "自动招募幸存者",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(state)
        states.autoPotup = state
        if state then
            threads.autoPotup = task.spawn(function()
                while states.autoPotup do
                    task.wait()
                    pcall(function()
                        local player = game.Players.LocalPlayer
                        local character = player.Character
                        if character and character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                            local humans = workspace:FindFirstChild("Humans")
                            if humans then
                                for _, v in ipairs(humans:GetChildren()) do
                                    if v.Name == "survivor" then
                                        local head = v:FindFirstChild("Head")
                                        if head then
                                            local popUp = head:FindFirstChild("popUp")
                                            if popUp then
                                                local proximityPrompt = popUp:FindFirstChild("ProximityPrompt")
                                                if proximityPrompt then
                                                    character:MoveTo(character.HumanoidRootPart.Position + Vector3.new(0, 0, -2))
                                                    fireproximityprompt(proximityPrompt)
                                                end
                                            end
                                        end
                                    end
                                end
                            end
                        end
                    end)
                end
            end)
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "提示",
                Content = "自动招募幸存者已开启",
                Duration = 3
            })
        else
            if threads.autoPotup then
                task.cancel(threads.autoPotup)
                threads.autoPotup = nil
            end
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "提示",
                Content = "自动招募幸存者已关闭",
                Duration = 3
            })
        end
    end
})

    Title = "自动收集",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(state)
        states.autoCollection = state
        if state then
            threads.autoCollection = task.spawn(function()
                while states.autoCollection do
                    task.wait()

                        local player = game.Players.LocalPlayer
                        local character = player.Character
                        if character and character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                            local items = workspace:FindFirstChild("Items")
                            if items then
                                for _, v in ipairs(items:GetChildren()) do
                                    v:PivotTo(CFrame.new(character.HumanoidRootPart.Position))
                                end
                            end
                        end
                    end)
                end
            end)
            WindUI:Notify({
                Title = "提示",
                Content = "自动收集已开启",
                Duration = 3
            })

                task.cancel(threads.autoCollection)
                threads.autoCollection = nil

                Duration = 3
